google_reviews.text: I really like this place, all dishes looks delicious, I recommend reservation for dinning, as a Vegan I always go to the back of their menu and order their 3 side dishes. The combination is delicious, but they could add few vegan options.

google_reviews.author: Simon Bernard
google_reviews.text: We went there because we live nearby and only have positive things to say about this place. The food was delicious, the atmosphere is cozy and our waiter was very friendly and ready to assist if we needed something. Had shrimp tartare for the first time ever and it was top!

google_reviews.author: Tommaso Singer
google_reviews.text:
I was thrilled with my first visit! The food was authentically Italian and simply delicious. The service was attentive and warm; I immediately felt welcome. The price was absolutely justified.

I will definitely be back.

google_reviews.author: Andreea Turay
google_reviews.text: Excellent, I ate divinely. The chef, the staff, and the owner were all incredibly kind and, above all, attentive. For the little one, I ordered something off the menu and they were incredibly kind. I'll definitely be back! Excellent cuisine!

google_reviews.author: Admir Djulan
google_reviews.text: Driven by curiosity, we decided to try the restaurant's organic pizza. It's tasty, light, and crispy, and highly recommended. The service is very friendly and attentive, the tables are elegant, and the atmosphere is pleasant.

google_reviews.author: Christoph
google_reviews.text:
My girlfriend and I spontaneously decided to stop by for dinner tonight. We were curious because the restaurant only recently opened in our neighborhood.

Let's just say... we were both very satisfied! The food was delicious and exactly what we liked – typically Italian. The staff was exceptionally friendly, attentive, and helpful.

We'll definitely be back!

google_reviews.author: Stephanie Ratsamy
google_reviews.text: This is my favortie Kebab shop in all of Graz! Super clean environment, and really nice owners! Great food, and good prices!

google_reviews.author: Anil Tilanthe
google_reviews.text:
Expensive place. The food doesn't match the pricing. The guy serving was not friendly either.

Just walk to Spar or Billa

google_reviews.author: Andreas Ortmayr
google_reviews.text: Very good quality! They make their own bread.

google_reviews.author: karthik “karthikntpatrick” bhat
google_reviews.text: Great kebap place near the university, friendly staff

google_reviews.author: Pedro Boechat
google_reviews.text: Good kebap, friendly staff. Usually empty (+1).

google_reviews.author: vandini modi
google_reviews.text: Very clean, vegan and vegetarian friendly place with one of the best falafels. It also has 8 flavours of hummus and all are yum. Strongly recommend this place.

google_reviews.author: Seb S
google_reviews.text: The portion was a bit smaller than expected but the taste and quality of the food more than made up for it! I had the wrap and when I finished it I came straight back for a second serving and both were some of the most delicious street food I have ever eaten. The owner is very friendly and gave some good recommendations. Would come again!

google_reviews.author: Patrick
google_reviews.text:
Delicious food! Falafel bowl was amazing. The hummus is the best hummus I've ever had. We went back multiple times to this place and the food was 10/10 every time. Everything was so full of flavor. Try the chipotle hummus and the freshest bread ever.

The staff is absolutely the nicest people I've met in all of vienna. Thank you for the incredible bowls ♥️

If you're visiting vienna, you absolutely need to come try this place.

google_reviews.author: kaiwen yeo
google_reviews.text:
Really lovely chicken pita! Walked past and was attracted by their poster outside the store. Went in as they just opened, place was still empty. Chicken pita was generously filled and portion was enough for me. Flavors were amazing, something I’ve never had before!
Best of all, the owners (I assume) were friendly  :)

google_reviews.author: Yelyzaveta Y
google_reviews.text: The food was fresh and the restaurant seemed clean. I was pleasantly surprised by the wide selection of hummus varieties and genuinely impressed by the depth of flavour in each dish. The service was warm and attentive. This spot is precisely what the heart of Vienna needed!

google_reviews.author: Sapir
google_reviews.text:
We were hypnotized by the smell
But-
I took the vegeterian tofu dish which was less tasty / flavored than the typical chicken dish.
I couldn't communicate vc of the language:/

google_reviews.author: Manisha Choudhary
google_reviews.text:
I have tried veg fried rice which was quite decent, a bit of sweet flavour. My husband took chili chicken which came along with some white rice. The chicken pieces weren't fresh and he didn't like the gravy as well.
The lady was very kind to warm up the meals. Also there are a lot of vegetarian options which looked quite tempting, although I haven't tasted them all. They have a few tables where you can stand and enjoy your meal. Accepts only cash.

google_reviews.author: Emma B
google_reviews.text: Very nice street food. I recommend trying it.  They have a good range of different types of dishes. There are high tables to eat standing, and it's all clean. Also very good price. 👍🏼

google_reviews.author: Budmil Budapest
google_reviews.text:
At rice pots by MayKay you get what you paid for which is not much.

The dishes have the right names and the quantity is generous but the food has little to do with the name of the dish, ie the so called "mapo tofu" tasted like tofu in a tomato sauce minus the ingredients that should be present in mapo.

They have a large variety of dishes and so they are cooked in large pots which means there is a good chance your food will be cold and if (like me) you don't like to have your food microwaved there is an 80% chance you will eat it cold or if you are lucky lukewarm.

google_reviews.author: Sa Wol
google_reviews.text:
The bulgoki was fabulous 😍 You get rice as a side dish to every meal, and they heat the food for you.
Plenty to eat for less than €10!
Sadly, you can only pay with cash, but there's a bank nearby with ATMs.
You eat the food at the standing tables in front of the food stall or take it away. Nice & clean place.

The food is delicious and the staff is very kind!

google_reviews.author: Peter Varun D'souza
google_reviews.text: Good place for Spanish tapas

google_reviews.author: Christine F.
google_reviews.text: Top!

google_reviews.author: Markus Le
google_reviews.text:
For me, this is the tapas place in Graz. Authentic, beautifully decorated, and fabulous food. The hosts are all welcoming, and you won't miss a thing! The beer is a tasty change from our Austrian beers. All in all, "the place" with a market flair and, at the same time, a holiday feeling in the heart of Graz.

It was really good, and I can only recommend it to anyone who enjoys tasting food. 5/5 🌟

google_reviews.author: Marie-Therese Prein
google_reviews.text:
A true gem – from the first to the last second, everything was simply perfect. The atmosphere is authentic and cozy, the staff warm and attentive, and the food... simply divine!

The aioli is particularly noteworthy – I've never tasted better! Creamy and simply irresistible. The tapas were all fresh, subtly seasoned, and prepared with love. Whether it was patatas bravas, gambas al ajillo, or jamón ibérico – every dish was a delight.

Add to that a great wine selection, and an all-around perfect experience was guaranteed. Anyone looking for authentic, high-quality tapas should definitely not miss this restaurant. I will definitely be back!

google_reviews.author: Julia Binder
google_reviews.text:
The tapas are amazing!
Produce is imported directly from Mallorca or sourced from local farmers at the Kaiser Josef Market. Everything is cooked fresh daily, and it tastes simply delicious. The selection is amazing, and the most impressive thing is the top-notch quality, as well as the very, very high-quality olive oil. 🫒🫒
If you want a true Spanish experience, you should definitely go!
The owners are very motivated and hardworking.
We'll definitely be back! 🇪🇸🦐🍷

google_reviews.author: Juergen Jankovits
google_reviews.text:
great variety also local sounding flavours, eg. apple, grape
ice cream tasted quite good, worth trying
didn't visit the ice cream show production and exploration section

google_reviews.author: Driving Fun & Family Car reviews
google_reviews.text: A little overrated; it's good but it could be better.

google_reviews.author: Amy Loren
google_reviews.text: Wonderful!!!

google_reviews.author: peter delephont
google_reviews.text: Super 🍨

google_reviews.author: DJ Traxx
google_reviews.text: Good but mit cheap

google_reviews.author: Norah Sztojka
google_reviews.text: The most prominent flavour is that of burnt oil, at least in the fried noodles which are also dry and greasy. The sechuan duck is somewhat better, it has actual sauce on it, even though the meat is a little overcooked.

google_reviews.author: Franz iii (2 Takt Frisör)
google_reviews.text: Really good food, was enjoyable, thank you

google_reviews.author: david gfrerer
google_reviews.text: Worst sushi I've ever eaten. I threw up after just one bite. So disgusting, I still have that awful taste in my mouth three days later. They should be shut down. I ordered it through Foodora.

google_reviews.author: Michael Wimmer
google_reviews.text:
Honestly, I've rarely ordered such bad food.

We also made the mistake of ordering through the website. While the order itself works, you don't hear anything after that and are left to wait helplessly. After a really long wait, we called. The woman was clearly stressed and very unfriendly. Most importantly, the information that the food was already on its way was incorrect. At least we received a call later to clarify the error; the food was now "already" being cooked (after almost 40 minutes).

And the food? Partly okay, partly bordering on inedible. The pasta, in particular, was almost impossible to swallow; let's not even talk about enjoyment.

Two stars because at least the ordered dishes were delivered and the error was corrected proactively during the phone call.

google_reviews.author: Moritz Hofbauer
google_reviews.text: I ordered food from here via Foodora. After quite some time, something finally arrived. Half of it was missing. The mini spring rolls came without any packaging and were just crumpled up in aluminum foil and almost inedible. The duck tasted like they'd put last week's leftovers in the microwave for a minute. Two hours after I'd finished eating, the sweet and sour chicken arrived, but without any sauce, rice, vegetables, or anything else. They could have kept it, though, because no one would have eaten it anyway. I've ordered food probably over 200 times in the last few years, and this was the first time I felt compelled to write a review because the food was so bad!

google_reviews.author: Wolfgang Gschweitl
google_reviews.text: Not recommended. Service is very poor. You're only ever accosted by other guests. Poor hygiene.

google_reviews.author: Sabine Goger
google_reviews.text: A pub dating back to the 1960s, and the decor is still from that era. We were a group and couldn't get anything to drink at 7:30 pm. The elderly owner, with her few small dogs, has her principles; when she's had enough, that's it. However, there's also a young waiter who is very attentive and friendly. Parking is available, and it's wheelchair accessible.

google_reviews.author: v z
google_reviews.text: A cult restaurant in the heart of Graz! Marianne and her daughter take perfect care of every guest! We always love coming back and hope the restaurant stays around forever!

google_reviews.author: Leo Bernsteiner
google_reviews.text: Thanks for the raw burger and the half-cooked potatoes

google_reviews.author: Erika Salzbauer
google_reviews.text: I personally find it very good 👍 friendly and nice

google_reviews.author: Dan J
google_reviews.text:
I have visited about 95% of pizzerias in Graz, and I can confidently say this is in the absolute Top 2 when it comes to the pizza itself — truly excellent. Unfortunately, I am rating the restaurant as a whole, and that is where the problems start.

The service is poor, to say the least — unfriendly, impolite, and very often makes mistakes with orders. Almost every time I ask for lemonade or juice without ice, I still get it with ice. Even after explaining that I have throat issues and can’t drink cold beverages, nothing changes. On top of that, the drinks themselves (lemonades, juices) taste watered down — I’m not saying they are, but the taste is definitely weak.

In the evenings, the outdoor seating area has absolutely no lighting, so you can hardly see what you’re eating.

To sum it up: excellent pizza, but the overall restaurant experience leaves a lot to be desired.

google_reviews.author: Mehdi TEHRANI
google_reviews.text: Great real Italian food. Very good service. Must visit in Geaz

google_reviews.author: Mahdiyar N.H.Gilani
google_reviews.text:
Great authentic original Italian pizza. My Italian friends also say this is probably the best Italian Pizzeria in Graz. The ingredients used are very good quality and there are a few good vegetarian and pescaterian options available. The only two things I could suggest is having an English menu available and potentially (depending on their customer base) having a few halal meat options available too.
Overall, very good food and service!

google_reviews.author: Gerhard K.
google_reviews.text: always good, and they are not afraid to cater larger tables :)

google_reviews.author: Neil Graham
google_reviews.text:
Looking for an amazing pizza, then look not further. One of the best pizza’s I have had outside of Italy. Well done guys
One star off as the salad’s where lacking but you should only go here if you want best in class pizza 🍕🍕🍕

google_reviews.author: Pa Lu
google_reviews.text: If you're looking for a refreshment stop along the Mur Cycle Path with friendly staff, excellent service, and quality food, this is the place for you. A cozy and quiet garden invites you to linger, reasonable prices, and a very dedicated team. See you soon.

google_reviews.author: Schubsti 74
google_reviews.text: Great cafe with a lovely atmosphere right on the bike path, excellent service, a beautiful outdoor seating area, and a friendly owner... Keep it up! 👍👍👍

google_reviews.author: Manfred Spreitzhofer
google_reviews.text: Very nice café. Very friendly service. Nice customers. Very good atmosphere.

google_reviews.author: Gerhard Eichler
google_reviews.text: A very pleasant place. Very friendly service. Excellent coffee.

google_reviews.author: Manfred Derdau (ZECKI)
google_reviews.text: Extremely expensive, nothing to show for it. Bad service even when it's quiet.

google_reviews.author: ChrisTina Lee
google_reviews.text:
Original review (shortened):
The food was average and overpriced, but what really made us regret coming was the terrible service and atmosphere.

Edit: Updated after reading the restaurant’s response to clarify what actually happened.

Had a quick lunch here and the experience was unfortunately awful. We came in with high expectations based on the Google reviews, but it was beyond disappointing.

The main issue wasn’t the food, but the atmosphere and the service. During lunch, gangster rap and heavy metal were playing. I politely asked the waiter if he spoke English or Italian, and then asked him in German to change the music. He clearly understood me, tapped the speaker saying “this is radio,” refused, and later came to the table to tell my husband (a native German speaker) again in German that it couldn’t be changed because it was “internet radio.” Yet he adjusted the volume several times, which showed he did have control over it.

Shortly after, we heard him on the phone and talking to colleagues, whether in German or Italian, repeating “music” and “classico” in a mocking tone. Since we were the only guests, it was obvious the comments were directed at us, very unprofessional and uncomfortable.

The restaurant said we should have complained on the spot. But when a simple request about the music already led to mockery, we didn’t expect any constructive reaction about the food. We paid and finished our meal because we were hungry, not because we enjoyed it. And we are not the type of customers who would refuse to pay or demand a refund. While the restaurant mentioned high-quality ingredients in their response, that doesn’t change the fact that we simply didn’t enjoy the taste of the dishes.

We ordered two pastas, a Sodazitron and a small Holundersoda for €49,80. We were aware of the prices and the menu in advance and naturally expected a nice Italian lunch experience, not a comparison to fast food. The reference to McDonald’s in their reply felt unnecessary. For context, two normal McDonald’s menus cost roughly the same as one plate of their “Pasta Lamborghini,” which simply shows that the pricing here is in a completely different category.

Overall: average food, inappropriate music, and a waiter who mocks guests. Not a place we recommend.

google_reviews.author: Julian Konrath
google_reviews.text: Very friendly and fun staff and amazing prawns. Totally recommend!

google_reviews.author: Patrick Verhoeven
google_reviews.text: Great service excellent food. The owner and staff are amazing. See you soon again.

google_reviews.author: Betti Csiba
google_reviews.text: Lovely and quiet restaurant with excellent service and delicious dishes! We had the Pasta Lamborghini and Pizza Margaritha with mixed salad, all yummy!

google_reviews.author: maria M
google_reviews.text: it was absolutely amazing!atmosphere is typical italian and the food was probably the best dish i’ve ate in graz.i totally recommend going there when it’s sunny and beautiful outside if you want a quiet comfortable and beautiful place to relax and eat!!

google_reviews.author: George Papanastasiou
google_reviews.text: A complete meal, very cheap. Mittagsmenü

google_reviews.author: hong nhung do
google_reviews.text: Thank you for lunch

google_reviews.author: Arjun Rao
google_reviews.text: Really nice food!

google_reviews.author: Soumya Bhattacharya
google_reviews.text: Authentic Austrian food.

google_reviews.author: Igor Keuc
google_reviews.text: Super

google_reviews.author: Martin Oisterschek
google_reviews.text: Oldest and most likable organic store in Graz. Authentic people, great (mostly local) products and nice store. You can even get organic cleaning stuff there.

google_reviews.author: marie aimetti
google_reviews.text: Best shop ever !!!

google_reviews.author: Renate L
google_reviews.text: My family loves shopping at the Biosphere in Ludersdorf, and we're so happy that there are people who sell us food that not only tastes better but also makes us feel like we've done something good for the environment and our health. Thank you, dear Matzer family! 💕

google_reviews.author: Petra Tauber
google_reviews.text: Great products, wide selection; I always find what I need here when I'm looking for vegan/vegetarian ingredients and specialties. Everyone is very friendly.

google_reviews.author: Ingrid E.
google_reviews.text: Top quality and very friendly, helpful staff! It's always a pleasure to go there. You can find things you can't get anywhere else!

google_reviews.author: Flaviu-Cristian Navratil
google_reviews.text:
A very tasty pizza, custom made and also a good price and size. The serving was fast and the payment can be done by card or NFC too.
Also, the music and atmosphere is very good.
You can serve a pizza not only with meat, but also a vegan one.

Update: After a few visits I and my friends decided that this is one of our favorite places to eat.The burgers are also great and the potato portion big. The patty is flavorful and bun soft with a crunchy crust.
The most awesome thing is, that you can do it to match your taste, so there is a small chance not to like it.

I definitely recommend it!

google_reviews.author: Jyothish Atheendran
google_reviews.text: The Menu options are definitely interesting. Can recommend for budget fun with friends.

google_reviews.author: S. 宋
google_reviews.text: Ordered this pizza for delivery and full disclosure I didn't realize it was almost closing time until after I had paid so I thought they would just cancel my order, but they didn't. Instead I got this masterpiece which probably just all fell to the side as it was being delivered. Then again the taste was also not great. It tasted a bit watered down and it was also a bit short of some ingredients. The fact that I could count the pineapples and the green peppers was not encouraging. The two stars was for the effort because maybe the workers had a long day but I was disappointed overall.

google_reviews.author: Daniel Hannih
google_reviews.text:
If you are looking for a cozy place to have some beer and fast yet great food for an affordable price, this is the place to go.
There are almost infinite possibilities of toppings for your food, but limited if your vegan. Sometimes they do offer vegan cheese for your pizza.
At evening it’s often super crowded so I recommend to book a table a couple of hours before. But overall, great service and food!

google_reviews.author: Thao Pham
google_reviews.text: Very nice concept that you can build your own pizza, salad, omelette,... Big portion and good quality. The waiter was very friendly and helpful as well

google_reviews.author: Rameez Butt
google_reviews.text: Good

google_reviews.author: Luca sss
google_reviews.text:
Excellent guesthouse, offering a trouble-free night's sleep. Extremely clean and friendly.
Original interior decor.
Native language: German.
You'll find courtesy and helpfulness.
Strategic location for visiting Graz.

google_reviews.author: Eich Kater
google_reviews.text: Small and cozy, you feel like you're at home. You'll be greeted warmly not only by the boss but also by the dog. Of course, only if you like it.

google_reviews.author: Manfred Loydolt
google_reviews.text: A simple but very nice and cozy guesthouse. Clean and friendly hosts. Highly recommended. Tram number 5 takes you to Graz's most important sights.

google_reviews.author: Alexander A
google_reviews.text: One of the coziest and most quaint guesthouses I've ever seen. The breakfast is plentiful and varied. Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: Andrey Tyurikov
google_reviews.text: Real Italian food! Very tasty!

google_reviews.author: Наталiя
google_reviews.text: We are very grateful to this establishment for our delicious dinner and for a wonderful evening! Unfortunately, we are bad bloggers))) - we could only take pictures of empty plates)) I ate a tricolor salad, and chicken stewed in white wine with capers, cherry tomatoes and olives. My husband had seafood pasta and fried squid. Very good service and a cozy atmosphere! We will gladly return there again if we have the opportunity. Once again, thank you!!!

google_reviews.author: Marion Innerhofer
google_reviews.text: The shortest way to Bella Italia: a visit to the new Cantinetta in the Hofkeller in the heart of Graz - Dolce Vita feeling included 🤩

google_reviews.author: Sabine Trummer
google_reviews.text: Excellent traditional Italian cuisine with modern influences in a cozy atmosphere.

google_reviews.author: David P
google_reviews.text: Fantastic food, great choices, super fresh and very tasty. A must visit when in Graz, we loved it.

google_reviews.author: Lisa Weekes
google_reviews.text:
Fresh, tasty dishes at a great price

Highly recommended! We had dinner here: Thai curry chicken and Pao chicken. Crisp veges, delicious flavours and really good servings. Not at all oily. €6.90 a meal. The sushi options looked great too.

google_reviews.author: Taylor Hensson
google_reviews.text: We took the bowls to go to eat on Schlossberg - great idea, but 15 min walk up the hill. Very fast service, bowls were prepared on the spot, and super delicious, definitely healthier than other fast food options.

google_reviews.author: Monika B
google_reviews.text: Absolutely fantastic, fresh, tasty and in reasonable price. It was such a joy! Secret tip: you can mix two different dishes in one bowl for just 1 euro extra.Totally to recommend!

google_reviews.author: Mali Quaeck
google_reviews.text: Great asian food! Was very busy but efficient. Plenty of delicious choices. You can either build your own bowl or choose one of the rice dishes.

restaurants.name: Lendplatzl
restaurants.summary: Charming hotel in a 1600s home featuring individually styled rooms, a restaurant & a beer garden.

google_reviews.author: Nicole Yu
google_reviews.text: We visited the Lend-Platzl restaurant for an early dinner and we absolutely loved it! I found this hidden gem on Apple Maps (ironically), but super glad that I did. For mains, we got a Cordon Bleu (with pork schnitzel) and Oststeirisches Kotelett (eastern Styrian cutlet); paired with a local beer. For dessert, we shared a melange (coffee) and a chocolate cake (potentially a lava cake). Everything we ordered was delicious!! For our visit, we didn’t have a reservation, as well it was on Dec 31, therefore it was quite busy and we had a time limit for our table. But we never felt rushed during our meal. We would recommend this restaurant, and for us, we would definitely return!

google_reviews.author: Annie M
google_reviews.text:
I cannot eat gluten, dairy and egg but love Schnitzel.  I emailed to ask if there were any options for me and within 30mins they responded to say they would make me Schnitzel!!!!
It was lovely!!!! Going back in 2 days for more.
Danke!!!!
Staff are lovely.
Inside is lovely.
They really try accommodate allergens

google_reviews.author: Georgie Meikle
google_reviews.text: Really wanted to try backhendl while I was in Graz the biggest touristy recommendation was a bit out of the way for me so I stopped by the restaurant here instead and I'm so glad I did! Service was friendly and patient, the outdoor seating had a great vibe, and the backhendl itself was delicious. Crispy on the outside while still really juicy and tender inside, perfectly balanced by the sweet and sharp berry jam I ordered alongside. Would recommend getting it with a light green salad rather than the bean salad I ordered, which was delicious but very heavy, especially on such a hot day! Besides my ordering blunder, though, this is a hearty recommendation.

google_reviews.author: William Schmidt
google_reviews.text: The Lend-Platzl Restaurant is a hidden gem that does not appear as a separate listing on Google Maps and so is difficult to find and easy to overlook. Yet it is a top-knotch family restaurant and beer garden with an enormous menu full of authentic Styrian dishes. Even better is that they make gluten-free fried chicken or Steirisches Backhendl that is superb, and have other gluten free items on their menu. I rather foolishly failed to take pictures of the dishes, but both the backhendl and goulash were amazing. I really hope that the owners consider making a separate google maps listing for the restaurant and have me back to contribute the first proper review. Thank you for a wonderful meal and service.

google_reviews.author: Michi Hofer
google_reviews.text: The baked chicken liver and the Wiener Schnitzel are excellent, reasonably priced,and the waitresses as well waiters are very friendly.

google_reviews.author: William Schmidt
google_reviews.text: This restaurant is a great stop for schnitzel and Cordon Bleu on a gluten-free diet. Not only do they do typical ham and cheese stuffings but several gourmet varieties - please see the menu. As a tourist needing a gluten-free menu this was a good place to go. Indoors is a dining room that has a classic feel while outdoors is a relaxed setting. Many regulars were coming by to join the cook and waitress at this restaurant, and it would be interesting to be dine with the regulars. The only complaint I have is that the stuffing could have been richer - e.g., the pineapple stuffing my friend tried only had a few pieces of pineapple. While alternative stuffings is a great idea, it needs to be done with style!

google_reviews.author: Tara Ciric
google_reviews.text: Amazing schnitzel and so nice to have GOOD gluten free food! And great Austrian gluten free beer. The owner was so kind and helpful! A definite must

google_reviews.author: tanner b
google_reviews.text: Cordon bleu tasted amazing and the staff and everyone inside was very welcoming and friendly.

google_reviews.author: Paul Timotheus Zimmert
google_reviews.text:
Friends that life in Graz always told us that we had to try this place. According to them one of the best Cordon Bleu places in Austria.

This weekend we finally managed to visit the place. We made a call ahead to make sure they are open and that a table is available - the place is small so make sure to reserve a table around the busy lunch or dinner hours.

When you step in you are transformed back in time to a real Austrian Wirtshaus which you know and cherish from your childhood. The even sport a Jukebox in one corner of the seating area. Two Euro get you some songs for your and - everybody's - enjoyment.

The place is run by the chef and his wife. He is responsible for the variety of Cordon Bleus while she keeps the service afloat. The service was quick friendly and attentive. We were warned that we would have to wait a bit since it was quite busy but since we were informed it was fine for us.

They offer variations on the classic Cordon Bleu we had the Styrian (Cheese, Geselchtes, Horseradish) and the Farmer's style (Cheese, bacon, onion). All dishes come with a side of choice.

The Cordon Bleu is homemade made from great ingredients sourced directly from the market / farmer's market on Saturday nearby. The fires are handcut and crisp.

Definitely on of the best Cordon Bleus we had. Give this place a try.

google_reviews.author: Mauricio Azevedo
google_reviews.text: Certainly the place to go if you’re willing to try Austrian cousine. The food is delicious and the menü (each day has a different course) is total worthy and delicious. The staff are gentle and kind (the owners). I’ll definitely go more often, since I live nearby. Danke!!

google_reviews.author: Erick Garcia
google_reviews.text: I came to this place as soon as I arrived to the city for the first time. Eat all you can for 10.9 euros + beberage. They have a good variety of chinesse food, also sushi, and deserts. And the personal was very kind...

google_reviews.author: Tom Reksodipuro
google_reviews.text: Very good for groups , owner is very nice , food  are decent , nice parking , one of my favorite layover place in austria for big group

google_reviews.author: Pumamori
google_reviews.text:
I'm a regular, or used to be, and it genuinely hurts to say I just can't recommend this place anymore. Some days it's excellent when the right people are present, but sometimes it's just so, so rough. Raw chicken, horrible stomach ache & sickness afterwards, the drinks are super expensive but also a coin toss on whether they're good on any given day.

I want to love this restaurant like I used to but I don't like gambling for my own well-being.

google_reviews.author: Fabian
google_reviews.text:
Excellent experience to eat there!
I've been a fan of them for many years and some time ago they added a buffet and it's magnificent! So many different choices and everything tastes great! Especially the duck is extremely well done which is not usual at a buffet! They offer a big variety of desserts as well, even a chocolate fountain!
Service is also great, the owners are always very friendly! Prices are okay.
Looking forward to eating there again!

google_reviews.author: True Sunshine
google_reviews.text: Came here twice on our way to Italy and back, during lunch hours and the food is great. Second time we made a reservation because the place is so popular that it's full during the weekend. There is much to choose from, salty or sweet and they even have sushi. They have a large parking and it was easy to find a spot. For me, it's the perfect chinese restaurant.

google_reviews.author: Frank Gelling
google_reviews.text: We enjoyed the wonderful buffet this evening.  Very organized, clean relaxed restaurant.  The food for us was amazing and much to choose from.  They had it all.  We recommend and will try to return before we continue on our travel adventure.

google_reviews.author: Thanh Xuan Le
google_reviews.text:
Chinese cuisine.
15 EUR per person (including 1 cup of soft drink and expression coffee).
I love the variety of foods here. Both main dishes and desert.
Try to mix coconut ice cream and expression coffee 🥰
Come and check it out

google_reviews.author: Ronald Stilting
google_reviews.text: It's conveniently located coming from Hauptbahnhof going towards the old city just before the bridge. There is indoor and outdoor seating. Their main offering is the all you can eat buffet for lunch and dinner. It has a big range of Asian dishes,  including Sushi. There are also desserts incl icecream.  Food quality and taste are the usual bland adaptation of asian food that is often found in lower end restaurants. It isn't bad but lacks vibe and real Asian spark. All staff are Asian which means communication is only basic as is the whole service. Prices are fair and you won't leave hungry.

google_reviews.author: Martina Ilia
google_reviews.text: We just find this restaruant yestarday evening, and we had amazing dinner here. Large amount different delecius asian food, sushi, shrimps, differnt kind of chicken dishes, sweets, cakes, fruits. Everything was super fresh and delecius,  the staff is freindly and kind. If the food is getting empty, they are refelling immidiatly with fresh food, and good price for all of this. 🥰

google_reviews.author: Ann Fanzheng
google_reviews.text:
Evening buffet is good, large selections of food. As a Chinese, I’m so happy and surprised to find green tea cakes here… (the small green cake with sesame in the plate in my fourth picture) I haven’t had them for such a long time living abroad.
All the stir-fried dishes are good. I like the sweet sour chicken/ pork very much.
But sadly the drink menu and desert section is not so Chinese. But it’s ok since we are in Graz.

Staff here is also so friendly:) they smile at me all the time. Really felt welcomed.

price is at about 15 euros per pax excluding drinks. Good for friend gathering!

google_reviews.author: Amin Sedighfar
google_reviews.text:
I got Spinaci pizza with beer then tiramisu for the dessert.
The tiramisu was genuinely delicious. The waiter and waitress were also so friendly

google_reviews.author: yutsz 1203
google_reviews.text:
Good food, good mood.
Reasonable prices.
Great services.
Highly recommend.

google_reviews.author: Blanka Mateljan
google_reviews.text: Great food,great service. The waitress was all smiles,fast and so kind to my daughter and me. The portions are huge. Definitely recommended.

google_reviews.author: Drago Satosek
google_reviews.text: An ok place. Pizza not best, but was ok.

google_reviews.author: Kevin Beirne
google_reviews.text:
Maybe it was just because I was on a much-needed holiday but this was maybe the best pizza I've ever had in my life. The menu said it had "mushrooms and other mushrooms" on it and I just had to order it to find out why they decided to specify the second portion of mushrooms. I'm so glad I did. I still think about this pizza almost a year later.

Just one warning: they only take cash. I had to run to an ATM after my meal to get money to pay for it (five stars for them trusting me to do that!)

google_reviews.author: Slobodan Ulaz
google_reviews.text: Great kebab, friendly owner and works 24/7 even for NYE

google_reviews.author: Jyothish Atheendran
google_reviews.text: Unfortunately it was a bad experience for me in terms of cleanliness and quality of food.

google_reviews.author: Jure Antunović
google_reviews.text:
Really good kebab.
Decent prices.

google_reviews.author: Domagoj Malovic
google_reviews.text: Whenever we visit Graz from Croatia, we have to make a stop here! Great authentic kebab place, more than highly recommended.

google_reviews.author: Ben Bacey
google_reviews.text: Not sure what the hours are, but it's definitely not 24h. I went there at midnight and they were closed

google_reviews.author: R Lin
google_reviews.text:
Came to the inner city to hang and have a drink. We saw Kaisers has bellini in the menu which most of the other places nearby didn’t, so we went for it.

The workers were somewhere between friendly and not. We didn’t try the actual food but it was a great spritz and we got a chocolate candy cookie for a perfect little sweet treat.

google_reviews.author: Oleksii Shtyfura
google_reviews.text: So, around 20:00 try to order food, that’s listed in the board, as response you get from two fairy waiters: “gibt’s schon lange nix mehr”, where one could say sorry we only have food till… then you order drinks.. want to pay then they say sorry no card, without a kind explanation where the ATM is or where you can possibly get food. I get it, gym trained waiters and all, doesn’t hurt to have a brain cell for  politeness. :) never to come back again, but the market environment & atmosphere definitely saves the establishment.

google_reviews.author: A K
google_reviews.text: Roast chicken, the sauce, potato salad and warm pretzel was perfection. Price was very fair! Friendly staff. They only take cash so make sure you have some cash on you.

google_reviews.author: Herr Lugus
google_reviews.text:
I enjoy the good vibe and loving atmosphere, the staff emanates.
The food is excellent; so is their coffee and beer.

google_reviews.author: Virginia Marisela Salinas Guajardo
google_reviews.text:
Excellent place! Deli food, the guys there are super nice and friendly. Highly recommend 😊 🐖 No doubt, they made food with Love.
Gracias!

google_reviews.author: Boris Maric
google_reviews.text: Cosy little cafe, friendly waitresses.

google_reviews.author: Mike Shulman
google_reviews.text: chilled vibe, with great healthy food and views. Veggie friendly and some great options

google_reviews.author: Adriana Cvitkusic
google_reviews.text: Great coffee,Great service

google_reviews.author: Fabian Dominici
google_reviews.text: Top Service!

google_reviews.author: Lenka Maninkova
google_reviews.text: Tasty smoothies

google_reviews.author: Luke Ribeiro Skreinig (Lucchas)
google_reviews.text: Lovely place to buy coffee beans, the Technika Blend is great! Can't wait for the place to reopen, any idea when that might be?

google_reviews.author: Zsóka Gyulai
google_reviews.text:
I had the opportunity to travel to Graz frequently for several days each month, I've discovered a hidden gem that I can't help but recommend to my friends – Technika.
The coffee here is truly unparalleled, and the staff, especially the talented barista who creates mesmerizing latte art, adds an extra touch of warmth to the experience. Everbody should try her oat cookie too - it's a treat for the taste buds... To me, a trip to Graz wouldn't be complete without indulging in their delightful lattes, chai lattes, and savoring a bagel and a cheesecake at this charming spot.
Technika sets a standard for what a perfect café should be. It offers a welcoming and cozy atmosphere, making it a great place to unwind and enjoy quality time with friends. Good food, cozy atmosphere, very clean....shoud I continue?
It should be on everyone's must-visit list when in Graz!

google_reviews.author: angelo ascani
google_reviews.text: Quick feedback: Coffee is ok. But service is desperately slow. Bagel average, really over priced. Not worth going back.

google_reviews.author: Nick Acorne
google_reviews.text: Good place to make a stop for a good coffee. Cosyplace to sit on the sun during the day.

google_reviews.author: Gabriel Wolf
google_reviews.text: super cozy, great coffee and bagels!

google_reviews.author: Sa Wol
google_reviews.text: Thomaburger with Apple juice. 2 kind sof potatoes and batata for the side dish. 3 kinds of sauce you can pick. Wonderful food, kind staff and neat interior. What else do you need? ;)

google_reviews.author: Michel Oleynik
google_reviews.text: We ordered two burgers, one of them following the place name. Even though the patty was good, the bread was too dry and meat doneness was not consistent: mine was medium, while my wife's was rare. We think some homemade mayonese could boost the overall taste. Sweet potatoes were great though, but refrain from the homemade salsa, also tasteless.

google_reviews.author: roxana sl
google_reviews.text: We reserved a table three months ago and called again in the morning, but when we arrived, the tables were not ready. We had to wait over an hour for the food and the meat was completely raw, they took it away and when they brought it back, there wasn't much difference! The restaurant had a very small kitchen and just one cook for the whole restaurant, and the poor cook got a break down at some point and just left the restaurant!!! One of us was left without food in the end!!! Very poor management in this regard! Never going there again and absolutely not recommend it! The waitress was very nice though!

google_reviews.author: Pedro Costa
google_reviews.text: The food is good, but unfortunately, the service is very bad. The waiter seemed irritated while serving us (perhaps because we were foreigners) and was extremely rude for no reason during payment. She made us pay for tap water, falsely claiming that she had warned us about the charge. I wouldn’t mind paying if it had been clearly communicated and conveyed in a better tone, but it seemed like she was just in a bad mood. Unfortunately, this is unacceptable—paying a not-so-cheap price and still being treated this way. I will not be coming back.

google_reviews.author: Scott
google_reviews.text: Food portion's big, tasty too. Good service.

google_reviews.author: mind sharing
google_reviews.text: Saves my lunch break every time! Nice atmosphere with great music. You can work and eat. Healthy menu, I recommend!

google_reviews.author: Fabian Jöbstl
google_reviews.text: price food everything is great

google_reviews.author: J. B.
google_reviews.text: Very good, reasonably priced food. Recently added pleasant background music. Very friendly service. Ideal for students.

google_reviews.author: David Reitbauer
google_reviews.text:
Unbeatable price and top quality!

As a student, I think it's great to eat here. €5.40 (with a cafeteria stamp) for soup, main course, salad, and dessert. You can't get that anywhere else in Graz! Highly recommended.

Even without a cafeteria stamp, the price of €6.90 is more than reasonable!

google_reviews.author: Constanze P.
google_reviews.text: Really delicious and the price is right too. I'd gladly order again, especially if I have things to do at university and still want something filling.

google_reviews.author: fernando de la cruz lopez
google_reviews.text: This is one of those restaurants where everything just feels “right.” Great lighting, comfortable seating, polite and professional staff. I had the duck breast with cherry glaze, and it was exquisite — crispy skin, tender meat, and balanced sweetness. The appetizer, a goat cheese and beet salad, was also fantastic. It’s more on the upscale side, but absolutely worth it.

google_reviews.author: G Donna
google_reviews.text: This cozy little spot is perfect for a quiet dinner. I ordered the roasted vegetable lasagna, which came in a bubbling dish with layers of perfectly cooked vegetables, cheese, and tomato sauce. The garlic bread was crisp and buttery. The staff was friendly and made us feel at home. The background music wasn’t too loud, and the vibe was really relaxed. It felt like a hidden gem in the city.

google_reviews.author: Rudi P
google_reviews.text: Very nice restaurant that I used for hosting a birthday party for my father. Spacious outdoor area. Very important for us was the handicap toilets which allowed wheelchair access. Very friendly staff consisting of highly motivated younger people who are still in training. Excellent value for money. Sufficient parking is available. Will come again!

google_reviews.author: Yves Le Goff
google_reviews.text:
Slightly out the way, high quality restaurant populated by locals.

We ate in the beautiful shaded garden outside.

Excellent value for money

google_reviews.author: Darshan BR
google_reviews.text: It was awesome experience. If you guys had any plans to visit this is the best place to watch out .

google_reviews.author: Triin Berkhald
google_reviews.text: The food was really good. The place was also really nice outside. There weren't any visitors when we went and the waitress couldn't speak any English but she was really nice and we managed to order exactly what we wanted. We could also hear the food being prepared so we knew it was fresh:)

google_reviews.author: George Papanastasiou
google_reviews.text: Typical rustic local restaurant with daily midday dish, very cheap. Kottelet.

google_reviews.author: Bill Grilli
google_reviews.text: Absolutely great food and quality, rock solid. I loved the Slovenian beer. But tourists beware: they only accept cash (2022!) and there is no warning on the door or the menu.

google_reviews.author: Elise Sala
google_reviews.text:
A hidden gem. I hesitate to rate it so high because it’s worth gate-keeping! ;)
Very good food and very nice staff.

google_reviews.author: Machovich Ivan
google_reviews.text: Top

google_reviews.author: Júlia Beatriz Amarantes Petschl
google_reviews.text:
The African food is so good! I love to try foods from all over the world. I as a Brazilian went there and really like the food! 😋 the environment is cool, good calm music, and the staff is sympathetic.

I ate Poulet DG («Directeur général») with jollof rice, and drink Pineapple with coconut Juice 💚

google_reviews.author: No Body
google_reviews.text: This was my 4th time visiting and like always it was a very pleasant visit. We were welcomed very nicely. He was very kind and explained the dishes to us. Everything tasted so good and flavourful. The service was quick yet not rushed. I ordered the egg roll and the fufu soup variation which are meant to eat by hand. I got a separate dish with water to clean my hands. I tasted from everyone and everything tasted truly amazing. Overall a really nice experience.

google_reviews.author: Ben T.
google_reviews.text:
We had a wonderful culinary excursion into african cuisine.
The staff was friendly and the food tasted wonderful.
A wonderful opertunity to widen your culinary horizon.

google_reviews.author: Kirsty Blackwood
google_reviews.text: Food is fantastic. Very well priced. A local place, nothing fancy but worth the trip for the dishes (jollof, Fufu and soups all amazing).

google_reviews.author: G. G.
google_reviews.text:
Food is great, it was quite different from the usual cuisine we're used to. They have some imported beer, but a bit pricey.

Another time we were here, although with reservation, we never got seated -- the reception couldn't find our reservation.

google_reviews.author: Matthias Czaschke
google_reviews.text: I first came here a few years ago through a friend. Since then, I've been something of a regular. The landlady is fantastic; it doesn't get any better in a pub like this! You meet acquaintances or strangers, it doesn't matter; the atmosphere is always friendly – people bond over conversation. As long as I can crawl, I'll be happy to come back... I've never eaten here, hence only 4 stars, but the snacks look and smell delicious...

google_reviews.author: Johannes der Jünger
google_reviews.text:
A nice and pleasant café – you sometimes (intentionally or unintentionally) bump into various celebrities from radio and television here.

The motto here is "to see and be seen" :)

google_reviews.author: Manfred Huber
google_reviews.text: Pleasant atmosphere, pleasant people there, all in all definitely worth a visit!

google_reviews.author: paul mayer
google_reviews.text: Great place, pleasant atmosphere and lots of fun included 👍🏻

google_reviews.author: Hamid Hessabi
google_reviews.text: It's always nice and cozy to have a coffee here.👍

google_reviews.author: Joanita
google_reviews.text: My experience at the restaurant was not the greatest. Firstly the workers are smoking infront of the restaurant I had to wait a few minutes before entering with my baby. We ordered two main meals and a aloe juice. The food we ordered was not very tasty it lacked salt and spice. I was hoping to taste the nice Umami flavours but unfortunately it lacked the flavours I was hoping for. We used the lemon wedge to give the food flavour. Yes the portions are very big and the prices reasonable but no flavour to the food is rather disappointing. I hope they can add nice fresh spice to make their meals more tastier. And also not smoke infront of their restaurant but perhaps a metre or so away. This restaurant definitely has potential they just need to make their food tastier and be a bit flexible and accomodating to their customers! If the customer asks something don't say it's too much to ask or you don't have time etc this  turns your customers away!

google_reviews.author: Matej Logar
google_reviews.text:
I ordered spicy chicken fresh noodles. The noodles may have actually been fresh, but the chicken definitely wasn’t. Some pieces were very cold, I guess it was under‑heated in the microwave. The taste was a bit strange, but that was probably due to the spices.
The pad thai chicken & prawns was apparently okay, but also oddly seasoned and a bit under‑salted.

google_reviews.author: Marija Malesevic
google_reviews.text: Absolutely amazing. Crispy chicken noodles are the best thing I’ve ever eaten. This made my day.

google_reviews.author: Lynda Tsukibayashi
google_reviews.text: Better than some biang noodles we tried in berlin, woule recommend beef biang noodle

google_reviews.author: Geoff Poynter
google_reviews.text: Really great home made noodles. Very tasty and very quick. Small area on the street with seating

google_reviews.author: Martin Gärtner
google_reviews.text: Cool milk bar

google_reviews.author: Berta MARIA Regenfelder
google_reviews.text: Very good

google_reviews.author: B Dornelas
google_reviews.text:
I cannot recommend this place highly enough. Everything was excellent — and the food was absolutely delicious. I called ahead to make a large reservation, and it was handled in less than a minute. When we arrived, they had prepared our table in a semi-private room, so it felt like we had the whole space to ourselves.

The staff were incredibly friendly, and they even spoke English with those of us who didn’t know German. For those who did try speaking German, they kindly stuck to it — none of that annoying automatic switch to English that can make practicing the language difficult. They also provide (optional) English menus.

The atmosphere was wonderful. According to our Austrian friends, it feels like a genuinely authentic 70s restaurant. There’s a wide variety of food options, including vegetarian dishes, as well as great desserts and a diverse selection of drinks. And everything for a reasonable price.

google_reviews.author: Nejc Selčan
google_reviews.text: Oldschool restaurant, with old ambient. Simple, nothing too complicated. Food was good, nothing extra special. Resonable prices.

google_reviews.author: Liega Zelgalve
google_reviews.text:
This place needs a Michelin star!
I had a Rindfleich salat and my partner a dish of the day. Huge portions and super delicious. I discovered new taste combinations, felt authentic too. 10/10 experience.

google_reviews.author: Alex Poliak
google_reviews.text: Delicious food and big portions. Good price for what you get. Service kind and helpful.

google_reviews.author: Reinhard Siegl
google_reviews.text:
The best shrimp on rice since long! Very tasty!
Perfect chestnut noodles with chocolate sauce on ice cream as dessert!
Cosy ambience

google_reviews.author: Tatjana Kovtuna
google_reviews.text:
We were walking around Graz in the evening when we noticed this food stand—it was crowded, so we got curious. After checking some great reviews online, we decided to stop by for a quick bite. And we’re really glad we did!

The service was very friendly and helpful. We asked what their iconic dish was, and they recommended the "cheesy heaven" hot dog —and it was absolutely the right choice. Super tasty, perfectly cooked, and served fast.

They also offer their own local “HausSpritz,” a refreshing mix of sparkling wine and soda water—perfect for a summer evening.

Overall, we had a great experience, and judging by the line of people waiting, this place is clearly a must-visit when in Graz. Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: N X K
google_reviews.text:
That hot dog tastes like bread, sausage and ketchup + mayo. you can make at home
And make 10x as many of them.

It doesnt taste different than the most basic one you can make at home, i do not recommend. Waste of money.

Not a single thing connects together and they use the lowest quality of sausage possible.

Bread was not soft, but over heated, resulting in partial crumbling.

google_reviews.author: Beatricie Parascan
google_reviews.text:
The hot dogs are amazing!! Just try the vegan one, you’ll thank me later :) We also took the sweet potatoes fries that were divine.
And last but not least, the guy who makes them is extremely nice!
Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: Dalia Kager
google_reviews.text: Great hot dog, really big portion with super tasty and fresh ingredients. Apsolute must try when come to Graz👌

google_reviews.author: Vulnet Abazi
google_reviews.text:
The best hot dog E V E R !!!
Try Cheesy Heaven 👌

google_reviews.author: Sara Oblak
google_reviews.text:
Definitely the best pizza I have ever had. The staff is super nice. If you are in Graz you have to check it out.
I took Bresaola and is out of the world😍

google_reviews.author: Jouni Riihimäki
google_reviews.text: Delicious food (tried pizza, pasta & deserts) and excellent service. Definatelly the best pizza in the city! I can just recommend to visit!

google_reviews.author: Ana Koren
google_reviews.text: By far the best pizza dough I ever ate in my life. Whenever I visit Graz, I always go eat here, because I really love their calzone. It’s huge and filled with delicious and fresh ingredients. 2 very hungry people can satisfy their hunger with 1 calzone. Waitress is always super friendly and takes the best care of the guests. The restaurant is also very nicely decorated and clean. I highly recommend that you visit 😄

google_reviews.author: Petra Hus
google_reviews.text: Solid pizza, very good crust. Good 8/10!

google_reviews.author: Natascha Eibl
google_reviews.text:
We had the pasta which was really good.
The staff is friendly and welcoming.
One star less because we waited very long to get our food.
Nevertheless I will come again to try the pizza.

google_reviews.author: Rebeca Monteiro Neves
google_reviews.text:
Very expensive, I payed 7 Euros for 2 half cups black coffe and the coffe tasted burned. No plant based milk available!
Smell and environment wasn't very pleasant either.
Desided to drink the coffe outside at the lovely bus station park.

google_reviews.author: Nora Hacker
google_reviews.text: Lovely bread, super-creamy ice cream!

google_reviews.author: Gabriel Arnstberg
google_reviews.text: Great breakfast, great atmosphere.

google_reviews.author: Sameeerbabu MT
google_reviews.text: Best rice in Doha

google_reviews.author: Parvu Adrian Stefan
google_reviews.text: Exelent!

google_reviews.author: Flaviu-Cristian Navratil
google_reviews.text:
A very tasty pizza, custom made and also a good price and size. The serving was fast and the payment can be done by card or NFC too.
Also, the music and atmosphere is very good.
You can serve a pizza not only with meat, but also a vegan one.

Update: After a few visits I and my friends decided that this is one of our favorite places to eat.The burgers are also great and the potato portion big. The patty is flavorful and bun soft with a crunchy crust.
The most awesome thing is, that you can do it to match your taste, so there is a small chance not to like it.

I definitely recommend it!

google_reviews.author: Jyothish Atheendran
google_reviews.text: The Menu options are definitely interesting. Can recommend for budget fun with friends.

google_reviews.author: S. 宋
google_reviews.text: Ordered this pizza for delivery and full disclosure I didn't realize it was almost closing time until after I had paid so I thought they would just cancel my order, but they didn't. Instead I got this masterpiece which probably just all fell to the side as it was being delivered. Then again the taste was also not great. It tasted a bit watered down and it was also a bit short of some ingredients. The fact that I could count the pineapples and the green peppers was not encouraging. The two stars was for the effort because maybe the workers had a long day but I was disappointed overall.

google_reviews.author: Daniel Hannih
google_reviews.text:
If you are looking for a cozy place to have some beer and fast yet great food for an affordable price, this is the place to go.
There are almost infinite possibilities of toppings for your food, but limited if your vegan. Sometimes they do offer vegan cheese for your pizza.
At evening it’s often super crowded so I recommend to book a table a couple of hours before. But overall, great service and food!

google_reviews.author: Thao Pham
google_reviews.text: Very nice concept that you can build your own pizza, salad, omelette,... Big portion and good quality. The waiter was very friendly and helpful as well

google_reviews.author: Micki Thorson
google_reviews.text: I got the matcha latte & double chocolate donut. The donut was very soft & the chocolate was a hard shell over top, very delicious. The latte was good as well! It was a bit on the sweeter side so if you are someone who doesn't like sweet matcha, maybe you could ask for half the sweetness. The service was quick & the employee working was a bit short but I think that was just due to a language barrier, which is completely fine.

google_reviews.author: Alisa Dehtiarova
google_reviews.text: The best bubble tea I’ve ever tried! And the donuts are very tasty

google_reviews.author: Aleta Eubanks
google_reviews.text: Tasty donuts, not overly sweet!

google_reviews.author: AA
google_reviews.text: Got a regular bubble milk tea there. It was nice tho the pearls were a bit too soft in my opinion (personal preference).

google_reviews.author: Nina M.S.
google_reviews.text: Donuts were ok but the delivery guy came ONE hour before the scheduled time and was angry and rude cause "we were not there to pick up the order". Yes Sir, that's why we scheduled it for one hour later... Donuts good, delivery horrible.

google_reviews.author: Joann Mistica
google_reviews.text: I take back my 5-star review. We ordered last time and for some reason, the burger buns were incredibly thick and soggy. It disintegrates while you eat it.

google_reviews.author: Big Tiger
google_reviews.text: Ordered Pizza Funghi and Wedges (huge portion). Was great!

google_reviews.author: Reinhard Ott
google_reviews.text:
Nice new place. Very friendly staff.

Edit: rating reduced because the food quality has been a bit inconsistent lately and I noticed AI-generated images displayed behind the counter.

2nd edit:
Another star off because it's obviously their perogative to raise prices but the frequency and amount is wild, plus the menus on the counter weren't even up to date last time I went so I paid even more than expected.

google_reviews.author: Marko Jukic
google_reviews.text: The food is terrible and the staff is not friendly at all. Really dissapointing

google_reviews.author: Bog
google_reviews.text: The food was absolutely tasteless. I ate cevapci and pljieskavita in a lot of places in former Yugoslavian countries, but here was just some pieces of meat, completely tasteless. shloud try to change the recipe for the meat, maybe using some bacon, cheese, onion in the meat.

google_reviews.author: D Lacroix
google_reviews.text: Hidden gem, small a cozy. Had one of 2 pasta dishes for the night and it was simple and well executed. I’ll be back for pizza.

google_reviews.author: R Štefan
google_reviews.text: One of the best pizzas I ever had! Definitely Top 3, where other two restaurants were in Italy ;) Super tasty and fresh, as promoted, only from fresh and high quality ingrediencies. The restaurant itself is small and very cozy, service is good, great vine. Can only advise a visit. Reservation is recommended.

google_reviews.author: ChaCha
google_reviews.text: Without doubt the best pizza in Graz and in general one of the best I ever had. Crusty, fresh, bursting with flavor. Very nice people. A little more expensive than the average pizza place but worth the money. Will be a regular.

google_reviews.author: Nicholas Fletcher
google_reviews.text: It’s the most overpriced pizzeria in Austria, toppings are good but a chewy dry base for €20 plus coperto plus expensive tap water is not acceptable. Spritz was good though but again far too expensive

google_reviews.author: Martina G.
google_reviews.text: Amazing pizza (great taste & also the dough soft & crunchy) cozy atmosphere. Real italians :)  No outside seating.

google_reviews.author: Marko Siltakoski
google_reviews.text: Nice and clean place, food was very good (chili burger was actually hot and not mild), service was also fast and nice

google_reviews.author: Aleta Eubanks
google_reviews.text: This restaurant reminds me of a restaurant in New York. The food portions are generous. Delicious! I highly recommend. Friendly service too!’

google_reviews.author: Trymon Ridcully
google_reviews.text: Best kebab in Graz, no debate. Fast service and zero compromises on quality.

google_reviews.author: bluebardot
google_reviews.text: Best Turkish food in Graz, nobody does food better than Best Food Grill. I'm a usual customer so I go there very often which means I tried all their food. For the services they offer the price is very affordable. I can t recommend this place enough

google_reviews.author: Borbala Stuber
google_reviews.text:
Our fav kepab and fast food restaurant in der Münzgrabentraße. Tasty Kebap, good burgera with sweet potato fries and truffle mayo!
The guys are always polite and the place is clean and atmospheric.
Big plus: you can pay with cards!

google_reviews.author: Shkelqim Hoti
google_reviews.text: Great cocktail bar near the heart of Graz. The barman was very respectful and well spoken. Good choices of beer. Not random that its one of the « 50 BEST BARS ». Looking forward to visiting again.

google_reviews.author: Federica Benes
google_reviews.text:
Tried this bar by chance with my husband, we were surprised by the cocktails. Really amazing quality and service.
Thanks to Dimitri for the fantastic cocktails!
We will come back for sure.

google_reviews.author: Jonathan Fitzgerald
google_reviews.text: Very nice cocktail bar that serves delicious cocktails, whisky and their own brand of craft beer, the latter being very mild but pleasant to drink. Very limited seating though.

google_reviews.author: Alexander Veith
google_reviews.text: A very cool cocktail bar with great, high quality drinks and a very appealing old fashioned ambiente. Will surely come again!

google_reviews.author: Wandern Leo
google_reviews.text: Chill bar with a great Gin selection. Love their house beer. If you are looking for a cool place to spend the evening you should pay them a visit. Always enjoyable, never had a bad experience. And their whiskeys aren’t bad either. And the prices are also fair.

google_reviews.author: OC 420
google_reviews.text: First time eating here.. kebab was amazing, even after carrying it in my backpack for 20 min it tasted so good.. oh lawd I will come again

google_reviews.author: Abdullah Gelgör
google_reviews.text: The best kebab in Graz! You should also try Kebab Stangerl! 🌮

google_reviews.author: Das deutsche finanzamt
google_reviews.text: im going here every week. the best kebap i have ever eaten, its even better then ferhat in vienna! The food has a normal price for Graz and the employees are always nice and they have special sales for there customers and also sometimes give you a few percent off. I have even gotten a free kebap once when I forgot my wallet

google_reviews.author: Aditya Rana
google_reviews.text: Delicious kebab, pides and pizzas! One of the best kebab places in Graz in terms of quality and quantity. They always make their pita bread fresh infront of you.

google_reviews.author: victoria tubrett
google_reviews.text: The best Kebab I have had so far in Europe, Canada and the U.S. 100% recommend going here if you are in Graz.

google_reviews.author: Luke
google_reviews.text:
Finding this Neapolitan pizzeria in Graz felt almost like being in Naples. The pizza was really delicious, with a soft crust and very fresh ingredients that made every bite amazing.

The staff was very friendly and created a warm, welcoming atmosphere. I enjoyed my visit so much that I will definitely come back soon.
A great place if you want real Neapolitan pizza in Graz!

google_reviews.author: Kevser Karabulut
google_reviews.text:
It was really a wonderful pizza! 😋 It was as good as my friend described. It was both delicious and the staff were very kind.I’m sure I will go again.
Also, thank you very much for giving me this glass for my collection. 🙏🏻 😊

google_reviews.author: Camilla D'Incau
google_reviews.text: This is a typical Italian pizzeria, the only authentic one I have have been to since in Graz. All the pizzas I tried there were super good, as an Italian myself I am pretty picky about mozzarella and tomato sauce when eating pizza. Later I found out that all ingredients come from Southern Italy. If you are looking for a delicious pizza plus Italian vibes, this is the place to go to in Graz.

google_reviews.author: Abigaile Purice
google_reviews.text: Every time I've eaten here, the pizza has been delicious! The ingredients are fresh, and the flavor combinations are fantastic. The staff is friendly and attentive, and the atmosphere is pleasant. I highly recommend this pizzeria!

google_reviews.author: Giulio Zausa
google_reviews.text: Simply the best pizza I’ve eaten so far (and I’m Italian). The staff is really nice, the ingredients are very high quality (I wish they sold them on their own, please 🥺) and the prices are good. Come try it!!

google_reviews.author: Daniel Ivanovici
google_reviews.text: Very well prepared dishes in a traditional Austrian style. A real hub of the neighbourhood, but still quiet, relaxing and with a nice open air area.

google_reviews.author: Vetal Fiber
google_reviews.text: Gut

google_reviews.author: Andreas Goelles
google_reviews.text: Dear friends of refined Austrian home cooking! Here you'll find top quality at a fair price! Friendly, fast, cozy, and above all, incredibly delicious! The lunch menu is unbeatable, a strong recommendation!

google_reviews.author: Günter Pratter
google_reviews.text:
A hidden gem for outstanding, down-to-earth cuisine and warm hospitality

Gasthaus Wagner is a true treasure and comes highly recommended!

From the moment you arrive, you'll feel welcome and perfectly at ease.

The exceptionally friendly staff deserves special mention. You'll be served with a warmth and attentiveness that is sadly rare these days. Every request is promptly fulfilled with a smile, which significantly contributes to the overall positive atmosphere.

Gasthaus Wagner also excels in terms of value for money. The dishes are not only of excellent quality and lovingly prepared, but also fairly priced. You truly get your money's worth and leave the restaurant feeling you've received exceptional value.

Whether for a cozy dinner for two, a family outing, or a larger gathering – Gasthaus Wagner offers the perfect ambiance for every occasion and a cuisine that leaves nothing to be desired.

A visit is definitely worthwhile!

google_reviews.author: Roland Reicher
google_reviews.text:
A true gem in the culinary world. It's rare to find such good Wiener Schnitzel and Cordon Bleu.

And of course, the soups and salads are fantastic.

They really know how to cook here.

google_reviews.author: BRUNO DI GERONIMO QUINTERO
google_reviews.text: Merano is the typical place you come inside without expectations and... Boom 💥  the magic comes! Sometimes the dj is good and professional, sometimes you really want to kill him.

google_reviews.author: Marko Mesicek
google_reviews.text: Good music, normal prices for drinks, bit small place but has soul. Recommended

google_reviews.author: Hrvoje Kljajić
google_reviews.text: Good

google_reviews.author: Heinz Puchleitner
google_reviews.text: Cool

google_reviews.author: costa150577
google_reviews.text: Top

google_reviews.author: Ákos Radványi
google_reviews.text: Really nice and tasty pizzas (and other foods) which you can customize on an order card listing all options. The employees are also really friendly. The place offers a good view to the city. I like to come back here each time i visit Graz.

google_reviews.author: monica pronzini
google_reviews.text: Unlike what other reviews said, the service was slow and we had to wait quite a while to get our lunch; also the table was quite dirty. The concept of making up your own lunch on a slip of paper is nice and innovative and the food was ok and cheap. The ambience is young and quite crowded.

google_reviews.author: Melani Radmilović
google_reviews.text:
The food is disgusting! We got 3 disgustingly dry burgers. The meat smelled of being frozen, the service extremely inconsiderate. I paid €57 for 3 burgers. left her full plates and left.
I don't recommend it.

google_reviews.author: Vjekoslav Colić
google_reviews.text:
Was it just me or this place is just the best place in all of the Graz!
As soon as we arrived, staff came up to us and with SUPER friendly approach they helped us with with our order. Considering that we don't know a lot of German and there were a lot of other costumers, the waitress stayed with us to show us the menu.

After we ordered our pizzas, not much time passed until it arrived. And oh boy!! This guys really know what they are doing!! I couldn't believe that an costum order pizza could taste better than any other I had before! The doe was crispy, not dry at all and just with a mild taste so it can compliment all the toppings.

Go crazy with your order. I'm interested what you will find in your imagination ;)

google_reviews.author: Jonathan Tinnacher
google_reviews.text:
There can’t be many better places in Graz for a beer at the end of a sunny day. Wonderful views, great service, a decent selection of draft and bottled beer, and sensible prices!

They also do food with a sort of ‘build your own’ selection of pizzas, rostis, pastas etc. We didn’t have the chance to try these, but they looked good!

google_reviews.author: Nicholas (Exabius)
google_reviews.text:
Really cozy and welcoming pub with very personal interactions with the bartender. Knows a lot of inside drinks and music was also good. Happy to have found an irish pub outside of my home town that is up to standard.

SMOKING IS NO LONGER ALLOWED SINCE 2019 NOVEMBER SO DONT BE SCARED OF THE OTHER REVIEWS.

google_reviews.author: Sirapassorn Champa
google_reviews.text: Cozy Irish bar in Graz. The staff was so friendly and the foods were so great, Fish and chips was fresh :)

google_reviews.author: TomBecX
google_reviews.text:
Drink only, cash only.
The beer was ok.

google_reviews.author: Rachel Neylin
google_reviews.text: This is just about the best Irish Bar we've found in our travels (and we've tried a few!) The Guinness is properly stored & poured by Mark - the Bar Manager. He has a wealth of great stories to tell. Including the Bike Race - inside the Bar! It really would be worth travelling back to Graz just for that! Such a lovely place and lovely people, get there if you can.

google_reviews.author: Šimon Hrdlička
google_reviews.text:
During our visit to Graz we had been looking for the best pub in the city and I think we succeeded with this one. Staff very friendly and helpful. Great selection of drinks.
I am also glad that even during these hard times, personnel is always being safe and taking all measures - wearing masks, disinfecting and asking for some kind of certificate. Some people might find it silly or even get angry but measures like these are making me feel safer.
Keep up the great work, thank you.

I don't know where to begin:
Extremely unfriendly staff. Upon entering the bar, my friends and I were politely ignored, even though we kindly greeted them upon entry.
There were four of us, so we ordered four beers (0.33 or 0.25), but the staff said they only had small beers. They then charged me over €17 for these small beers. My request for a bill was denied... that shouldn't be allowed!!!

substandard. I asked the waiter about it: It's not my area of ​​responsibility; the cleaning lady comes every two days anyway. Oh well, that one :-)
