google_reviews.author: Devil85
google_reviews.text: Very good food, nice service

google_reviews.author: Ayce Melike Yılmaz
google_reviews.text: Unfortunately, we waited for the meat for an hour and the meat was not medium as desired, it was well-done. The potatoes served with the meat were incredibly salty and the meat sauce was not tasty. Our starter plates were forgotten. Maybe we'll go there again, not just to eat but to try their cocktails.

google_reviews.author: Mehmet Çakıcı
google_reviews.text: The waiter brought the orders completely incomplete. The meat, which was supposed to be medium, was well-done. The drinks were good but we were not happy with the food. Low quality service for such an expensive place.

google_reviews.author: lilla lajtai
google_reviews.text: Really cozy yet stylish design. The service was phenomenal and the food just simply perfect. We shared the grill plate, everything was cooked to perfection. Highly recommended! Thank you! 🙂

google_reviews.author: Stephen C
google_reviews.text: Food was amazing, I had the classic burger and my wife had carbonara. The staff are very friendly. No expense was spared decorating this restaurant, the place is extremely modern and clean. I would recommend

google_reviews.author: Alex Aprodu
google_reviews.text: Great place with a great atmosphere and great food, can only recommend.

google_reviews.author: Johannes der Jünger
google_reviews.text:
Very friendly staff and friendly regulars. Here, you can enjoy a few drinks in a pleasant environment.

It's wonderful that there are still places like this in Graz 🤗👍💪🍾

google_reviews.author: Kurt Pirker
google_reviews.text: Anyone who gives this place 5 stars has never been to the restaurant.

google_reviews.author: Ekkehard Missmann
google_reviews.text: It's just good.

google_reviews.author: Helmut McSchuly Schulhofer
google_reviews.text: A cult restaurant. Top

google_reviews.author: Adelheid Fahler
google_reviews.text: Friendly service

google_reviews.author: Bhakti Pawar
google_reviews.text:
I have ordered vegetarian pizza and he didn’t bake it for 5 mins and gave me half baked, soaked and tasteless pizza. Mushroom are soggy and unbaked, tomatoes are watery and so my pizza is. Cheese is not even melted. Overall horrible pizza. He charged 9.50 for this.

28/06- Thank you for your prompt response. Yes the order was Takeaway, the shop was closing and we needed other orders to take as well. I didn’t pay attention while the shopkeeper was keeping pizza in the box as we were in rush. I am an international person visiting Graz, I couldn’t go back or speak to the person as there was communication gap. The donar and kababs were good but Pizza wasn’t up to the quality. The tomatoes were raw and unbaked. The veggies and cheese were unbaked as well, as you can see in these picture. I am not here to pass judgement that quality of all your products are bad but I haven’t received a good service. I am showing my dissatisfaction. I hope that makes everything clear.

Ich habe eine vegetarische Pizza bestellt, aber sie wurde nicht einmal fünf Minuten gebacken. Stattdessen hat man mir eine halb rohe, durchweichte und geschmacklose Pizza serviert. Die Champignons sind matschig und nicht durchgegart, die Tomaten sind wässrig – genau wie die ganze Pizza. Der Käse ist nicht einmal geschmolzen. Insgesamt war es eine schreckliche Pizza. Dafür wurde mir 9,50 € berechnet.

google_reviews.author: Mohammad Rahmani
google_reviews.text: The owner is very nice. I have noticed he continousely tries to keep everything clean. If he is not working, he tries to chat with customers even in their native language. Unlike other small shops who avoid accepting banking cards, he lets people to pay with bankomat even for the smallest amount. I encourage everyone to visit his cozy shop.

google_reviews.author: Japji Kaur
google_reviews.text: So I was here and I must say the food was as good as I tought it would be. Please try the Kebap. I recommend it it very much.

google_reviews.author: Michel Oleynik
google_reviews.text: Recently expanded and renovated, the place now offers some tables and sofas to enjoy a typical kebap right there. One should not expect anything else than such a shop can offer: pizza and kebap in different variations. Combos with soft drinks supposedly are a deal; you can, however, always jump to the nearest BILLA to pay even cheaper for some Cola.

google_reviews.author: NIKOLA HALVAJIEFF
google_reviews.text: Really nice food…& the owner takes care to prepare food correctly….good guy 👌🏻👌🏻& pizza base crispy & thin ,freshly prepared.

google_reviews.author: ChunkyCherry
google_reviews.text:
Had the kebab today and I really liked it. There were only a few negatives but besides that everything was great.

The bread is super delicious and flavorful, and is also with a bunch of spices on the outside which I really liked. The fillings were nice and varied but I would have loved some cabbage in mine as well, the roasted vegetables inside were delicious however. Also the curry sauce and their chili was 10/10! Super delicious.

Only minuses were the iceberg lettuce which I thought was a bit “flat” and also the kebab should have had a lot more meat in my opinion. Another point, is that if they would have toasted the bread for a couple minutes it would really have elevated everything.

google_reviews.author: Tilly of &Tilly
google_reviews.text: Nice enough prices, good portions. And a lot of veggies for the salad.

google_reviews.author: ksenija banovic
google_reviews.text: Very tasty, fresh vegetables and big portions. Drinks for free. Highly recommmended. Great value for money!

google_reviews.author: Hendrik Bower
google_reviews.text:
This place changes name about every 6 months which is NOT AT ALL SUSPICIOUS but the kebabs are good, and especially *cheap*. Kebab prices are skyrocketing everywhere, and as of writing, it's €4.90 for a kebab + can of soft drink - whereas you're lucky to get just the kebab for that elsewhere. The turnover is high so the meat and salad are always very fresh. Friendly and efficient service. Generally enough space to eat in without having to share a table.

As well as the regulation scharf/mild sauces, they also have curry sauce.

google_reviews.author: M G
google_reviews.text: My favourite kebab in town

google_reviews.author: R Y
google_reviews.text: very nice , relaxing and cozy bar. staff very friendly, pleasant and helpful. went there for a glass of wine and stayed for two.

google_reviews.author: Agata Szabova
google_reviews.text: A fantastic bar in the heart of the city! The drinks were delicious and the staff was just wonderful. We had a great time, thank you!

google_reviews.author: Darina Vaseva
google_reviews.text: The cocktails were great and the atmosphere was cosy. The problem was that the waitress took a significant tip for herself alone without asking. Of course I would have give her a tip, it’s just frustrating when she decides alone.

google_reviews.author: Sarah Lesjak
google_reviews.text:
recommend with reservations - small and cosy bar, friendly and attentive staff, unfortunately reckless handling of allergens.

The interior and seating is narrow yet very cosy and intimate. The drinks menu covers all one could be looking for, including non-alcoholic drinks, wine and spirits and a price range typical for the area.
Care must be taken when ordering wine or spirits that are served with a straw - it is made from pasta but the allergen (gluten/wheat) is not highlighted anywhere nor is it written in the menu that it comes with a pasta-straw. As I suffer food allergies, to me this is irresponsible and made my evening end rather unfortunate.
I've told the waitress about it and suggested that they should make a note in the menu and she  was very considerate of my situation and feedback.
Despite this inconvenient experience I've enjoyed a very pleasant stay until that point and recommend paying a visit.

google_reviews.author: Sarah Haas
google_reviews.text: This place is so nice. I love the atmosphere and interior. Also they have really great wine. It's super cozy.

google_reviews.author: Anhuar Lopez Rodriguez
google_reviews.text: The best Kaiserschmarrn I have ever eaten in my life, please of you’re in Graz just go there for that.The schweinschnitzel was ok a little bit dry. And the fritatten suppe is a must in Austrian cuisine.

google_reviews.author: Dan J
google_reviews.text:
Mohrenviert is a restaurant I discovered thanks to Google reviews, which were very encouraging. I visited around 3 PM, and it seems that between 2 PM and 5 PM the menu is a bit more limited, more of a bar-style menu compared to what they serve after 5 PM.

That said, we had a really delicious meal. The beef tartare was absolutely amazing – highly recommended for anyone who loves tartare. The taste was incredible, almost making you wonder whether you’re eating meat or some kind of perfectly prepared vegetables. Truly outstanding, easily a 10/10.

We also had the Wiener Schnitzel. The choice was a bit limited at that time of the day, but the schnitzel was very tasty and well prepared. If you’re a fan of schnitzel, you won’t be disappointed.

Finally, we tried the half chicken (I don’t recall the exact name). We expected it to come in pieces, but it was breaded, a bit in the style of KFC – still very tasty and enjoyable.

The staff is very friendly, though sometimes they don’t immediately notice guests, which can make the service feel a bit slow at times.

Overall, a great experience and definitely worth visiting if you’re in Graz

google_reviews.author: Chengrui Hu
google_reviews.text:
Wonderful experience! The tartare is fresh and the seasoning is special without covering the original taste of the meat. I would definitely recommend it. The Schnitzel is great with crispy outer layer. They have two options for it: one is pork and another is veal. We tried the pork one and they handled the original taste of the pork very well. Also, I was impressed by the potatoes. The cake of the day is delicious too. It’s not too sweet and won’t make you feel too much after finishing it. And the ice cream dip is a surprising fit for the cake. Staff are friendly and caring. Had a great time eating here.

PS. The cake of the day might vary by chef’s choice and the wait time is a bit longer than other dishes (about 20-30 minutes), so if you’re tourists rushing between attraction spots, do think it thoroughly if you have time for it before you order it.

google_reviews.author: FoodBasics -
google_reviews.text:
This restaurant looks very cosy inside. It struck me for their regional products and the high quality of their ingredients.
The salad was amazing - a big portion full of taste.
Also the carrot - very buttery yet the lemon zest gave the freshness needed. Really good presentations overall. The meat was so tender and the wine was good too. The only down side was that I felt waiters to be slightly stressed and after having finished my meal, I was told that I had just 15 more minutes - something that wasn’t mentioned during the booking. Still, I do recommend this! Also very central in Graz.

google_reviews.author: Stephen Spencer
google_reviews.text:
With just one night in Graz and no bookings we turned up at Mohrenwirt based on the reviews, and despite the place being packed they quickly seated us at the bar.
I’d describe the food here as being comfort food, but it was very good, and the service was warm and friendly and the wine recommendations were superb.
A great first night stop in Graz.

google_reviews.author: WestWorlder
google_reviews.text: I had the pulled pork burger. The guy was very nice and friendly. I thought there were still sandwiches but apparently now they do burgers instead. But still a great burger. Bun was toasted, soft, gave it a crunch without being hard, and thick enough to hold the pork with its juices. The pork was tasty and a rather generous portion. The sauerkraut or slaw could have had maybe some other extra sauce on top of it (just a personal preference), but it added balance to the burger so it was pretty good. Overall, closer to a 4.5/5. Would come back

google_reviews.author: Niko Frommhold
google_reviews.text: Nice fast Imbiss to dine in or take away. They changed their menu, be aware, now they serve Burgers and chips. The not anymore available Phillycheese sandwich is gone 🤨 but the Angus cheeseburger 🍔 is recommended! I got mine a bit too rare but it’s all about your order! Good selection of beers available too! You should try it!

google_reviews.author: Özgür Savaşal
google_reviews.text: Best burger I’ve ever eaten. Kevin was very nice, fast and obviously talented. Portion is very big, you might wonder if you can’t finish but worry not - it’s so tasty! (I’d wish there were more seats available, however in the summer when the banks outside can be used - I’m sure it’s great)

google_reviews.author: Kiss Ádám
google_reviews.text: Very tasty burger, the meat melted in my mouth and the bun was excellent as well. I recommend it!

google_reviews.author: Skid On The Road
google_reviews.text: Amazing burgers! But they don't have Philly cheesesteaks as some of the other reviews and photos imply.

google_reviews.author: Benjamin Annett
google_reviews.text:
Hidden gem in Graz. 💎 For real Thai food lovers! 🤗

Having lived in Thailand for several years, I usually approach “authentic Thai cuisine” abroad with low expectations. But Bangkok-Eck is in a different league entirely.

From the very first spoonful of their Massaman Curry, I knew I was back in Southeast Asia. Not just in taste, in atmosphere, balance, emotion. A whole cinnamon stick, generous galangal, star anise, tender chicken, all simmering in a rich sauce that tasted just like the street stalls of Krung Thep.

Even the satay skewers were spot on: smoky, juicy, just sweet enough, and best enjoyed in pairs, exactly like in Bangkok and in Sri Racha, where I lived. This place isn’t a European version of Thai food. It’s Thailand, nestled in a quiet corner of Graz.

Beyond the food, the team is full of heart. Warm, respectful, and genuinely passionate. They’re not just serving dishes, they’re sharing memories. There’s a soul here, and you feel it from the first bite to the last smile. I talked to the owner and she goes to Thailand to get some products directly from there. I can tell the difference! 👌

On grey days in Graz, skip the schnitzel! You know where to go now. 😇

ขอบคุณมากครับ 🙏
Thank you so much for bringing real Thai soul to Austria !🇦🇹😃

google_reviews.author: Jan Ovcar
google_reviews.text: So far the best Thai restaurant in Graz.I was a bit skeptical before coming here because we first tried the restaurant with the best rating in Graz and it was not authentic Thai food at all - tasted very average. We decided to ask other Thai people which restaurant they recommend and this was one of the two recommendations and it definitely did not disappoint. There is always enough chili at hand if you like your food very spicy like we do and the food tastes very rich and authentic Thai.

google_reviews.author: Opritescu Azghadi Elena
google_reviews.text: The food was great and soup great and enough to enjoy  it

google_reviews.author: Johannes Khinast
google_reviews.text:
Ouch. Extremely long waiting time (we waited 1 h for spring rolls). Food soso. My chicken leg in curry was cold inside.
Sorry for bad review. It’s a new restaurant and the young people running it surely are still adapting. Next year things certainly will be much better.

google_reviews.author: Mónica Cano Abadía
google_reviews.text: The atmosphere is so nice. Vegan food option, and very tasty!! I will definitely gome back!

google_reviews.author: Phillip Rohrmeier
google_reviews.text:
Very dog-friendly, but the music leaves something to be desired.

There's a dartboard 🤙🏼

google_reviews.author: Miriam Strobl
google_reviews.text: Top service – absolutely world-class! You feel absolutely welcome, great ambiance, and delicious food

google_reviews.author: Nicole Waldhauser
google_reviews.text: Very friendly service, very nice owners, great guests... affordable prices... very cozy place... I'm already looking forward to coming back.

google_reviews.author: Gerhard Albrecher
google_reviews.text: Great restaurant, very nice owners, in summer it's also nice to be able to sit outside and enjoy a good drop of wine, beer or coffee.

google_reviews.author: ge schrei
google_reviews.text: A venue for the 70+ generation. It's wonderful that they're trying to offer a meeting place for this age group!

google_reviews.author: Derin
google_reviews.text: The atmosphere was so lovely. The food was delicious.

google_reviews.author: Mihaela Koleva
google_reviews.text: I really like this place and would definitely recommend it. The goulash and apple strudel are excellent! The atmosphere is very cozy with a traditional flair. It's clean and well-maintained. The service is very nice and friendly. A great café for breakfast or for coffee and cake in the afternoon.

google_reviews.author: Noah W.
google_reviews.text: A lovely café with a charming atmosphere and a manageable selection of food and cakes. The food is delicious, and the service is very friendly.

google_reviews.author: Chris Cambria
google_reviews.text: I only wanted to grab a quick coffee, but I was absolutely delighted by the warm and welcoming atmosphere :) A friendly clientele, a delicious apple strudel made according to Mom's recipe, and a really good spritzer convinced me to stay longer and that I'll definitely be back. Thank you so much, Isabella, for your hospitality!

google_reviews.author: Herbert Edelsbacher
google_reviews.text: Cozy café with many regulars

google_reviews.author: Sarah E K Andresen
google_reviews.text: Amazing vegan dinner! We had the seven course surprise menu with wine pairing. Each course was unique, creative, and beautifully prepared. The service was impeccable with perfect timing of the courses and wine pairings. Thank you to the chef and staff  for a lovely evening!

google_reviews.author: Katrin Wrulich
google_reviews.text: had a wonderful evening at Gerüchteküche! I love high-quality, fresh food that is locally sourced. It's incredible what the chef is capable of: had 5 courses (vegetarian) and loved every single creation. However, great food is nothing without a charming, passionate and knowledgeable service. Therefore, I simply have to point out that this is one of the few places where service and food meet on an excellent level. Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: M C
google_reviews.text:
Probably the best vegan gastro cuisine I ever tried.
The wine selection was matching perfectly with what was served.
The chef was really friendly and provide information about each meal.
You must reserve for a dinner and it will take you at least 2 hours to eat.

google_reviews.author: Tara Venditti
google_reviews.text: Creative. Unique. Extraordinarily healthy,  locally sourced ingredients and gourmet presentation. It was intimate and provided an atmosphere where one was completely taken care of by extremely competent and caring staff. The chef prepared all of my courses separately for allergies and created new,  spontaneous recipes just for me!  Amazing. Onstead of egg,  he used bone marrow i  my main course. It was genius! Instead of making me feel guilty for presenting an allergy,  he made me feel special!

google_reviews.author: Stefan Friedl
google_reviews.text:
Great place for great food - don't be coward and just trust the chef.
There is no menue available but you can select between 3, 4 or 5 courses. The kitchen shows flexibility if really required but it pays back being brave and just going with the recommended composition.

google_reviews.author: Elizabeth
google_reviews.text: Best falafel I’ve ever had. fresh, good portion, good flavours, good quality ingredients. Will be back! :)

google_reviews.author: Svitlana Zhytnia
google_reviews.text:
Very tasty, a lot of options to choose from.
My favourite place to grab a falafel roll!

google_reviews.author: john paichl
google_reviews.text:
Well worth the walk to find this excellent falafel 🧆 shop, friendly owner, and the falafel was …. So tasty and fresh! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ highly recommended.
*I arrived in Graz on a Sunday, when pretty much everything was closed. The Airbnb I rented was in a few streets away from the Falafel Shop and I was so happy to find a place where to get food on a Sunday*

google_reviews.author: Patryk Wycech
google_reviews.text: Amazing falafel bowl, sauces are insane

google_reviews.author: Wandern Leo
google_reviews.text: Fantastic falafels, best ones you can get in Graz and super friendly service! Check out their hummus variations. Love the spicy jalapeño hummus. Really recommend this place enough, go taste it yourself. You won’t regret it.

google_reviews.author: Sa Wol
google_reviews.text:
I visited more than a week ago and I'm still thinking of the slice of cake I ate. I might need to visit again!
This wasn't my first (nor the last!) time át this Konditorei and everything I've raten so far, look good, tasted amazing and nothing is too sweet. Just the right amount.
A wonderful, friendly place, a bit nostalgic :)
The first time I visited was to investigate their doughnut, because it was voted to be the best one in town. And it really was amazing!
No matter what I try next time, I'm sure it'll be amazing. Also, sorry for the half-eaten cake photo - it was so delicious, I forgot to take a photo before I started 😅

google_reviews.author: Tomislav Rajter
google_reviews.text: Thank you for warm welcome and excellent cakes! And Bier!

google_reviews.author: Umut B.
google_reviews.text: Bought a birthday cake from here, it was both looking good, cheap and delicious. Everyone was so caring when I wanted some special fun stuff, and they found everything I've wanted. I cannot add the cake since we literally finished a 6 people cake in seconds. Definitely recommend it

google_reviews.author: Ella Yean
google_reviews.text:
I ordered a birthday cake for my son in October two years ago in this shop. That was when we just arrived in Graz and were not so familiar with everything. (We found this shop by searching Google)
The cake was quite crude, totally white and  simple, without ANY decorations (what are those beautiful pictures used for? We didn't give any limitation of the price, then for what reason did we get such a scratchy one instead? Shrugs*), and the cake box was uncovered on the top (a round hole on the top board as if it was about to be served on the table). I asked whether it had a lid or at least a paper bag to be carried, the lady said  "No" indifferently(no other words, not at all), with the cold, impatient face just like when we ordered it together with our boy. I wonder whether everyone has to take his BIRTHDAY CAKE  home this way? But by then I thought to myself maybe this was how cake shops worked in Graz. So I took the cake,  held it by hand and took tram line 1, and climbed all the way up the Mariatrost hill on foot to our rented apartment, with its top completely exposed to the air all the way.
Now we've moved to our current house, been accustomed to everything here and gradually got to know Graz and its normally friendly people. And when I look back and recall what I received on my boy's 5-year-old birthday, I gotta say it was awful, and it wasn't worth it at all.  And given the fact that I can't help returning here to leave this review two long years after the event, I need to admit that it was very impressive as well.

google_reviews.author: Sascha Kuhness
google_reviews.text: Really nice small place that offer a wide variety of different delicious cakes and "strudel". They also have coffee to go which is something you might not expect at first. Not ideal to sit down though, as it's really small and cramped, and when you go there during peak hours you probably wont get a table.

google_reviews.author: John Pardon
google_reviews.text: It's just really really great! Flavors meld perfectly, pleasant attentive service. Quality is consistent across my visits. Definitely the best restaurant I've been to in Graz!

google_reviews.author: Amara Crosby
google_reviews.text: The food was delicious, the staff was friendly and timely, and the ambience was perfect. I don't go out to eat by myself often, but I did this time and I had a lovely dinner. Can't wait to come back and bring others with me!  Had the ribeye med-rare, it was cooked exactly. The augratin potatoes and creamed spinach were very good.

google_reviews.author: Ling Ho
google_reviews.text: A small but cosy restaurant. Foie gras in main dish size was pan fried to perfection served on a bed of truffle puree. Just like the ones in france. The xo aged steak in medium rare was the key highlight. It was seared to perfection, was fragrant, juicy and tender. Spinach is a good side, texture is tender and not too chewy. On second visit we tried the tuna steak and beef steak. The steak again did not disappoint, very tender and juicy. The tuna steak is well prepared and the sauce and bed of vegetables is tasty, almost asian in flavour with what tastes like a culmination of soy sauce and sesame. Service is excellent too, servers are warm and hospitable. We will be glad to return whenever we are back in Graz.

google_reviews.author: fernando de la cruz lopez
google_reviews.text: Stopped in for a quick bite and ended up staying for dessert because everything was so good. I had the soup of the day (creamy tomato basil), followed by a grilled veggie panini. Everything tasted fresh and homemade. Ended with their signature brownie sundae — warm, gooey, and absolutely worth every bite. Service was quick and kind.

google_reviews.author: Tommy Gripenstam
google_reviews.text:
If you want to have some premium steaks for a change, this is the place to visit in Graz. A little bit hidden on the small streets but close enough to the center.

Had the 300 grams Ribeye steak and that was one of the 5 best steaks I ever had. Soo tender and a fantastic taste, still waters my mouth thinking back..

Not so pricey compared with the premium meat restaurants, well worth the visit.

My thanks to the chef! 👍

google_reviews.author: Alun Lewis
google_reviews.text: Not a bad little boozer

google_reviews.author: Günter Pratter
google_reviews.text: It always has been a small, fine restaurant with friendly service. You're immediately welcomed by the regulars!

google_reviews.author: Brigitte Schwab
google_reviews.text: Lives up to its name. Small but cozy.

google_reviews.author: LUCIE VASKOVA
google_reviews.text: Small, charming, but always fun. I highly recommend it.

google_reviews.author: Weihenstein “HAVC Tec”
google_reviews.text:
Guests urinate on the tree in front of the restaurant.
Absolutely unacceptable

google_reviews.author: Sean Wiseman
google_reviews.text:
No food, but they allow you to bring food from outside if you want.

12 different Meads, try them all!

Cash only, so make sure you bring some.

Bartender is awesome, ask for recommendations.

google_reviews.author: c. Antonia
google_reviews.text: A guy took me here once. We’re getting married.

google_reviews.author: Vidya s
google_reviews.text: First time trying beer with honey(Met) and it was nice. The bar staff went out of her way to help me order and also helped with tram directions. As I'm on holiday visiting a family member who recently opened a caribbean fusion restaurant in Smart City ( liming Spot) so I don't speak German. The bar atmosphere is reminiscent of old Viking or Knights . It was a nice experience for us .

google_reviews.author: Manuela Pausan
google_reviews.text: Great place offering a great atmosphere, a nice variety of honey wines and best rock/viking/metal music.

google_reviews.author: Candy Zimmermann
google_reviews.text:
Location: only a 5 min walk from the main square

Bar: very rustic and cool. It felt like I was back in the time of knights.

Barkeeper: the owner is super friendly and chatty, which makes you feel welcome.

Bathroom: it was Okey.. but I will try to avoid it the next time

Drinks: he is famous for his 'Met Bier', which is sweeter than normal beer. The prices are a little high but for like once a month it's worth it :)

google_reviews.author: Josef Letonja
google_reviews.text: Very good cuisine

google_reviews.author: Fam. Hainzl
google_reviews.text: Nice conversations, delicious drinks & snacks

google_reviews.author: Simon Brugner
google_reviews.text: Simply delicious!

google_reviews.author: Ronald Wotruba
google_reviews.text: Great place, small but excellent.

google_reviews.author: Erika erika
google_reviews.text: Friendly service, top cafe

google_reviews.author: Uwe Poelderl
google_reviews.text: Closed due to incompetence....

google_reviews.author: Martin “MMartin” Matuska
google_reviews.text: Good coffee. Cozy

google_reviews.author: Andreas Thibet
google_reviews.text: Top Cafe

google_reviews.author: Hannah
google_reviews.text:
The pizzas are actually good, but the service is a disaster.

Some of our deliveries didn't even include the pizzas we ordered. The vegan pizza with vegan salami had real salami on it, and the vegetarian pizza also arrived with salami, even though we hadn't specifically selected that option.

We immediately called the pizzeria and calmly explained everything. Unfortunately, they weren't at all accommodating. Instead, they simply accused us of making a mistake when ordering. We've been ordering from them for a long time and have never had any problems before, and we double-checked the order and certainly didn't order extra salami on a vegan pizza.

New pizzas? Forget it.

Instead, the employee on the phone argued with us and consistently blamed us. That's really not good customer service. It's more likely a system error.

The suggested solution was that we could simply remove the salami. Of course, if you're vegan and find the taste of salami disgusting, that's completely useless.

The good and customer-oriented approach would have been to simply replace the two pizzas. Anyone who values ​​customer satisfaction would do that, but unfortunately, that's not the case here.

In fact, you're being gaslighted.

google_reviews.author: Kleiner_Wolfi
google_reviews.text: Monday, August 11, 2025: 1 x Mini Pizza Mushrooms, very good 👍 I liked the fresh mushrooms. 1 x Mini Pizza Quattro Formaggi, the cheeses were great 😁 Top! Chicken wings were disappointing again - the meat was juicy, but could have been a bit crispier, and it lacked the spice described on the menu 😕 😕 boring. 1 x Lahmachu was okay - I'm not used to the taste, herbs like oregano, and perhaps a bit more spice would be recommended - could be improved. EVERYTHING was delivered - very quickly and on time, it was a pleasure. Bravo 👍 THANK YOU for the clean delivery. Regards, Wolfi 😁

google_reviews.author: Andreas Skischally
google_reviews.text: The best delivery service in Graz! All the dishes I ordered were first-class, and the portions are huge. I highly recommend it. Greetings from Andy in Switzerland, staying at the Wiener Straße City Apartments. I can highly recommend them too!

google_reviews.author: toni tauschmann
google_reviews.text: I ordered several pizzas for a group, and everything went perfectly. Even my last-minute request for a slightly later delivery was easily accommodated. The pizzas arrived oven-fresh on the newly agreed delivery date. And most importantly, the pizzas tasted great :)

google_reviews.author: Hells Kitchen
google_reviews.text: I ordered two pizzas and a drink. The drink never arrived, and the pizzas were absolutely disgusting. 🤮 A complete disgrace!!! How can anyone make such bad pizzas? Absolutely nothing was right!

google_reviews.author: Péter “P_T_RPARK_R” Cseke
google_reviews.text:
A nice place to be, either inside or outside no matter, good local blend coffee named Baristas, great drinks smoothies and always fresh made snacks!

During the week you can also try some vegan or vegetarian menus for an appropriate price, if you prefer to take away, no problem.

At night the coffeehouse turns into a real Bar sometimes also with DJ's, bringing vibes to the whole Place.

Service is great and always with a smile!

Go on, and check it out yourself!

google_reviews.author: Maximilian Bernsteiner
google_reviews.text:
Very friendly staff! They really pay attention to presentation, from coffee and shakes to even the set menus! Everything is beautifully presented and tastes delicious!
A quiet, cozy atmosphere since the reopening 🥂 They even offer cocktails!! Since my first visit, Vis a Vis has now been my regular haunt! Even during times like the pandemic, they offer delivery and takeout!! Truly the best bar/coffeehouse in all of Graz! 🥂😇

google_reviews.author: Sara Rainer
google_reviews.text: The waitress says she's overwhelmed with only two occupied tables. Half the menu is either unavailable or poorly prepared. The owner really needs to make sure there's enough food in the café!

google_reviews.author: Mojola12000 Jo
google_reviews.text: The waitress told us at 10 a.m. on a Monday morning that she had to go to Spar to get ingredients. We waited 20 minutes for our shake and ultimately cancelled our food order and went to Auer instead.

google_reviews.author: Alexandra Schrank
google_reviews.text:
Excellent restaurant!

They have a delicious lunch menu!

Breakfast and coffee are also highly recommended.

Very friendly owner :)
Cozy and clean!

google_reviews.author: Gabriel Gruber
google_reviews.text:
We've already had dinner here several times. The staff are very friendly, the ambience is fine (what you would expect). Reservations are almost always necessary for several people (more than 3). It's unlikely that you'll get a seat if you're lucky. In summer it is quite warm inside.

1) The first time we had prosciutto with artichoke and bread as a starter. Then a pizza marinara special and a kind of musakka. All dishes were excellent. As a non-wine drinker, I really enjoyed the white house wine.

2) As a starter we had the Russian shrimp salad, which was excellent. The fresh bread with it was fantastic. For the main course we had various pizzas, Capricciosa, Gobbo (not on the pictures), Intrigrante, Calcone and a Rustica I think (but correct me if I am wrong). The dough is very thin, which I personally like better than thick bases. The edges are crispy and a little soft. Unfortunately, it doesn't come close to a classic Napoliatana pizza (that's complaining on a high level).

google_reviews.author: Philip Daniel
google_reviews.text: Food to a long time to come out despite the restaurant being half empty. Not a single piece of Octopus in my dish which was advertised as having so. I understand if you have run out for the day, but you need to tell the customer.

google_reviews.author: DHALIA R
google_reviews.text: When we entered,restaurant was almost empty.We went on the upper floor and we choosed the place but the waitres didnt like it because she planned other people there ( even noone arrived next three hours) because she just want ro finish what ia in her head and she turned upside with her eyes which is very impolite behaviour.Within few minutes she turned her eyes upside down few times.After we notice that she is a very nervous person.She is loud and fights with other workers loudly.We waited longer for food.It is freezing there.We were with blankets but still very,very cold feets.We were waiting just to go home to heat ourselves because it is extremly cold there.Imagine that they save for that.Shame!!In the restaurant people want to enjoy not to make them business! She used to forget what we ordered..more wine etc...she is a strange person and place became strange.Food is ok but expencive and the restaurant was better before! Pitty,because no good italian restaurant in Graz.

google_reviews.author: R Štefan
google_reviews.text:
Very nice experience :) one has to appreciate the very friendly and original staff, the waiter gave us a very friendly greeting right at the entrance, waiting on us as we were entering the restaurant. Location it self is nice, plus for all the bottles on the walls as decoration. Main point is of course the food ;) As we had fish 🐟 dishes, all was fresh and very tasty, but the portions aren't exceptionally big. You will need the bread on the side. The profiteroles at the end is something else, full of chocolate and cream, fingerlicking 😋

Food: 4 would be a mistake, 4,5 stars
Service: excellent, one of the best in Graz
Atmosphere: good, could me more cosy

google_reviews.author: Christina Schirl
google_reviews.text: Highly recommended! Have been in this restaurant for a few times now, and the food has always been great! The Pizza is thin, richly loaded, and the shellfish starter for two was huge and delicious! Maybe important: During the afternoon the kitchen itself is closed for some hours, so you can "just" order pizza!

google_reviews.author: Martha Milch
google_reviews.text:
I recently spent an evening at La Tavernetta, tucked away in Graz’s Old Town near Südtirolerplatz. The charming outdoor terrace, complete with umbrella-shaded tables and a backdrop of a baroque church, instantly transported me to an Italian piazza setting.

Inside, the space feels authentically Italian—warm lighting, rustic touches, and cozy seating that makes it feel more trattoria than tourist trap.

I began with a mixed seafood appetizer, followed by a Risotto Asparagi—creamy and fresh with tender asparagus. The Grigliata Mista di Pesce brought a generous platter of grilled sea bass, calamari, and seasonal vegetables, each component highlighting its natural flavors. To finish, I couldn’t resist the Tiramisu, light and classic.

Service was genuine and attentive—friendly without ever rushing me, suggesting wine pairings, and explaining dishes with approachable flair.

google_reviews.author: Tom Maier
google_reviews.text: We chose this authentic Italian restaurant for our special dinner, and it was a wonderful evening full of enjoyment. You can feel the original Italian flair and atmosphere from the friendly welcome. All the menus are fresh (fish), creative and delicious. Together with delicious Prosecco, Vino Blanca & Grappa -tutti perfetto!

google_reviews.author: Der Eisenvater
google_reviews.text: Very tasty Pizza Calabrese with Stracciatella. Really good Italian taste. Service was not too caring but still okay.

google_reviews.author: Marius Matei
google_reviews.text: The waiters are a bunch of SWINDLERS/THIEVES!! Although it's not exactly good manners, but, if you pay with cash, ABSOLUTELY COUNT the money/(cash) you get back (in change/rest) from those "waiters"/THIEVES: if you pay with large bills, they tend to "mince" the change (back) in the lowest bills possible (€5/10), and swindle you of €10-20!!

google_reviews.author: Cookie RFW
google_reviews.text: High-quality, traditional Italian cucina. Fresh seafood and pasta. Special wine selection and attentive and well-trained service team. Went here for celebrations and were very happy from the very start till the tiramisu. The location of La Tavernetta is nice for summer evenings outside as well as inside for the winter time.

google_reviews.author: Gulfam Hussain
google_reviews.text: I stopped by this shop today and picked up some salami and chicken. The prices are really reasonable, and I found the staff to be super friendly and helpful. It’s a great place if you’re looking for Halal products like chicken.

google_reviews.author: T. S.
google_reviews.text: Drove from Slovenia to get some arabic and Middle Eastern groceries. The quality is good, and the variety of choices is great. Quite affordable. The people working there are very helpful.

google_reviews.author: Martin Oláh
google_reviews.text: Good place, they have a full goat head for €2,50 if you're ever curious. They also sell goat balls and stuff.

google_reviews.author: Ro Ma
google_reviews.text: Great choice.  Good prices.

google_reviews.author: Anamaria Clara Grama-Asztalos
google_reviews.text: They have Aleppo Soap and quite cheap and many other things with reasonable prices. I was looking to try the Aleppo soap for a while now, never got around to order it from Internet.

restaurants.name: La Fleur

google_reviews.author: Susan Backhaus
google_reviews.text: Ordered the avo toast and a tea. Received 2 pieces of toasted bauernbrot but only one piece had a topping, the other bread slice was randomly placed on top ... not a lot for over 10 euros. I wanted milk with my tea, it cost me 40c extra! I certainly won't go back, it was all a rip off.

google_reviews.author: Leo X
google_reviews.text: Really quite good for a shopping centre restaurant. Large portions, good chips and the waffles are nice too.

google_reviews.author: Ádám Soltész
google_reviews.text:
Great quality food with great service. Friendly attitude even to non-german speaking guests.

One major issue is that there is no card payment option. This was very surprising. Come on...we are well into the 21st century.

google_reviews.author: Guriya Kumari
google_reviews.text: The outside is really shiny, but their food quality and service is very bad, not interested anymore.

google_reviews.text: How can a healthy person behave so badly! I have been in delusion ever since, How rude!

google_reviews.text: Tasty cocktails. Huge selection of different ones. Stuff are so nicely and friendly.

google_reviews.author: Yazan M Rihan
google_reviews.text: Wonderful vibes and selection of cocktails. Make sure to visit during the happy hour!

google_reviews.author: Tamás Kovács

google_reviews.author: Simon Corazza
google_reviews.text: The service is great! And the waiter Patrick is really cool and brings the drinks fast! Happy hour for cocktails is from 17 h to 20 h everyday.

google_reviews.author: Thomas Ulz
google_reviews.text: Great selection of whisky and beer plus very friendly staff and a good atmosphere make for a very good bar to enjoy a couple of drinks.

google_reviews.author: Brennan Bell
google_reviews.text: What looks to be a random hole in the wall of a bar, Die Beate has a beautiful selection of whiskeys, focusing primarily on scotch, but with a handful of others as well. The prices are hard to beat, too!

Beer is good, great selection of whisky and scotch

Friendly barman,  lack of food is a minus, but you can bring your lunch with you 😋

google_reviews.author: Valentin Costianu
google_reviews.text: Great place to try out interesting whiskeys

google_reviews.author: R Jolly
google_reviews.text: Decent bar, mostly urban audience ranging from ca. 25-60, with majority in their 30s & 40s, good selection of beers & broad variety of Whiskey ( more than are found on the menu) occasionally live music and whiskey tasting, very friendly staff.

google_reviews.author: Marc Graz
google_reviews.text: A cozy restaurant with a wonderful hostess and friendly guests. Quaint.

google_reviews.author: ANDREA SCHULTER
google_reviews.text: ORIGINAL WITH FAMILY TRADITION! VERY GOOD QUALITY, FRIENDLY AND COZY!

google_reviews.author: Markus Moser

google_reviews.text: Old but good

google_reviews.text: It's a cozy restaurant at Griesplatz.

google_reviews.author: Susi K
google_reviews.text: Nice winebar with good regional selection. Didn’t try the food but enjoyed some drinks. No doubt a great spot.

google_reviews.author: George Buchanan
google_reviews.text:
What a discovery, great location, the owner is a Sommelier and was super helpful and informative, she introduced us to Sammling by Pilch and their Sauvignon, we bought a bottle of the Sammling and have ordered more wine from Pilch.
If you are going in the evening I would suggest booking as there maybe an event

google_reviews.author: Stephen Prust
google_reviews.text: Sat in the courtyard and enjoyed a very good glass of wine. Service was friendly and attentive. A place to have a relaxed drink and chat.

🙌
