restaurants.google_address: EKZ Shopping Nord, Wiener Str. 351, 8051 Graz, Austria

google_reviews.author: Aylin Yasmin Eder
google_reviews.text: Top

google_reviews.author: Marion Behindblueeyes
google_reviews.text: An incredibly friendly and attentive owner. Delicious new drinks, hot or cold. And in my opinion, the most delicious bagels ever. :) Located right in the middle of the shopping center, this place is a wonderful place to relax.

google_reviews.author: JJ
google_reviews.text:
Dear Reader!

The café is very cozy. The staff is very welcoming. Basically, they offer more than you'd expect in a small shopping center.

Highlight: Tribeka coffee beans – the best coffee beans in Graz.

The Bean Bear milkshake is also highly recommended 😉

google_reviews.author: Marcel Pauri
google_reviews.text: A very cozy café with a pleasant atmosphere. The coffees and drinks taste excellent – ​​perfectly prepared and very aromatic. The food is also fresh, lovingly presented, and truly delicious. You can tell that great emphasis is placed on quality here. The service is friendly and attentive; you immediately feel at ease. Definitely a place you'll want to visit again!

google_reviews.author: Nina Stuffer
google_reviews.text: Ich war heute zum ersten Mal hier und habe einen super Eindruck. Der beste Matcha Latte weit und breit. Tolle Getränkeauswahl. Unheimlich ansprechende Frühstückskarte, wir werden ganz bestimmt noch das Frühstück ausprobieren. Sehr sympathischer Besitzer.

restaurants.name: Meat.art

google_reviews.author: Oksana Aliabieva
google_reviews.text: The place is very popular among the locals. Many visitors from the nearby villages also come to visit this restaurant. The food is always delicious, everything is fresh. I recommend trying the drink with pear and watermelon. The wings are very tasty, the sandwiches are big. The staff speaks English and German. One of my favorite places in Graz.

google_reviews.author: Nikola Rošić
google_reviews.text:
This was my second visit to this restaurant, and I must say, it serves the best burger I have tried in Graz.
I ordered a Styrian Mountain Burger, and it exceeded my expectations!
My girlfriend agreed that it was typically Steirisch.

I would only suggest that a slightly larger portion of fries would be appreciated.

google_reviews.author: Nati G
google_reviews.text: I'm pregnant and feel disgusted by most food these days, but today I was absolutely CRAVING chili con carne. We found this place that does delivery but for some reason the software was buggy and the chili was the only item we couldn't order. My husband called and they agreed that we could order a chili nachos instead and they'll send us a chili con carne. It was everything I was dreaming of and you guys may have saved our marriage 😂

google_reviews.author: isabella “izy” schultz-wild
google_reviews.text: very good quesadillas and sauces. they provide unlimited sauces: garlic, curry, mayo, ketchup, and spicy ketchup. this place is very clean (bathroom included) just a little overpriced in my opinion. 12€ for two of those quesadillas on the picture. very friendly staff and mood. good music.

google_reviews.author: Thomas Starlinger
google_reviews.text: Never have I ever ... been evicted from a venue ... until recently that is. Along with a whole group of like-minded Volleyballers (30-60y, f&m, all sorts of backgrounds and employs). We usually play 6-8pm and visited the venue in question for the last 90+ weeks. 6-16 people for a about 90+ minutes (closes around 10pm). I always thought that for once we bring in good money and for the second we had a good mutual appreciation. Until about a week ago, we tried to enter and the manager made it clear, that we are no longer welcome to the establishment. The reasoning was along the lines of creating a stressfull and hostile atmosphere for the waiters, with even them being afraid of us. For the stress, well, feeding 6-16 people in 90 minutes ... For the hostility, no answer to that from my side aka no idea. May this be as it is, I'm writing this review mostly because of the abismal communication skills shown. Taking our money plus tips for the better part of 2 years and then booting us from the venue without so much of an explanation or even an example is a little disturbing to say the least. So take care what you do when you visit.

restaurants.google_address: WienerStraße 331 Shoppingcenter Graz Nord, 8051 Graz, Austria

google_reviews.author: berke ayrancioglu
google_reviews.text: I went there for a breakfast. I tried Frühstück Bacon with eggs. It had three eggs, bacon, orange juice, coffee and bread. It was nice but I would expect the price to be lower

google_reviews.author: Dragoslav Miric
google_reviews.text: Very pleasant place to have a busy day break if you’re in the neighborhood. Kind staff and decent food and coffee.

google_reviews.author: Sabrina K
google_reviews.text: I honestly don't know how anyone can seriously call this a restaurant. My schnitzel was clearly frozen and still frozen inside, really cold in the middle. When I politely said that wasn't acceptable and asked if I could have a new one, I was actually told no, but they could reheat it. Honestly, that's not your standard, is it? My daughter's pasta was also completely overcooked and unseasoned, tasting of absolutely nothing, as if they'd forgotten everything except putting it in the water. There was no trace of coziness or hospitality; you feel more like a nuisance than a guest. All anyone does is chat. The cleanliness was also questionable, and the really unpleasant smell that permeates the place definitely comes from the restrooms. It completely kills your appetite before you even look at your plate. But the staff eat right there, so it's no wonder they criticize the food so much if they can't smell it themselves. But as they say, the fish ***, and that's absolutely true here; something is fundamentally wrong, and as a customer, you notice it immediately. Definitely not recommended by me; I certainly won't be going there again.

google_reviews.author: Hans Müller
google_reviews.text: There's good food here next to a Billa supermarket. Plenty of seating to enjoy your meal. Besides breakfast and lunch, they also have a weekly menu with constantly changing dishes. We found the food very good and reasonably priced. You pay at the register and receive a token; when your food is ready, you can pick it up at the counter. I think it's a great option for affordable and good food.

google_reviews.author: S. Fuchs
google_reviews.text: I've never eaten so badly anywhere. The schnitzel was frozen food of the worst quality, the fries were soft and soggy, and the breaded chicken salad, advertised on the menu as €12.90 with pumpkin seed oil and cream sauce, was just a lot of carrots and some coarse, poorly cleaned green lettuce drizzled with balsamic vinegar. They didn't have strawberry Pago either. The staff seemed to be on vacation. And the big sign advertising "we prepare everything fresh daily" is a lie when it comes to frozen breaded schnitzel.

restaurants.name: Postgarage cafe
restaurants.summary: Nightclub & gig venue for live bands & DJs, including a vegetarian cafe with takeaway.

google_reviews.author: isabella “izy” schultz-wild
google_reviews.text:
i was there a few times, i really like the club, especially the inner design/area. there are 2 floors, but 3 "dance floors" (2 on the ground floor, one is rarely open) the second floor is cozy and the stairs lead to wardrobe and then the bathroom, and if you go on, you arrive the first floor again on the other side of the room.

they have pretty nice doormen and the music depends on who's performing, but they often have music from a certain decade and events. information available on their instagram.

google_reviews.author: paolo
google_reviews.text: very nice place, and electronic music, although I lost my bikes helmet and couldn't get it back

google_reviews.author: Fischmehl
google_reviews.text: ncie location! I like the sound on the 2nd floor more! Also u can smoke there and its always better atmosphere there! always enjoyed to play there!

google_reviews.author: Martin
google_reviews.text: One of the door guys was so agressive for no reason. There is polite ways to tell people to get in cue before pushing them and touching. When I told him to stop pushing me he started to punch me and be agressive. So sad.

google_reviews.author: David Redok
google_reviews.text: Must visit party place in Graz!

google_reviews.author: Uday Akasapu
google_reviews.text:
Such a vibe! Great drinks combined with decent food! Will come again, the waiters are super enthusiastic and cheerful, drinks served in no time.

This is what you need for a nice relaxing drink, good service and a great atmosphere!

google_reviews.author: Jan
google_reviews.text: I recently visited for the first time and I have to say, I was blown away. The atmosphere is fantastic with the brightly lit bar, the tables and chairs are comfortable, and the music is great. The young man behind the bar was extremely attentive and always on point, with a great sense of humor. After a while, we got hungry, so we ordered some focaccia pizzas and were initially skeptical, as they're usually rather disappointing in bars, but they were excellent! Perfectly cooked, juicy, and delicious. You've gained some new regulars in us – we'll definitely be back!

google_reviews.author: Nicolas Graf
google_reviews.text:
A wonderfully pleasant and beautiful atmosphere.

The cocktails there are absolutely fantastic!

The staff is incredibly hardworking and always up for a laugh!

They offer a wide selection of cold snacks and antipasti, but the pinsa is the real highlight!

I wholeheartedly recommend this bar to everyone.

google_reviews.author: Lylith
google_reviews.text:
Amazing bar. Period.

You feel right at home the moment you walk in. Warm lighting, great music, relaxed guests. No frills, just a really pleasant atmosphere.

The team is incredibly welcoming and attentive without seeming forced. And: thanks to head bartender Marco – he's a pro. The new menu is truly fantastic. You can taste the love and attention to detail in every drink/cocktail. They didn't just throw something together; they experimented, refined, and tried again. There's a little bit of magic in every drink. ✨

It's become one of my favorite spots in the city. Perfect for winding down the day. Laughing, chatting, meeting new people, and simply having a good time.

La dolce vita in Geidorf!

google_reviews.author: Michael G
google_reviews.text:
Very inviting atmosphere!!

I was there recently with a fun group and we were greeted by an extremely charming and attentive young man who provided outstanding service.

It leaves nothing to be desired!! I'm thrilled and will definitely visit this establishment again and recommend it to others!

Thank you!!!

google_reviews.author: Henrique Brasil
google_reviews.text: Best coffee in Graz (by far!) at the fairest price you can find. Also, you can’t make a mistake with any cake or pie they have, all delicious. Highly recommended. The internal space is limited but if you’re lucky, you can get a table outside on a sunny day.

google_reviews.author: camilla dal santo
google_reviews.text: Very easygoing place, perfect for breakfast. I had a chai latte and a delicious vanille plunder. The selection of drinks is large and at a really good price. I like the station where you can add different syrups to your drinks. The selection of pastries and salty snacks is also great and again the prices are very very competitive compared to the rest of the city and for the great quality that they offer. The staff is very kind. The only thing is that the ambient could be a bit cozier but overall I enjoyed my breakfast there!

google_reviews.author: Dia Gejdosova
google_reviews.text: One of the best coffees I ever had! Very nice space, delicious food! Great prices.

google_reviews.author: Liam Hall
google_reviews.text:
Not the greatest but very worth it for the price.
Matcha latte is too sweet.

google_reviews.author: Guillaume Leon
google_reviews.text: Everything was perfect. Go inside there a little cosy terrasse in the back

restaurants.name: Running Sushi

google_reviews.author: Yele
google_reviews.text:
We had a wonderful dining experience. The staff, especially the lady attending to us, was exceptionally kind and accommodating, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere. Their genuine hospitality made our meal even more enjoyable.

Now, onto the food – it was fantastic!All shrimps dish stood out with its exquisite flavor and perfectly cooked texture. Each bite was a good experience, and it's clear that attention to detail goes into their culinary creations.

The overall atmosphere of the restaurant was cozy and inviting, contributing to a memorable evening. We left with satisfied appetites.

google_reviews.author: Stefi
google_reviews.text: Absolutely amazing service, diverse and tasty food, hot or cold, salty or sweet. 17.9 euro per person 2h all you can eat in Sept. 2025. Would go again anytime! The staff is super friendly.

google_reviews.author: Johan Bonn
google_reviews.text: Large selection of both cold and warm dishes. Also many deserts. Staff very friendly.

google_reviews.author: Anh Thu Bui
google_reviews.text: Decent Asian restaurant! Very nice and helpful waiters and waitresses 😊 Just next time please don’t cut my noodles into small pieces 🙏

google_reviews.author: Ben Gombor
google_reviews.text: Best piccante soup in town, sushi is running very fresh, they like to experiment with new ingredients and styles, very enjoyable. The warm food section is a bit reduced compared to the competition but you can find many great dishes. We like coming here.

restaurants.google_name: Eat Asia Food - Running Sushi & all you can eat in Graz

google_reviews.author: Renate Hepher
google_reviews.text: Good sandwiches and pastry. Popular for breakfast with son me outside seating. Rather simple, cheap furnishings, but friendly service.

google_reviews.author: Patricia Brocker
google_reviews.text: I think have the best sandwiches  always fresh love having a drink there with a sandwich.lovely ambiance

google_reviews.author: andrej lamut
google_reviews.text: Super

google_reviews.author: Barbara Petautschnig
google_reviews.text: Toll! 1 a

google_reviews.author: Jovo “Svabo” Ljuboja
google_reviews.text: Top

google_reviews.author: Noa Musa
google_reviews.text:
I recently tried the burgers at this cozy little spot. While it may not catch your eye from the outside, once you step in, you're greeted by friendly staff and warm vibes. Plus, the prices are pretty reasonable.

The fries didn't impress me much, nothing crazy but also not bad. As for the double smashburger, it was also alright – I'd give it a 7 out of 10, decent but nothing to write home about. Nevertheless, the bun was soft and tasty, and the meat was really well-seasoned. But there were two things that bothered me: the strong mustard taste and the cheese inside the burger, which didn't quite hit the mark. It tasted like the processed cheese you'd find on American toast – I was expecting something a bit better.

What unexpectedly caught my attention and impressed me, though, was the to-go packaging! Well done!

Overall, it's a nice spot to visit every now and then. Next time, I might give their hotdogs a shot!

google_reviews.author: Abdullah Alsalamah
google_reviews.text: Very good Halal food lovely owner and nice atmosphere

google_reviews.author: Vitaliy Boyko
google_reviews.text: Very tasty food. Best smash burger in Graz

google_reviews.author: omar ali
google_reviews.text:
I discovered this 100% authentic halal fast food place in Conrad von, Graz by coincidence, whilst on a delivery job and decided to take a quick brunch on the road.... What caught my attention was "The beef patties" used in the burgers, as they were "proper home prepared" & not frozen or ready made like almost every other fast food place I've visited . They were well cooked & marinated with a unique middle eastern "lushed spices😌 & scrumptious dripping Sauce juice" 🤤.

The cuisine chef Abdul and his experienced crew were extremely generous with my double beef topped with melted cheese, & stuffed on "red hot Libyan Style harisa" burger, in addition to fried sweet potatoes sprinkled with curry powder" which tasted overall perfection!!!😋

I paid at least 10€, which was reasonable for the quantity & quality of the food, in addition to a free inclusive cold drink!

Note: on an individual preference of choice, A sunny side 🍳 to this burger 🍔 WD make it a complete winner! ✅ 💯 🏆

google_reviews.author: Ivan Aleksandrov
google_reviews.text: If Graz was an Ocean, Würstl Scheich would be Krusty Krabs - No.1 place in Town. Nice service, cool for dates too!🤫

google_reviews.author: Jyothish Atheendran
google_reviews.text: We went here to celebrate a friend's birthday. They have really nice offerings. And the staff is really friendly. Can recommend if you are into sweet stuff 😋.

google_reviews.author: Korina Kyriakou
google_reviews.text: Quite rude and abrupt on the phone when called and politely asked about an offering on the menu. Was looking forward to visiting, but we’ll go somewhere else after that attitude.

google_reviews.author: Andre Jordão
google_reviews.text: Nice atmosphere, looks like a tea house with good cakes.

google_reviews.author: Riya Ann Roy
google_reviews.text:
Simply loved the service.

I went looking for a last minute birthday cake (something small) but since it was a Saturday and almost time for them to close up shop, I couldn’t find what I was looking for but fortunately the extremely friendly staff member recommended the ‘Steiermark Torte’ as a substitute. Well, it served the purpose and was yum.

Thank you! ^^

google_reviews.author: Ashishwangh Limki Auvray
google_reviews.text:
On our way to Hungary, we stopped in Graz, looking for a cakeshop. We wandered and found Kristinas.
We inquired whether we could sit outside because we had four dogs. The gentleman at the counter requested us to go in with the dogs, because the chairs were wet outside.
What a lovely surprise! And that was not enough. He brought a water bowl for my four dogs.
And all of this with a BIG SMILE.
Thank you very much, gentleman. You are the reason we continue to believe in humanity.

google_reviews.author: Wilhelm Hund
google_reviews.text: A lovely, unassuming little bar with a lot of character. The service was incredibly friendly and entertaining. The ambiance was very rustic but super cozy, creating a welcoming atmosphere. I highly recommend it.

google_reviews.author: Daniel Gröger
google_reviews.text: Cool place with very friendly staff! Not too big but a diverse crowd. You can also get some food. There's a DJ and a revolving foosball table! Prices are reasonable too.

google_reviews.author: Christoph Wolf
google_reviews.text: A very nice restaurant with little space, but well designed

google_reviews.author: Claudia Liebminger
google_reviews.text: As always great, top chef, extremely courteous waitresses, security's absolutely competent and nice

google_reviews.author: Roberthuber
google_reviews.text: Simply having a good time is definitely possible there.

restaurants.name: Der Wintergarten
restaurants.summary: Laid-back destination with a wine shop & a trendy ambiance, specializing in traditional fare.

google_reviews.author: Luis Teixeira
google_reviews.text: Thank you very, very  much to the outstanding Chef who kindly proposed to bring the food to our hotel following the cancellation of our reservation due to sudden illness. Absolutely spotless and kind initiative. The food was delicious. God bless you Sir.

google_reviews.author: TARIQ FAISAL
google_reviews.text:
Der Steirer delivered a beautifully curated dining experience with an ambiance that blended rustic Styrian charm with a contemporary, soulful warmth. We enjoyed the sweet potato gnocchi in saffron ginger coconut cream, a dish that felt both inventive and comforting.
The truffled celery cream soup with puff pastry sticks was refined and deeply aromatic, and the Wiener Schnitzel from veal stood out with its classic authenticity.
A thoughtfully crafted atmosphere paired with memorable flavors Der Steirer truly captured Graz’s creative culinary spirit.

google_reviews.author: Tom LaRocque
google_reviews.text: Excellent food!  Made a reservation through Google (very convenient), and had a great meal!  Wiener Schnitzel (veal), a very good hausbier and a wonderful apple strudel- all so very tasty!  I’m glad I was staying next door so I could enjoy this restaurant!

google_reviews.author: Mishel Beygelman
google_reviews.text: Great spot, thought it would be super busy, but it had many free spots. Recommend coming before six for a guaranteed spot. Their fried chicken was very juicy, we took the mushroom soup too, it was very different from the classical cream soups, it had pieces of potatoes and mushrooms. It was very comforting and cozy.

google_reviews.author: Ryan Hall
google_reviews.text: Food was amazing and the staff were even better! Traditional cuisine and a good wine selection too. Great, relaxed atmosphere and the puddings were next level! I had a perfect creme Brulee! 10/10

restaurants.name: Rauch & Rebe

google_reviews.author: Kat Riley
google_reviews.text:
We chose this place as it was close to our hotel (Augarten Art Hotel) and had decent reviews online.... I was actually amazed at the experience (seriously though).

Every dish was made with a genuine love of cooking and the region that you could taste. The plating choices made me finally understand why Food Network shows award style points for creative yet non-fussy presentation.

Christian talked with us about his joy of cooking and the design behind the restaurant — he could not have been more passionate or welcoming. Mike's local wine knowledge was exceptional. He selected the perfect local red to match my steak and even convinced my other half to try a style he usually avoids (the "not bad Obama" reaction was priceless).

Did I mention all of these interactions with genuine laughter and stories exchanged were in a language they both said they were "rusty" ... [narrator: I never would have guessed so].

Already planning a return trip to catch the museums we missed, and to "politely" devour more of their food like a starved wolf.

google_reviews.author: Marek Syldatk
google_reviews.text: Best food in Obertauern, delicious starters and desserts. Schnitzel is a mist try :) Super friendly staff. A must visit when in town!

google_reviews.author: J Mann
google_reviews.text: The chef is a master with pumpkin in a region famous for it. Had a lovely evening here.

google_reviews.author: Christoph Marschall
google_reviews.text: Last night/dinner of our skiing vacations - was a highlight. Great service in a very convenient & cosy atmosphere of an old hotel and excellent food also nicely presented.

google_reviews.author: Sam Burrell
google_reviews.text:
Really wonderful evening. Great location, food was excellent and the service was friendly.

Jerusalem artichoke soup was incredible!

restaurants.google_name: Restaurant Rauch & Rebe im Augarten Art Hotel

google_reviews.author: Abdulkadir Eryildirim
google_reviews.text: I think that this restaurant is a hidden jem in the city center of Graz. It is in walking distance to Jakominiplatz where all public transportations intersect. The ambience is lovely. The staff is very nice and friendly. The food was great. More than I expected.. The price is fine, not expensive.. It is spacious.. The restaurant is hard to notice when you pass by

google_reviews.author: Gilbert Fruhwirth
google_reviews.text: Excellent meals, in particular the 'Backhendl', great service

google_reviews.author: Anna
google_reviews.text: I stayed in the upstairs B&B for two nights and it was great!

google_reviews.author: Jasmin Korittnig
google_reviews.text:
The boss was super nice and very accommodating.
Really great people.
The place is very nice and is very sophisticated and romantic for a date.
I have to say that the best place to come back is with the whole family.

google_reviews.author: Karl ruckenstuhl
google_reviews.text: Only the boss and his wife work here. I'm always amazed at how he manages the service alone without long waits. The same goes for the boss, who runs the kitchen. A perfectly coordinated team. The food is pure delight! There are always seasonal delicacies, straight from Grandma's kitchen, so to speak. The prices are really fair. An absolutely recommended insider tip!

google_reviews.author: Edgy Ecchi
google_reviews.text:
Great selection of beers, very friendly atmosphere and good music.
Outside seating is perfect in the summer, inside it's warm and cozy in the winter.

google_reviews.author: Dubai Girl Guide
google_reviews.text:
Great selection of beer, ladies toilets are clean, has toilet paper,  and are kinda hip even. The owner has a great personality,  and is definitely part of the charm here.
Recommended establishment 👍

google_reviews.author: Fikret Huskic-Aina
google_reviews.text: Great place to relax and enjoy a good beer! The atmosphere is super comfortable and chill, perfect for unwinding. The owner is especially nice and welcoming, making you feel right at home. And the goulash? Absolutely incredible! Highly recommend this spot.

google_reviews.author: Anička Vondrů
google_reviews.text: Very nice pub and friendly people. Good Beer and nice bathroom

google_reviews.author: Dan Brill
google_reviews.text: Really enjoyed this place - not a top craft beer establishment but a good range of beers and a pleasure to sit outside in the sun. For me, good bars in Austria were a bit thin on the ground, and this was a really nice location with friendly staff. Definitely felt authentic and local.

google_reviews.author: Bettina
google_reviews.text:
We had breakfast there today – highly recommended!

The service was exceptionally friendly and attentive. The food was delicious – you can tell they place great emphasis on regional products. The presentation was also very appealing.

We'll definitely be back!

google_reviews.author: Nicole Wolpert
google_reviews.text: I went to this restaurant for breakfast – and it was absolutely fantastic! The food was incredibly delicious, freshly prepared, and lovingly presented. I'd especially like to highlight the friendly service: The staff were incredibly attentive, welcoming, and made you feel completely at home. It's a great way to start the day! I'll definitely be back.

google_reviews.author: Anesa Wess
google_reviews.text: I can highly recommend Wilde Möhre – the daily special is always excellent in taste and quality! The staff is very friendly and, above all, very attentive. I wish more people knew about Wilde Möhre in Andritz! If you're looking for a high-quality lunch, this is the place to go! 🥰

google_reviews.author: Eva L.
google_reviews.text: A cute little shop that really appealed to me visually. Cozy, stylish. The food (lunch menu) was fantastic; we were thrilled by the details and the love the chef puts into the dishes, the desserts, and the service. We enjoyed it and will be back again. Highly recommended.

google_reviews.author: Eduard Weber
google_reviews.text:
We were there for breakfast.

Great selection of regional, mostly organic, products. A nice shop is attached where you can buy great souvenirs. And what I liked best: no background music…
Very friendly owners who are happy to stop by for a chat…

google_reviews.author: Istvan Gardos
google_reviews.text: Central meeting place for a lot of locals. Drunk and unfriendly owner who sent us away after paying the bill and sitting at the table because of a "reservation", although a lot of free desks were available

google_reviews.author: Simon Peter Voss
google_reviews.text: Perfect for a quick coffee or snack in the morning sun :)

google_reviews.author: Lucas Domaros
google_reviews.text: Great place for a meeting with frends!

google_reviews.author: Wolfi Wallner
google_reviews.text: Ok

google_reviews.author: Ralf
google_reviews.text:
Nice cafe, friendly and entertaining owner, good Gratzer beer in bottles,

Stiegl beer is available on tap.

google_reviews.author: Jyothish Atheendran
google_reviews.text:
I visited Mur Kebab on a Monday evening, around 4 PM. It was pretty quiet, just me and one other customer chilling out. The location is super convenient, right by the Tram/Bus stop, which is a big plus.

Now, I'm a bit of a kebab connoisseur, having tried them all over Graz. But I gotta be honest, Mur Kebab didn't quite impress me. The Chicken Kebab I ordered was just okay. The bread was a bit smaller and thicker than I expected, so there wasn't as much filling as I'd hoped for. And while the prices were similar to other spots, it felt like I didn't quite get my money's worth.

On the plus side, the shopkeeper was friendly and spoke a little English, and they accepted card payments, which was convenient. But here's the thing – their menu listed the kebab at 4.90, but I ended up getting charged 5 bucks (I paid with a Debit Card). That raised a bit of suspicion in my mind.

They do offer both dine-in and takeaway options, which is nice for different occasions. But based on my experience, I might not be in a rush to go back anytime soon. It just didn't quite meet my expectations.

google_reviews.author: G
google_reviews.text: Due to the location between two of the biggest schools in Graz, the waiting times are sometimes very long. Once I waited for more than 20 minutes. After all the quality of the delivered product is always very good!

google_reviews.author: Cristian Irimia
google_reviews.text: Good Kebab at decent price, but nothing too special in my opinion

google_reviews.author: Juhana Ahopelto
google_reviews.text: Good but next day i almost passed out in eggenberg because of diarrhea

google_reviews.author: Patrick Hart
google_reviews.text: Most excellent Kebab. The owner has a lot of stories to share if you have the time.

google_reviews.author: Kenny
google_reviews.text: Overall a nice place for Viennese/styrian cuisine. The person attending to us was very nice and we felt welcome. And most importantly we enjoyed the meal.

google_reviews.author: Natalie
google_reviews.text: Great atmosphere, we ordered their honey mead with soda and a beer. We ordered beef ribs with bbq and garlic sauce, and a half fried chicken with potato salad. Everything was really delicious. Might be a little on the expensive side but the portions were huge- we took our leftovers home with us and by the looks of it, the other diners did as well.

google_reviews.author: Martin Jarc
google_reviews.text:
Great little proper Austrian place with really good home-made beer and good food. There is a lot of focus on ribs but they were delicious. Came back the second time.

The waiter is the best and really made us feel welcome.

google_reviews.author: oriol morros llordella
google_reviews.text: Very pintoresque, affordable typical auatrian food with a touch of exentricity, excelent service

google_reviews.author: Jüri Jõul
google_reviews.text: Visited without a reservation and was still kindly accommodated, even on a busy evening. The food was delicious – even better than I had expected, especially given the modest prices. I would definitely recommend this place for anyone looking for a hearty and satisfying local meal.

google_reviews.author: Martin Berktold
google_reviews.text: Top

google_reviews.author: patrick böhmer
google_reviews.text:
Agreements regarding the costs of events, such as the meal after a funeral, should definitely be made in writing. You don't want any unpleasant surprises 😉

Response to the owner's comment: If the customer asks for a menu price and the owner replies that the menu price is €10-15, then the customer expects a menu price. Claiming afterward that there is no menu is at least misleading!! At worst, fraud!!!

google_reviews.author: jhold
google_reviews.text: Staff and food were excellent!

google_reviews.author: Werner Jörg
google_reviews.text: Great food, very nice service, I can only recommend it

google_reviews.author: Katharina Vogrin
google_reviews.text: My father really appreciates the daily menu... he's 87 and often emphasizes how nice and friendly the service is at 'Hochl' and that the quality of the food is excellent... that shouldn't go unmentioned, thank you for that.

restaurants.name: parks

google_reviews.author: Adriana Schatzmayr-Loidl
google_reviews.text: Amazing food, good drinks, nice restaurant and friendly people ! ❤️

google_reviews.author: Tamás Kovács
google_reviews.text: I drunk only one coffee, it was okay, next time maybe I need to try the morning brunch

google_reviews.author: Manuel
google_reviews.text: The falafel wrap for breakfast is a real bundle of energy! Cosy, uncomplicated and delicious

google_reviews.author: Artur Klauser
google_reviews.text: The place has a yummy all-you-can-eat Sunday brunch buffet. Albeit a bit expensive (€13.9, drinks extra), you get a bunch of sweet and savory options and all is organic. You can enjoy the outdoor seating in front of the coffee shop while the weather is nice and the adjoining road is not too busy on Sunday morning.

google_reviews.author: M C
google_reviews.text:
The number of vegan options is not very high.
The amount of food you get for the price is too low.
More advanced vegan cuisine would be welcome.
Vegan does not mean only healthy.
I tried two times.

restaurants.google_name: PARKS Bio Fairtrade Restaurant & Catering Graz

google_reviews.author: Aleksandar Nesic
google_reviews.text: Very attentive staff, beautiful, relaxed atmosphere, delicious food. We came here by chance to celebrate our first marriage anniversary - what a pleasant surprise, what a hidden gem! We will definitely come here again next time we visit Graz.

google_reviews.author: Sarah Lesjak
google_reviews.text:
I was having brunch with friends of mine, and we had a wonderful time.
The breakfast buffet covers a wide range of tastes and preferences: sweet & savory, veggies, cheeses, spreads, cold cuts and smoked salmon as well as warm dishes such as scrambled eggs and veggies. Bread and rolls are offered with a broad variety as well. In addition to that, one can order omelette or eggs (sunny side up) to the table.
Drinks include juices, still & sparkling water as well as a selection of tea and coffee.
Vegan options are available too (sweet and savory).
The only thing I wasn‘t too happy about was the labeling of the dishes: the font was very small and no allergens are listed. One can ask staff and they are very knowledgeable, but to me this makes things a bit too complicated and busy.
Also, the carpeted floor is a trip hazard as the wooden chairs tend to not glide sufficiently when standing up and fall over backwards.

All in all it is a great spot for an elegant brunch. The interior is cozy, a well matched blend of imperial & modern design. Ine of my favorite places to go to.

google_reviews.author: Marsha Cartledge
google_reviews.text: Had a really great steak frites for dinner. Well cooked and tender. Paired it with an amazing bottle of Balufrankisch. Husband had the schnitzel with some extras which I’m told was equally good. Highly recommend this place

google_reviews.author: Nirvana Kos
google_reviews.text: We came to Graz late and had a hard time finding a table. The host at Marie’s was super accomodating and did everything he did to help us. The service was also excellent and surprisingly fast considering how full they were. We ate appetisers and tried a bit of everything and it was delightful. I highly recommend this place!

google_reviews.author: DHALIA R
google_reviews.text: I was 8.01.2026 there and the restaurant was empty.It is huge and just two tabkes were bussy.When we entered waiters put us on the small table for tqo persons where qe hardly can feel free .Number one rule, CUSTOMER IS ALWAYS RIGHT! You do not be greedy even to allow your clients to sit where they want because they came to enjoy for their OWN MONEY( DO NOT FORGET THAT) and they didnt come just to MAKE YOU MONEY! YOU HAVE TO RESPECT THE CUSTOMERS! You are giving people place for two and restaurant is huge and you know that after 6.01. is everywhere empty.Also,already one year they are changing waiters and always are some new waiters who dont have experience and who and massy.They always do some mass,or they drop the wine or they do other mistakes like bringing food to early and it is colder...very bad MANAGMENT! DESTROYING BUSUNESS IF THE OWNER! Restaurant would work much better if they find very good waiters and if they have giid managment! Food is good depands what you are eating.Entrecote is very good but small portion ,SHOULD BE MORE MEAT.French fries are also very small amount and shoud be huge amount of french fries.Sweets are ok but not the best.Creme brule is good.They have good Cezar salat.But managment and waiters,PLEASE CHANGE THEM,or it will be worse even!!!!! Silly people work there.

google_reviews.author: Franz Haneder
google_reviews.text:
OUR PERSONAL VERDICT:
- We were thrilled with the food and the service!
- We will visit again
- Highly recommended, in our opinion

Our personal impression:
- Simple and unpretentious, but nice restaurant
- Very good food
- And exceptionally friendly service (we were repeatedly asked during each course how the food tasted, if everything was okay, and if we needed anything else. We found this very attentive, authentic, and sincere)

Our facts:
- Our first visit
- Visited in mid-July on a Friday around 5:30 p.m.
- With two people (adults only)
- Our consumption: Drinks, appetizer, dinner, coffee, and wine

google_reviews.author: Stella Simitis (Stellista)
google_reviews.text: Excellent food and a very pleasant outdoor seating area 😊 Friendly and prompt service. There were four of us today; we ordered two appetizers and four main courses and were more than satisfied. Good portion sizes and well-seasoned, authentic Greek dishes. A lovely place to spend a pleasant midweek evening with a touch of holiday atmosphere.

google_reviews.author: Paul L.
google_reviews.text: A very friendly, small family-run business serving Greek/Albanian home-style cooking. A beautiful outdoor dining area and excellent value for money. As a bonus, you can play with the kittens. Thank you for the hospitality, we'll definitely be back!

google_reviews.author: Olga Paschenko
google_reviews.text: It was so delicious! A welcoming family restaurant! Thank you 🤗

google_reviews.author: He Mi
google_reviews.text: Very friendly, great service, good food, nice beer garden - a classic recommendation.

google_reviews.author: Anhuar Lopez Rodriguez
google_reviews.text: Best place around Banhoff to get a quick recharge of batteries. We ordered some pancakes and smoothies and everything was so tasty. My recommendation goes on the sweets and bakery. It is true that the prices online are lower than in the store so be aware.

google_reviews.author: David Kolbezen
google_reviews.text:
Ambient is not for me, maybe for you, or amy other person.
But food..food is very delitous. Burger and Mexican tortilias looks and taste like..njami👌😊

google_reviews.author: Marcel Legault
google_reviews.text: Granola was amazing. The Cappuccino was really good and the Hawaiian Ocean Bowl very good. Add in the the great service and this is a most for anyone traveling to Graz.

google_reviews.author: Nick Irsel
google_reviews.text: Amazing atmosphere and delicious food. They have lots of options for breakfast and drinks as well. The surface is decent, but can be chaotic and some of the waitresses have been kind of rude though most of them are super super nice. Maybe it was just a bad day for her and it was nothing too serious. It is however an amazing place to eat and definitely one. I would recommend if you’re around and want some great breakfast. As I’ve said, most waitresses are a very nice so do try this breakfast place

google_reviews.author: Sez it Reght
google_reviews.text: There is a reason this place has good reviews. That's because IT IS GOOD lovely staff great menu and tasty food. Thank you for a wonderful breakfast this morning

google_reviews.author: Afroditi Temourtzidou
google_reviews.text: As a sushi girlie this place has super delicious sushi and a big variety to choose from! Also other dishes were very tasty!

google_reviews.author: Rebekah Berkovic
google_reviews.text:
We have looked forward to visiting Miho since its opening.
The decor and atmosphere are lovely. The staff are great too - friendly, polite, efficient. Generally it's a lovely place to be.
However, we found the food rather disappointing. While the presentation was great and we didn't wait very long, the taste just wasn't there.
The edamame were very overcooked and falling apart, didn't taste good. The sushi rolls were pretty but very bland - could hardly taste the fish. For the price, the rolls are not worth it.
We also noticed that the soy sauce was quite bland - almost tasted watered down and the ginger was overly acidic.
Again, the place and the people are lovely but the food did not meet our expectations, especially not for the price.
We probably won't return.

google_reviews.author: Marin Zovko
google_reviews.text: The raw fish was fresh and tasted sushi-grade. The sushi rolls were one of the best I've tried in Graz so far. I liked everything I've tried on the menu... will be coming back ;)

google_reviews.author: Claudia Carpena Höll
google_reviews.text:
As very often I had the feeling to eat for rice than really fish or something else. But in general was really good, even more the salmon, it felt pretty fresh. As choices were not that much and when ordering sushis comes a lot of pieces, it would be much better less pieces that customers can maybe try/have more choices.
The food presentation was extraodinary amazing!

google_reviews.author: Danny Devito
google_reviews.text: Food was flawless, but it takes forever to arrive, to the point where you forget you ordered it. But the wait is absolutely worth it, tastes amazing (and there is no time limit so just plan in quite a lot of time). Lack of desert is a bit of a shame but to be fair it is mainly for sushi and these are absolutely amazing.

restaurants.name: Hummel

google_reviews.author: S. habibi
google_reviews.text:
I suggest you this restaurant to try new tastes like fried feta cheese covered with sesame.
You can order fully vegan food or add some meat to the recipe, what we did in the sandwiches.
We ate dinner at this restaurant and it was very busy, there is less chance of finding a table if you don’t reserve.

google_reviews.author: Sarolta Knorr
google_reviews.text: We decided to sit down to this mezze bar for dinner during our sightseeing in Graz. Very delicious food, we enjoyed all. Many vegetarian and vegan options. (We are not, but in a place like that you don’t even feel the need to eat meat!) Staff is friendly and easy going. Thanks

google_reviews.author: Lauren Tilton
google_reviews.text: Lovely spot for Mediterranean food. We did the mezze plate for two people, which was the perfect amount. All the food is super fresh and bio. The courtyard is charming. Great service!

google_reviews.author: George Buchanan
google_reviews.text:
The menu has many small dishes, we couldn't make up our mind and went for the set menu , which was really good and gave us a good variety of tasty dishes.

The wine menu was  good  using local wines

Our waiter was extremely helpful and patient with us.

We booked our table in advance, it does get busy , however they do have a garden as well.

google_reviews.author: Mike Mayr-Mittischek
google_reviews.text: Super friendly staff and the most delicious vegetarian Mezze Table. Great coffee too - I absolutely love this place!

restaurants.google_name: HUMMEL | Mezze Bar - Brunch - levantinische Küche

google_reviews.author: Amela Stankovic
google_reviews.text:
If you love Italian food, this is a place you simply have to visit! You can truly feel that authentic, homey Italian spirit here from the smell of freshly baked pizzas to the background music that instantly transports you to a small restaurant somewhere in Italy.

The staff are extremely friendly and relaxed, you can tell they love what they do and genuinely care about their guests. The food… absolutely fantastic!
Definitely recommend this restaurant and will come back! 🥰

google_reviews.author: Virginia Marisela Salinas Guajardo
google_reviews.text:
Super deli food!! Lovely place to celebrate. Outside is pretty and inside is cosy with candle lights 🤗
I tried the calamary with tomatosauce yammy! Really good.
And the dessert Panna Cotta  yammmm 🤤 extremely good! I was impress with the really good flavors.

No doubt, I will go again soon!
Thanks!

google_reviews.author: Andreea Szasz
google_reviews.text:
My recent dinner at Trattoria Veneziana was an absolute delight. The food was incredibly delicious, the service was outstanding, and the romantic atmosphere added that extra touch of magic to the evening.

From the moment we stepped inside, we were captivated by the restaurant's charming ambiance. The dim lighting, elegant decor, and soft music created a romantic and intimate setting that set the stage for an unforgettable experience.

The food at this trattoria exceeded all expectations. Each dish showcased the culinary expertise of the chefs and the use of fresh, high-quality ingredients. The flavors were exceptional, and every bite was a delightful journey of taste and texture.

The service we received was impeccable. The staff went above and beyond to ensure our evening was perfect, providing attentive and knowledgeable assistance. Their warmth and professionalism made us feel like valued guests throughout the entire evening.

Overall,  Trattoria Veneziana offers an exquisite dining experience that combines heavenly cuisine, exceptional service, and a romantic atmosphere. It is the perfect place for any special occasion or simply a desire to indulge in the finest Italian cuisine. I highly recommend this restaurant and guarantee it will leave a lasting impression on anyone who visits.

google_reviews.author: David Moseley
google_reviews.text: I've been there twice, and both meals were excellent. Had the risotto di mari before, and the goldbras this evening. Both perfectly cooked. If really recommend this slightly out-of-the-way and informal Italian for reasonably-priced and very well prepared food.

google_reviews.author: Stefan Ra
google_reviews.text: We had excellent pizza, fish, profiteroles and scallops. The risotto was so so, a bit on the hard side. Menu with typical italian dishes that are hard to find elsewhere, fair prices. Can be crowded, since rather small. Fantastic espresso!

google_reviews.author: Phillipe C
google_reviews.text:
In summer it's great to sit outside underneath  a grape arbor, but thats already the best part about this place.
The waiters either don't seem to enjoy what they are doing or they are pretty unexperienced. They were incredibly rude. Moreover, the drinks had an sugar overdose. Hardly, possible to drink. This was my first and last time being there.

google_reviews.author: Gerhard Maier
google_reviews.text: A great outdoor dining area for sun lovers, and a gazebo for those who don't. A delicious breakfast – highly recommended.

google_reviews.author: Thomas
google_reviews.text: Very nice, good and a very cool social employment project!

google_reviews.author: Dimas Otaño
google_reviews.text: Food was amazing, and we thought the prices (for Graz of course) were very reasonable considering the sizes. The service was nice and explaining, the atmosphere is beautiful. I'll probably be back.

google_reviews.author: A K
google_reviews.text: Delicious! Reasonably priced food, especially their daily specials! You can either choose vegan or with meat. Super friendly staff. will definitely be returning.

google_reviews.author: isabella “izy” schultz-wild
google_reviews.text:
i love this restaurant. good food and such good service.

they have lunch menus under the week and today for tuesday. they had these three curries: with lentils, with kauliflower, and smth with cheese. they serve this with rice AND naan. menu packets have a soup, the main dish, and a dessert.

bonus: you can refill any curry/rice, until you are full. the worker is so nice to inform me and offer me.

google_reviews.author: Jyothish Atheendran
google_reviews.text:
I recently tried the Chicken Biryani from Namaste Nepal, and I have to say, it was not a bad experience. It cost me around 15 Euros, which I found to be quite reasonable considering the average cost around other places and the portion size. In fact, a single biryani was enough to satisfy both myself and my dining companion, depending on our appetite.

What I really liked about Namaste Nepal is its convenient location. It's just a short walk from the Tram line near the University of Arts, making it easily accessible, especially for those who rely on public transportation like myself.

When it comes to the taste, the Chicken Biryani at Namaste Nepal definitely had a North Indian flair rather than the South Indian style I'm more accustomed to. The blend of spices and flavors was distinct and delicious. I particularly enjoyed the well-balanced proportion of chicken and rice in the dish. It made each bite flavorful and satisfying.

If you're planning to dine in at Namaste Nepal, I highly recommend reserving a seat in advance. This way, you can secure a spot and avoid any potential waiting times. It's always great to have a guaranteed spot, especially if the restaurant tends to be popular or crowded.

One more thing worth mentioning is that Namaste Nepal accepts card payments, which is convenient for people like me who prefer using cards instead of cash.

All in all, I would definitely try the Chicken Biryani from Namaste Nepal again. The reasonable price, generous portion size, North Indian flavors, and well-balanced chicken-to-rice ratio all combine to create a memorable dining experience. I highly recommend giving it a try, especially if you're a fan of North Indian cuisine.

google_reviews.author: Riya Ann Roy
google_reviews.text:
Found this gem in the city today!

I was craving for some biriyani and there was ‘Namaste Nepal’ to the rescue. The place looks quite decent and serves excellent food. There was a lovely lady with a beautiful smile at the counter :)

I visited the place on a Monday afternoon, hence it wasn’t packed. I ordered a chicken biriyani takeaway for € 15,70. The wait time was 20 mins.

I must say the food was quite tasty and the portion was big enough to fit my two meals. Definitely recommend the place!

google_reviews.author: Andrej Jerman
google_reviews.text: Best place in town, lively ambience, the lady that runs the place is super kind and helpful, open late, food right off the grill. Can't recommend enough.

google_reviews.author: Duke Papas
google_reviews.text:
We had a wonderful meal and drinks at this restaurant.  The space is very small which encourage interaction with the other guests.  This lead to fun conversations with guests and the hostess/owner.  If you want a private evening then look elsewhere but if you want to meet some locals then this is the place!
The food came out on a giant family style platter.  It was all very good.  There were also many Croatian liquors available for sampling.
Head over to this place with an open mind and you'll have a great time!

google_reviews.author: Billie Redgrave
google_reviews.text: horrible staff, lied about prices and smells rly weird. 2 karlovaškos for 10€ when outside it is specified on the sign that a beer is 3,5€ for a 500 ml beer to take away. i highly discourage visiting this place.

google_reviews.author: gita scajner
google_reviews.text: My boyfriend and I came from Croatia there at Konoba Kroatien and it was amazing. The food, people, atmosphere, drinks was all excelent. The prices are good. The staff were very nice and polite. I can’t wait to come there again!!!

google_reviews.author: Mila Svirčević
google_reviews.text: I had a great experience at Konoba Kroatien. The food was fresh and full of authentic Croatian flavors, especially the grilled meats. The cozy atmosphere and friendly service made it even better. I’ll definitely visit again!

google_reviews.author: matija kovaček
google_reviews.text: We ordered the cake. At first no response since our mail ended up in spam. On second contact we made an order for the cake. We agreed on making a cake with chocolate sponge with straberys with lemon cream in between. The cake was done and we came to pick it up looked ok but the colors on it were wrong. The detail work needed to be silver it was white. But we went with it it looked okeish. But the thing that is absolutely unacceptable was that it was a chocolate cake with nuss cream... Totaly un professional and I would suggest that you stay away from this place.

google_reviews.author: Mrs devi
google_reviews.text: They bake yummy cakes. Totally satisfied.

google_reviews.author: Andreas M.
google_reviews.text: Fancy cakes, high quality

google_reviews.author: Veronika Poron
google_reviews.text:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
We ordered a birthday cake for my husband and it was absolutely perfect! 🎂

Not only did it taste amazing, but it was also beautifully decorated.

The service was friendly and efficient – ​​highly recommended for any special occasion! 😉

google_reviews.author: Julian Mikl
google_reviews.text: The cake was beautifully made, but the communication was unfortunately a complete disaster. I constantly had to ask for clarification, and some of my messages went unanswered. Just one day before, I was told that certain things weren't possible. The cake was supposed to be filled with passion fruit, which it was, but you could barely taste it. If you could taste it at all, it was pureed in a cream, which wasn't what I had in mind. Therefore, I'm giving it two stars for the appearance, and that's all.
