google_reviews.text: Amazing prosecco, simple but great food, in a very hip area of Graz.

google_reviews.author: Ivan Markovic
google_reviews.text: Very nice place, good food. Recommended 👌🏻

google_reviews.author: Birgit Tode
google_reviews.text:
A little bit weird to offer goulash with 3 or 5 pieces of meat. First we thought it was making some fun...
But overall a nice place to sit and relax.

google_reviews.author: Markus Sorger
google_reviews.text: Small but lovely food market. Family like style. Chef is really funny and is making an effort about every customer. Daily menus, you have to ask what they have. But because of that everything is fresh. You even can watch how your food is cooked. Nice place to have your lunch or even just for a small drink.

google_reviews.author: Thomas Braunstingl
google_reviews.text: Cute market shop with daily food specials and friendly staff- it’s always a pleasure to enjoy some time in the sun here!

google_reviews.author: David Mitchell
google_reviews.text: Shame the owner had a heart attack and died. Bar was closed at the end of trading last night (23 Sept) lets hope it reopens. It proves in life you need a will and instructions for when you go toes up.

google_reviews.author: Judit Adrienn Kazsuba
google_reviews.text: Extremely nice little bar, very good beer and lovely hospitality! 🍻🐾🎶💚

google_reviews.author: Zoltán dr.Völgyi
google_reviews.text: Good atmosphere, kind host, excellent music, authentic guests and our first Kernkraft with fine beers.

google_reviews.author: Hansjörg Sitner
google_reviews.text: Cozy place...lovely staff...live music...cannot ask for more...

google_reviews.author: Berliner Luft
google_reviews.text:
Best Bar in Graz!
Greetings from Spreeborussen Berlin 1986.

google_reviews.author: Vedran Bajer
google_reviews.text:
Lovely location, very close to the city center, yet far enough to be in a really cool 'Platz' like place with a lot of other bars.

The food menu, whilst limited, was super tasty and a real pleasure to eat 🤤. Great coffee as well, great service and just a nice place to spend time in!

google_reviews.author: Patrick Galster
google_reviews.text: Favourite coffee and brunch place at Lendplatz, friendly staff und great selection of nibbles and drinks.

google_reviews.author: Dora M
google_reviews.text: We stopped here in the morning to have brunch. We loved the atmosphere. Breakfast was just enough and the service was great.

google_reviews.author: Candy Zimmermann
google_reviews.text:
Location: there's a farmer's market until 12 o'clock und lots of people chilling in the sun.

Staff: the jung one is friendly and funny. The old one doesn't seem to like his job.

Menu: they have alcohol and some Snacks

Bathroom: there's a public toilet in a separate container. It was awful

google_reviews.author: Raymond Shen
google_reviews.text: I sent a message by FB to the restaurant and asked if I can reserve for Tuesday night. Tuesday morning I got an answer that reservation is not necessary. 30 minutes later, when I passed by the restaurant, a panel on the door saying that the restaurant is closed for illness. I sent a second message by FB, the restaurant confirmed that it is true. OK. Tuedsay night, when I passed by once again the restaurant, I saw a table full of persons. I leave the judgement to you, simply feel sad not being able to enjoy a good meal. Maybe some misunderstanding, but there would be no next time.

google_reviews.author: Jean Madzima
google_reviews.text: As a tourist, I had the best experience at this restaurant! Best service and food. Thank you, Graz!

google_reviews.author: Tracey Duncan
google_reviews.text: This was one of the best experiences I've had at any Greek restaurant! The food was AMAZING!!! THE SERVICE WAS EXTRAORDINARY!!! AND THE ATMOSPHERE WAS GREAT!!! I LIVE IN BERLIN, BORN IN AMERICA AND THIS WAS GREAT GREEK FOOD!!! B.A.N.G.!!! B.A.N.G.!!!!!

google_reviews.author: Ezgi Halatli
google_reviews.text:
Google tagged as it is a fake comment. Well it is not!

I was there during the Germany—Spain game on 5th Jul2024z I ordered koftedakis, it was not even a minced meat, it was some mix of creamy stuff which doesn’t taste like a meat and it was raw. It is not the first time i eat this meal, At least since last 37 years i eat it very often.

Then they apologized and bring me moussaka! We also ordered greek salad with Feta cheese. None of those meals were not close to how it should be.

So in a nut shell i went home and couldn’t sleep and i had stomach issues next 2 days.
Instead of giving these details and impacting any business i decided to add the comments below. But looks like it is not easy for owner to take criticism and correct things.

“Garden is nice, the rest needs a lot of improvement.”

google_reviews.author: Alenka Klarica
google_reviews.text: Great restaurant. It caters for all needs (I am vegan). Food is excellent and staff are super friendly and fast. I reccommend it for small or big groups!

google_reviews.author: manos trollas
google_reviews.text: One of the best restaurants in Graz, this restaurant gives you a very family feeling, everything is fresh and the service is top. You just have to try it!

google_reviews.author: Elisabeth Toth
google_reviews.text: An absolutely charming boutique with very attentive service and fantastic, modern, and unique styles, textiles, shoes, and jewelry! You can feel the love for fashion in every piece ❤️

google_reviews.author: Sandra Setznagel
google_reviews.text: Exclusively selected fashion! There's something for every taste. Professional and honest advice makes shopping an experience. I hope the restaurants are allowed to open soon! Then shopping at Vicky's will be even more fun!

google_reviews.author: Philip Steiner
google_reviews.text:
Excellent selection of casual fashion items. Delivery was incredibly fast. Ordered Thursday – delivered Friday!
I'd be happy to come again!

google_reviews.author: Barbara Wappel
google_reviews.text:
Great, exclusive fashion.
Honest, friendly advice.
It's a shame the bar isn't open, which makes it even more fun.

google_reviews.author: Lima Echo AT
google_reviews.text: My favorite store! It's a shame the bar isn't allowed to open right now. Shopping there was always even more fun!

google_reviews.author: Drake Miller
google_reviews.text: Great pizza. Excellent staff. Felt immediately welcome and well taken care of. Recommend you give them a shot. They won't let you down.

google_reviews.author: Ren Earl
google_reviews.text: This is a great place for Italian food.  I went to two other restaurant but this was the best.  The penne dish was very good and the red sauce was truly Italian.

google_reviews.author: Emil Oprisa
google_reviews.text: I moved to Graz about 6 months ago and in this time I've used the lieferservice.at and mjam apps to order pizza from probably around 10 different places in Graz. I can honestly say that Volta makes the best pizza I tasted so far in this town, if not in all of Austria. You won't be disappointed!

google_reviews.author: Romulus Calin Negru-Radu
google_reviews.text:
We went there yesterday for pizza in a pouring rain evening after a bus tour of city of Graz.
The waiteress was quick and very child friendly.
Pizza/ Vienna schnitzel and local beer great.
Good value for money- we paid much less than expected.
Lucky to find this place after a bad experience with Pizzaiollo Graz were poor customer service and unfriendly bartender.

google_reviews.author: Louise Erlbeck
google_reviews.text: We Just left this place before ordering. They did not have any glutenfri options

google_reviews.author: Klaus Schiefer
google_reviews.text: A very nice bistro with a small but fine selection of fresh dishes. A pleasant ambiance and friendly service round off a successful culinary experience (and a quick lunch for those on a time crunch). Full marks!

google_reviews.author: Manfred Altenstrasser
google_reviews.text:
Fantastic! Excellent cuisine, from the appetizer to the main course to the dessert 🍮 – everything is highly recommended!

Very fast and very friendly service.

google_reviews.author: Robert Pflüger
google_reviews.text:
Always a pleasure to visit.

Great food, great wines.

google_reviews.author: Anna Maria vit
google_reviews.text: A small but welcoming place, the sisters who run it are particularly kind and friendly. We decided, as Italians, to try Italian food, and I must say we were delighted. The appetizers, featuring freshly sliced ​​cheeses and cured meats, baby cuttlefish and anchovies, as well as those featuring sun-dried tomatoes, mushrooms, artichokes, and more, were a delight for both adults and children, vegans and non-vegans alike. All this was accompanied by delicious homemade bread with a crispy crust, arugula, real olive oil, and good wine. The generous, simple yet delicious first courses also met everyone's tastes. Affordable prices.

google_reviews.author: Manuele Bazzichetto
google_reviews.text: As an Italian, I was pleasantly surprised to find this authentic Italian trattoria in Graz. A homey, welcoming atmosphere, excellent food and wine! Recommended to all Italians (and non-Italians) in Graz looking for something authentically Italian.

google_reviews.author: Stefan Linco
google_reviews.text: Until now I had no idea Cevapcici can be this good. It was a dairy free version with a key unique tasting vegetable spread. The owner is glowing with a positive attitude and did everything possible to make my dairy free experience perfect. Big enough portions also praised by my bodybuilding friends and the place has also a great friendly chill atmosphere 😌

google_reviews.author: CML
google_reviews.text: Excellent ambiance and very friendly service. The food is delicious. U should visit Dolly Bell.

google_reviews.author: Mikky Lovely
google_reviews.text: The restaurant is decorated in a modern wooden style. The host is incredibly nice and it invites you to stay. The dishes are unique and delicious. The meal becomes a reasonably priced experience. Inside the restaurant there is a table on a small balcony. The restaurant is worth trying. Excellent Croatian cuisine. An insider tip to eat.

google_reviews.author: Nightmare2800
google_reviews.text:
Very nice and cosy restaurant run by a jack of all trades owner who welcomes you kind heartedly.
Food was awesome and definitely a place to check out. We for sure visit again.

google_reviews.author: Hamzagic Elvir
google_reviews.text: Top top

google_reviews.author: Steve G
google_reviews.text: Very nice, informal spot for a drink in small streets of Graz. Service was rather informal and attentive.

google_reviews.author: Ksenia Romankova
google_reviews.text: So friendly staff, great local atmosphere, tasty food and cheap prices!

google_reviews.author: emanuele baraldi
google_reviews.text: Nice traditional food and beers. But the waitress didn’t speak english

google_reviews.author: Hans-Peter Woger
google_reviews.text: Best Leberkäse in Graz. Many different types of it. Great service. But "Schlager" music.

google_reviews.author: Cezar Burtescu
google_reviews.text: Nice wine for such a small family businesses.

google_reviews.author: Zainab Ahmad
google_reviews.text:
Had the best beef burger in Graz, Austria! The staff is super nice and friendly. We got our order in 10 mins. The burger is hugeee and it comes with fries too. A must try!

I asked them to cut my burger in half and they brought it back cut and covered with foil. So easy to eat!

google_reviews.author: Sandra Krcmarevic
google_reviews.text: The burger at this restaurant was incredibly delicious – juicy meat, rich and fresh salad, and perfectly balanced flavors. I especially want to mention the cleanliness of the restaurant, which is at a very high level, as well as the freshness of all the ingredients, which you can taste in every bite. I truly hope everything will remain just as good in the future. The owner also deserves praise for making an effort to speak several languages, which is very helpful for those of us whose native language is not German. Overall – a great experience, and I will gladly return!

google_reviews.author: Margaret mags
google_reviews.text: Great food at good prices. You can see how fresh the ingredients are and it really makes a difference. The staff is super friendly and really make you feel welcome! They've also got outdoor seating! All in all, a great place with place with good food and great staff!

google_reviews.author: Leonid Spektor
google_reviews.text: Super tasty! I had the falafel dürüm and it was amazing — crispy on the outside, soft on the inside, and packed with flavor. Everything was fresh and made with care. Great spot for a quick and satisfying bite. Highly recommend!

google_reviews.author: Joshua
google_reviews.text: My wife and I had the Big Chicken Kebab after spending the whole day at the F1 — and it absolutely hit the spot. The food was fresh and packed with flavour. The staff were all incredibly friendly and helpful. As visitors from Australia, we felt so welcomed. Love your work and your food, guys!

google_reviews.author: Anna Kalinina
google_reviews.text: Lovely restaurant with a very kind and friendly owner. The food was delicious and we really enjoyed our time here. We left happy and will definitely come back again!

google_reviews.author: chris trummer
google_reviews.text:
The food was good, the service was kinda icky.. they forgot our drinks several time, forgot glasses, the food took ages till it was brought to us..

The "playground" for the kids, which is only a small slide for 3-4 year olds, has nails  sticking out there and the gras and area around it was covered with Stinging Nettle (brandnetel).

google_reviews.author: Patricia Brocker
google_reviews.text: Calamari served in wine sauce,and garlic bread delicious..

google_reviews.author: Anthony Horsley
google_reviews.text: Good food at very reasonable prices with warm friendly service

google_reviews.author: Wolfi Wallner
google_reviews.text: Ok

google_reviews.author: Andrej Gusel
google_reviews.text:
Food: definitely not  a 3-star Michelin place, but good food and good prices.

Service: swift, friendly, polite.

Atmosphere: not a Hilton, but OK for the purpose...

google_reviews.author: Jakub Lanča
google_reviews.text:
Enormous portions of food with reasonable prices (4-8 €), for which you'll get enormous portions.
Majority of the menu is fried, though tasty.
Our waitress didn't speak English, so you better learn some German words to make an order.

google_reviews.author: summerinthedeephouse
google_reviews.text: Very good food! Nice place, plenty of parking space. If you travel, this place is a brilliant choice for a stop off.

google_reviews.author: Martin Salcher
google_reviews.text:
Cozy place with great affordable food.
Just thinking about their Schnitzel makes me drool 🤤

google_reviews.author: Irene Sasim
google_reviews.text: Huge portions of delicious food. Great place

google_reviews.author: Christian Chelu
google_reviews.text: The staff was very friendly and attentive, which created a lovely atmosphere. The dishes we enjoyed were absolutely delicious, and the way they were served—with style and attention to detail—was truly impressive. Highly recommend!

google_reviews.author: Michael Hartwell
google_reviews.text:
My wife and I were on holidays travelling through central Europe and came upon Koch Genuaa Atelier and our first impression was per the attached image (noting it was afternoon, getting dark and freezing with light drizzle - late December 2025), warm, bright, inviting and offering a huge selection of Biologica options.

We love Certified Organic (Biologica) Italian wines, in particular Villa Teresa's Prosecco....after travelling through several countries with none in sight, to see it out the front of this wonderful cafe really piqued our interest. As we stood there admiring the establishment and making up our minds if we should stop for a meal, Ute, the owner and gracious host, came out to greet us and walk us through the offerings, so welcoming and genuinely friendly, we had to go in.

We sat at the little table on the left of image right under the wine and alcohol selection cabinet, which was an awesome discussion topic during our visit, deciding on which local or European Biologica wine we should have with our meal. We should have been more adventurous and chosen an Österreich (Austrian) wine, but were so excited by the Villa Teresa that we ordered a bottle.

My wife and I have vastly different tastes, however agree that a good meal should be organic, seasonal, full of flavour and made with love and passion. That's exactly what we got. Whilst the menu is not extensive, there is enough selection to find something to have you walking away felling sated, nourished and very content, with good memories of the experience. A small menu is authentic, is made with precision and care and not prone to tourist trap huge selection quality deficiency.

Each of our meals were prepared to order in front of us. We watched the chef prepare these with care and passion, he was also serving us and was very professional and friendly, we felt like old friends not random walk-ins.

This is not a fast food experience, this is place to come and savour a glass of quality, healthy wine, have a great conversation (with your companions and the owner and staff) whilst your meal is being prepared, absolutely worth waiting for. But also noted there were selections in the cabinet made fresh by Ute and the team for take away or a quick bite in the cafe.

In summary, lovely staff, lovely cafe, wonderful experience. When we return to Graz we will definitely be visiting Koch Genuaa Atelier.

Thanks Ute and team for a magical experience, happy new year, wishing you all the best in 2026 and look forward to visiting again soon.

google_reviews.author: joan yang
google_reviews.text: Chanced upon KochGenussAtelier while visiting Graz. We were first surprised at the small dining space, 2 tables indoor and the healthy food. In wintery Graz, the salad, soup and apple cake baked by the owner's mother is stupendous. It is comforting,  healthy and delicious. We love the sincere and friendly service of the owner and the heart that goes into preparing the food.

google_reviews.author: Hannah Leschnik
google_reviews.text: The food is really delicious. The service is really friendly and welcoming. If you are in Graz it's really worth while to come and eat there.

google_reviews.author: zuzana_zu
google_reviews.text: Very fresh & tasty food. I woul recomend Pumpkin risotto with plums, Chili con carne was also really delicious.

google_reviews.author: Aleksiij
google_reviews.text: The Fröbel Kebap is one of the rare fast food places which I regularly visit. The reasons are: at  first very kind and friendly service always ready for nice kind chat and  ready to listen what you really want and like to eat. Food is fresh and very tasteful. Vegetables nicely chopped and crispy. Dough is freshly prepared for baking after you place the order and it is finished as top quality bread on the end. Kebap was not my kind of food until I have discovered this place and now it is one of my favourite food. Also not to forgot to mention: the restaurant is spotlessly clean and tidy. The value which you get for the price is great. They always have fresh and very tasteful Baklava in the offer, too.

google_reviews.author: Stef Chef
google_reviews.text:
Very small store, therefor...whats to see is quite ok. Had a lahmachun and a chicken kebab. The big advantage of this store is...he's makin all dough fresh...so the dough was nice and fresh...but a bit to much breaking up..chicken very nice and proper grilled before cutting and serving. All in all...for a 4.50 EUR Kebab a good choice....try it.
The lahmachun is fresh prepared....for this size a bit lack of meat...and a bit to spicy...just by it self...without ordering spicy. Big size...fresh made...would be even much better if not wrapped with the salad...suggesting serving as a pizza with salad on side....but aswell...for a 4.50 EUR here aswell...nothing to complain. Value for money....good.

Apsolutly worth a try.

Dear Chef...thank you very much 🙏

google_reviews.author: Amira Hosny Ibrahim
google_reviews.text:
Yummy kebab! Big portions and great value for money. Great service (only ordered take away but the guy was super nice!)
5/5

google_reviews.author: Mariya Shylinska2
google_reviews.text: The best service and the food is soo good!

google_reviews.author: Hakam
google_reviews.text: They used the Iraqi type of bread for my sandwich, which is the best (at least for). Sandwich tastes good and a normal price. I recommend them!

google_reviews.author: Sol Rodriguez Caro
google_reviews.text:
I ordered a pizza online from Argentina as a gift for a family member who lives in Gratz and they took the time to write a “Happy Birthday” note and even made some last minute changes I asked to the order!
Would recommend the service 100% and the pizza is apparently really good 😊

google_reviews.author: Nikola Do Anhova
google_reviews.text:
Very disappointed!
Ordered pizzas tonight via mjam app but they the pizzas were not tasty at all! I ordered one with pfefferoni which was meant to be spicy, but it was very bland. Will not order from this place again.

google_reviews.author: Cobra Cobra
google_reviews.text: Supper Ambiente Super Service Super Team ✌️😁✌️ Typisch Xıntık........

google_reviews.author: ThePassionOfGames
google_reviews.text: It's fast and near home

google_reviews.author: Kemal Arslan
google_reviews.text: Supper

google_reviews.author: E T
google_reviews.text: I had a pizza menu delivered by foodora. Not only the coupons couldn't be applied (not the restaurant's fault), the pizza was stone cold when arrived and the dessert is not what I picked (tiramisu) and didn't look or taste good. Pizza tastes okay. Overall, a very disappointing experience, though maybe the restaurant is better if you visit in person. Would definitely not recommend delivery by foodora. :(

google_reviews.author: Áron Tőkés
google_reviews.text:
There is a huuuge variety of pizza, more than 70 types to choose from. So it’s quite difficult to pick just one 😃
Finally, with the recommendation of the house, I chose the pizza specialty called pistachio mortadella burrata.
Oh mamma mia, this is molto gustoso 🍕👌🏽😋
And let me tell you, that the athmosphere of the pizzeria is authentic, nice & welcoming.
The staff & the service is genial, direct & friendly 🤗
Quindi va tutto bene 🤌🏽🤌🏽
Thank you for the experience & the fantastic food!
It was the first, but definately not the last visit here!!

google_reviews.author: Vjekoslav Jurić
google_reviews.text: Only good pizza in Graz! 👍🏻👍🏻

google_reviews.author: Stefan Marchl
google_reviews.text: Top Pizza super Service:-)

google_reviews.author: Noémi Cserháti
google_reviews.text: Excellent pizza 👌👍

google_reviews.author: Vizak Pinkwolf
google_reviews.text: Extremely friendly staff. There are several rooms you can use, as well as various events. The only downside is that people often come there who make you feel unsafe (I was harassed and followed several times). So be careful, but the staff are always there for you. And there's free electricity.

google_reviews.author: Konata YuriShima
google_reviews.text: I've been there several times and everyone is super nice, understanding, and most importantly, you can have a lot of fun with them!

google_reviews.author: chrislMath
google_reviews.text: Very nice! But Martin takes some getting used to. xD

google_reviews.author: Gustl Njivice
google_reviews.text: Hello, that's nice that it exists!

google_reviews.author: Joe
google_reviews.text: So, if you walk past there sometimes, it doesn't feel like a youth hangout, but more like a drug dealing spot. Sometimes it smells so strongly of weed that it couldn't be worse. And in the summer, when the weather is nice, the area in front (by the benches) gets littered with cigarette butts and sunflower seed husks. So, the quality of the place is zero. 🤮

google_reviews.author: Adna
google_reviews.text: Pizza was good-everything is pre-made. It's a good snack place, but I wouldn't say its very much filling for the price they offer. The place is small but nicely decorated , and they dont have a toilet.

google_reviews.author: Lukas E
google_reviews.text:
Edit after my second visit:

The Pizzas themselves are very good. The dough is superb. I mean it. The Pizza was really gentle on my digestion, so I think they did something special with the dough. Better than many others in that regard! Come for properly rested and prepared pizza dough.

The pricing is a little too high though. I would find it fairer if the take home pizzas were cheaper than the instore pizzas.

No Coca Cola, just some lemonades available to drink.

Come on guys.

If I'm getting a Pizza I want to drink a proper Coca Cola with it. Not some weak raspberry lemonade.

The concept is interesting. The location is clean and stylish. I would have preferred without the merchandise on the shelbes though.

Also no olive oil and vinegar freely available, which I enjoy dipping my crusts in.

My recomendations:
Cut the price a bit
Offer Coca Cola!!!
Make olive oil and vinegar available for the guests like at Vapiano

google_reviews.author: Sander dM
google_reviews.text:
Great place that looks amazing when you walk in. Superb concept and the merch is on point. Tried one of their pizzas as a takeaway to bake-off at home. Very kind and helpful staff gave we some extra insider tips for the best results.

Followed the tips. Might be my cooking skills 😜 wasn’t blown away by the pizza. Especially for the prise and needing to do some work on it at home… some delivery pizzas in the city are cheaper or similar priced and tasted better - to my taste at least.

But if you’re reading this and made it this far in… go have a try for yourself.

google_reviews.author: Todd Hatfield
google_reviews.text:
Sorry but not authentic Neopolitan pizza. Dough was not airy and undercooked in what looked like electric ovens vs wood fired oven. Not crispy at
all on the bottom.

google_reviews.author: Santiago Raimondi
google_reviews.text:
In a place where O' Sole 'e Napule or Pizzaiolo or Galiano exist, is an aberration to call this product pizza. Sorry not sorry.
Dough is precooked (so you don't know when it was made) and then heated in an electric oven when competitors use proper freshly made dough and wooden fire ovens. Cherry on top, the hefty price of €12 (!).
The place itself very uncomfortable to sit as a restaurant. And even the pizzas sold to eat here are wrapped in plastic for no reason as you anyway eat it here.
The personnel were very kind and helpful but just the product is not worth it

google_reviews.author: WestWorlder
google_reviews.text: A take on their local dessert. Taste and style is similar to a waffle or pancakes, and i think probably inspired by the style of japanese french toasts. Pretty nice dessert, and standard sweet stuff. Nutella was a bit weird to me, maybe maple syrup or something would be cool. So a pretty good place, just found it a little expensive for what it was. But a decent place for sure.

google_reviews.author: Inge Gsellmann
google_reviews.text:
It was oily, soggy/doughy and just sugary sweet. It should be fluffy and have a light caramelisation due to being made in a pan. Also all of the options have vanilla ice cream on them - what happened to the traditional apple sauce or Zwetschgenröster? Also crazy expensive and portions are rather small.

The atmosphere at the place is one where I would prefer my order to-go but with -5 degrees we staid and contended with the noise a group of teenagers makes.

If you're a tourist and want to try this traditional meal then please do yourself a favor and go to a traditional restaurant!

google_reviews.author: Rafał Fojcik
google_reviews.text: Great dessert. Can’t go wrong with this one. Definitely worth a try

google_reviews.author: Jyothish Atheendran
google_reviews.text: Good food. Friendly staff. They accept payments with card.

google_reviews.author: urška klaneček
google_reviews.text: Friendly staff and amazing food.

google_reviews.author: Margaret
google_reviews.text: The service here is abysmal. Most of the servers seem to have peripheral blindness! Go elsewhere if you want quick service and attentive personnel.

google_reviews.author: Srdjan Stankovic
google_reviews.text: Great place ... Food is amazing.. simple but great. Strudel is "must have".

google_reviews.author: Karin KG
google_reviews.text: Nice café inside the Citypark Shopping Mall. Extensive selection of pastries, bakery products and beverages etc. Very friendly staff and spacious seating

google_reviews.author: Patrik Vincetić
google_reviews.text: I always stop by at this place when im in City Park i love it

google_reviews.author: Lizabeta Prenka
google_reviews.text: Super..

google_reviews.author: Lisbora Likaj
google_reviews.text: Best burek in graz! Really good and not oily! 100% recommended!🤩

google_reviews.author: Biljana P (Zarina)
google_reviews.text:
Very good bakery!
Great choice of pastry, bread, snacks, cakes, and you can have coffee as well.
If you love Burek this is a place you don’t wanna miss

google_reviews.author: M Pendl
google_reviews.text: Next door bakery - also open on sundays

google_reviews.author: Tihomir Mandović
google_reviews.text: Burek people, burek! Provided with "real" Balkan jogurt. Price insignificant due the quality.

google_reviews.author: Karmen (K)
google_reviews.text: Great burek and sirnica, we enjoyed both immensly!

google_reviews.author: Bendgúz Hegyi
google_reviews.text: The best products from the best sellers! I can only recommend them!

google_reviews.author: S. Fuchs
google_reviews.text: I went there again today after a long time, and everything was very messy. An employee was putting together a gift basket or an order, and we were left to our own devices. We bought rendered pork fat from the Streilhofer family and liver pâté from Höllerbauer. The rendered pork fat wasn't properly rendered, making the fat very gritty and difficult to grate. The liver pâté contained flavor enhancers and preservatives, so its best-before date is February 25, 2026. I might as well just buy the mass-produced stuff. I wanted to support local farmers and buy regional products, and I was hoping for good taste. Neither is highly recommended. Very disappointing!

google_reviews.author: Marko Jelencic
google_reviews.text: Simply fantastic! A huge selection of high-quality products. If you're looking for great products from other regions at fair prices, or perhaps a gift for friends or family, this shop is just the place. The staff is very friendly and helpful. You won't regret your visit!

google_reviews.author: sara hunjak
google_reviews.text: A beautiful shop with local Austrian products! Everything is carefully selected, and you can feel the genuine quality. I would especially like to emphasize the friendliness and warmth of the staff – always attentive, helpful, and with honest recommendations. Every visit leaves a very positive impression, and I always look forward to returning.

google_reviews.author: Hamzeh Nassar
google_reviews.text: Delivery for a farewell party was 38 minutes late!! Just imagine the embarrassment! Never again!!!

google_reviews.author: Pavel
google_reviews.text: Good, but they don't accept cards

google_reviews.author: Virginia Rose
google_reviews.text:
Absolutely fantastic bread rolls, buns, and pastries.

I ate there during my lunch break at a cozy standing table with stools. The incredibly friendly staff served me immediately and looked after me. They also offer drinks, of course. The prices are very reasonable for the location and the quality. The food is truly fresh and delicious!

Overall, I highly recommend them; I'm now a regular customer.

google_reviews.author: Drill Sergeant
google_reviews.text:
Ordered 50 rolls by phone on December 29, 2025. Delivery was promised for December 31, 2025, but we received nothing. We called several times but only got the voicemail. Regards, Roman.

Update: The rolls arrived at 5:20 PM.

Delivery was agreed upon between 2:00 PM and 4:00 PM. Unfortunately, our guests had already left by then.

google_reviews.author: Henrietta Bócsi
google_reviews.text:
The mixed selection of vegetarian and meat rolls was excellent.
The price was also very reasonable. Delivery was smooth!
What could be improved: an online ordering option – in line with modern needs.
We will definitely order here again!

google_reviews.author: hermine paul
google_reviews.text:
I fully agree with the other reviews.

I only ordered once, and the meat was undercooked and bloody inside. The first time I ordered, I had to pay for two sets of food containers. I kept one. The owners refuse to return the second set that I paid for.

google_reviews.author: Viertler Daniel
google_reviews.text: I would not recommend turkey schnitzel that is neither "cooked through" nor raw.

google_reviews.author: Robert Kropic
google_reviews.text: Very friendly service and good menu at reasonable prices

google_reviews.author: Nick Acorne
google_reviews.text: It's a sweet place to have a drink with friends. Good for summer days, when you can sit outside. Friendly. Unfortunately payments can be made only in cash. So be aware, that you might withdraw some money before you go there.

google_reviews.author: Károly Kasza
google_reviews.text: Extremely friendly local pub.

google_reviews.author: berke ayrancioglu
google_reviews.text: A great bar near Lendplatz. Nice music, friendly people. Reasonable prices

google_reviews.author: nikos koulouris
google_reviews.text: Great, friendly bar. Great choice of beers and you still get the drink after the night curfew.

google_reviews.author: Thomas Moshammer
google_reviews.text: Great Bar in Lend Quarter. Cool music, perfect Service, nice people!

google_reviews.author: Robert Stock (Suerion)
google_reviews.text:
I'm a regular at Medico, and I immediately notice that there's always stress among the employees as soon as the terrace opens; there's definitely a lack of staff.

However, since one lady always lets the others work and cites a strict table allocation as the reason for not being able to serve them right away, it's actually really not right for the company.

There used to be a slightly slimmer lady there, who, despite the stress, made sure everyone worked together and it worked out.

Since a more strict lady has been there, there's no sense of community here anymore. The friendly smile is also missing.

A year ago, the welcome here was definitely friendlier.

Generally, the food is good and excellent for a bistro/café.

Unfortunately, they've discontinued the healthy breakfast yogurt, which would have definitely been better than toast (yogurt with muesli and fruit).

If the service improves again, I won't be coming here with a bad feeling.

The renovation of the men's restroom is definitely worth seeing :)

google_reviews.author: Ralf
google_reviews.text:
A generally nice cafe.

The staff is incredibly stressed, but still provides friendly and fast service.

Unfortunately, the espresso wasn't to my taste, but I'm quite particular about espresso.

google_reviews.author: Marcoh Hugerih
google_reviews.text:
It looks cozy for sitting outside. But the ashtrays and the smell of cigarettes from all sides change that perception. The waitress is visibly ill and is serving/taking orders. I also had to wait 15 minutes for them to take my order.

They also brought me the wrong order.

I hope it was just an unlucky day, and like most reviews, this is a snapshot in time. But it spoils breakfast here.

Plus point: System of a Down was playing as music inside.

google_reviews.author: Klaus Titz
google_reviews.text:
Nach 20 Minuten warten wurde ich das erste Mal von der Bedienung gesehen und gekonnt ignoriert oder nicht wahrgenommen. Dachte ich zumindest. Nach weiteren 5 Minuten konnte ich endlich bestellen. Im Gespräch war sofort zu sehen, dass die Angestellte außer Atem war. Man konnte sie auch die ganze Zeit hin und her laufen sehen, um das Pensum zu erfüllen.
Den Platz zu verlassen um drinnen zu bestellen war auch nicht möglich, da der Tisch dann sofort belegt gewesen wäre.
Das auf die geöffnete Terrasse alleine zu schieben wäre nicht fair, drinnen war alles leer. Da aber die Anzahl der Mitarbeiter bereits öfter kritisiert wurde, wäre hier vielleicht Mal nachzubessern, vor allem, da dies auch in diesem Fall das Problem gelöst hätte.

google_reviews.author: Adam Jovanovic
google_reviews.text: The croissant, as you can see, was about two days old. The salad was partially rotten (unfortunately, no photo available)... The service wasn't great either...

restaurants.name: Vapiano
restaurants.summary: Laid-back restaurant featuring made-to-order fresh pasta dishes, along with pizza & salad.

google_reviews.author: findefuchs
google_reviews.text:
I got a free lemonade for this review but the lemon flavor was very sour an not sweet at all. Not recommended.

The food was below average and very bland.

The people working there are friendly but Service doesn't exist because it is self-serve.

Prices are all right and portions are good but like I said it's nothing special.

Spend 3 or 4€ more and go to a genuine Italian restaurant.

google_reviews.author: M G
google_reviews.text: I love this place. The food is fresh and delicious.

google_reviews.author: Andrea K
google_reviews.text: Self service restaurant. You get a card at the entrance which you scan when order and hand to the clerk when leaving. They offer gluten free pizza, some risottos, salads, some appetizers and even some gluten free desserts. They have a gluten free station and bake the pizza in another oven. It was tasty!

google_reviews.author: Sadie d. love
google_reviews.text: Haven’t been to Vapiano for a while and was pleasantly surprised with a bunch of vegan options and the prices that didn’t skyrocket as in other places. Lemonades are great and huge and you can get them for 2€ in the menu. The place wasn’t crowded and was very pleasant and cosy. Not sure why are so many Vapiano restaurants closing recently…

google_reviews.author: Afra Aras
google_reviews.text: Fantastic pizza, crispy and variety of ingredients! Tastes so good! I recommend the place to everyone who loves pizza and pasta! Will come back again!

google_reviews.author: Sandie Smith
google_reviews.text: We enjoyed a drink here.  Inside, it seems to be set up for wine tastings as well as people wanting to have a casual drink - so a bit of a muddle.  Having been asked to move to a smaller table (as a couple), we were then unimpressed to see 2 people sit at the table we had been asked to vacate!  Pleasant service despite the tourist treatment.

google_reviews.author: Daryl Tay
google_reviews.text:
Chanced upon this place and it turned out pretty good. The tramezzini was tasty, tiramisu wasn’t too bad either.

We went on a Monday afternoon in the middle of November, so it was pretty quiet and relaxing inside - the waitress was quick and attentive too.

google_reviews.author: Al Orozco
google_reviews.text: We randomly found this spot and we were absolutely in love with this place. It’s low key with a nice ambiance and great tasting deserts and snacks with very good drinks. Customer service was top notch. Highly recommend it.

google_reviews.author: Tathi Ribeiro
google_reviews.text: I loved the croissant, very tasty.  I recommend.  The place is nice, we sat outside.  Very cordial service. We spent €10 for 2 coffees and 2 croissants.

google_reviews.author: Pauline Roberts
google_reviews.text: Tiny, cozy spot with a modern relaxed vibe. Luscious variety of Crostini or  cheeseplate gives vegetarians some nice options. Open before some of the other dinner restaurants. And they offer breakfast!

google_reviews.author: Lia Mxn
google_reviews.text:
Dining above Graz' rooftops!
Whenever I have visitors in Graz, I guide them here. The restaurant is located in the very heart of the old town of Graz with a perfect view of the castle hill as well as the marvelous city hall.
I've been here several times for breakfast, which has been on point every single time. There is sth. on the menu for every taste:  whether you want pancakes, poached eggs, muesli, French toast or other culinary combinations. Besides the great taste and truly good pricing, I love that they use fresh and mainly regional products.
Also very recommendable is the coffee - and I say that as a coffee lover. But if you are more in the mood for champagne or a "Spritz" - I'm sure you'll find some tasty options too.
Hot tip: if you would like to visit this place on the weekend, make a reservation well ahead of time, especially if you would like to sit on the beautiful terrace.
Last but not least I enjoy it very much that the service treats every customer like a queen/king. I emphasize this because not only the "normal people" meet at Freiblick, but also the "Upper classes". You just feel comfortable and welcome here, no matter what you look like.
In conclusion: a visit here is a big fat recommendation!

google_reviews.author: T. S.
google_reviews.text: Lovely cafe with a gorgeous terrace on top. Views are really beautiful and you can see all of the old town of Graz. We only had cuppacino there, it was good. We were there mainly for the view.

google_reviews.author: Zsófia Maróti
google_reviews.text: The most perfect rooftop spot in Graz! Lovely food, cool vibes, great view!

google_reviews.author: Matija Mirković
google_reviews.text: Food was amazing. Dog friendly place. Service could be better not like on the instant track. You have to make reservations before, in my case 1 hour, it is acceptable, just the feeling that everything is in hurry I don't like. Sit-eat/drink-go, next please....Average evaluation 4 🌟.

google_reviews.author: David Gonzalez
google_reviews.text:
Finding the restaurant was a bit tricky. The map indicated I had arrived, but it turned out to be the entrance of a mall. Thankfully, a guard informed us that the restaurant was on the 6th floor. Upon arriving there, we were impressed by the stunning city views.

However, we had to flag down a waiter after waiting for about 10 minutes unnoticed. Once seated, service improved significantly. The waiter was friendly and knowledgeable about the menu. The food arrived quickly and was delicious, though the portion sizes seemed small for the cost. Breakfast for three, including eggs and bacon for my wife and I, pancakes for my daughter, two juices, a cappuccino, and water, came to around 60 euros plus tip – quite pricey.

Despite this, I would recommend the restaurant for its beautiful scenery and tasty food.

google_reviews.author: Melih
google_reviews.text: This amount of quality is crazy for the price, all of the food was amazing and very traditionally Turkish. We tried the mixed grill, mevlana and etli ekmek and each was wonderful on it's own. There's also Turkish tea here. We will definitely come back for a taste of home food.

google_reviews.author: Marc Wernli
google_reviews.text: Had a great lunch from Elit, stopped in and order takaway. Ordered a Doner and a shoulder. Fresh made bread, large portions and inexpensive.  Great lunch spot.

google_reviews.author: Simeon
google_reviews.text:
Aggressive Vendor Conduct at Elit Restaurant (Rösselmühlgasse 6b)

Hello,
I’d like to report a serious incident of inappropriate and aggressive behavior by the owner of Elit Restaurant at Rösselmühlgasse 6b.

Today, I arrived to pick up a customer order and waited respectfully for over 10 minutes, after greeting the staff and sitting quietly as I usually do. No one asked for my order number during that time. Then, without warning, the owner began shouting at me, accusing me of “sitting around lazily” and “not saying anything.”

When I calmly explained that I had greeted them and was waiting to be asked (as is standard practice), he escalated further — getting in my face, yelling, and threatening me publicly in front of customers. He then told me to leave the restaurant entirely.

I’ve had continuous problems at this location since 2019, but this is the most aggressive and humiliating behavior I’ve experienced yet. This is no longer just bad service — this is harassment and a clear threat to courier safety.

I’m requesting that this vendor be reviewed and flagged, and that other couriers are protected from future incidents.
Thank you.

Addendum:

Since submitting my report, I’ve seen that the vendor has filed a retaliatory complaint against me. I want to emphasize that this is a false reversal of events and a classic case of projection.

This incident is not isolated. I’ve had repeated issues with this vendor since 2019 — including long wait times and unprofessional behavior — but I’ve always kept my interactions polite, about the cleanliness of the place or hygiene while prepping food i dont want to even start.

I’m requesting that this incident be reviewed seriously for courier safety concerns, and that my report is prioritized over this clearly defensive response by the vendor.

google_reviews.author: İbrahim efe Keser
google_reviews.text: One of the best Turkish restaurants in Graz! The food is delicious, the atmosphere is great, and the staff are super friendly and attentive. Totally recommend!

google_reviews.author: Slobodan Ulaz
google_reviews.text: Pizza Capricciosa is with sardines which I have never seen before. Also Margherita stinks on the fish too. Owner also seems very unfriendly.

google_reviews.author: REIS J.E.
google_reviews.text: Very nice location with good options for beers and wine. They have a nice terras but also sufficient room inside.

google_reviews.author: Fabian Hofer
google_reviews.text:
Nice and relaxed atmosphere and super-friendly staff.
You can enjoy a good coffee during the day and end up with a surprise cocktail-testing in the evening. Hidden gem located right in the city center!

google_reviews.author: peter
google_reviews.text: Affordable tasty wines make you feel like J. Christ

google_reviews.author: Maja Gajić
google_reviews.text: Nice place with some interesting cocktails.

google_reviews.author: fabien
google_reviews.text: Nice bar, not smoky, service was effective and nice!

google_reviews.author: deadlybee111
google_reviews.text:
Best Döner Bread i ever eaten.
Service is friendly.
Sauces are good too.

google_reviews.author: Fabian
google_reviews.text: Friendly, quality, not expensive

google_reviews.author: J P
google_reviews.text: !!! Best Spicy Sauce in Town !!!

google_reviews.author: Lera bho
google_reviews.text: As a true Italian, I wanted to try a Margherita pizza, which was expensive (normal for Graz). The dough was rubbery, the cheese (if mozzarella) was very poor, and the tomato and oil tasted overwhelmingly of onion and garlic (there's no garlic or onion in a Margherita in Italy). I wanted to know what they meant by pizza, but they didn't understand pizza. Negative.

google_reviews.author: Daniel Jakob Wolf
google_reviews.text: The kebab shop was good for years, but the last few times have been bad. The bread falls apart when you eat it, there's not enough meat, it arrives cold, and the price is too high. I'm disappointed and will have to find somewhere else.

google_reviews.author: Dino Marek
google_reviews.text: Great food, nice people.

google_reviews.author: Die Therapie Kammer
google_reviews.text: I ordered from Pizza Ooint via the app for the first time today and was absolutely thrilled! 🙏🏼 The food arrived promptly and as agreed, and was incredibly fresh and delicious! I'll definitely be ordering more often in the future. ☺️🙏🏼

google_reviews.author: Peter Gucher

Excellent food (vegetarian options available) and truly friendly service.

Highly recommended.

We'll be back!

google_reviews.author: Peter Eberharter

google_reviews.author: OSSİ BERTAN
google_reviews.text: Very satisfied. The pizzas are great, taste good, and the staff is very friendly. Lots of different food options on the menu. 👍👍

google_reviews.author: khan world
google_reviews.text: today went to for my MRI Private Clinic, everything nice clean very Beautiful , Then i give 1 floor MRI ROOM 6 .mitarbeiter lady behavior is not good .i don't know  only me or all

google_reviews.author: Emre Zengin
google_reviews.text: Short waiting time for appointments, friendly and competent staff, very clean and well-organized building.

google_reviews.author: Barbara Guidassoni
google_reviews.text:
Highly recommended sanatorium

I was extremely satisfied with my stay at the sanatorium. The treatments were professional, well-organized, and very helpful. A huge thank you to the entire nursing and care team – all the staff were consistently friendly, helpful, and attentive.

The rooms were clean (I was on the 3rd floor), comfortable, and well-equipped, so I felt right at home. The pleasant atmosphere throughout the entire building also contributed significantly to my relaxation.

Many thanks to the entire team for the excellent care. I wholeheartedly recommend this sanatorium and would gladly return if needed.

Thank you so much!

google_reviews.author: Walter Zach
google_reviews.text:
Check-in January 28, 2026 - 1 p.m. Check-out January 29, 2026 - 10:30 a.m. without any problems!

I underwent septoplasty at the private clinic of the Sisters of the Cross in Graz and I can only say: I felt extremely well cared for from the very first moment.

The entire staff – from reception to the surgeons – was exceptionally friendly, competent, and warm. This combination of professionalism and genuine humanity is rare these days.

The surgical team supported me before and after the procedure with great empathy, calm, and care. This allowed me to have a very positive experience despite my understandable nervousness.

I was particularly impressed by the short waiting times, the perfect organization, and the high level of cleanliness throughout the entire clinic.

The private rooms and the pleasant, almost hotel-like atmosphere further contribute to the feeling of being in good hands, rather than in a hospital.

Many thanks to the entire team – a clinic that can be recommended with complete conviction.

google_reviews.author: Sabine Hagen
google_reviews.text:
I was there for surgery.

Overall, it was very relaxing and I felt well cared for.

The room, the food, and the care provided by the staff and doctors were excellent.

Thank you so much.

restaurants.name: Murheuriger

google_reviews.author: Oplan Stripsl
google_reviews.text: A very pleasant, quiet Heuriger on the outskirts of Graz. Super-friendly service, big portions, very reasonable prices. Don't forget to order the traditional beetle bean salad!

google_reviews.author: Claudia Carpena Höll

google_reviews.text: Top

google_reviews.author: Dominik Komloši
google_reviews.text: Decent running sushi, but really nothing special. Staff was nice. Sushi was a bit dry, but warm meals were good. Food had quite a bit variety, which is also nice. Not dissapointed nor specially satisfied. It's okay.

google_reviews.author: Elzbieta Jacevic
google_reviews.text:
Food are delicious 🤤
Staff and service are on the top 🔝 very friendly staff 🥰 and atmosphere there are nice, just like in asia. I love it! Definitely recommend 👍

google_reviews.author: Sara Baily
google_reviews.text:
The food is nice also the staff is friendly but i was there today with my kids we ate at the place with the moving plates and i had to pay 43 euros?
We were only three one adult two kids ! we didn’t order anything else only 2 glasses of water !!
It felt like a rip off for me honestly!!

google_reviews.author: THE Mithrandir09
google_reviews.text: Easily the best Running Sushi in Graz. Good sushi, great breaded prawns made with crispy panko, incredible gyoza and a good mix of other side dishes you'd expect. Try out the yellow salad, it's unexpectedly delicious and refreshing!

google_reviews.author: Nina H
google_reviews.text: Very unpolite stuff, low quality food, poor choice. Per person 16 Euro, orange juice 4+€

google_reviews.author: Alexander Herkner
google_reviews.text: Liked the day menu with local food in a modern environment

google_reviews.author: Anil Tilanthe
google_reviews.text: Great food and very nice staff. I got a delicious food deal. I was not very hungry, but once I started eating, I couldn't stop. The curry was great. Delicious rice with veggies. 💕👌

google_reviews.author: clara Van meegen
google_reviews.text: Did not try the food, because it was full. They were not nice.

google_reviews.author: Anne Riddare
google_reviews.text: excellent food. nice place. a bit expensive.

google_reviews.author: Stanko Man
google_reviews.text: Great place, with wonderful food.

google_reviews.author: Michael Forenbacher
google_reviews.text: Exeptionnel fine dining

google_reviews.author: Josef Schwarz
google_reviews.text: Super Sommelier!

google_reviews.author: Florian Prutsch
google_reviews.text:
My wife and I had a wonderful evening at the restaurant yesterday!

The ambiance is inviting, generally dark, with lots of wood and recurring patterns from the floor to the walls and tables. Pleasant music and a quiet atmosphere conducive to hushed conversation are perfectly balanced.

The eight-course menu is beautifully crafted and a true culinary delight, from the amuse-bouche to the petit fours. Head chef Jan Eggers (Pastry Chef of the Year and head chef – a rather rare combination) and his team demonstrate culinary artistry of a very high caliber. Here, the art of cooking is truly lived – from classic French techniques to modern culinary methods, everything is represented. The outstanding quality of the ingredients is particularly noteworthy. The pre- and main desserts were, of course, highlights, which is hardly surprising given the chef's professional background. The Jerusalem artichoke dish was another absolute highlight.

The service is understated and unobtrusive – in the best possible way. In keeping with current trends, a good selection of non-alcoholic beverages was also offered, and the service was excellent in this regard. While the service could have been a touch more approachable and included a bit more small talk between courses, this is a personal preference and probably perfectly acceptable to most other guests.

Overall, it was a wonderful evening. Many thanks to the entire team.

google_reviews.author: Daniela Körndl
google_reviews.text:
A first-class culinary experience 🌟

My expectations were not only met, but far exceeded – for me, this award-winning restaurant is absolutely at Michelin-star level.
What's served here impressively combines flavor, creativity, artisanal precision, and the highest product quality. Each dish was uniquely composed and a true experience for all the senses.

The three of us opted for the 8-course menu with a matching wine or kombucha pairing. The culinary journey was varied and multifaceted – from sophisticated interpretations of classics to bold, surprising creations. Particularly charming was the staged interlude featuring "Sisi's Coke," which provided a humorous moment and further lightened the evening.

The pictures can hardly capture the flavor – what we were served tasted even better than it already looked spectacular.

An evening to remember.

google_reviews.author: Laura Jirka
google_reviews.text:
My partner and I were there yesterday and are still absolutely thrilled. We started the evening with high expectations, and these were completely exceeded. Every course was a surprise; creative, unusual, and yet perfectly balanced. You can immediately sense the passion and creativity that goes into the kitchen. Such compositions are truly rare.

A particular highlight was the different stories behind each course and the fact that the kitchen team personally served and explained each one. This direct interaction, the openness, and the enthusiasm with which our questions were answered made the evening truly special.

The service also deserves high praise: warm, friendly, attentive, and professional at the same time. You could tell how well the team worked together and how important it was to them that the guests felt comfortable, and that's exactly what we did from the very beginning.

The atmosphere was warm, cozy, and simply perfect for a relaxed and enjoyable evening.

In short: The best restaurant experience we've ever had. Highly recommended.

google_reviews.author: Natascha Eibl
google_reviews.text:
Heavy food very savory.
Traditional Austrian cuisine. Bit to salty and oily tho.
Very limited parking space.
Friendly staff.
Reservation during lunch time highly recommended it's overcrowded during lunch time and dinner time.

google_reviews.author: berke ayrancioglu
google_reviews.text: Nice place for those who want to experience something traditional. The traditional food tastes nice(tried Jägerpfandl), you can feel the ambience with wooden tables and people wearing traditional clothes. I think prices can be considered a bit high but I can suggest this place.

google_reviews.author: Kathy Tudor
google_reviews.text:
I’ve had great schnitzel in Graz, but not here.
The breading didn’t stay on the schnitzel and it had no flavour at all. The potato salad with pumpkin seed oil was tasty.

google_reviews.author: Mario Baumann
google_reviews.text: We haven't eaten this well in a long time. For the "kitchen" and the friendly service, 5 stars are definitely worth it. We would love to come back to this great inn and it's always worth a visit. We are very satisfied. food great. Friendly service. Always my pleasure. Great atmosphere to stay.

google_reviews.author: Johnathan Appleseed
google_reviews.text: Nice Austrian place. Loved the Backhendl salad. Lovely service and good beers. Only open until 22h most days, kitchen until 21h.

google_reviews.author: Jagannath Nandi
google_reviews.text: Nice place for hangout ,sip fresh coffee and bite delicious homemade cakes

google_reviews.author: Raluca Müller
google_reviews.text: I ordered donuts.. They were perfect.Cevapcici were also great. The owner is very friendly

google_reviews.author: Alina Shabalovskaya
google_reviews.text: Highly recommend. Burek was perfect as well as desert. The lady on the counter was very nice.

google_reviews.author: ANTONELLO ALOE VERA
google_reviews.text: I really liked this little place where you can eat and drink! The lady is very nice, kind, and cheerful! I highly recommend it, of course.

google_reviews.author: A
google_reviews.text: Beautiful restaurant, very friendly owner. The party pretzels, which we were able to order at relatively short notice, were excellent, and the owner was attentive to our special requests.

google_reviews.author: Aydinahasna Huwaida Aziz
google_reviews.text: The staff was very friendly and I love the ambience since it was relaxing. I ordered the lunch menu (came with choice of soup or spring roll) which is chicken curry with veggies. I like the soup but the curry chicken is quite different than my expectations (bcs it was neither Japanese/indian/any other Asian style I’ve tried bfr). Idk if it’s really a Vietnamese but it seems more similar to just Chinese stir fry and mine was a bit too salty ig. But portion wise it’s worth it and I actually still curious about other menus so might come again in the future.

google_reviews.author: Chang Liu
google_reviews.text: Service is friendly but very very VERY slow due to the fact that they only have 1 server for the entire restaurant. Food is also so so, European style Asian food. Can’t say that I’d recommend or ever come back

google_reviews.author: Alberto Pascual
google_reviews.text: The plates have good amount of food and taste good. For starters we got mini rolls (the typical fried from frozen bag) and a small soup that was ok. For main dishes, we tried the crispy duck and the fried rice with chicken. The duck was crunchy outside but a bit dry, served with rice and some vegetables with a not very flavored sauce. The fried rice was more remarkable, very tasty and with delicious juicy chicken.

google_reviews.author: Christina Schirl
google_reviews.text: The Restaurant is larger than it looks from the outside, really nice interior! The food was fresh, though a bit bland (the restaurant is completely forgoing glutamate!). I recommend using the two pots on the table to enhance flavor to your liking! The staff was super fast and friendly!

google_reviews.author: Readmymind
google_reviews.text:
I ordered pho here before,  and it was delicious.
Today we have ordered some spring rolls, Tom xao xa ot and cashew chicken. I was disappointed, the taste was off, shrimps fried with whole shell on. All together really oily. Cashew chicken had only a few cashews and tasted bland.

google_reviews.author: thomas butler
google_reviews.text:
Overall a great game!
Not the result I think we are all looking for but that’s just the way things go. Nigeria had a great shot at it but lacked the attacking quality in the final third. Argentina have shown time and time again that they are able to deliver when they need to. And they had the players that could produce something special when needed.
Food was also good

google_reviews.author: Helton Calmon Rosa
google_reviews.text: Really nice place for dinner and some beers. They have some typical Austrian foods and the best scrum (typical drink in Austria). I have also tried the Cordon Bleu, one of the best in Austria. You can seat inside or outside, anywhere will be perfect. The only problem for non smoking people is that all restaurants people are allowed to smoke inside but all of them also have a non smoking area.

google_reviews.author: Mihaela Iancu
google_reviews.text: Delicious food and excellent local wine list. Fast and friendly service. Great location in the middle of historical center of Graz

google_reviews.author: Jen
google_reviews.text: Friendly staff, great services. The beef main course and the chocolate mousse taste amazing. Just the pumpkin soup is a bit salty.

google_reviews.author: Sandie Smith
google_reviews.text: A long wait for a table not helped by people moving to other tables on the terrace without discussion with staff.  A delicious meal ruined by some very poor service.  Just one example:  a 15-20 minute wait for the wine list is unacceptable.

google_reviews.author: Frank
google_reviews.text:
Each day a different surprise menu. They take into account any allergies of things you don't like.
The result are amazing flavourful dishes.
You can choose how many courses you want, but beware each serving is large, which is great.
Nice modern setting, very friendly service.
Free parking outside the restaurant.

google_reviews.author: Mahdiyar N.H.Gilani
google_reviews.text: I went here for company dinner and the food was fairly good. However, most of the food was poorly labelled (no indication of whether something is vegetarian or alcohol free) which led to me having to ask the waiters about all the options. The waiters did do a good job of ensuring that guests were constantly kept happy though but bringing waters bottles etc.

google_reviews.author: Karolina Riebl
google_reviews.text: The restaurant has a very relaxing and warm interior and excellent food. Very kind and professional personel who gave us a comprehensive description of every meal. Even though it's slightly outside of the city, it's a definite worth-to-go place.

google_reviews.author: V
google_reviews.text: Feels very high-end, the card is every day and you and the service is great, also the wine and the other drinks are fine, price is correct for the service, would definitely recommend because it also has big parking spaces

google_reviews.author: Stefan Klampfer
google_reviews.text: A beacon of light in the otherwise mundane culinary landscape of Graz. Great lunch options in a beautiful setting and easily accessible makes for a wholesome satisfying meal experience.

google_reviews.author: Ioan Toma
google_reviews.text: Very good pizza! Highly recommend! And of course, other dishes are great but pizza is a must to try there!

google_reviews.author: Robert Todd
google_reviews.text: Absolutely out of the park ! Both meals . Service is excellent . Would never have thought that such a small restaurant could do this so well ! Chef knows his meat . Pizza looked good , but we had Steak , and a rack of ribs ! OMG !

google_reviews.author: Michael Valentine (Cinderpath)
google_reviews.text: Run, do not walk to the Adria Grill to eat! This is an unassuming hidden culinary gem in Lienz, just across the street from the train station. While it is more known for its delicious pizzas, I had perhaps the best grilled calamari I have ever had, and it was totally unexpected! One of the owners (Pablo) is from Argentina and makes an incredible steak, and you can get a glass of Malbec red wine to match with it.  The owners and staff put passion into their food, and it shows, Lienz is lucky to have such a wonderful place!

google_reviews.author: Marusa Ahaj
google_reviews.text: Great experience! I don't remember when I last ate grilled calamari that delicious! Steak was also very good and waiter was friendly.

google_reviews.author: P Heap
google_reviews.text: Very quiet but because out of season. Looks like takeaway pizza is the main trade. Food was lovely.

restaurants.name: BioShop

google_reviews.author: Wolfi Wallner
google_reviews.text: Ok

google_reviews.author: Ljubica Negovec
google_reviews.text: This has been my absolute favorite store for years. It feels like the old days at a grocery store. You can order things, and the service is always very friendly, so your every need is practically read from your eyes. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for being here.

google_reviews.author: Ralf
google_reviews.text:
Dear Hertl Family!

This is a place where you feel at home, where you're treated like a person!

A fantastic organic shop with a wide selection of groceries and hygiene products, a Hermes parcel shop included, and parking right outside. It's a real pleasure to shop here or even just stop by for a chat. Please keep up the great work! All the best, kind regards, Ralf.

google_reviews.author: Info Administration
google_reviews.text: Forgot your shopping bag? No problem, the Bio Shop Graz can help you.

google_reviews.author: Andrea Lobmeier
google_reviews.text: I love this shop. Great products at more than fair prices, the owner is always in a good mood and up for a chat. The fruit is really good. You immediately feel at home when you walk in. It's small but perfectly formed! They also have hot food, which I haven't tried yet, but it's on my to-do list! I hope this shop stays around forever ♥️

restaurants.google_name: bioSHOP GRAZ - Bioladen, Naturkostladen, Zustellung & Catering

google_reviews.author: Gar-Hay Kit
google_reviews.text: In my world, my stomach eats first, and camera eats second, hence the limited photos. Steak Boutique blew me away in all categories for a steak dining experience abroad. The service was impeccable, the ambiance unforgettable (I’m in Europe! So that in itself is awesome!), and the food was amazing! Our server was very knowledgeable about their wine inventory and was able to suggest a bottle we all enjoyed.  All the appetizers and sides came out perfectly in taste, texture, and presentation.  The steaks were served piping hot, cooked perfectly at the correct temperature and seasoned just the way they should be- with some salt, butter, and a hint of pepper. Dessert was just as delicious as everything that came before, a perfect ending to a wonderful dinner. I’m not sure when I’ll be back on this side of the world again, but Steak Boutique is definitely going to be one of my stops!

google_reviews.author: Micki Thorson
google_reviews.text: Fantastic place. My partner & I came here for our last dinner in Graz. We didn't make a reservation but were able to secure a table. I imagine during the busier season, a reservation is a must have. Or if you have more than 1-2 people joining. But we got lucky. The wine was delicious, the steak melted in our mouths, the whiskey I tried was indescribable, & the desert was a wonderful end to the meal. The service was incredible as well. Highly recommend for a romantic & special dinner.

google_reviews.author: Emanuel Leon
google_reviews.text: This is the go to steakhouse in Graz. Nothing else comes close to quality and service. Steaks are all cooked at our desired temperature. All their sides go great with each cut of steak. They have some good IPAs available and good list of wine to chose from. I would highly recommend making a reservation and asking for a table in the courtyard. Get a ribeye, you wont regret it.

google_reviews.author: Mona Kh
google_reviews.text:
Steak Boutique is an absolutely gorgeous place to eat in Graz. The dry aged steaks melt in your mouth. Two kind of steak, American and Austrian are available and both are super delicious. It was the best steak I’ve ever eaten. The wine list is impressive, with a full range of pricing. You can find what ever you want. And don’t forget to eat cheesecake! :)
Staffs are so professional and friendly!
A very satisfying dining experience.

google_reviews.author: Joann Mistica
google_reviews.text:
We had an amazing dinner here and everyone left happy and full. I highly recommend the wagyu filet (medium rare), cheesecake, and portobello mushrooms with cheese. The rest are also delicious. This is our second time here and we ordered the porterhouse (medium rare, Austria) again, it did not disappoint. We couldn't stop talking about the wagyu filet after dinner. I've had it often back in Asia and didn't expect to find it in Graz in such excellent quality. The best restaurant in town for sure!

The staff provides friendly and excellent service. The way they presented the cake in the end really surprised me. What an awesome celebration!

I highly recommend this restaurant. I will definitely be coming back and try other items from the menu.

restaurants.name: Burger Factory
restaurants.summary: Relaxed spot specializing in meat & veggie burgers, featuring exposed-brick walls & modern decor.

google_reviews.author: Metilorange
google_reviews.text: There's nothing much to say except that it tastes amazing, the servers are very polite. The atmosphere is amazing. Would definitely come back again. I recommend a reservation, because, we waited a bit to get seated.

google_reviews.author: Gergely “GeЯa” Izsák
google_reviews.text: This burger was AWESOME. I loved every bite of it. Was fresh, crispy, delicious 🤩 with the sweet potato and truffle sauce on the side. I can 100% recommend if you are in Graz. The waitresses were really nice, chill and cool with us. Best burger in town, definitely!!! I would like to see your burgers in Vienna one day 💙 Thank you for the nice experience

google_reviews.author: AK Advisor
google_reviews.text:
Good food and good service. Quality ingredients.

Personally, I think the burger ban doesn’t fit in. It’s more like a big piece of bread.

google_reviews.author: Marica Pasar
google_reviews.text: Incredibly nice staff, great burgers with multiple vegetarian options and a nice, comfy atmosphere. Perfect lunch on one day trip to Graz 😍!

google_reviews.author: Teodora Dicheva
google_reviews.text: I am not a big fan of the burgers buuuuut this place - those were real burgers! Just amazing! I cant wait to go back!

restaurants.name: dean&david

google_reviews.author: Lala Günther
google_reviews.text:
I think this may have been one of the best chickens i ever had. Its so perfect.
The whole bowl was amazing.
The two waiters were also really friendly and patient since there was a small language barrier. The place has a really nice modern vibe to it :) Maybe we just came the a perfect hour but it also wasnt crowded.
Would for sure come back. I reccomend 🙂

google_reviews.author: Lukas Koscovas
google_reviews.text:
Complete and utter incompetence. I ordered a simple 1 vegetarian chicken bowl. It arrived with real chicken, and my child had an allergic reaction to it.

When I called, all I had was some person on the other line that could barely speak German, or English. Honestly, next time put patick the star behind the counter.

google_reviews.author: SN M (SNM bornwithwings)
google_reviews.text: They have friendly staff. They have vegan vegetarian options. Place is clean. Colorful seating place. Its about 15 mts walk from center. But nice cosy place n its warm inside

google_reviews.author: LemLem Oliveira
google_reviews.text: The staff here is so friendly and helpful! We really enjoyed our food and are happy to have discovered this restaurant chain!

google_reviews.author: Richard Colinge
google_reviews.text: Mango Curry and Halloumi salad were great, service was fine.

restaurants.google_name: dean&david | Bowls, Salate, Curries & Snacks am Jakominiplatz Graz

google_reviews.author: Sean Wiseman
google_reviews.text: Absolutely lovely place for lunch. The staff/owner was so friendly, and gave us wonderful recommendations. The pesto on the Tagliatelle was phenomenal, fresh and aromatic, with perfect al dente noodles. The lasagne, which she had to 'warn' us was vegetarian but 'lacked nothing' was funny and so true. It was beautiful. The Suppli were delicious!!

google_reviews.author: Suleyman Rahimov
google_reviews.text:
Very cute cafe with friendly owners. The tiramisu is delicious. I would definitely recommend this place to everybody who looks for a beautiful cafe with great food.
A little advice from me to the owners: cafe is really easy to miss from outside because the sign outside indicating that it is a cafe is quite small and easy to miss. You could try to make sure that cafe is easier to notice from outside and it would be beneficial.

google_reviews.author: Tanja Vasiljevic
google_reviews.text: The food! We ate pasta and it was incredible. Maybe the best pasta we ever had! And the staff was lovely and welcoming ❤️ If you are ever visiting Graz, visit them! We can’t wait to go there again.

google_reviews.author: Jamie Foster
google_reviews.text: everything was great! we had an amazing lunch with a great wine recommendation! From starters to the main course and dessert, everything was delicious, we will definitely be back 🍝❤️

google_reviews.author: walker49
google_reviews.text: My husband and I happened upon this lovely cafe.  We sat outdoors and enjoyed coffee and beer.   The Cafe is owned by two Italian sisters.  The next time we visit Graz we'll be sure to have dinner.  They treated us to a slice of their Blueberry Flan which was delicious.  They are so gracious and friendly, it was a pleasure talking with her.

google_reviews.author: Aditya Rana
google_reviews.text: A super good and affordable place for eating. Their Pide (Turkish pizza) is super super delicious. I would definitely recommend this place since they offer super good quality, good quantity at a reasonable price. The staff if also very friendly and their customer service is really good. Will definitely come back more times.

google_reviews.author: Akos Csoka
google_reviews.text: Good choice of burgers, wraps, kebabs and boxes. Nice meat roast and grilled vegetables available. Parking available right outside and inside a few tables if you dont opt for takeaway

google_reviews.author: Joshua Temple
google_reviews.text: Good price, delicious doner and burgers

google_reviews.author: Wolfgang Rasborcan
google_reviews.text: I never liked kebub or doener, but there it's so delicious, even the bread is perfect...

google_reviews.author: Nika Pr
google_reviews.text: Tasty food, big portions, not so fancy though

google_reviews.author: Can Çimen
google_reviews.text: Awesome location. Perfect quality döner. And an amazing Turkish guy enlightened us about Graz and his delicious kebap. Enjoy!!

google_reviews.author: Eric Andre
google_reviews.text:
Coolest hair style in town!

Good kebab with good ingredients.
Good serivce and nice little shop.
Tested the strong duner kebab and it is recommended! Incredibly good cheese to add.

I have tasted better kebabmeat, but all in all very good!😃

google_reviews.author: Дона Буджови
google_reviews.text: Guys, this is the best kebab I've tried in Graz! 🤌🏻🤌🏻🤌🏻 Clean, tasty and very kind owner 🙌🏻🌯🌸

google_reviews.author: Goda
google_reviews.text: If u drunk, come here. Very nice kebap box 🙏🫶🏻👍

google_reviews.author: AHMAD HASSAN FAISAL
google_reviews.text: Had the most delicious Kebap Pizza here 🤤. Highly recommend. Will definitely come back!

google_reviews.author: Buddhi Madusanka
google_reviews.text: Very good food and friendly staff. A really clean restaurant, suitable for a family party. There is also good parking space nearby.

google_reviews.author: serkan günes
google_reviews.text: Top👌

google_reviews.author: enes meral
google_reviews.text: THE BEST

google_reviews.author: Hans Nötig
google_reviews.text: Reviews generally very good. We wanted to eat here in the evening. We ordered at the counter, and the staff was very rude and condescending. We waited more than half an hour for fries, even though there were only two occupied tables in the entire restaurant (including us). We ended up only paying for our drinks; the staff didn't ask why we were leaving, nothing. I would give fewer stars if I could!

google_reviews.author: Vahdet Öztürk
google_reviews.text: A pure culinary delight! I am absolutely thrilled with the quality and taste of the dishes. A huge compliment to the kitchen – this was craftsmanship at its finest. Combined with the cozy atmosphere, it's the perfect place for gourmets.

google_reviews.text: Home atmosphere and elevated food with Dalmatian/balkan soul! Fantastic choice to make if you are looking for calm please away from the strict center but still close. Tuna tartare and squids were top. Bread and butter delicious 🔥
