google_reviews.author: Michael Oberauer
google_reviews.text: Excellent Croatian restaurant in Graz with very friendly and attentive service, great food, and an outstanding (Croatian) wine list 👌

google_reviews.author: Minsko
google_reviews.text: Thank u Guys for the amazing food and drinks! And also Big Thanks for the recommendation from the waiter and his beautiful Soul, it was a Blessing and such a warming welcoming! Would love to come again!

google_reviews.author: Maruša Puhek
google_reviews.text: Interesting place - fine dining, nice atmosphere, mostly fish with vegan and vegetarian options. You can taste the freshness - I would recommend the tasting menu. We enjoyed it a lot.

google_reviews.author: Anna Novik
google_reviews.text: Popular place. Good choice of beer. Sandwich can be taken for two. Also i recommend to try zucchini here.

google_reviews.author: C X
google_reviews.text:
Great new changes have come to Feinkost Mild, was really pleased :)
First, the most obvious change is the one to strictly only outside smoking (which neither of us smokers actually mind), therefore I think the Van is gone inside to make more space for tables. Actually looks much bigger and brighter inside now ;)
Second, I am delighted to announce there is a new sandwich variation which is just extra spot-on delicious (slowly cooked lamb which tastes amazing accompanied by joghurt-sauce and deliciousness through and trough) and a real highlight- highly recommended!
Service staff is, as always, the 3 magic f's:
Funny, fast, and reeeaaally friendly :)
They haven't changed their beer selection though, so no worries :)

google_reviews.author: Reinhard Ott
google_reviews.text: Decent, good beer selection. Slightly low value for money on the food but not too bad. Quality is great, it's just the quantity/price ratio. Considering the location, it could be worse. A solid 4/5 all round.

google_reviews.author: Lisbora Likaj
google_reviews.text: Good sandwich, i like the vegetarian options more, generally a little overrated. :)

google_reviews.author: George Papanastasiou
google_reviews.text: Der Alex, pulled pork, and zuchini fries. Tasty, different and stuffing for me. Perfect for a night out.

google_reviews.author: Mohammed Islam
google_reviews.text: Fantastic restaurant with a great menu. Very tasty and well cooked with fantastic flavours. Great service from the staff, attentive and professional. The decor and lighting provides great ambience.

google_reviews.author: Bart de Groot
google_reviews.text: Had a starter of shrimp and crab rolls and they were very good, crunchy and yummy and no oil. We had mains of stir fried duck with noodles and stir fried beef with noodles and they were both excellent. Very fresh, crispy and tasty without too much sauce or too much salt. Enjoyed it very much. The sorbet (mango) for dessert. Friendly staff. Very minor, it was slightly too dark on my side of the table for my taste.

google_reviews.author: Oliver Kann
google_reviews.text:
Great food, very good table service. Shame we were left standing in middle of dining room by host looking for table despite our reservation.
Finally needed to find our own table.
Our open feedback at the end to make them understand our view was received with „not me“ and nobody else wanting to communicate.
Real shame, we were hoping for a new „regular“ but not begging to spend our money

google_reviews.author: Toni Horvat
google_reviews.text:
Food was good. Bartender was not so good with speaking English so we didn't get much information with the food.

Spring rolls with beef came cold (we didn't know that) but they are served cold, crab and shrimp rolls where tasty. Main chicken dish was hot and tasty, other main chicken was a bit flat for my taste. It needs some seasoning.

Overall nice place to have a bite.

For dine in for 2 was 50€.

google_reviews.author: Tom Maier
google_reviews.text: We came for an exclusive birthday dinner and made reservations well in advance, but it was still tough to acquire a 2-hour time slot for a table on a typical weekday. The reception and service were quite polite, although there were considerable wait times while ordering, and unfortunately, dessert could no longer be ordered.( The starters and main courses were delicious, with an Asian twist for us Europeans.. The ambience is very modern and stylish, however there is little light. There is certainly potential for improvement at this gourmet restaurant.

google_reviews.author: Krzysztof Jelnicki
google_reviews.text: Great curry wurst, and equally good cordon bleu sandwich. Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: Hubert Hofer

restaurants.google_address: Herrengasse, Kiosk Ecke, Hans-Sachs-Gasse, 8010 Graz, Austria

google_reviews.author: Monica Rotulo
google_reviews.text: Best pizza in Graz (e non solo ;).. ) super friendly and kind staff, they serve not only pizza but many local food from Liguria. Genuine taste from Italy. My favorite pizza is the one with pesto!! Highly recommended

google_reviews.author: Elisabetta Valgoi
google_reviews.text: This place is amazing, for fussy Italians and...oh well, for anyone really. Even for vegan there are so many options that you will need some time to decide and pick! Quite extraordinary especially for vegan, usually you can feel lucky if you have a 2 or 3 options...

google_reviews.author: G Donna
google_reviews.text: We brought out-of-town guests here and they were beyond impressed. The ambiance was elegant without being stiff, and the staff treated us like VIPs. I had the filet mignon, which was melt-in-your-mouth tender, and the truffle fries on the side were addictive. We ended the night with a crème brûlée that had the perfect crack on top. Everyone left happy and full.

google_reviews.author: Stefan Östersjö
google_reviews.text: Greatest pizza in Graz. Only need to offer more quality wine by the glass

google_reviews.author: cv
google_reviews.text: I used to go here and the pizza was very good. Hidden gem in Graz, can recommend going.

google_reviews.author: Fatema Alhawaj
google_reviews.text: Charming little coffee shop in the beautiful city of Graz. The owner and her daughter were incredibly friendly and welcoming. They recommended the Colombia V60, which turned out to be perfect for our taste, also tried the cappuccino, which was skillfully made and thoroughly enjoyable. Though the seating area is small, it’s definitely worth a stop for any coffee lover. We picked up some beans to take home. They also offer a great selection of coffee equipment at reasonable prices. Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: Vít Jandásek
google_reviews.text: I bought two bags of beans based on the suggestion - and was not disappointed, tasted very well and the price was very acceptable. Recommended, I will definitely come again once I will be in Graz.

google_reviews.author: Denis B. Martin
google_reviews.text: Very good specialty coffee place! They're the only one offering a third wave experience in town (except for Blend Coffee). Moreover, they have amazing vegan cakes.

google_reviews.author: Aneta B
google_reviews.text: Great coffee and atmosphere. Recommended for every filter/nonfilter lover. You can also buy the coffee beans they roast there. The only problem is no bathroom, as mentioned in couple of reviews before.

google_reviews.author: soph h
google_reviews.text: Probably the best coffee in Graz. There's not much seating space, but it makes for a cosy atmosphere, which is augmented by the old vinyl records that provide a nice background soundtrack. Staff is very friendly and helpful. Only downside is that there's no bathroom.

google_reviews.author: Jessica G
google_reviews.text:
The man that was waiting this morning was absolutely amazing. He was super attentive and kind and helpful. He made me feel very comfortable and right at home to relax and enjoy my coffee.

The menu for food is limited, but covers everything you might want for breakfast fare. I got a caprese bagel and it was amazing.

This was the perfect spot for breakfast on a morning where I needed a nice calm and welcoming space. Can’t recommend enough!

google_reviews.author: Jaime Martínez García
google_reviews.text: The 26th of october at 09:00 p.m. this happened to us. Me and my boyfriend sat down in a table on the terrace, and we waited for a waiter to take our order. A bearded, 30-ish year-old waiter came and told us that we have to wait for 5 minutes and he would come and take our order, everything ok. Time passed, and after 10 minutes he came and took our order, 2 large beers. We never saw those beers, and we sat there for half an hour waiting for the waiter to give us our drinks. We told three more times the same waiter that we were waiting for the beer, and his response was that he had the beerst noted down, and he would being them to us soon. Last time, when we saw that he was attending peoole that just sat dow 20 minutes after us, we told him again that we have been waiting for our beers for half an hour, and he told us that he ordered them to the kitchen but couldn't bring them to us (which is a lie because more peoole ordered beers after us and got them). Finally, after complaining that all the tables were attended and we were waiting there for half an hour just for two beers, he justo laughed and left the tables, which we found really rude, so we left the place with no beers and after half an hour. Don't recommend this place at all, at least this waiter.

google_reviews.author: Constanza Garcia
google_reviews.text: If I could give this place zero stars I would. Incredibly rude staff. Came with a group of friends and the waitress treated us incredibly poorly. Ordered a coffee to-go and she didn’t even let us sit down inside even though it was cold outside and we had clearly given the place a lot of business. The place was completely empty before we got there.

google_reviews.author: ashley thacker
google_reviews.text: Was visiting my Austrian friend and they recommended this place but we had an awful experience. We sat down and no one greeted us or came to ask us what to drink, during that time my friend got cut by one of the chairs outside, when asking for a first aid kit, they said they don’t have one even though by law they have to have one, they made a joke that said sounds like wrong shoes. Very rude, my Austrian friend had to go back in and demand a bandaid, then we left

google_reviews.author: Milan Latinovic
google_reviews.text: Very nice caffe but the service was not good. My friend tried to order for 20 minutes without success. When we wanted to pay waiter confronted him with giving him "a lesson" on how ordering works in Austria. Very unprofessional imho. Coffee was ok though, this negative review is solely service experience based. Hopefully this will improve in future.

google_reviews.author: Лъчезар Арсов

google_reviews.author: Elena A

google_reviews.author: Ronnie moses

google_reviews.author: Francy Manka
google_reviews.text: Best delicious pizza 🍕 😋

google_reviews.author: Rudolf
google_reviews.text:
I have no idea what's good about this place? The Pizza Quatro Stagioni is absolutely awful! Definitely no Italian chef; the layout and taste are more like Turkish fast food! They don't even tell you when your pizza is ready! The fries are just as bad!

The service is terrible!

But OK! The food is very palatable for those of us who are slim!

google_reviews.author: Drin Ajrizi
google_reviews.text: Incredibly professional service. From the staff to the kitchen, a very welcoming team. They place great emphasis on their customers, go the extra mile, and always maintain a positive attitude. Of particular importance is the kitchen, where the work is carried out with meticulous precision, cleanliness, and care! Highly recommended – by far one of the best restaurants!

google_reviews.author: Nikola
google_reviews.text: The food is amazing every time! I also have to give a big compliment to the staff and the kitchen, as they're always very quick and friendly, despite the large number of customers. It's very hygienic, and overall, you feel very comfortable. I highly recommend it!

google_reviews.author: Hannah
google_reviews.text:
The pizzas are actually good, but the service is a disaster.

Some of our deliveries didn't even include the pizzas we ordered. The vegan pizza with vegan salami had real salami on it, and the vegetarian pizza also arrived with salami, even though we hadn't specifically selected that option.

We immediately called the pizzeria and calmly explained everything. Unfortunately, they weren't at all accommodating. Instead, they simply accused us of making a mistake when ordering. We've been ordering from them for a long time and have never had any problems before, and we double-checked the order and certainly didn't order extra salami on a vegan pizza.

New pizzas? Forget it.

Instead, the employee on the phone argued with us and consistently blamed us. That's really not good customer service. It's more likely a system error.

The suggested solution was that we could simply remove the salami. Of course, if you're vegan and find the taste of salami disgusting, that's completely useless.

The good and customer-oriented approach would have been to simply replace the two pizzas. Anyone who values ​​customer satisfaction would do that, but unfortunately, that's not the case here.

In fact, you're being gaslighted.

google_reviews.author: Kleiner_Wolfi
google_reviews.text: Monday, August 11, 2025: 1 x Mini Pizza Mushrooms, very good 👍 I liked the fresh mushrooms. 1 x Mini Pizza Quattro Formaggi, the cheeses were great 😁 Top! Chicken wings were disappointing again - the meat was juicy, but could have been a bit crispier, and it lacked the spice described on the menu 😕 😕 boring. 1 x Lahmachu was okay - I'm not used to the taste, herbs like oregano, and perhaps a bit more spice would be recommended - could be improved. EVERYTHING was delivered - very quickly and on time, it was a pleasure. Bravo 👍 THANK YOU for the clean delivery. Regards, Wolfi 😁

google_reviews.author: Andreas Skischally
google_reviews.text: The best delivery service in Graz! All the dishes I ordered were first-class, and the portions are huge. I highly recommend it. Greetings from Andy in Switzerland, staying at the Wiener Straße City Apartments. I can highly recommend them too!

google_reviews.author: toni tauschmann
google_reviews.text: I ordered several pizzas for a group, and everything went perfectly. Even my last-minute request for a slightly later delivery was easily accommodated. The pizzas arrived oven-fresh on the newly agreed delivery date. And most importantly, the pizzas tasted great :)

google_reviews.author: Hells Kitchen
google_reviews.text: I ordered two pizzas and a drink. The drink never arrived, and the pizzas were absolutely disgusting. 🤮 A complete disgrace!!! How can anyone make such bad pizzas? Absolutely nothing was right!

google_reviews.author: Daniel Preda
google_reviews.text:
From a driver perspective.
Wonderful factory ! Anmeldung  terminals , offices , unloading sites , everything is smooth and nice . You take your passport , safety shoes and vest ( terminal is making photo ,dont try to skip ) , you go to the terminal and register, you will receive an sms in about 2 minutes which office are you allocated , you go to office and they will give you directions , after that we go in parkplatz and wait for the screen to show our number plate , acces is made by an entry card wich is provided by the registration terminal .

At the exit we inserd our card and you are free to go. You can make a good and hot shower which is provided for free. Thank you Magna !

google_reviews.author: A N
google_reviews.text: Went to the Mercedes Benz G-Class factory in Graz Austria in November 2015. Absolutely incredible!

google_reviews.text: Very good and organised company. I loaded there many times and it was always fast and efficient. Many languages while registering is also useful for us truckers.

google_reviews.text:
Large HCV/LKW parking:
(47.0255639, 15.4822958)

LCV/PKW or 3,5t transporters:
(47.0252398, 15.4814311)

Büro:
(47.0251246, 15.4810717)

1. Make check in to recieve the badge to pass through the gate

2. Wait for the sms, then go to büro, after all documents, you will recieve a map/plan where to go, then you wait for another sms that you can go to the dock

Quick unload for 3,5t transporters

restaurants.name: Ginko Green House
restaurants.summary: Hip, modern cafeteria offering a daily self-service buffet of international vegetarian fare.

google_reviews.author: Lorenzo Petrucci
google_reviews.text: I have been to this restaurant several times now. The concept is very appealing: every day there is a new buffet menu, and you can choose whatever you want and as much as you want, with the price calculated based on the quantity. All the food is vegan and very tasty. In addition, thanks to the spices used, the food is very colorful, which makes it even more appetizing. The staff are very friendly. I would particularly like to thank the waitress who recommended a delicious dessert today, which I had in addition to the Sacher cake I chose. The desserts are also vegan and very tasty. I highly recommend trying this restaurant at least once.

google_reviews.author: Pasquale Morrone
google_reviews.text: The food was delicious and the menu was varied. We were greeted by the young ladies who immediately made us feel at ease. Another plus was the warm welcome they gave our dog, Lulù. We absolutely must return.👍🏻👍🏻😁😁

google_reviews.author: N
google_reviews.text:
My taste buds have unique experience every single time I eat here. Or: How to turn anyone into a pure food hedonist without overpriced or unethical/unhealthy choice.
Hats off for every single detail and taste on the menu and in the restaurant generally.
You are my inspiration.

google_reviews.author: Vittoria
google_reviews.text: Really nice restaurant overall. It works as a buffet where you can choose whatever you like, fill your plate, then weigh it and pay based on how much it weighs. For two quite full plates and one sparkling iced tea without sugar, we paid €27, which felt reasonable for the amount of food. The space is big and comfortable, with another separate indoor area as well. There are also a few small activities for kids, which is a nice touch if you’re coming as a family. Just one thing to keep in mind: everything is vegan. We didn’t realize that from the Google reviews and only found out when we arrived. If you’re vegan, this is definitely the right place for you.

google_reviews.author: Martha Milch
google_reviews.text:
As an adventurous food-lover who follows the beat of the world’s best bites, discovering Ginko in the heart of Graz is like stumbling upon a vibrant oasis of vegan culinary creativity. Open, airy, and welcoming, the café floods with natural light, inviting you to explore its colorful, self-service buffet island—from crisp, seasonal salads to thoughtfully prepared warm dishes, all made with conscious care and priced by weight.

I delighted in mixing and matching a plate of beautifully fresh salads, hearty mains, and a fragrant soup—each bite felt honest and thoughtfully composed. Later, the pastry counter captured my heart: vegan cakes and tarts so luscious and delicious, each slice a testament to their in-house bakery’s gentle care and artisan craft. The minimalist décor and friendly staff only added to the cozy yet modern vibe.

True, the price-per-gram approach means your experience is as personal as your plate—but seeing how lovingly each dish is prepared, it’s a small price for such mindful indulgence. Ginko isn’t just a meal—it’s a celebration of vegan cuisine done with soul, style, and sincerity. A must-visit in Graz for conscious diners and anyone craving food that feels both good and great.

google_reviews.author: Joysn
google_reviews.text: The lunch buffet was fantastic, and the staff were very friendly!

google_reviews.author: Tatjana Tschernitz

Even though it's "just" a restaurant, they serve amazing cocktails – expertly mixed – and delicious snacks, all of which are great. There's also regular live music from a DJ. Tip: Fridays are karaoke nights! The restrooms are spotless and brand new. A real asset to Gries.

Whether for a karaoke night or a quick drink before the club, I can wholeheartedly recommend it. Oh

google_reviews.text: We have finally found a gelato in Graz. An ice cream we can buy anywhere else but a gelato is only at Gianola’s. The REAL ITALIAN gelato. What we also like about Gianola is that she adds new flavours every now and then.

google_reviews.author: Pisák Tamás
google_reviews.text: Really delicious gelato in the middle of Graz. Kind, smiley and helpful staff, they work with available prices. We even got a small taster of gelato. They have ice cream without milk too. We can only just recommend this place. Taste it, yummy, yummy, yummy…

google_reviews.author: Wesley Pechler
google_reviews.text: Friendly service and several vegan options! Some benches right outside to enjoy your gelato in the shade.

google_reviews.author: Tiziana Adage
google_reviews.text:
Best artisan Italian ice cream in Graz, and I should know since I am italian… 😉
Prepared daily fresh with the best ingredients and regional farm milk.
I particularly love the creamy flavors like marroni and coffee in the colder seasons, to move to the fruity ones in summer. Don’t miss the raspberry and the spiced nectarines.
Easy to reach from the old city center.

google_reviews.author: Spencer Zhao
google_reviews.text: Omg this gelato tastes exactly like what I had in Italy! Soooo good 🤤

google_reviews.author: Sanjay
google_reviews.text: Kapadokya Grill House in Graz serves hands down the best kebabs in the city! The kebabs were so delicious that after our first two, we went back to order two more for takeaway. The flavors were rich, the meat perfectly cooked, and everything tasted fresh. If you're in the area, you have to try it at least once. The restaurant operates on a self-service model, so don’t expect table service, but that doesn’t take away from the amazing food. It's centrally located right opposite the bus stop, so finding it is easy. I’ll definitely be back!

google_reviews.author: Stef Chef
google_reviews.text:
One of the best Lahmachuns and Pide we ever had. Even it was for take away and we ate it 30min later... all igredients are super fresh and spot on.
Everything is just fresh prepared while ordered to very reasonable prices.
For sure next time beeing in Graz, see you again for a pide and lahmachun. ♥️🙏
Vielen Dank 🫵👍

google_reviews.author: moos wolda
google_reviews.text: Terrible! Do not go here! Don't listing or read the fake rewievs! This place is bad! Terrible service! Bad food....

google_reviews.author: 葉柏軒
google_reviews.text:
warmth in world
Still find some food to eat at 2am

google_reviews.author: Danil Tiagnibeda
google_reviews.text:
It was totally a disappoint.
The durum with beef was so dry and vegetables were bitter. Not recommending it and will not be coming here again 🙅.

google_reviews.author: Marian Atef
google_reviews.text: Very bad service the girl at the last shift not professional , she can not smile and her attitude was not good at all. Its over Price for this bad service. Your behavior in dealing with customer service is clearly noticeable in your reply for the Reviews . Its obvious that i am not the first review for the bad service .

google_reviews.author: Mahdiyar N.H.Gilani
google_reviews.text: Really nice Halal food, it did take some time for our food to arrive however I believe this was due to the fact that the restaurant was so busy. The waitresses were very friendly and the overall service was good.

google_reviews.author: Borbala Stuber
google_reviews.text: The restaurant has a real oriental atmosphere with comfortable massive tables and chairs. It looks cozy and beautiful at the same time. Service staff comes to your table to take your order. The food we ordered was very delicious and fresh. The grilled lamb meat was especially amazing without that strong lamb taste. Normal waiting times, friendly waiters and reasonable prices. The dessert was so tasty that it really made our day: buttery filo-dough with pistachio filling. And of course a Turkish tea!

google_reviews.author: Aiman Syed
google_reviews.text: Delicious, halal, turkish food, long waiting times. One problem is they forget to bring side dishes everytime. Don't go on Saturdays.

google_reviews.author: Bedirhan Metin
google_reviews.text: It was a wonderful dinner for us. You should definitely give their Lahmacun a try!

restaurants.name: Abu Burger
restaurants.summary: Relaxed spot specializing in meat & veggie burgers, featuring exposed-brick walls & modern decor.

google_reviews.author: Metilorange
google_reviews.text: There's nothing much to say except that it tastes amazing, the servers are very polite. The atmosphere is amazing. Would definitely come back again. I recommend a reservation, because, we waited a bit to get seated.

google_reviews.author: Gergely “GeЯa” Izsák
google_reviews.text: This burger was AWESOME. I loved every bite of it. Was fresh, crispy, delicious 🤩 with the sweet potato and truffle sauce on the side. I can 100% recommend if you are in Graz. The waitresses were really nice, chill and cool with us. Best burger in town, definitely!!! I would like to see your burgers in Vienna one day 💙 Thank you for the nice experience

google_reviews.author: AK Advisor
google_reviews.text:
Good food and good service. Quality ingredients.

Personally, I think the burger ban doesn’t fit in. It’s more like a big piece of bread.

google_reviews.author: Marica Pasar
google_reviews.text: Incredibly nice staff, great burgers with multiple vegetarian options and a nice, comfy atmosphere. Perfect lunch on one day trip to Graz 😍!

google_reviews.author: Teodora Dicheva
google_reviews.text: I am not a big fan of the burgers buuuuut this place - those were real burgers! Just amazing! I cant wait to go back!

google_reviews.author: Enes NAZLI
google_reviews.text: This German wine house I visited alone on Christmas day was an experience filled with warmth and kindness. The friendly waitstaff who promptly guided me to my seat and took my order contributed to this lovely moment. While enjoying my draught beer in a Christmas atmosphere, I decided to head to the cashier, but unfortunately, I had no cash with me, only my credit card. When I explained the situation, the owner of the wine house, a kind lady, refused payment, saying, "Today's on the house." I highly recommend this wine house to anyone looking for an incredibly high-quality and cozy atmosphere. The staff and the owner are truly fantastic!

google_reviews.author: Justas Mišeikis
google_reviews.text: Great place with their all you can eat lunch menu. Staff was very friendly and delicious food! No credit card payment though...

google_reviews.author: Dany Leanza
google_reviews.text: Amazing and welcoming staff. If you are looking for an authentic and folkloristic way to experience Graz I really recommend this place!

google_reviews.author: Oscar
google_reviews.text: Nice food and super friendly staff. We’ll be back!

google_reviews.author: Martin Fuchs
google_reviews.text: Delicious wine and good food in nice atmosphere with friends service.

google_reviews.author: George Papanastasiou
google_reviews.text: The one star missing is because he threw the garbage without washing his hands and then he was "relocating" the potatos on the plate.

google_reviews.author: Hendrik Bower
google_reviews.text: Great burgers, fries and sauces. Better than average selection of soft drinks.  An OK little seating setup considering it's the middle of Jakominiplatz. There might be quite a wait for your food so don't go if you're in a hurry.

google_reviews.author: Sonia Wołkowycka
google_reviews.text: To be honest...fantastic burgers!

google_reviews.author: Christoph Barthel
google_reviews.text:
Perfect burgers, excellent!
Everything fresh and lovely composed!
Really nice service!

google_reviews.author: THE Mithrandir09
google_reviews.text: Best burger in graz! Burgerista, Burger Factory, Freigeist.. none of them can compare to these awesome awesome burgers!

google_reviews.author: Metilorange
google_reviews.text:
It might be the best bubble tea in Graz, but if this is the best, I wonder what's the worst...
Overall mid, the price is too high based off of how bad it is. I would never come back again. The employees are very polite.
The interior is super cute.
But there is a lot more required to get customers to stay. Someone who loves a good boba tea will not accept this low quality.

google_reviews.author: Ling Ho
google_reviews.text: Classic brown sugar bubble tea and matcha tea with brown sugar and (white) jelly topping. Delicious drinks! Friendly service and located conveniently near the heart of old town square. Recommend! 🧋💕

google_reviews.author: Kisu
google_reviews.text: Best Bubble Tea in whole of Graz - large variety of different kinds and flavours of teas.Tapioca pearls were just perfect. If I was living there I would take at least one each day.

google_reviews.author: Alexx M
google_reviews.text: I ordered a Chocolate Bubble Milk large and yeah it was delicious but it tasted the same as the chocomilk that you can find in all the supermarket. After all the place is nice and cozy and the staff is friendly. There is not much choice between hot and cold teas.

google_reviews.author: Saqib Khan
google_reviews.text: Just tried the "Havana's Ocean" bubble tea at Teas 'Me and it was absolutely delightful! The color gradient is stunning, and the flavor is just as impressive – so refreshing and perfectly balanced. It's quickly become a new favorite. Highly recommend stopping by Teas 'Me for a unique and delicious bubble tea experience!

google_reviews.author: thomas palkovich
google_reviews.text:
We have used Greimel catering for our 50th birthday party in August 2023. Ms. Greimel guided us in a highly professional manner to make the right choices when we prepared the buffet. They didn't shay from any efforts preparing and delivering all as fresh as possible. The main course was served in person from the Chef at the buffet, to the pleasure of our guests. All equipment was perfectly suited for the purpose and in sufficient number available. The starters were very appealingly served on large plates and very tasteful, followed by a stunning and delicious variation of main courses. The deserts served as sweet ending of a feast.
We are very pleased with the quality of food, the local focus with ingredients and service orientation of Greimel Catering.

google_reviews.author: Wolfgang B
google_reviews.text: Best in town!

google_reviews.author: Willi Maierhofer
google_reviews.text: Bingo

google_reviews.author: Hannes Feichtinger, SchallplattenHannes
google_reviews.text: Stopped for a coffee and a sausage roll. Very nice shop in Geißler.

google_reviews.author: Markus Hubmann
google_reviews.text:
Amazing specialties are offered here!!!

On Wednesdays, seniors meet for a cozy get-together, celebrate birthdays, etc. Excellent, flavorful lunch menus, top-notch catering, and moderate prices.

"""
""
100% recommended.

google_reviews.author: fernando de la cruz lopez
google_reviews.text: This place is a hidden gem. The exterior is unassuming, but inside, it’s vibrant and full of life. I had the lamb shank, which was fall-off-the-bone tender and served with a flavorful jus. The mashed potatoes were rich and buttery. The dessert — baklava with pistachios — was the perfect ending. Service was quick and friendly, and the prices were very reasonable. I’ll definitely be back.

google_reviews.author: Mohammadreza Kariman
google_reviews.text: Had a lunch with my coworkers during a sunny early autumn day. The restaurant is situated in a peaceful neighborhood and has a charming front yard. I opted for the salami pizza, and it was incredibly delicious.

google_reviews.author: Allesha Song
google_reviews.text:
This restaurant is a true corner of Italy, with a wonderful and friendly Italian staff. They are always warm, polite, cheerful, and welcoming, making each visit feel special. Located in a charming and quiet area of Graz, it's the perfect place to enjoy authentic Italian flavors.
The dishes are bursting with flavor, and the ambiance is both relaxing and inviting. Highly recommended for a memorable dining experience! 🙏🙂🫶

google_reviews.author: Steve Foodie
google_reviews.text:
The food itself was just ok. It wasn’t up to the standards that I have had in recent Italian restaurants around Europe.

Pasta was cooked well but lacked freshness in ingredients and the sauce was average, lacked punch that you expect in a tomato sauce.

Pizza was not my style, No real crunch, not soft and airy. Felt like something you would make at home in a conventional oven.

Tiramisu, was ok but again, just ok.

All of this is just my opinion, please try for yourself, could be good for you.

But we did love the service and atmosphere, this was the winner in this restaurant for us. Great helpful waitress’s the place is tucked away in a nice street, and the restaurant is done well!

Thanks again

google_reviews.author: Bob Raucher
google_reviews.text: Wonderful dinner. Great food, friendly and helpful service and a very lovely setting. Highly recommend.

google_reviews.author: Nouman Saeed
google_reviews.text: Best place to try Cěvapcici and Buruck in Graz 👍🏼

google_reviews.author: Agnese Kalnina
google_reviews.text: The best Bakery in Graz. Everything is so tasty and delicious, will definitely return

google_reviews.author: Mario Jelicic
google_reviews.text: Great bakery especially for people from balkan's because it's very similar to those bakeries that are in balkan region. You should definitely try few delicious pies with cheese, potato and so on.

google_reviews.author: Fadi Nouh
google_reviews.text: Very good Balkan food :)

google_reviews.author: leiterlaurin
google_reviews.text: kipferl and Schnecke contained only dashes of chocolate/topfen even tho it was labeled as Topfenschnecke/Schokokipferl

google_reviews.author: Stephen Ellwood
google_reviews.text: It feels like this place has seen better days. Its a bit shabby and downtrodden. The food was OK but its not enough for me to want to go there again.

google_reviews.author: Jakob Jongsma
google_reviews.text: Good fresh Chinese food - one of the best in Graz

google_reviews.author: Máté Finta
google_reviews.text:
Kind, fast service. Fairly priced, delicately spiced. Large portions, one menu is enough for 2 meals. 😁
The front area could be a little brighter, better lit, a little more design, but they cook with heart and soul. 🤗

google_reviews.author: Alpharius Omegon
google_reviews.text: The food was fine. Nothing legendary, but certainly not bad either. It was perfectly adequate, and I'll order and pick up my food here again. The lady who prepared the food was wonderfully friendly and lovely.

google_reviews.author: Markus “Xmax” K.
google_reviews.text:
Whether it's Wiener schnitzel, Cordon Bleu, Emmental cheese, or fried chicken with a side dish and/or salad, or as a roll or burger...
Simply GREAT!
Large portions, quick preparation, and above all, a completely fair, affordable price...
And if you prefer Chinese food, this snack bar can also compete with other Chinese restaurants!

Try it, you'll love it!

google_reviews.author: Ahmet Yüksek
google_reviews.text: Was waiting for the bus. Saw the sign for the bar. And decided to have a beer before I go home. The place was 80% empty. It was so cozy and the music was so beautiful. İf you want to go into deep conversation with someone you value, this place offers the ambiance for it. The beer was also in a very good shape :) 5/5

google_reviews.author: Jack Anderton
google_reviews.text: This bar is still open, kind elderly couple in charge, old-time atmosphere with golden age memorabilia and often a fire burning in colder months. Great to sit with a drink and a chat, sometimes enjoy the music

google_reviews.author: Andreea C.
google_reviews.text: Loved the atmosphere, cozy retro! Very lovely people. We even had live music! Definitely recommend!

google_reviews.author: Wandern Leo
google_reviews.text: Authentic charming bar. Great place to have a beer after a long day of work.

google_reviews.author: Klaus Herunter
google_reviews.text:
One of the best bars in Graz.
Love that retro and vintage style!!!

google_reviews.author: Zen Niedermayr
google_reviews.text: Can i please get all my orders from DPD? I really thought all delivery services were incompetent till I got something sent via DPD. Its amazing, thank you very much for your service :D

google_reviews.author: Aleš Sajovic
google_reviews.text: Good Schnitzel 👍

google_reviews.author: Marc Annez de Taboada
google_reviews.text: Delivered punctually and as in perfect condition.

google_reviews.author: Dietrich Oberg
google_reviews.text:
Limited selection, but the schnitzel was great!
The beer was always fresh on the table, and the darts rounds made this pub a typical neighborhood hangout.

google_reviews.author: Max Eissner
google_reviews.text: Best pub in Graz! The owners are super friendly and always up for a laugh. Darts is a big deal here!! Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: Janet Efrati
google_reviews.text: One of the best places in the area. Excellent food and presentation. Highly recommended. We started with a soup, followed by tasty risotto and liver, ended with assorted desserts. Big compliment to the chef ❤️👍

google_reviews.author: Allesha Song
google_reviews.text: 10 of 10! When food is not only tasty, but also artistic! You are a godsend!! Thank you and recommend!

google_reviews.author: Ann Szmagala
google_reviews.text: Excellent! Food delicious! Place very clean! Staff very friendly and helpful.

google_reviews.author: Patrick Galster
google_reviews.text: Friendly staff, delicious food from local suppliers. Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: Lukas Paces
google_reviews.text: Extremely polite and profesional staff. Excelent food.

google_reviews.author: Guilherme Cavalcante
google_reviews.text: Sensational views of the beautiful city of Graz. The service was also quite good! Have no complaints whatsoever

google_reviews.author: Djordje Skakun
google_reviews.text: The food is alright, for the price the portions could be bigger. They were better earlier, the prices are always increasing and the portions are always getting smaller. The sight is really good if nothing.

google_reviews.author: stickievidz
google_reviews.text:
They do not accept card payments for weeks now. They cannot handle the membership and students discounts without it, and their way of handling cash is very poor.
Portion sizes are OK but not spectacular for the money.

google_reviews.author: Ashok Samraj
google_reviews.text: Went there for a team lunch during my visit to Graz. The place was beautifully with a view of the mountains and clock tower. Food was just okay, nothing that stood out.

google_reviews.author: Martin Salcher
google_reviews.text: Nice place/view. Cheap and high quality food. TASTY

google_reviews.author: Mohammad Ameri
google_reviews.text:
This is the third time im coming to this place and it never disappoints.
Although they have delivery option, but coming in person and chatting with the owner and enjoying the atmosphere, it seems better choice for me.
Quality of food is high and consistent throughout the times ive been here.
Also try this tea while waiting for your order. Its a nice touch.👍🏻

google_reviews.author: Bahar Mostafaei
google_reviews.text: Like this place a lot! The kubideh wrap is really good!

google_reviews.author: Chris Dewsbury
google_reviews.text: I was really pleased to find this gem of a place while visiting Graz from the UK. The authentic Persian cuisine was absolutely amazing and the owner was so welcoming and served us himself. The koobideh was out of this world, packed full of flavour and perfectly seasoned. I could have stayed there eating it all day! I Would definitely recommend popping in to try the outstanding food and wonderful service at a great price.

google_reviews.author: Sal Pak
google_reviews.text: Best Iranian restaurant and Iranian Kebab (Kubide) in Graz

google_reviews.author: Addis Tajdivand
google_reviews.text: My friend recommended me this place as I love Persian food.I must say this is the best restaurant I’ve been to recently. I can’t help myself, but to go there every week !!! The kebab is so delicious and juicy, and the atmosphere is lovely.

google_reviews.author: Raimund Ströcker
google_reviews.text: Friendly service

google_reviews.author: R Štefan
google_reviews.text: Great place for automatic Ethiopian good. You have the options of meat or vegan dishes. Everything very tasty, the amount of food is more than enough and the service is really nice. Definitely a place to visit. Personally,have to drop by for a Ethiopian coffee during the day. Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: Timirtcom
google_reviews.text: The food was very good specially the doro wot and the siga wot (meat sauce). We had a mix of vegetarian and meat. The 'dulet' was average, the vegetables like the potato wot and the cabbage (gomen) was good enough. The injera average (have had better). The biggest plus is the service, a very friendly woman makes the experience positive. Overall I am glad I found an ethiopian restaurant in this part of Austria. Worth trying!

google_reviews.author: Sisay teshome Lemma
google_reviews.text: I recently had the pleasure of dining at this restaurant, and it was an experience worth sharing. Attentive service fresh and well balanced traditional food with a great Ethiopian coffee.

google_reviews.author: selome tamirat
google_reviews.text: Café Abol is a wonderful place to enjoy authentic Ethiopian cuisine. The food is full of rich flavors and served at very fair prices, making it excellent value. The waiting time was short, and everything arrived fresh and well-prepared. What really stands out is the owner’s warmth and hospitality, which creates a welcoming atmosphere and makes the whole experience feel special. I highly recommend this place to anyone who appreciates good food and great service.

google_reviews.author: AMIT SINGH
google_reviews.text: It was the first time that I dinned in an East African restaurant. The traditional interiors are very appealing. The staff is very nice and polite. Staff knew limited English but very fluent in German. The food was not that spicy as I expected, but taste good. I found that Ethiopian flat bread (Injera) is spongy and very much similar to South Indian Dosa. They have traditional Ethiopian spice tea as well in their menu. You might feel a little hungry after eating because their dishes are very adequate in amount. Overall its a nice place to experience East African kitchen.

google_reviews.author: Andrew Förster
google_reviews.text: Delicious Schnitzel and Beir

google_reviews.author: Mircea Manole
google_reviews.text: Ok

google_reviews.author: Valentina Ostovary
google_reviews.text: Hidden Treasure

google_reviews.author: E. Lind
google_reviews.text:
An absolute recommendation for anyone who enjoys excellent wines, sparkling wine or even champagne!
You can also purchase exquisite delicacies and special sweets. Special requests regarding rare, exquisite wines and drinks will be gladly accepted and provided (please allow appropriate lead time for procurement - if intended as a gift)!
The advice shines with great specialist knowledge and - most importantly for me personally - with passion and warmth! Thank you!

google_reviews.author: Johannes Aigner
google_reviews.text: Great store with a good selection of wines in a wide range of price ranges. I was looking for two large bottles as a gift and received excellent advice. Definitely recommended for any wine connoisseur, and those who want to become one!

google_reviews.author: Dominik Komloši
google_reviews.text: A nice restaurant, with grilled goods. While nothing extraordinary, food was great, and vogerlsalat was fresh.

google_reviews.author: Soujanya Bangalore Chamundaiah
google_reviews.text:
Ordered through lieferando. All the items were fresh and tasty. Garlic bread must try recipe. Backhendl was super delicious with potato salad.
Maintained very good quality.

google_reviews.author: Pippo B
google_reviews.text:
I was maybe pretty unlucky, but I was served in the small sad backyard with supermarket frozen food. I read many enthusiastic comments, so maybe I went the wrong day... but I won’t take the risk again.

P.S.
Thanks to the owner for his kind answer. I just reported my first experience and impression (and I can have only one). Compared to Austrian standard the place is still ok. Best regards!

google_reviews.author: Mc Holiday
google_reviews.text: Ordering food is very difficult due to linguistic understanding and about this friendliness on the phone cannot be assessed. Orders via delivery service are not possible outside of 4km. Ordering online via delivery service is not identical to the menu.

google_reviews.author: Anil Tilanthe
google_reviews.text:
Nice restaurant, nice pizza. Was mostly empty when we went. The service was quick.
Some great offers for take away pizza ! 😉😊

google_reviews.author: Siha J. Maje
google_reviews.text: I wouldn't believe that i ate one of the best pizzas in my life in Austria. It sounds a bit confusing, but it is true. Great pizza, great service, fast and efficient, very kind staff, great location near christmas market. Super experience in Graz. I will come back. A bit overpriced, but did oversee that over great experience.

google_reviews.author: laura s
google_reviews.text:
Highly anticipated, badly disappointed.
We had reserved a table already one and a half months ago, but they seated us (6 guests) on a small table, because our actual table was still occupied with the explanation that the restaurant is really full today, which was the first problem. The restaurant should give priority to reservations made in advance more than people who walk in, and if it is full, it should not accept any more guests if it knows that reservations have been made.
Our table was in a small room, with two other tables and far too many people
for that small room. The noise level was intensely loud and unbearable. We were not able to speak and hear each other at all. The waiter was confused and couldn’t take our drink order correctly.

Two of us ordered extra fresh truffles
on the pizza, which were sparingly graded over it (like 4 slices). And even after we asked for more, the waiter just added one slice. More than disappointing for that price!!

After we had finished our dinner and drinks, the waiters signaled to us with looks and gestures that we should hurry up and leave. They really gave us that feeling to leave fast so they can seat the next round of guests on that table.

The pizza was good but the atmosphere and service disastrous and incredibly bad. I would not recommend going there, because there are so many other good pizzerias in town with a better atmosphere, service and value for money.

I rate it one star because the pizza was tasty.

google_reviews.author: Rebecca Zalia
google_reviews.text: Good service and food. Not really a fan of pizza, but you guys at Napo have made me like it. Thank you so much for such a delicious pizza. Oven cooked. And fresh grated.

google_reviews.author: Ștefan Gălbău
google_reviews.text: I want to say that this would have been one of the nicest pizza places ive ever been if not for the end of my lunch there. The food and cocktail were amazing, 10/10 for Lucifer pizza, however at the end our waiter changed, the one who asked us to pay was very rude, asked for a random sum of monwy when I asked to pay separately and when I told him what I had he started to speak to me in English like I didn’t understand the German, not only that but his gestures and grimaces were very aggressive and it sullied the whole experience. No clue what happened to the nice waiter but the second one should learn proper customer service for goodness sake.

google_reviews.author: Yele
google_reviews.text:
Everything was really good at this pizza restaurant! We had the Margherita pizza and the truffle ricotta pizza – both were absolutely delicious.

The waiter was kind, helpful, and friendly, and the atmosphere was relaxed and enjoyable. Definitely a place worth coming back to!

google_reviews.author: Pablo L.
google_reviews.text:
Absolutely terrible service. I went there today, took my wallet out and walked towards the stand. When the saleswoman saw me arriving and I was about to order, she said "Sorry we're closed!" and closed the shutter in front of my face!!

This happened at 16.57, when Google says they close at 20.00. Then, with the shutter down, she started cleaning up in front of me and I suppose the Pretzel I wanted to buy is now in the trash.

I had already heard about the bad service of this place, but what I experienced today was unbelievable.

Absolutely terrible image of the city for all travelers. I won't buy a single Pretzel there ever and will go to Spar instead.

google_reviews.author: M. P.
google_reviews.text: Der Brezelkönig in Graz ist praktisch für einen schnellen Snack zwischendurch, geschmacklich aber eher durchschnittlich. Die Auswahl ist begrenzt und das Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis überzeugt mich nicht. Insgesamt okay, wenn man schnell etwas braucht, aber nichts, wofür man extra herkommt.

google_reviews.author: Ralf Driesner
google_reviews.text: I zipped from Klagenfurt to Graz for a quick trip. The new Koralm Railway makes it easy. On the way back, I grabbed a snack at Brezelkönig. The filled cheese pretzel baguette was worth the price. The two salespeople were friendly and efficient. I'd gladly go again!

google_reviews.author: Sviatlana Hubmann
google_reviews.text:
I'm a regular customer and have been buying pretzels from you for a long time.

I've always been very satisfied, but since the recent staff change, the quality has noticeably declined.

I recently found a burnt pretzel in my bag. When I mentioned it to the saleswoman, she explained that the oven was broken and the only thing she could do was close the shop – which she said wasn't a good solution. Instead, she apparently decided to sell the inedible items anyway.

Furthermore, the sunflower seeds have been missing from the sunflower seed pretzels for a few weeks now (see photos)!! I might as well just buy a regular pretzel without paying any extra.

Unfortunately, for now, I have to go with the competition, as I'm not only getting an inferior product for my money, but also no solution or apology from the staff.

What a shame!!

google_reviews.author: martin skerbinz
google_reviews.text:
Simply wow! A very well-maintained counter, a great selection, and even vegetarians are catered for. The staff are very polite, and the food is simply delicious.

You should expect to pay a little more, but it's definitely worth it.

google_reviews.author: Cyril Karpenko
google_reviews.text: The food was good but I didn't particularly enjoy the tactic of the waiter of including the tip in the price to only then ask me if it's "okay" before charging my card. Austria is not the US, and tips are not assumed and I'd like it to remain as such. I also wasn't given the receipt which is another sign of a bad service.

google_reviews.author: Debjyoti Banerjee
google_reviews.text: The Italian Restaurant is situated in the heart of Graz HBF, adjacent to the Graz HBF Railway Station and Bus Station. It offers a diverse culinary experience, featuring a wide range of dishes, including pizzas and burgers. Notably, some of the dishes incorporate Indian and chinese influences. The restaurant’s interior exudes an elegant ambiance. It accepts both card payments and cash transactions. Takeaway options are also available. Additionally, the restaurant caters to dietary preferences by providing vegan food choices. A comprehensive beverage selection is available. The restaurant is wheelchair-accessible.

google_reviews.author: Antonia Šteko
google_reviews.text: Everything was great! The food was delicious, and the service was even better. Our waiter was friendly and attentive. Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: Vikram Bollineni
google_reviews.text:
One of the finest Italian restaurants we have visited.
My wife usually doesn’t prefer Italian, but she was awestruck with this one.
Draft beer, Bio lemonades, Avocado salad, Pesto pasta and Tiramisu were outstanding.
The environment was great and so was the waiter and other support staffers.

google_reviews.author: Ronald Stilting
google_reviews.text: The location is great near the Hauptbahnhof and the atmosphere is pleasant. Interior design is bright and contemporary and there is also a terrace.  Service is active, friendly and efficient. The menus obviously italian with modern interpretations. Food quality is good though portions could be bigger. I've been there several times and will go again.

google_reviews.author: Kristen McWilliam
google_reviews.text:
Decent food at a very reasonable price. I enjoyed the sesame chicken with noodles. I didn't see soy sauce when I was there and didn't think about it, but was really wishing I had some when I sat down to eat!

Definitely recommend for some good and quick, cheap, filling food. Very generous serving portions!

google_reviews.author: Jyothish Atheendran
google_reviews.text: A nice place to grab a quick something to eat. They don't take card 💳 payments. They offer dine in and take away. Although the sitting for dine in is pretty limited. I tried the Sesame Chicken and Noodles. It was Ok.

google_reviews.author: Kivi Knuuti
google_reviews.text: A nice take away place with excellent price-quality ratio. Box looks a bit small but it definitely isn't. Gets your stomach full. Multiple protein options and four different sauces give you a good amount of variations

google_reviews.author: Neha Pandit
google_reviews.text: They have some amazing take away combos!! I loved this place! Went here a couple of times for lunch!

google_reviews.author: Gagiša
google_reviews.text: Great chinese place, very tasty, simple and fast to pick up.

google_reviews.author: Snailmate
google_reviews.text: Amazing place for live music and drinks. The staff is amazing and they treat the bands really well! Very clean and cozy.

google_reviews.author: Patrick Galster
google_reviews.text: Great Beisl in the neighbourhood with a decent selection of craft beers. Sometimes they do live gigs.

google_reviews.author: Nick Acorne
google_reviews.text: Very cosy and vintage place, good music, great atmosphere.

google_reviews.author: Elke Tomašič
google_reviews.text: very friendly staff, super cozy atmosphere and always excellent music. there's a huge variety of drinks as well. perfect for a nice evening with friends.

google_reviews.author: Jaime Pinheiro
google_reviews.text: Live music. Interesting artists. Great environment. My new pub in the city.

google_reviews.author: Design Haptic
google_reviews.text: The best Burek in town!

google_reviews.author: David
google_reviews.text:
Okay bakery, a bit too little meat in the burek for my taste.

Nice staff and the sweets are great too :)

google_reviews.author: Tertu Shuuya
google_reviews.text: The food is prepared with bare hands no regard  for covid 19 as the saleslady appears maskless.

google_reviews.author: Radovan Zivec
google_reviews.text: Nice and prices are normal. Be back for sure

google_reviews.author: Patrick Arbeiter
google_reviews.text: very cheap and very good food

google_reviews.author: Borbala Stuber
google_reviews.text:
Latin (Peruvian) pub and dance local. Live music on Saturdays.
Recommended for people who want to dance Salsa, Bachata, Merengue or so.

google_reviews.author: Christian H.
google_reviews.text:
Hola!

Established in 1984 I know this place from ages back. Latin American music, drinks and food, and a lot of dancing.
The crowd has aged, style remains, memories remain.

google_reviews.author: Adrian Holom
google_reviews.text: Great place for Latino live music and drinks. Everyone is dancing so atmosphere is at its best.

google_reviews.author: Gabriel Molina
google_reviews.text: Very nice Latino place. Perfect for dancing salsa, bachata, etc

google_reviews.author: Alun Lewis
google_reviews.text: Great music

google_reviews.author: Monna Čizmić
google_reviews.text: Excellent vegetarian meals. Lovely and friendly stuff. Dog friendly 🥰 I highly recommend Fino.

google_reviews.author: Mario Jelicic
google_reviews.text: Maybe even the best place for a breakfast, lunch or dinner. Lovley and friendly stuff, with a great atmosphere. Must visit!

google_reviews.author: Nick Ruppert
google_reviews.text: Great place to drink coffee or eat after 11:30. We stayed nearby in a Hotel en we ordered some pizzas en a thai wok. All food was good, also excellent service. Also the Bistro looks very nice.

google_reviews.author: Dejan Pažin
google_reviews.text: I must have had bad luck, since I see a lot of good marks here. But the spaghetti I got were really under par. They looked and tasted even worse than the ones sitting and waiting for customers for hours in a self service restaurant. Too bad. I am giving it two stars since the calamari were ok. The spaghetti were a clear one star. Made me actally feel bad in the stomach although I only ate half.

google_reviews.author: Pavel Vagner
google_reviews.text: Fair 5 stars. Meals really excellent and tasty. Frendly service. Sufficient parking space available. Hope could return sometimes again.

google_reviews.author: Vetal Fiber
google_reviews.text: Super

google_reviews.author: Miloš Milić
google_reviews.text: Top

google_reviews.author: MST. Friedrich Kreuzweger
google_reviews.text: Top 🔝 Institution .

google_reviews.author: D M
google_reviews.text: Super!

google_reviews.author: Andrew Omonomo
google_reviews.text: Super 👌👌👌👌

google_reviews.author: Chris
google_reviews.text:
Nice Bar , cool Drinks, beautiful People, best Music in Town by GebruederMond.
Thanks

google_reviews.author: Adnan Devedzic
google_reviews.text: Wann have fun? Just visit. One of a kind experience

google_reviews.author: marcelo champanier
google_reviews.text: Best place in town. Must visit!

google_reviews.author: Martin Allram
google_reviews.text: A nice place to have a drink

google_reviews.author: Dominik Hegedys
google_reviews.text: Best place in town....

google_reviews.author: Mike Bicopoulos
google_reviews.text:
Based on the reviews I expected much more than an overpriced fare of average food…the olives I would rate well below average, anchovies in a can? …tasty but why did it take almost an hour ? The carpaccio was ok but again it tasted like it came from a supermarket deli…
The service is pleasant but oh so slow and if you choose to sit outside be prepared to be smoked by nearby tables of smokers ..

google_reviews.author: a kray
google_reviews.text: We are visiting Graz for the week from the USA. Decided to walk a few blocks away from the main tourist areas for breakfast.  Very glad we did.  Everything was perfect!  Onsen egg on toast with avocado, cafe late, espresso, specialty tea.  Personal service from the owner on a quiet Wednesday morning.

google_reviews.author: Diane Ramirez
google_reviews.text:
Absolutely World-Class Dining Experience
This restaurant offers an unforgettable culinary experience. The atmosphere is warm and relaxing, with beautifully curated decor that adds to the charm. What truly sets this place apart, though, is the exceptional food and wine selection. Every dish is crafted with locally sourced ingredients, showcasing both freshness and creativity. The staff’s wine knowledge is impressive—thoughtful, local, and perfectly matched to the menu. If you’re in Graz, don’t miss this gem—your taste buds will thank you.

google_reviews.author: Brent A
google_reviews.text: Absolutely. Positively. World Class. 🤩 stumbling upon this lovely restaurant was simply lovely. But what made it EVEN better was the beautiful couple who run the place and pour their heart and soul into the food (all locally sourced). My main recommendation to a first time visitor is to let them guide you on what to order and let your world be forever changed. We live in the USA but I still crave their food and can’t wait to return ♥️

google_reviews.author: Sebastian Horvath
google_reviews.text: Awesome wines. Excellent food. Great service.

google_reviews.author: M. A. Fettah Tüfekçi
google_reviews.text: Amazing place to eat döner kebab! Delicious meat, bread and other ingredients. Friendly waiters and service, you will never regret it. Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: Sebastian Neudorfer
google_reviews.text: Best Döner/Kebap in Graz! I used to go there when I was studying at the FH JOANNEUM and just checked them out again today! Still delicious food!👍🏻

google_reviews.author: Adrián Bősze
google_reviews.text: I recommend you to try it. The food is good, the personal is friendly. Quick service, clean and quiet place to eat. They offer delivery as well.

google_reviews.author: Vipul Dhingra
google_reviews.text: Nice place to sit and Kebap tastes good. Kebap Pizza with Knoblauch sauce is quite nice. I'd rate it 5 star if they also serve it with a smile. 😊

google_reviews.author: Bjørn Vidar Dahle
google_reviews.text: Quick and good food! Only negative is that for a tourist, ordering and asking about the menu on English was a bit awkward. Would return for the kebab though!

google_reviews.author: Hana Havlová
google_reviews.text: Great bartender playing the best rock and rock-'n'-roll music. Excellent atmosphere and lots of good beer. Don't turn away because of the street in reconstruction, it's open!

google_reviews.author: Markus Hayden
google_reviews.text: Nice Bar with great music.

google_reviews.author: berke ayrancioglu
google_reviews.text: Nice place and nice workers with nice beers

google_reviews.author: Martin Berger
google_reviews.text: The owner has a fantastic music selection, and they even take requests. A brilliant place for a few beers and good conversation with excellent music – the name says it all!

google_reviews.author: Helmar Glinitzer
google_reviews.text:
This place certainly lives up to its name.
Timeless charm in terms of music, ambiance, and service.
Warning: If you're expecting newfangled gadgets, you've definitely come to the wrong place!
But if you like really good music and affordable drinks, and want to enjoy friendly hosts in a cozy atmosphere, this is the place for you!
I always enjoy coming back!
:-)

google_reviews.author: Leonid Spektor
google_reviews.text: We had a really great experience here. The pizza was delicious — we tried the one with cheese and ham, and it was excellent. The place is right in the very center of Graz and open until 11 or even midnight, which makes it super convenient. Everything was tasty and reasonably priced, the service was excellent, and the atmosphere was cozy and pleasant. Highly recommended if you’re in the mood for pizza. Thank you!

google_reviews.author: Miguel Bessa
google_reviews.text:
The place is really confortable and we were a big group compared to the size of the restaurante and we were confortable eating.
The food was really good, the pizzas were well done, the dough was the tradicional "italian" way ( thin crust).
In terms of price, for a place in Áustria is really cheap and price/quality i give 8.9/10

google_reviews.author: Robert Peharz
google_reviews.text: Our favourite pizza place, visiting 2-4 times each month. Not original Italian pizza, but really enjoyable. Every month some creative special pizza. Spicy peppers always as a side. Salad extra with pizza for 1.90. Cosy place, nice wait stuff. A "Graz original".

google_reviews.author: Rita Neyer
google_reviews.text: I haven't found myself this positively surprised by unusual pizza toppings in a while. Loved it. The side salad alone was worth the trip. And as an add on, everyone was super friendly and considerate. Strong recommendation.

google_reviews.author: Emanuel Leon
google_reviews.text: Great pizza and mixed drinks. You can build your own pizza and add from a list of toppings. The staff is super friendly.  Seating is a bit tough in the summer since the indoor area gets a bit hot (dont be shy and share a table with some randoms :D).

google_reviews.author: Niklas Dominick
google_reviews.text: Black Coffee in Graz is an absolute gem for brunch lovers! Their brunch spread is amazing, with a fantastic variety of options, including plenty of delicious vegan dishes to choose from. The highlight for me was the massive cake buffet—definitely something you don’t want to miss. While I can’t recommend the coffee itself, any other hot drink that comes with the brunch is a much better choice. The atmosphere is cozy, the staff is super friendly, and the food is so fresh and flavorful. A must-visit spot for brunch enthusiasts in Graz!

google_reviews.author: Mauricio Azevedo
google_reviews.text: Without a doubt one of the best places for a relaxed breakfast in Graz. The food is amazingly delicious and the staff are kind and helpful. The garden in the backyard is simply beautiful, with a relaxed atmosphere for breakfast. The prices are fair for the amount of food. I’ll certainly come back for the weekend brunch!

google_reviews.author: Hana Střítecká
google_reviews.text: Great selection, including vegan options. Everything was delicious. Luxurious eggs, butter, and teas.

google_reviews.author: Roni Kollender
google_reviews.text:
The food is wonderful, a great location for brunch.

The room was clean and spacious, the balcony of the room was very nice. The only down side, is that we arrived 10 minutes before check in, and there was nowhere to wait, so we had to wait in the cold until the machine would let us check in

google_reviews.author: Denisse ZT
google_reviews.text: There is a good variety of options for the breakfast or a brunch. I would definitely go for the bagels. Besides, at the time I was there, they were offering ice cream, and they were really good. I am just taking a star, because I cannot deny that the prices are a little high. Besides, the service is very good, but depending on who is attending. So, you need some luck for this second factor. Moreover the internet (that comes from Black Home) is not so fast, and it could be a problem if you are also working. Finally, better to go before 10am, in other case the place could be a little bit full until 11.30.

google_reviews.author: John Pardon
google_reviews.text: The food is exquisite, truly a hidden gem among many great places to eat in Graz

google_reviews.author: Martin Oisterschek
google_reviews.text: Great atmosphere, very nice and attentive service staff, the owner and chef is open to dietary restrictions and the wine is great.

google_reviews.author: ma schtoni
google_reviews.text: Everything I tried was really excellent! Tasty Tapas, Good Wine. Nice little restaurant.

google_reviews.author: Jochen Schurich
google_reviews.text: Very nice and cosy place!

google_reviews.author: Lukas Haas
google_reviews.text: We had a fantastic New Year's Eve! 🥰 The food was delicious. Rene was a wonderful host.

google_reviews.author: Nastaran H
google_reviews.text:
We had a burger there. It was good, and I  liked it. So I gave it a 5 star on that day.
Unfortunately, I have to update my review. Because yesterday, I ordered the BBQ sandwich, and the topping was only a salad, and other toppings were missing. They should have informed me that they have run out of toppings. I will still give another shot to this restaurant to explore more. Hopefully, next time, it proves that this time was an accident.

google_reviews.author: Mo' Ojelade
google_reviews.text: I love the ambience. The coffee was very good too

google_reviews.author: Adriaan van der Brugh
google_reviews.text: This surprisingly good restaurant is run by amazing staff, both cooks and waitresses are extraordinary good in culinary entertainment in all thinkable aspects. Daniela has the capability of being a kind en lovely entertaining host, absolutely next level.

google_reviews.author: Alexey (norlin)
google_reviews.text:
Cold tasteless stake-burger, "homemade" lemonade is just water with a syrop, and even fries they managed to make tasteless. At the same time, more pricy then very good burger restaurants in Graz.
Tho service was relatively quick.

google_reviews.author: Julia Hödl
google_reviews.text: We just went for drinks. The staff was really attractive and super nice.

google_reviews.author: Klára O
google_reviews.text: Amazing hidden bar in the centre of Graz. It's a bit pricey, but The bar itself has a great atmosphere, staff and the jazz music played from CDs. Pity it's allowed to smoke here, but again it somehow raises the atmosphere.

google_reviews.author: Christian Hoelzl
google_reviews.text: If you want to get ripped off for every cent you own, go there, the music is good. Otherwise better avoid this place.

google_reviews.author: marie aimetti
google_reviews.text: Great place to be!!! Nice music!!! Nice Maitress...

google_reviews.author: Alois Finster
google_reviews.text: Love it

google_reviews.author: Dominik Strycharski
google_reviews.text: Love the place!

google_reviews.author: Rebekah Berkovic
google_reviews.text: Top notch! We had breakfast here and really enjoyed it. The cafe is comfortable and tastefully decorated, the service was friendly and fast and the food was really creative and delicious. We were pleasantly surprised by the innovative combination of flavours and quality of ingredients. The coffee is always very nice. I'd definitely recommend this place and will be back to try the rest of the menu!

google_reviews.author: Patricia Krenn
google_reviews.text: Kabuff Bistro in Graz is the perfect spot for food lovers/connoisseurs! Whether you're in the mood for a cozy breakfast or a relaxed dinner with friends and family, Kabuff has you covered. Freshly baked sourdough bread and unique seasonal dishes made from locally sourced ingredients around Graz make each meal a memorable experience. For natural wine enthusiasts, Kabuff is a great place! The carefully curated wine selection pairs wonderfully with the house specialties. A must-visit for anyone in Graz who appreciates a warm atmosphere and high-quality, regional cuisine.

google_reviews.author: A K
google_reviews.text:
It’s a nice cozy bar. Ambience is great, specialty cocktails were delicious and creative. They also carry natural wine. The staff is attentive. It’s definitely worth a visit when you’re in Graz.

Fyi, they only have chips as snacks(no other food)

google_reviews.author: Addicted ToPhotos
google_reviews.text:
Great place, the sourdough is amazing, the food presentation is on point, can’t wait to try dinner here👀

also props for the knife that can actually cut through the sourdough

google_reviews.author: Daphne Henry
google_reviews.text: I hope they get their Michelin star soon. One of the best restaurants in Austria, breathtaking food and such a wonderful and welcoming staff!

restaurants.name: Bao Bar

google_reviews.author: Niklas Dominick
google_reviews.text: Great Ramen in Graz! I would totally come here for the food, which is the best in his category in Graz. Yet they are better places for Ramen overall the atmosphere is OK but not very cozy. Same with the service that is more about getting the job done than about creating a comfortable environment since the kitchen is open plan one does smell a little bit like food after visiting yet I would come back

google_reviews.author: A J
google_reviews.text: One of the best ramen in Graz. I’m not too familiar with bao buns but they are delicious as well. They also offer vegetarian / vegan options of their ramen. The food is quickly prepared. I recommend making a reservation on busy days if you‘re a group of at least three people, maybe even two.

google_reviews.author: Katerina Semina
google_reviews.text:
I had always wanted to try ramen, so I was really excited — but unfortunately, I was very disappointed. The ramen I got was extremely salty, and I couldn’t even finish it. When I mentioned it to the staff, all I got was a simple “sorry.” There was no offer of a discount, no replacement, not even a small gesture like a dessert to make things right.

I still had to pay the full price, and sadly, this experience left a bad impression. I understand that mistakes happen — food can turn out too salty sometimes — but good service and thoughtful customer care could have made a big difference. Unfortunately, I won’t be coming back.

google_reviews.author: AA
google_reviews.text: We originally went to another of their shops and unfortunately they are full and they referred us to this shop. Very good service and very good food. The dumplings were exceptionally good!

google_reviews.author: Marco Brandner
google_reviews.text:
Perfect food for a very fair price, the homemade lemonade was also very special!

The bao buns and the main dishes (Ramen and Sake Don) were very delicious! We will be there again!

restaurants.google_name: Bao Bar - Ichi Go Ichi E

google_reviews.author: Marc Wernli
google_reviews.text: Really delicious Schnitzel and Cordon Blue, fries were crispy. Big portions. Delicious spot for dinner.

google_reviews.author: Krištof Ocvirk
google_reviews.text: The restaurant was empty, with me and my girlfriend being the only guests. The visual inside is pleasant, albeit quite dated. There is a heavy smell of frying oil in the air, which is a bit off putting. The pictures seen in other reviews are misleading, as the food we've had is nothing like it. Despite that, it is not by any means bad, the fries that came with the meat platter were very tasty, but I couldn't stand the dryness of the meat and the low quality mustard. The server had quite the "humorous" attitude, which I personally appreciate but some guests might find off-putting

google_reviews.author: Juliana Semíramis Menzinger
google_reviews.text: Wonderful place! We were very well attended and the food is wonderful

google_reviews.author: Mateja Svilengaćin
google_reviews.text: I got the hauspfandl and it was good damn delicious. The waiter was very friendly and understood English well. It was one of the best stew's I ever had.

google_reviews.author: Karin Lems
google_reviews.text: We went there because of the reviews and the menu on their website but it seemed like a totally different place. The menu consisted of only a few dishes and the food was very disappointing.

google_reviews.author: Korina Kyriakou
google_reviews.text: I absolutely love the food here, been a few times and everything we ordered so far is incredible, highly quality and creatively put together with interesting flavours. The one star less is due to the spot lights they have shining sharply on your face on many tables. I specifically asked in the reservation for a table without these and we still got one with a spotlight. The rest of the restaurant has such a beautiful ambience and it all gets ruined by these spotlights. I really hope they remove them or at least point them away from the tables and people’s faces.

google_reviews.author: S
google_reviews.text:
A big factor in choosing to try this place was the interesting interior. We were already disappointed from the start when we were told that, due to the warm weather, we cannot sit inside. We were promptly seated right next to a table of chain smokers and after asking, were offered  tables 1m further away and even more unpleasantly  directly at the extremely busy street with bikes, scooters and the occasional car passing by constantly.

Honestly there should be a discount if you're forced to passive smoke for two hours, sit on cheap uncomfortable outside furniture and listen to the ruckus going on outside just to play advertisement for the restaurant.

The food was generally good but the Nigiri (sushi), while being alright quality, were topped with extremely poorly cut fish that also needed to be at least 50% longer. They  looked so SO sad. Other than that I can recommend the eggplant, the salmon tartar and the argentian beef.

As for drinks, the cocktails were really nice but we were also charged 8€ for 750ml of still water which is rather outrageous.

Maybe the atmosphere inside could have saved our dinner from leaving a bad aftertaste but I'm not sure I'd be willing to try again to find out. This was not a 150€ experience, not even close.

TLDR: There are places with arguably better Asian fusion food right here in Graz, which offer a great, smoke free, peaceful, atmosphere no matter the weather at a better price.

google_reviews.author: Oliver
google_reviews.text:
Miss Cho in Graz offers a fantastic dining experience with a modern, stylish atmosphere. Every dish I tried was full of flavour, beautifully presented, and clearly made with care.

The mix of Asian fusion and creative plating makes it stand out. Service was attentive, and the whole vibe of the place was just right for a relaxed but high-quality evening out. Highly recommended for anyone who enjoys good food in a cool setting!

google_reviews.author: DK Lo
google_reviews.text: Good Asian fusion food close to the Hauptplatz but to be honest, coming from Toronto, the food here is rather so-so. The pork belly is absolutely divine but the sushi selections are very mediocre. The prices are also quite high, which makes this an OK place to impress someone on a date based on its looks but not so much in terms of food quality. Service was also very slow, terminally so, though pleasant and polite.

google_reviews.author: Rebekah Berkovic
google_reviews.text:
Some good things, some bad. The food was OK, the appetizers very tasty. However, most of the dishes have some sort of sweet glaze or sauce so after a few tastes, it becomes a bit overwhelming. The prices are a bit wild.
The service wasn't great. Our waitress was abrupt, didn't really speak to us, sometimes spoke English, sometimes German (even though we told her we're a group of English speakers), plates were aggressively put on the table and taken away. Several times we ordered drinks or more water and waited ages or had to remind her. At the end, after we paid and were trying to leave, she stopped us and asked what was wrong (we decided not to tip because of the experience). Wasn't a very nice end to the evening.
The ambiance and music is nice but I don't think we will go back.

restaurants.name: Omas Teekanne

google_reviews.author: Julia E. Rozlach
google_reviews.text:
If you’re wondering whether to spend money on a hotel buffet breakfast or eat in town, go to Omas Teekanne :)

I came by this morning to have a filling breakfast that would last me a few hours - which is exactly what I got. I had the scrambled eggs with pumpkin seed oil and fresh bread. The bread was crispy and warmed up and the portion was bigger than I expected for the price (also, you can pay with card there)! The employees were delightful and energetic :) I honestly can’t find anything bad to write about this place. Come here for great atmosphere and food.

google_reviews.author: Martin Oisterschek
google_reviews.text: Cozy Restaurant that draws a young, hip crowd with good food and daily lunch options. Service was nice, but overwhelmed. The cook was also preparing (lots of) coffee and that's why we had to wait 45 minutes for our pre-ordered food.

google_reviews.author: Yee sun LAI
google_reviews.text:
