This cafe had great homemade breakfast. i ordered a pie with apple crumble - it's a huge portion! i ordered a handcraft grain cappuccino - the milk they put smells awesome. Priced at €3.5-4.8 a coffee - friendly price!!
Waitresses were lively. Their kindness made the experience super nice!

google_reviews.author: LemLem Oliveira
google_reviews.text: Such a cosy and cute cafe! We really enjoyed our tea, coffee and cake! The cafe itself is decorated with so much love! Really worth a visit!

google_reviews.author: Aavi Ya
google_reviews.text: Became my favourite place for breakfast and lunch and snack time. The food portions are huge! Prices are justified! And the taste makes me miss a time I was not even born in!

restaurants.google_name: Omas Teekanne Cafe - Brunch - Frühstück - Kuchen

google_reviews.author: Gwen
google_reviews.text:
Grilled fish was fresh, tender and flakey! The fried potatoes were great too.

The fish soup is tomato based and it was so so good! Perfect balance of sour, savoury, sweet and umami!

The tortellini was super creamy and al dente

Staff are super nice and friendly!

google_reviews.author: Emna A.
google_reviews.text:
The restaurant is easily accessible, the place is comfortable, they are super friendly although I don’t speak german.
the fish soup & bread are very delicious 5/5
what I didn’t appreciate too much is the soup of salad, the taste isn’t good for me. also the calamari pieces are not so fresh comparing to the one I’m used to (but I’m mediterranean person so my standards of calamari are too high, I won’t blame them for the quality but just wanted to share that I didn’t enjoyed them too much)
Thank you for the great service!

google_reviews.author: Jasper Hofstee
google_reviews.text:
You wouldn't expect such an amazing restaurant in this location. But please do not skip this one, especially if you don't want to spend a lot. The food was really good and the portions were huge.
The place seemed to be filled with locals, so for tourists you might say it's a bit of a hidden gem.

google_reviews.author: weiwei zhang
google_reviews.text: Very good food and service.

google_reviews.author: Artur Klauser
google_reviews.text: It's a nice little neighborhood restaurant serving typical local fare, pizzas, and a little bit of seafood. The only thing I dislike about it is that the seafood is too greasy. Ask for less fat when you order to avoid that problem. There's also a patio out back for the warmer days which is worth checking out.

google_reviews.author: Sara Shah
google_reviews.text: Very good service and super friendly staff. Food is great

google_reviews.author: Victor Statescu
google_reviews.text: Very friendly and helpful stuff. I had a burger, and the bun was a bit burnt.

google_reviews.author: Andrija Matic
google_reviews.text: Great place to create your food just the way you like it

google_reviews.author: Aini Mustafa
google_reviews.text: My lovely restaurant

google_reviews.author: Hannes Raith
google_reviews.text: Super Location

google_reviews.author: Hannes Kohlmeier
google_reviews.text: The service was very friendly. They offered both Greek and Styrian dishes, of which only the freshly prepared Greek dishes are recommendable. The best spare ribs in town, at a hefty €16, were reheated and tough. The roast pork with crackling was also bad; only the freshly grilled calamari were tasty.

google_reviews.author: Bernd Schlögl
google_reviews.text: Very friendly host, the interior of the quaint inn has been greatly improved. Hopefully, the locals of St. Veit will take advantage of what's on offer. A more detailed assessment isn't possible yet. Best of luck if the commitment is there.

google_reviews.author: Irene CZ
google_reviews.text: Absolutely fantastic! Styrian home cooking, a rustic atmosphere, and the chef always has new dishes that aren't on the menu! Today they had roast beef with onions! 😋

google_reviews.author: Matthias Dalkner
google_reviews.text: The ambiance is rather modest, the menu is small, but the food is good and inexpensive. The owner is very nice.

google_reviews.author: Christian Sternad
google_reviews.text:
Excellent food, and very, very friendly owners and waiters.

We'll definitely be back soon.

google_reviews.author: Gergely “GeЯa” Izsák
google_reviews.text: Don't be fooled by the appearance of this place from the street view! Inside you will be welcomed with quality time and muuuch better beer selection. The nice, helpful and talkative stuff will make sure you choose the right beer for yourself! We've been here after opening time, so there were basically only us inside. We enjoyed all the beers here with nice background music. I can say only good things about this place. Worth the visit for sure!

google_reviews.author: Lyn S
google_reviews.text: Best place to have a beer in Graz. Tucked away in a little corner you will find the most welcoming owner (Fionne) who will go above and beyond to make sure you have a fabulous time. Huge selection of beers from all over the world at very reasonable prices. Everyone was super nice. We felt like we were regulars by the time we left 😁 If you like beer this is the spot for you!

google_reviews.author: Tuğçe Kurtbeyoğlu
google_reviews.text: Great service and ambience! Amazing staff, great music. If you are a beer lover in Graz, make sure you stop by!

google_reviews.author: Tony K
google_reviews.text: Great cellar bar with beer garden,  great range of local tap beers. Friendly and knowledgeable owner. Great time had

google_reviews.author: Karolína Augustínová
google_reviews.text: Loved the beer, loved the bar, loved the owner! Went there everyday at our four-day trip. Thanks for the experience!

google_reviews.author: Vladimir Gajic
google_reviews.text: I must say food was ultra delicious. Service is a bit confused but at least we have really tasty meal. At the end when we want to pay, you didn’t get invoices only from head he counts how much we must pay. But i will recommend to order food from this place, not to eat in restaurant!

google_reviews.author: Borisav Bogdanović
google_reviews.text: Thank you for accepting our order, which we waited for two hours, and which in the end you did not even deliver to us.

google_reviews.author: Justin Nguyen
google_reviews.text: Came here everyday during my trip to Graz. Great poke bowls, good beef ramen and fried rice. Will definitely come back if I visit Austria again

google_reviews.author: Fatah
google_reviews.text: It was great

google_reviews.author: Jimmy
google_reviews.text: It was very good, but unfortunately there was very little chicken in the spicy chili chicken. I would have ordered extra meat if I had known that.

google_reviews.author: Richard Schiffer
google_reviews.text: Best Food in Town!

google_reviews.author: Thomas Schimpel
google_reviews.text: Super leiwand 👍

google_reviews.author: Bruno Hulders
google_reviews.text: Great authentic atmosphere and super friendly. The food was inexpensive, plentiful, and above all, delicious!

google_reviews.author: Martin irgendwas
google_reviews.text: Simply fantastic. Freshly cooked food – not too expensive – parking available – large outdoor seating – very close to Graz. We'd love to come back.

google_reviews.author: Marco Eisner
google_reviews.text: A beautiful, traditionally authentic location, which is especially cozy. The owner and staff bring a cheerful atmosphere and delicious food to the table. In addition to various cold dishes such as platters of cold cuts and cheeses or open-faced sandwiches, hot meals are also served daily at lunchtime. A farm shop with various delicacies is also included. 👍🏻

google_reviews.author: R Štefan
google_reviews.text: There are some claim regarding the best Burger in Graz. For me the Chivito burger is without any question the winner of this race. Just look at the layers of meat! All well balanced, with grilled potatoes a extra sauce. Honestly, I was asking my self, is this still a burger, or just a lot of meet in a bun. In the end, I just succumbed to the taste of fresh beef-meat and feeling of satisfaction after finishing this giant. Needles to say, that the service is extremely friendly and helpful. Plus, the espresso will not keep you sleepy, even after this kind of lunch.  Honest place with honest meals, this is how I would describe this place.

google_reviews.author: Razvan B.
google_reviews.text: The place has a nice atmosphere. We ordered one of the chivito burgers. I liked it, my wife not so much. Unfortunately you CANNOT pay by card, which is quite strange in this day and age. Luckily we had some cash with us....

google_reviews.author: Hendrik Bower
google_reviews.text: I'd never been here before but outdoor seating, public toilets nearby, friendly service. Didn't see what food they had

google_reviews.author: Benjamin Bailey
google_reviews.text: The meal was warm, filling, and delicious.

google_reviews.author: Vipul Dhingra
google_reviews.text: If you are there do try Gulash, but please order a small one. Trust me, its not small at all. Burgers are good as well. Great place to sit and watch football if it's not too crowdy. In my opinion, not suitable for big groups.

google_reviews.author: SN M (SNM bornwithwings)
google_reviews.text: We had excellent dinner here. Authentic punjabi food. We ordered vegetarian food. They provided whole wheat roti with butter and I was very satisfied. Punjabi Hospitality at its best. Ownerz and their family are only taking orders and serving. They explain everything and take our preferences seriously. I had requested not to put too much oil in subji n they obliged. Loved the ambience. Its very close from centre. Centally located, sweet staff, awesome food and prompt service. What more can you ask for?❤️🤗

google_reviews.author: Stan
google_reviews.text: I had kabli chana. Spicy chickpeas with rice. The dish is not by itself (spicy) hot, but they gave a fairly hot sauce on request. Dish was delicious. A mango spritzer went well with it. Outside sitting area was perfect for a warm summer evening. Service was excellent. Prices are fair.

google_reviews.author: Soujanya Bangalore Chamundaiah
google_reviews.text:
Ordered today 25.10.2022: ordered paneer tikka masala but received something with chicken not happy. I called the restaurant and they were supportive to send me the right order.
Visited 07.02.2022. for a buffet was very happy. Very delicious meal and was very fresh. Customer friendly. Worth the money. If someone looking for unlimited Indian meals this is very good. I loved jeera rice and Dal very much with Naan amazing taste..
Ordered paneer tikka masala n garlic naan from lieferservice. I think the kitchen has changed. Now the food tastes very fresh and delicious. Loved it.. I really wish the same quality continues in future.

google_reviews.author: Hammidah Shaari
google_reviews.text: It was nothing to shout about, in fact I was disappointed with the localized taste again in yet another Indian restaurant. The chapati was hard, and horrible. However, the servers were very polite, respectful and friendly. That's a plus point, therefore it's 3 ⭐ for these reasons.

google_reviews.author: AMIT SINGH
google_reviews.text: Its a Punjabi owned restaurant, serving all varieties of north Indian dishes. I have been here a couple of times. They are serving lunch buffet daily from 12 to 2.30 PM except for Sunday. The lunch buffet includes both vegetarian and non-vegetarian dishes with typical spicy pickles, chutney, curd raita, and a delicious sweet dish - mango yogurt, jaggery, or gulab jamun, etc. I like butter chicken and chana masala. You can also book a table in advance. For more details, have a look at their website. I am attaching a few photos of the lunch buffet dishes.

restaurants.name: Ichi go ichi e
restaurants.summary: Informal restaurant specializing in traditional Japanese noodle soups, plus takoyaki & gyoza.

google_reviews.author: Jana Sko
google_reviews.text:
Homemade ice tea is the best.
Octopus crockets - amazing. Chicken crockets - also nice but it's just like chicken nuggets.
Tried all the ramen versions and despite not being vegan the ramen with tofu and peanut soup is absolutely the best.
Service always super nice (been 3x), welcoming, giving me enough time to translate the menu to English. Would be actually nice if they get English menu too as lots of foreigners goes there.
Place always super clean, including bathrooms.

google_reviews.author: Tudor P
google_reviews.text: Small place near the center of Graz. No outdoor space but we found a table no problem, you can also eat at the bar. Food and drink menu is small but great. The ramen was amazing and it came very quickly.  Huge portion and very decent price. Amazing Japanese restaurant in Graz, cannot recommend it enough!

google_reviews.author: Julie
google_reviews.text: I visited this ramen restaurant a few months ago during a train transfer and decided to try it out of curiosity. I ate at the counter and the vegetarian ramen was absolutely delicious! Friendly atmosphere and great flavours, a wonderful surprise.

google_reviews.author: Max M
google_reviews.text: My favorite ramen place in Graz. Also less expensive than other restaurants.

google_reviews.author: Alex Holierhoek
google_reviews.text:
Fast service, lovely staff and amazing ramen.
Definitely worth a visit

restaurants.google_name: Ichi go Ichi e - Ramen Bar Graz

google_reviews.author: Piotr Staniszewski
google_reviews.text: Good food! You can choose from several options or compose your own poke bowl mix. Nice place for a lunch after a visit to the Armory.

google_reviews.author: Miko Piko
google_reviews.text: My husband and I love traveling Europe and America. One of our interests is exploring food of different style and culture. We visited Graz quite a few times and have heard over and over about a poke bowl bar restaurant called HumuHumu, and decided to try. We both were very impressed. We really enjoyed the food taste and presentation, friendly service, relaxing environment, and easy access location. The Mama Sophia’s Chicken Bowl has been my top choice.  Although my husband insisted on the Apsara Bowl two other times we went there. We went back a few times during our ten days visit to try other bowls. They were just all as delicious, especially the crispy nacho plater (forgot what it was called).We hit a little crow one day at lunch break which make sense because it’s a fast service and not a “fast food”, but we didn’t have any problem finding a place to sit. We strongly recommend it.

google_reviews.author: B F
google_reviews.text: Great food.  Nice people.  Techno music at lunch time?   Really?

google_reviews.author: Rav
google_reviews.text:
Cool concept, delicious food, fresh ingredients and very quick.
Fruits vegetables rice and raw fish in a bowl.
Was skeptic, ended up satisfied.
11€ for small bowl which is quite big and filling and 14€ for big one, might worth to share a big one.
I had the small one and was full afterwards.
Kind people, on a busy street.

google_reviews.author: Karlan Stephenson
google_reviews.text: Fresh fresh fresh! Make your own bowl is the best! Followed by a delicious cappuccino. Attention to service was perfect!

google_reviews.author: peric aleksander
google_reviews.text: Ok

google_reviews.author: thomas heller
google_reviews.text: One star is too much when the owner is his own best customer and treats guests like scum while completely drunk...not recommended at all and never again!!!!!

google_reviews.author: Bernd T.
google_reviews.text: A cafe with a very special charm that attracts guests from all over the world! Friendly staff, a pleasant atmosphere, and reasonable prices!

google_reviews.author: Sebrit Canoski
google_reviews.text: Singers: Sebastian Canoski and Jack Guilt. Dancers. Presenter. Cafe Boss Graz, Styria, Austria. The Best Cafe Bar, Cafe Boss, Damm 4

google_reviews.author: Jan-Ko Hab-jan
google_reviews.text: ...(...)...I like coming here for an espresso from Sega-fr-EDO!

google_reviews.author: Guilherme Cavalcante
google_reviews.text: A cheap, healthy, and tasty option for lunch. Half of the menu is vegan so a good call for vegans/vegetarians out there

google_reviews.author: Simon K
google_reviews.text:
Definitely the tastiest food at campus and surroundings! There's always about 5 dishes to choose from with at least 1 dish changing weekly and a few plant based options. Food is always garnished with fresh herbs, veggies, parmesan or nutritional yeast.

Vegan and plant based friendly.

google_reviews.author: Mahdiyar N.H.Gilani
google_reviews.text: Great food and 2 really friendly guy who work there take care when you have dietary requirements and they make sure they explain everything to you. They can be quite busy at times but that just shows how popular they are!

google_reviews.author: Kirin Raphael
google_reviews.text: best noodles in town!

google_reviews.author: Michael Rodler
google_reviews.text:
So, after a few visits, I finally have to write a review.
I'm a big fan of Italian cuisine. This is exactly where my cravings are satisfied.

The weekly specials are always a surprise. Creatively designed pasta dishes are served fresh and quickly. The homemade pestos are my favorite!

The quantity, quality, and taste of every portion I've eaten so far are unbeatable for the price!

google_reviews.author: Farhan Hanis
google_reviews.text: The best authentic pakistani food. Love chai, chapli and palau rice 😋😋 definitely will come again when visiting Graz

google_reviews.author: Tina Bailey
google_reviews.text: Wonderful !  The food is amazing . Perfect spice!

google_reviews.author: Martin Oláh
google_reviews.text: The food is great. Full buffet for €10. I've been there like 5 times, last 3 times I was not served. "Buffet ran out". In the morning, in the afternoon, on weekend. Right. I asked the guy "when should I come then?" He answers "I don't know." Right. But I was still offered to get a single meal for €13. - no buffet, single meal. Sorry, either you operate a buffet or you don't.

google_reviews.author: Anand Muhamadunny
google_reviews.text: Maps shows Sunday Open and It was closed when I went there.

google_reviews.author: Muhammad Waqar Khan
google_reviews.text: A Restaurant run by family with yummy, flavorful and delicious Pakistani and Indian food in Graz near FH Joanneum. Highly recommend it to anyone.

google_reviews.author: Eureka Wagner
google_reviews.text: Very crunchy falafels with an intense and deep taste. One classic falafel wrap definitely fills you for a couple of hours and on top of that, is very inexpensive. Also, the staff is very friendly and welcoming.

google_reviews.author: Fatma Zohra Bousbiat
google_reviews.text:
Really nice place to eat falafel,
The service is amazing, the gurls there are really gentle, respectful and nice .
Also suitable food for vegetarians.
I recommend 100% 😍🥰

google_reviews.author: Thomas Stocker
google_reviews.text: It was everything good except the bread and since the bread wasen’t good everything else coulden’t resolve the damage!

google_reviews.author: M U
google_reviews.text:
First of all, the man was incredibly friendly and nice, so it pains me to give him a bad review.

The falafel was "okay," but it definitely needed more seasoning. The sauces were also bland, the raw vegetables didn't help matters, and the wrap itself was unfortunately so tasteless that even extra sauces couldn't salvage it.

It's a real shame; the flavors just don't add up to anything I'd want to enjoy. You can get much better vegan options in Graz.

google_reviews.author: Leena Kareem
google_reviews.text: The falafel here is truly outstanding—nicely crispy on the outside and juicy on the inside. I was particularly impressed by the fresh ingredients and the delicious homemade sauces. The portions are also very generous, so you'll definitely feel full. The service is friendly and attentive, and you immediately feel welcome. Overall, a great falafel restaurant that I can definitely recommend.

google_reviews.author: Rebekah Berkovic
google_reviews.text: This was a nice place. The restaurant is trendy and clean and the service is great. The food is ok - I lived in Thailand for a long time so I am specific about the food. But the food here was good enough for European standards. It hit the spot for us and we would probably go back.

google_reviews.author: Jonathan
google_reviews.text: More than good! Nice restaurant with beautiful modern interior and a lot of wonderful dishes. Mine was maybe a little bit salty but overall delicious! Highly recommend visiting!

google_reviews.author: Kev C
google_reviews.text: Lovely thai food! Sure need more attention!

google_reviews.author: Elke Tomašič
google_reviews.text: Great vegan pad thai and good portions. It has that special something, it's not boring as it usually can be at similar places in the city. The summer rolls were full of fresh vegetables. Cozy place but could get crowded in the evening hours.

google_reviews.author: Peeratip Simon
google_reviews.text:
I, as a Thai, had a very bad experience with Thai foods in this restaurant.
The foods may be acceptable or good for non-Thai but for me I will not call the dishes I have had this evening in this restaurant Thai foods.

I order Wonton soup (Geo-Nam) which described in the menu as a clear soup with Wonton but what l got was a very cloudy , yellow soup  and tasted of unknown ingredients. I can only had Wonton which was in the soup but I couldn’t take the soup.  The second dish I ordered  was Papaya salad but had asked for 3 chilies instead of one in the menu. What l got tasted like papaya slides soaked with water , no taste at all - no sour taste from lemon, no salty taste from fish sauce, no sweetness from palm sugar and last no chili despite that I asked for more chilies. For this salad , I stopped after the first taste , couldn’t stand to have it anymore.

What disappointed me most was that I heard people spoke Thai language from the kitchen, which meant the foods cooked by Thai but I want to say that Thai people don’t cook such bad dishes even at home!!!
I‘m so disappointed that the dishes ruined reputation ofThai foods.

google_reviews.author: Stefan Matzer
google_reviews.text: Saved our lives when we were hungry and starving and lieferando failed. Super friendly, competent and tasty!

google_reviews.author: Erdem Ozkaya
google_reviews.text: Very friendly people. Fast serving. Tasty pizza and döner, could only recommend!

google_reviews.author: Klarissa Mehrl
google_reviews.text: great pizza, good prices, very friendly staff

google_reviews.author: Mc Holiday
google_reviews.text: Pizzas are tasty very good, well baked, with thin dough and plenty of toppings; Disadvantage: On the VIP Pizza is never topped what is ordered - should actually be called surprise pizza!

google_reviews.author: Nejat Saed
google_reviews.text: They sent me 2 small pizzas instead of family pizza which is much smallr in size.

google_reviews.author: Mirko Schraeyen
google_reviews.text: As soon as you enter the cafe you are welcomed and you feel comfortable. The music is also good.

google_reviews.author: p b
google_reviews.text: Most stressful waitress in the EU

google_reviews.author: Ангеліна Костенко
google_reviews.text: I love this place, for me it's delicious desserts just no words

google_reviews.author: Negita Asadi
google_reviews.text: Kern deserves all the stars 🌟 🤩 the best bakery, amazing coffees, tasteful warm dishes. 5 star service, amazing stab, stunning place.

google_reviews.author: Daria Kubyshkina
google_reviews.text: Pretty nice bakery. We had a breakfast there, really tasty and the price is about 2/3 of the similar breakfast in Auer.

google_reviews.author: Belinda Viesca
google_reviews.text: Today, I had breakfast with my little son and everything was fantastic! The food, the bread, the coffee, the service! Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: Patricia Brocker
google_reviews.text: Go there often to have a sandwich and a Spritzer.lovely atmosphere.

google_reviews.author: Boglárka Márta
google_reviews.text:
It was such a great experience! We love specialty coffee, and this place was just perfect. The coffee, the kindness, the vibe. We love that this is a local place, selling great coffee, and you can deep dive into the coffee topic as they are experts.
If you want to try something special, you should try the geisha coffee.😊☕️

google_reviews.author: Marko Kovacevic
google_reviews.text:
Have to share this! As a Barista I have to give a shoutout to the Girl working on 9.1.
Ordered coffee, she let the first shot down, saw that extraction ain’t the best, then set the grinder again, and made another shot. Without me saying anything.
That is the sign of quality.
I wish you all the best and will definitely come back!

google_reviews.author: Égető Sándor
google_reviews.text:
This is an awesome cafe. Coffee was excellent. There are fine homemade juices.
The staff is very kind.
5*

google_reviews.author: jan niederl
google_reviews.text: A really lovely café with a cozy atmosphere! I especially want to highlight the new barista – young, friendly, and super talented. My cappuccino was not only delicious but also beautifully prepared. You can tell she genuinely enjoys what she’s doing. Great to see some fresh energy behind the counter. I’ll definitely be coming back!

google_reviews.author: Anna-Maria Jung
google_reviews.text: Such a nice, cosy place - lovely owners + staff. Good coffee, and a great place to sit in the wonderful, green St. Leonhard.

google_reviews.author: RoBo Adventures
google_reviews.text: Alpoke Poke Bowl is a fantastic choice for fresh, healthy, and flavorful veggie bowls. Their homemade sauces and high-quality, seasonal ingredients make each dish stand out. With quick service, a welcoming atmosphere, and a commitment to fresh preparation, it’s a great spot for a nutritious and satisfying meal.

google_reviews.author: natasha-gabriela gstettner
google_reviews.text: We had 4 different bowls and each single of them was amazing. Fresh and unique! And the bowls are not small at all! The price is amazing!!!!! Stylish place and wonderful service!

google_reviews.author: reviews only
google_reviews.text: I ordered the Caesar chicken salad with extra sweet potato and soja-sesame sauce. Unfortunately, the experience was quite disappointing. The chicken had a slimy texture and tasted like it wasn’t fresh at all. While they gave a generous portion of sweet potato, it wasn’t cooked properly and was still hard and crunchy. As for the soja-sesame sauce…honestly, I’m not even sure if that’s what I received. It had a strange grainy texture and a very sour, almost spoiled taste. Overall, the meal was not enjoyable, and I won’t be ordering again.

google_reviews.author: Laura Schmitt
google_reviews.text: I cannot recommend this place enough. I originally wanted to visit the Thai next-door, but it was full, but I am so glad that it was. I had my one-year-old with me and this place is perfect. If you have a small child, they had a wonderful highchair and the benches in the window are set up in such a way that you can easily breastfeed, or have your child play there. I didn’t really fancy a poke bowl it was very positively surprised to see that they have many more great dishes on offer. I had a delicious halloumi salad. Prices are also very reasonable and the staff is very friendly. The only thing that I would point out is that the dark chocolate mousse is very sweet and quite heavy - I expected something a little lighter, and afterwards felt quite full 😂 but I will definitely be back, highly highly recommend!

google_reviews.author: Maya Jensterle
google_reviews.text: Healthy, fresh, and so many options! Plus they’re open until 22:30! Great post workout meals. Love it.

google_reviews.author: Grete Vunukainen
google_reviews.text: Best real Chai! Homemade and not sweet- just perfect. Much better than the places where the use sugar powder chai. And Moses was very kind human. Maybe this cafe be filled with lovely customers.

google_reviews.author: Kebing Nilsson
google_reviews.text: What a surprise! We got a fantastic dinner at this small Café. The food was delicious and fresh. The price was fair! I would recommend it to everyone!

google_reviews.author: Emma
google_reviews.text: Such a cute little spot! We love going there because the food is delicious. The owner and his employee are both really sweet and friendly. They also offer Too Good To Go bags with very generous portions. Highly recommend!

google_reviews.author: Lea Fischer
google_reviews.text: The owner was so nice, and the food was amazing. Great variety of taste, lots of vegetarian options. The homemade lemonade and ayran were 10/10

google_reviews.author: Lina Fievet Merkscha
google_reviews.text: Such a lovely place. 😍 Ali prepared everything himself; he made a special Mezze platter for me. Everything was so fresh and delicious. Nice and cute atmosphere; I will definitely be back!

google_reviews.author: Martha Milch
google_reviews.text:
As a globe-trotting foodie, stumbling into Restaurant Mekong felt like uncovering a little slice of Vietnam in the heart of Graz. From the moment I stepped inside the softly lit, unpretentious interior, it was clear—this place is about flavor, not flash. I savored velvety Pho, crispy, flavorful spring rolls (always confirming vegan specifics!), and a fragrant noodle bowl topped with succulent duck. Everything tasted freshly crafted and bursting with authentic depth.

The portions are generous, the prices surprisingly kind, and the staff—warm and welcoming—made me feel like a cherished regular. Whether you're vegan, curious, or craving comfort food, their thoughtful flexibility and clearly used quality ingredients shine through every bite. Don’t let the modest facade fool you: Mekong delivers one of the most heartfelt, satisfying Vietnamese meals in Graz. Absolutely worth discovering.

google_reviews.author: Bianca Katalinic
google_reviews.text: Best pho I've ever had. The portions were very generous, the atmosphere simply heartwarming, like walking into someone's home and they cook you a comforting meal. We loved all the sauces on the table, which were freely available, and the welcoming attitude of the staff. Thank you! 😊

google_reviews.author: HUMAN!
google_reviews.text: Excuse me. BUT… This is the best Vietnamese restaurant in Austria. Pho Bo is top notch.

google_reviews.author: True Mask Games
google_reviews.text: Lovely experience, friendly staff, excellent food with pretty generous portion sizes. And fairly cheap too, especially compared to some other Asian restaurants in Graz. Might not look quite as "pretty" on the inside, but it's much more cozy than some of the more expensive restaurants.

google_reviews.author: Erin Cornette
google_reviews.text: Fantastic pork vermicelli. Extremely generous portion and very friendly service. We also had the summer roll which was 2 big pieces, I haven't had chicken and shrimp as fillers before but still good.

google_reviews.author: Petra Szabo
google_reviews.text: I’m a little late with my review, but I definitely wanted to write one. We celebrated my 30th birthday here in September and not only the food was sooo delicious since then all my friends are coming back to eat here, but also the service was amazing. The lady who served us went above and beyond to make sure we are happy and have everything at all times. Once again, thank you for making my birthday so memorable, we had a really great time! ❤️

google_reviews.author: Alta Vista
google_reviews.text:
The food was of average quality, but my spaghetti carbonara was far too salty and very greasy , unfortunately not enjoyable. The waiters also forgot to bring us cutlery, so we had to get it ourselves.
Another issue was communication: we spoke in English, and while the staff understood us, they refused to respond in English and only spoke German. For an Italian restaurant in a city with many international guests, this was disappointing.
The waiter did not even say thank you or goodbye at the end, which made the service feel unfriendly.
Overall, it was just a mediocre experience.

google_reviews.author: Alexandra M
google_reviews.text: Fantastic food and service. Wood fired pizza, fresh pasta and excellent wine. Bonus being close to the train station too. Highly recommend for great food at a great price

google_reviews.author: Emrah OZBAY
google_reviews.text: As you know Graz has few nice pizza points inside and near by old town but after the train station, in Reininghaus and Eggenberg hard to find nice place to eat good pizza. Trenta is one of the good spots, they have nice pizzas, pastas and grilled sea foods together with salads. While I try to give right point I always eat “seafood pizza” they have fresh ingredients inside the pizza, pizza dough is little crunchy and soft when you bite. Service is really fast and friendly. Owner of the restaurant “I think” always walking around and checking the tables are the people happy. They have also regular Italian beer if you like. But you should have cash with you. Next to restaurant there are lots of free parking spots to if you come by car. Tram 4/7 goes really close to the restaurant just keep in mind to. Bon appetite..

google_reviews.author: Adam Vasas
google_reviews.text: Very nice and welcoming staff, charming atmosphere, good quality food and affordable prices. Very nice experience!

google_reviews.author: Prashant Mehta
google_reviews.text: Just like back home in Mumbai. The chef-owners are doing great work to bring slice of India and Mumbai in this part of world. Had greatly made Pav Bhaji

google_reviews.author: no name
google_reviews.text: Great proper Indian food. Everything's fresh made and tasty. The owners are also very kind!

google_reviews.author: sarah julian
google_reviews.text: Excellent samosas - great lunch option! I got two samosas to go and they were hot and delicious and I was on my way in minutes. They were perfect - filling and flavorful without being greasy or feeling heavy in your stomach. The date dipping sauce is so good!

google_reviews.author: Nathan Kang
google_reviews.text: Amazing Indian spot near the TU. Authentic, delicious, and filling. Samosas and mango lassi are also yummy. Great prices and good portion!!!

google_reviews.author: Poonam Chavan
google_reviews.text: Best Indian restaurant in Graz bcoz their food is so homely. Simple and authentic and simply the best.

google_reviews.author: Dejan Penko
google_reviews.text: Very good gorgonzola pizza, and with olive oil with chilli seeds made it excellent

google_reviews.author: Belinda Viesca
google_reviews.text:
The pizza and the service in this restaurant is super good and super friendly!!
We love coming here even if just for coffee or drinks!

google_reviews.author: Patricia Brocker
google_reviews.text: Delicious pizza really enjoyed food fresh and tasty. Lovely ambiance.

google_reviews.author: Darko Hudoletnjak
google_reviews.text: Nice

google_reviews.author: jimmy aaa
google_reviews.text: Service slow and unpolite. The food wasn't good, had no taste.

google_reviews.author: Joanna Pucher
google_reviews.text: Very nice place, run by lovely people. Every now and than they have special events for all generations :) everyone is welcome. It is worth supporting this great initiative 👏

google_reviews.author: Elton Bridges
google_reviews.text: The food here is delicious.

google_reviews.author: Georg Stuebler
google_reviews.text: Super Services

google_reviews.author: Franz Helmli
google_reviews.text:
One of the best places for children!
Excellent childcare! Individual rooms for children. There's also a garden!

google_reviews.author: Clemens Reinprecht
google_reviews.text: The literary readings at the MGH are always a treat for the ears and a truly memorable experience – highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: simon lackner
google_reviews.text:
Great view, unique atmosphere, the buschenschank offers a small selection of tasty food and drink options. The owner was friendly and open to a little chitchat with us, over all the experience was great!

Only thing I could critisise is that the prices are steep.

google_reviews.author: Medeea Suciu
google_reviews.text:
The food looks and is good, but extremely pricy compared to what a normal buschenschank offers. not much choice either,
we were told what we could still have even though it was early afternoon and there were just 4 other guests...Wine was undrinkable, juice was tasteless and expensive. All for paying a bit more for something delicious and if the location is worth it, but this wasn't it. the place is indeed very pretty but the best view tables were closed off. the ladies in service/kitchen seemed lovely and very kind and friendly, but the owner who was sitting with acquaintances treated these poor women horribly, constantly complaining and belittling them, making the atmosphere tense and uncomfortable. a real shame, since the place looks lovely at first glance, but i for one don't want to assist verbal abuse while having dinner.

google_reviews.author: daniel hulala
google_reviews.text: We stopped by here after a MTB ride and wanted to eat. We realized that they only take cash and since I only had a card we headed towards the door. Then the owner stopped us and said that it's not a problem and that we can pay next time. The people here are very nice and so is the food! Highly recommend!

google_reviews.author: Parvu Adrian - Stefan
google_reviews.text: Exelent!!!

google_reviews.author: Hannah Theresa
google_reviews.text:
Almost €7 for a sparkling apple juice and small (!) salads for €25.
Prices aren't listed anywhere, no official bill, only cash, unpleasant manager.
Exorbitant prices for poor service. The food was okay, but nothing special. Very disappointing and very dubious.

google_reviews.author: Nikita Comic
google_reviews.text: best coffe in Graz

google_reviews.author: TKA A
google_reviews.text: Ice cream is great

google_reviews.author: Nadine Fellegger
google_reviews.text:
I was absolutely thrilled with my visit to Aunt Frieda's! The moment you walk in, you feel instantly at ease – the atmosphere is cozy, charmingly decorated, and inviting.

The food was not only beautifully presented but also a true culinary highlight. Everything seemed fresh and prepared with love. I especially appreciated the friendly and attentive service – you can tell right away that they put their heart and soul into what they do.

google_reviews.author: Marko Gudic
google_reviews.text: scam, for 10 year kid I was charged full price for buffet regardless it was stated that is half price. dessert is terrible not sweat at all. fried banana tasteless, ice cream tasteless.

google_reviews.author: Sa Wol
google_reviews.text:
Lovely staff, wonderful food, popular Chinese, and Japanese cuisine (including sushi, miso), and various desserts. There's also a variety of condiments. I ate too much xD
Finished my meal at around 5 PM and only got hungry around midnight.
And they have the best salmon nigiri 😋
I drank lichi juice (watered, so it wasn't too sweet), it was really nice!
The atmosphere is also good. I warmly recommend this place.
The waiter spoke German and English as well.

google_reviews.author: Aya Ben Mohamed
google_reviews.text:
If i could put 0 stars I would!👎
Absolutely disrespectful behavior from the waitress, Cold and rude mannerism.

google_reviews.author: Zoran Stanko
google_reviews.text: Amazing food. Buffet option (all you can eat) for just 8.50€! A must visit if you want great Asian food!

google_reviews.author: Tamás Kovács
google_reviews.text: The chicken was strange, but you could find right food for you. On this level thid is okay

google_reviews.author: Nadja M
google_reviews.text:
The absolut BEST sushi place in Graz, maybe even Austria. I have been to Japan and this place can definitely keep up with the quality and care that Japanese sushi is made with. The ingredients are amazing and fresh and I would eat anything from their menu. The karage is amazing as well. I absolutely love the dragon roll, the rio roll (very fresh and tasty) or the rock shrimp roll if you love tempura and shrimp or even the crunchy roll (also lots of tempura there- super yummy). It is a bit expensive however definitely worth it. If you have something to celebrate or if you are visiting Graz you simply have to try it!! I used to not like Sushi and till this day I al very picky, but this place is amazing. Also lots of great drinks and Japanese beverages. It is rather small so make sure to reserve a table.
I hope you have a lovely experience if you do choose to go :)

google_reviews.author: Lina Fievet Merkscha
google_reviews.text: I am Japanese and I can say that the sushi here were one of the best I got outside of Japan! We ordered the two fresh fish that came from Japan, unagi (sea eel) and king mackerel. The nigiris were excellent, with a little original twist to its original version. The taste of the rolls were perfectly balanced and everything was made with care and precision. I would definitely recommend and be back!

google_reviews.author: Aigul H
google_reviews.text: I recommend to reserve, if one plans to have dinner at this restaurant. They have not many tables and it was full, when we went there first time. We made reservation for next evening. We were not disappointed. Food was excellent, cocktail drink was great. Waiter was very attentive and he knew his job really well. He made good recommendations. We ate and drank almost everything he recommended us and we liked it. One of the best Japanese food we ate there

google_reviews.author: Maciej Pelc
google_reviews.text:
Great sushi restaurant, everything is executed to the highest standard.
The waiters are professional and you can see it is their mission to make your stay enjoyable.
Food is first class, I've been to Japan and I must say to you are able to taste the authentic taste which japanese can conjure out of fish.
Atmosphere is also very nice, its a cozy place with nice interior design which helps you to enjoy this oriental cuisine. Also music is japanese themed which is important for immersion and many other restaurants forget about this aspect and blast not fitting music to the restaurant's theme.
I recommend toshi sushi wholeheartedly.

google_reviews.author: Gulnar
google_reviews.text:
The restaurant, service, staff, ambience was really nice but not their Shushi/sashimi/nigiri🙈

We came here because of how highly rated this place was but we weren’t impressed with the sushi at all. We took the 2x 45€ person set menu so that we could try their chef specials. Majority of the fish was tuna which wasn’t tasty at all, and we kept getting it in different settings. Tuna generally is extremely tasty specially with all the fat. But this one lacked flavor.

All other fish sushi’s, sashimi, nigiri, weren’t impressive.

One of the dishes we had was a baked rice or hot rice sushi which was barely edible.

With two drinks, our bill was around ~115 €. We were certainly full as the quantity was good. But we weren’t impressed one bit with the quality and taste of sushi/fish.

google_reviews.author: Martina Trogrlić
google_reviews.text:
Don't judge a book by it's covers!
Great food, freshly prepared dishes, great kebab, kind waiters, large portions, affordable prices.
Creative authentic atmosphere.
I'd work on the appearance a bit, if I were the owner.

google_reviews.author: ghofrane nasri
google_reviews.text:
The food was truly delicious, and the meat was juicy and tender.
The portion is generous
We would recommend going there.

google_reviews.author: Ana Stanojković
google_reviews.text: Amazing food! Super kind stuff. ☺️

google_reviews.author: Byron Khan
google_reviews.text: It was totally worth having Afghan food in Graz city ! Wonderful reception very well explained menu ! We tried mix grilled platter with rice ! They also brought some traditional complementary soup for us while we were waiting for our food ! Everything was perfect the place it self had a special Afghan traditional place to sit ! Thank you we really enjoyed your food

google_reviews.author: Joan Amir
google_reviews.text:
The food is great!! The best rice and the Personal is a nice Family. 🌟 The food in the pictures is:
Mirza Ghasemi (Eggplant spread with eggs) and a Persian lamb kebab with Rice.

google_reviews.author: Daniel Hannih
google_reviews.text:
I recently visited Sakana, an Asian restaurant with a welcoming ambience and friendly staff. Their food menu is diverse and impressive, showcasing a range of culinary delights from the East.

I was particularly pleased with the Veggie Rolls. Not only were they flavorful, but their size was surprisingly large, adding immense value to the order. Each bite was an explosion of taste, testament to the freshness and quality of the ingredients used. If you're a fan of sushi, these rolls are definitely something to look forward to.

On the other hand, the Veggie Poke Bowl was a tad underwhelming. It lacked the characteristic punch of flavors I was expecting, and it felt a little bit flat in comparison to the rest of the offerings. This, however, might be down to personal preference.

Despite the minor disappointment with the poke bowl, I would still recommend Sakana for the Veggie Rolls alone. With just a few tweaks, I'm confident that their poke bowls could match the high standard of their other dishes. Looking forward to revisiting soon and seeing what else they have in store!

google_reviews.author: Alberto Pascual
google_reviews.text: The restaurant is beautifully decorated and has a cool atmosphere. The food was very tasty and they have a big variety of uramaki and sushi plates, finding things they don't have in other similar restaurants around Graz. The service is friendly and fast (we had lunch on a Sunday and was not crowy). Totally recommend it, I will repeat soon!

google_reviews.author: Emiliano Vitaliani
google_reviews.text:
The local is characterized by decorated walls with the main area where people sit in front of sushi makers. Then there are two other rooms, so the place is rather big.
The service is quick... almost too much I would say...one wants to enjoy the meal.
The menu has a huge variety.
The dishes we tasted were good but nothing special which you will remember. On average 20-30 euro.

google_reviews.author: Januel
google_reviews.text: I recently visited this sushi restaurant, and it was an incredible experience from start to finish. The quality of the fish was outstanding  fresh, tender, and perfectly sliced.  showcasing the chef’s attention to detail and craftsmanship.

google_reviews.author: Luisa Pinna
google_reviews.text:
Very beautiful location, and it’s also close to the center of Graz! The food is very good, and the staff is kind and friendly.
Drinks are top 🔝

google_reviews.author: Marko Rebernik
google_reviews.text: Lovely Italian style restaurant. Pasta and pizza were both very tasty and the place looks authentic. You can also buy all sorts of produce, like bread, pasta, sauces.

google_reviews.author: Allesha Song
google_reviews.text: This is our favorite restaurant at first sight and from the first pizza! A real corner of Italy in Graz ❤️ I'm so glad I found this place! I will come to you again with the whole family! You are great, friends! Thank you for your work, you make life more delicious! Your limoncello is love! I recommend this restaurant!

google_reviews.author: Vivien Dániel
google_reviews.text:
I was unable to enjoy my meal at this Italian restaurant because my order was not taken for 25 minutes. When they finally took my order, I was informed that pizza is only available after 4 PM. This was not indicated on the menu.

During that time, I had to listen to the chef/owner shouting at the only waiter, first in Italian, then in German.
I find this behavior deeply upsetting and completely unacceptable. It was extremely uncomfortable for both the waiter and the guests, who had no choice but to listen to the chef berating the waiter at such a high volume that it was impossible to ignore.

While we may not know the full context of the situation, I believe that the private details being shouted across the restaurant were not something we should have been subjected to.

From what we saw, the waiter did not stop for a single second and was constantly doing his job. In fact, it was the chef who was holding things up with his long-winded tirade.

google_reviews.author: Candy Zimmermann
google_reviews.text:
Location: near the university and there is a bus stopp close by.

Restaurant: unfortunately it changed to the worse. The menu card used to be bigger and they would serve fancy stuff as grilled Octopus or just basic Pizzas. Now they only have a small selection, which is to expensive for what you get. You'll probably end up hungry.

Staff: friendly, but she couldn't handle the amount of guests by her own. So we had to wait a long time to even order our drinks and afterward getting the menu card.

Bathroom: clean and lots of room.

google_reviews.author: BogdanB
google_reviews.text: Excellent pizza and pasta and sea food! Quick service and very friendly staff! One of the best Italian restaurants in Graz!

google_reviews.author: alina ciubotariu
google_reviews.text: Pleasant atmosphere. Quick service, but the coffee was a bit over-roasted for our taste. We had a cappuccino and a V60, and both had a rather bitter taste

google_reviews.author: LemLem Oliveira
google_reviews.text: Great coffee! Great cookie! Lovely space!

google_reviews.author: Jon Maliepaard
google_reviews.text: Always enjoy the coffee. It’s a full on artisanal experience with a modern slightly sweet roast. Coffee is always perfectly prepared - and they make a proper flat white! If you love coffee, this is where you want to go!

google_reviews.author: Stop Stop
google_reviews.text:
Good coffee
Quiet and comfortable atmosphere.
Would come again
Baked goods were a little pricy perhaps.
but the coffee was super great

google_reviews.author: David Hefner
google_reviews.text: Excellent coffee ☕️ in a quiet environment, topped off with sweet cinnamon balls. Friendly, helpful staff.

google_reviews.author: Tamás Kovács
google_reviews.text: We ordered a pizza 2 years ago, and it was really good. But today was so bay and basics, plus Really expensive as well. Would be better to change back the chef le the receipt.

google_reviews.author: lynnnz w.c
google_reviews.text: The pizza is to salty

google_reviews.author: Sandro
google_reviews.text: Pizza 10/10

google_reviews.author: Nino Hauk
google_reviews.text: Terrible service, arrived 30 minutes late and was very unfriendly. Brought the wrong pizza.

google_reviews.author: Manuela Fasswald
google_reviews.text: We always pick up the pizza, so I can't say much about the atmosphere, but I can say we haven't had such good pizza at a good price and with such friendly service in a very, very long time. We'll definitely be back!

google_reviews.author: Celine Wagner
google_reviews.text: The people who work there are very nice, extremely friendly, and funny! The salami pizza with spicy salami tastes really good—a fluffy crust, delicious cheese, and good seasoning. I'll be happy to go back there again

google_reviews.author: Karl Heinz Puchegger
google_reviews.text: Attention! I ordered one fried chicken salad and received four pieces of meat. The breading on three of them looked the same, but on the fourth, it was much older and colder. This means they take the returned food and serve it to the next customer. I'm a trained cook and waiter, and I have a photo of this that I can't show here (please send me a private message). I will also submit this to the health department.

google_reviews.author: Michaela Käfmüller
google_reviews.text: Great food and great music! Highly recommended for a cozy evening.

google_reviews.author: anunum 6
google_reviews.text: The food there is so good!!!!! Everything is simply indescribably good!!!! But leave room for dessert! :)

google_reviews.author: Armin Buchberger
google_reviews.text: Why a new name for the third time... not recommended. Incompetent.

google_reviews.author: FelixN17
google_reviews.text: Very competent and friendly. Plenty of options.

google_reviews.author: Azadeh Farahnak
google_reviews.text: Best Persian restaurant I've ever been to. The food was fresh with authentic Persian taste. I recommend the restaurant 10000%. The music is also super 👏🏻btw I'm a super picky eater myself. Prices are also affordable

google_reviews.author: Sanaya Bharucha
google_reviews.text:
Lovely Persian restaurant run by an Irani family. Authentic and delicious food!

The portions are very generous and the prices are very affordable!!

Consider sharing if you are not a large eater.

The owners are also very helpful and friendly! And they have a store attached to the restaurant selling authentic Persian staples.

google_reviews.author: alex jurkovnik
google_reviews.text:
I'm not one to normally review places, but this place deserves a review.
Let's talk about food. Portions were really nice, more than fit for a grown man. Everything was done just right, not burned, not undercooked, and seasoned well. Tasted amazing.
Service was exquisite. Very polite, always around to check if everything was in order, yet in a way, that was not intrusive. Service together with atmosphere, where you can lounge after meal and enjoy a Shisha, makes this place at times feels more like a living room in your friend's house than a restaurant.
To recap, amazing all around, took me two hours to get there, but I'm happy I went. Give it 3 original Michelin stars - it's worth to visit Graz for this place alone.

google_reviews.author: PGAZ 01
google_reviews.text: Really good food ! Enjoyed every bite and had a really good time overall

google_reviews.author: Behrooz
google_reviews.text:
Overall experience was excellent and highly recommended.

Perfect customer service and friendly staff. Very cozy and warm place. The quantity of food is generous relative to the price paid.

google_reviews.author: Uri Magnus
google_reviews.text: Great Coffee and nice atmosphere to feel the city

google_reviews.author: Markus Sorger
google_reviews.text: Very authentic flair of the restaurant. They've a very big menu card, which is most of the time no good sign. But I recommend to eat the food of their "local section" and the seafoods, which is really delicious.

google_reviews.author: Dorotea Josić
google_reviews.text: Great food and drinks and very kind staff!

google_reviews.author: Sven Schönfeld
google_reviews.text: Great location! We were there on a Saturday and were lucky enough to get a table. Despite the many guests and the hustle and bustle of the market, we were served quickly and courteously. With delicious drinks on offer, we were able to enjoy the sunshine and watch the market activity. Highly recommended.

google_reviews.author: Daniela
google_reviews.text: As always, superb quality, super friendly staff and ambiance 10/10 - especially when you're sitting in the sun on a Saturday morning amidst the bustling market activity, enjoying a coffee and a Prosecco ;-)

google_reviews.author: Dominika Bąk
google_reviews.text:
Really good restaurant, with amazing delicious food.
If you would like to it something normal not like fast food then you can choose with close eyes that place.

google_reviews.author: Danica Škreblin
google_reviews.text: I just want to say this place is really cute and they have an amazing pumpkin soup.

google_reviews.author: Oliver Kann
google_reviews.text: Superb new venue, very attentive, stylish and excellent food. Looking forward to many more enjoyable lunches/ dinners!

google_reviews.author: Toni Nikola
google_reviews.text:
Fantastic food and even better waiter.
Will absolutely come again.

google_reviews.author: Felix
google_reviews.text: In diesem Lokal ist - bis auf die Preise und das Ambiente - leider alles unterdurchschnittlich. Bei unserem Besuch an einem Sonntag saßen wir im gemütlichen Gastgarten, welcher wirklich zum Verweilen einlädt. Bis der Kellner an den Tisch kam, um die Getränkebestellung aufzunehmen sind locker 10 Minuten vergangen, obwohl die meisten Tische unbesetzt waren. Auch bis die einzelnen Gänge serviert wurden, vergingen teilweise bis zu 30 Minuten. Die Gerichte selbst konnten leider auch nicht überzeugen. Die Spargelcreme Suppe schmeckte fad und das rosa Beiried (Vorspeise) wurde in einer undefinierbaren Sauce ertränkt. Die Hauptspeisen haben uns - bis auf die Käsespätzle - leider auch nicht geschmeckt. Es fehlte an Würze und Raffinesse, außerdem waren alle Portionen wirklich sehr klein. Für diese Preise haben wir einfach mehr erwartet. Wir entschieden uns aufgrund dessen gegen ein Dessert bzw. einen Kaffee. Schade, aus dieser Location könnte man mehr rausholen.

google_reviews.author: Regina Padma Rintchen
google_reviews.text: I ate the most delicious steinpilz of my life in this place. We arrived late in the evening, place was about to close but Roman opened the kitchen and cooked our meals from scratch, fresh and soooo nice. Highly recommend it!

google_reviews.author: Isabelle Papenfuss
google_reviews.text:
Walking into this spot, we definitely stuck out as Americans who didn’t know what they were doing. Local patrons welcomed us in, and so did a very cute and calm dog!

We sat down and chatted, explaining that we wanted to try a schnitzel and a couple beers. The menu was German so they sat down and helped us navigate it. The beers were great, and the schnitzel was a very large portion, which was great to share. Overall we left full, and it was a great experience and very tasty food, you must try those potatoes.

google_reviews.author: Adina Urda
google_reviews.text:
We went to this place due to Google reviews and it’s definitely worth 5/5 stars.
The waitress informed us that the chef has to cook for more people and that we will have to wait a bit longer, but it was actually the waiting time for food in Romania 😅 we went to places where the waiting time was longer without any prior information. We were informed when the cooking started and the chef came also to us to apologise for the delay (which was totally fine bc otherwise we could have not finished those huge portions).
I could take the newspapers as souvenirs (good way to learn German 😂).
After we finished food, we were given an home made cherry liqueur which is definitely on my “try to make at home” list.
The people working there were all super friendly, but the dog wasn’t very excited about people who wanted to play with him 🥺
Definitely coming back when visiting Graz.

google_reviews.author: zhou rui
google_reviews.text: Very nice and cosy restaurant. Food are very nice, especially chips and Schnitzel

google_reviews.author: Dmytro Kolosovskyi
google_reviews.text:
Amazing place. Amazing staff.
It was very nice from your side to let us in so late. Strictly recommended!

google_reviews.author: Vladimir Khomenok
google_reviews.text:
This is the best example of a quality local place. The food is simple and delicious, the staff is exceptionally friendly, the details are just cute!

I particularly appreciate heaters at almost every outdoor place, so you can stay comfortable during a winter lunches there c:

google_reviews.author: Mark Kastlunger
google_reviews.text: Spritz aperol rating: 2 outta 10

google_reviews.author: Ste Schwa
google_reviews.text: Great place to chat, eat and drink!

google_reviews.author: Goran Perger
google_reviews.text: Great service and prices.

google_reviews.author: M D
google_reviews.text: Mega chillig!,!! 👌😁

google_reviews.author: Fujimaru Takuji
google_reviews.text:
I had a Grill plate and salad for lunch.
The volume was fairly large, and the taste was excellent.
I wonder if they charge salad dressing fee to everybody, though.
Overall experience was satisfied.

google_reviews.author: Nico Prosser
google_reviews.text:
Since Grill-STOP opened, hardly a week goes by that I don't go there at least once. I'm completely sold.

1. The staff is incredibly friendly and attentive.

2. I absolutely love the atmosphere, both outside and inside, although I particularly like the bar inside ;)

3. And let's not forget the food! No matter what I order, it always tastes heavenly, whether it's a burger, calamari, or meat. I have no idea how they always manage to make the fries so crispy. A bowl of soup is a must for me every time I visit. All in all, I'm always extremely satisfied there, and I'm sure that will continue to be the case.

google_reviews.author: Deejay AvenTus
google_reviews.text:
I eat at Grillstop almost every day and I have to say I love the food there. Everything is always fresh, and it's one of the few places that prepares almost all of their dishes on a charcoal grill. I've already tried the entire menu and I'm truly impressed by the variety and quality of each dish. All in all, I have to say the mixed grill is my favorite, although I think the suckling pig at Grillstop is by far the best in all of Graz!

I highly recommend this restaurant!

google_reviews.author: Tom R
google_reviews.text:
Excellent quality, very tasty, friendly service, and quick service. Very invitingly presented, large portions. Everything was freshly prepared. 😊 Despite the daily special of suckling pig, I opted for excellent cevapcici, and my choice was perfect.
If the rather noisy passing cars and trucks were the crashing waves, you'd think you were sitting by the sea in Croatia. But I could have chosen a quieter spot than directly behind the hedge that separates the garden from the busy road.
I'll definitely be back!

google_reviews.author: Emanuel Hirsch
google_reviews.text: We were really looking forward to some grilled food and then found ourselves standing in front of locked doors with a sign saying "LOCAL FOR RENT," even though the internet said the restaurant was open. If you're going to close your restaurant, please be so kind as to announce it on your website, because this is an absolute outrage.

google_reviews.author: Kimberly
google_reviews.text: Great food and drinks, fast service too. My favorite joint to meet up with a good friend over margaritas every time i'm in the area

google_reviews.author: Stan
google_reviews.text: Some vegan options in the menu. Very friendly staff. Nice atmosphere, we went on a Wednesday evening.

google_reviews.author: Eleonora Fintschi
google_reviews.text: I don't usually leave bad reviews as I prefer to praise excellent places instead, for going an extra mile. Unfortunately I must review this restaurant as I never had such a bad experience (and I've been to many countries in Europe/Asia/Usa). The food was not my taste, but that's OK. The atmosphere was cheap and music too loud, but that's OK. However, when the casual drunk guy who had been sleeping head down on their counter  turned around and vomited on our coats and sweaters, that was too much. Too bad they let him sleep there for hours and then didn't absolutely care to help their customers, offer a discount, or even come up and try to help when I had to clean my coat and literally move by myself to a different table with the dirty stuff, leaving my kids and family behind. I obviously hadn't finished eating nor did my kids. On the opposite, they were quite keen to get paid in full and send us home. Such a disrespectful and inexistent customer service, we are so disappointed as this was our only night in Graz as part of a road trip. Very low quality indeed. Avoid!

google_reviews.author: Amaru Sunqu
google_reviews.text: It became one of the few places where to hear good danceable live music. I was last Saturday there, and really had a good time dancing and enjoying a beer. I wish i could order some food in the late night.

google_reviews.author: Luciana Sales
google_reviews.text:
👎👎👎👎👎
CAOS! Not recommended! We visited them last night! It was the worst experience in Graz!!!

They are very confusing and have not prepared the staff for the services.
You have to order everything with a QR code, but it doesn't work properly or let you know that the kitchen is closed! You order one thing, they send you three, or they just keep bringing you things you never ordered.

The waitress had an accident spilling two beers on our friend. He got completely wet!  Although everyone in the place saw it, no one from the management came to apologise for the accident.

A so-called manager (a black-haired woman) approached us very unfriendly to complain about our orders. When we tried to explain, she overreacted by saying: please answer my questions!!

Worst of all, the waitress left the restaurant crying. She was the only one who had come up to our friend so many times to apologise for the accident.
👎👎👎👎👎👎

google_reviews.author: Kimatni Rawlins
google_reviews.text: Nice enchanting and eco-friendly hotel and cafe with meditative music while sipping your matcha latte. It comes with little vegan chocolates. They have other vegan options for breakfast as well. The town of Graz is small but charming and Kai 36 makes you feel within the comfort of home.

google_reviews.author: Igor Weidlich
google_reviews.text: An absolutely beautiful hotel in a very accessible location, almost in the center of Graz. Everything is clean and modern, the ambiance is extremely comfortable, and the staff is very kind and ready to help. Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: Edyta Jatomi
google_reviews.text: BISTRO is so good. Amazing breakfast. The best we had in Graz. Creative, delicious, fresh. Good coffee and super fast service. Few spots outside to sit next to green plants.

google_reviews.author: Nadja Wiedner
google_reviews.text: I’ve stayed in the hotel and the cafe is basically my second home at this point. Best matcha ever, best breakfast ever, cutest/sweetest staff girlies. Feels like my living room but prettier.

google_reviews.author: Natasha Parikh
google_reviews.text:
Stayed for two nights while visiting Graz. Our rooms were the cutest and with an fantastic  view. The hotel also has a gorgeous pool on the roof with a superb view.

Lovely location, because we were able to access pretty much everything on foot. They gave us bikes for free to explore the city, and we enjoyed the entire two hours that we cycled around in the parks and the city streets.

The reception staff was amazing, and just SO nice! So was the staff at their cafe. Had a hassle-free check-in and check-out. Highly recommend the place!

google_reviews.author: Kristóf Bokor
google_reviews.text: We spent a company dinner there after a successful day. We haven’t heard the place before we just hopped in. The service was perfect. Our waitress was well informed, kind and funny. They even move a lot of tables and places because in the meantime it started raining. The food was really good. Maybe the only negative was the mosquitoes on the balcony. All in all it was a great experience.

google_reviews.author: M C
google_reviews.text:
Really appreciated chef cooked vegan options on demand.
The result more than satisfying.

google_reviews.author: Jakob Huber
google_reviews.text: Food was good. Service was not good, waited 20 minutes for a reserved table because other people occupied it. Waiters were only fairly nice for this kind of establishment. Atmosphere was okay (sitting right by the open kitchen) but the people on the bar were a little disturbing

google_reviews.author: Nikolas Hansbauer
google_reviews.text:
A gem of a café in this area. Trendy and business-y, it’s great having a proper café around here. Great coffee to take out or a relaxing atmosphere to sit in. Good for casual 1-on-1 meetings.

EDITING this review and reducing by 1 star: Opening hours are until 3 PM, however coffee is stopped being served at around 2:30 PM “as the machine takes a while to clean”. Doesn’t fall under my conception of “good business practice” but hey. The more you know.

google_reviews.author: Łukasz Powęska
google_reviews.text: Food was ok, but the service and the atmosphere was outstanding.

restaurants.name: Carla & Paul - Café

google_reviews.author: Jasmin K.
google_reviews.text: They are very friendly and helpful. Parking available and you get nice 2nd hand things to buy = ))

google_reviews.author: Corinna Durocher
google_reviews.text: A charity shop that resembles a boutique!! Except for the prices!!!! There is a one euro rail outside and a 30%of rack inside. The shop is spacious and well arranged with clothes arranged by colors! I really enjoy coming here. This Saturday there is a 50% discount on most or all items because of mothers day. ❤️🌹❤️

google_reviews.author: Ol
google_reviews.text: Zero stein

google_reviews.author: Christiane Dorfer
google_reviews.text: Beautiful shop and great coffee house. Very friendly service, good coffee, and the apple strudel was delicious.

google_reviews.author: K B
google_reviews.text: Many items of clothing are dirty, grubby, and torn. When I pointed this out, they were hung back with the other clothes. But even 1 euro is too much for a torn shirt. The staff looks down on you because you still don't want to take the stained shirt. As if to say: It's not good enough for you...

restaurants.google_name: Carla & Paul - thrift shop and café

google_reviews.author: Julian Seidl
google_reviews.text: Top place to be!

google_reviews.author: Elix Eidler
google_reviews.text: Excellent local cuisine and warm hospitality guaranteed! The ever-smiling owner gives the restaurant a cozy, living-room atmosphere.

google_reviews.author: Helena Löffler
google_reviews.text: Highly recommended! Friendly hostess, great food, affordable. Conclusion: I'd gladly return!

google_reviews.author: Pauline Paterno
google_reviews.text: Vorarlberg specialties right in the heart of Gries! I'd only give it two stars since I had to cook myself. However, because the dishwasher and plenty of Croatian beer are included in the service, I'm still giving it five stars. I'd gladly come again.

google_reviews.author: Kristina Krainz
google_reviews.text: If you're looking for culinary delights, this is the place to be. Top-notch, top-quality Austrian produce! A very charming hostess with a knack for that special something. Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: Anne Herranen
google_reviews.text: Lovely owner couple welcomes customers warmly. Self-made limoncello was delicious and so were the pizzas too! Hot and garlic sauce in the table were just perfect finishing touch.

google_reviews.author: LemLem Oliveira
google_reviews.text: We enjoyed our lunch here! The owner and the waitress were very welcoming and friendly! Pizza was great and the pasta dish was cooked perfectly!

google_reviews.author: Lucija Sklepić
google_reviews.text: It was great. The owner/waiter was very kind, a real Italian atmosphere, the pizza was absolutely phenomenal. Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: Yves Allimann
google_reviews.text:
Very nice place!
Chef so friendly :😃
Pizza was excellent 😋

google_reviews.author: Albert
google_reviews.text: Amazing owner, amazing food, amazing grappa and amazing limoncello! Best restaurant in Graz that I've been to! Perfetto!

google_reviews.author: Mrs&Mr Broccoli
google_reviews.text: The staff are not friendly. It doesn’t cost anything to smile and be kind to customers

google_reviews.author: Patrick Moser
google_reviews.text:
The food was okay,

The conditions were absolutely terrible, especially the redhead behind the counter. I haven't encountered such a rude person in a long time! Not only did she seem to hate her job and reluctantly cut up items or hand out change, but she also threw the change on the counter so hard you had to catch it before it hit the floor.

In conclusion: I read the negative reviews, but this is the first time I've ever agreed with them 1000%. Even if the food was okay, don't go there, folks.

google_reviews.author: Jakab Szilvia
google_reviews.text:
As God receives, so He gives!

If I approach someone in a friendly manner, there's an 80% chance the salesperson will respond in kind! If I go shopping somewhere and the salesperson is perhaps in a bad mood, I try to wish them a good morning or a nice day with a smile, and most of the time they return my kindness! The employees there are nice, and it's not easy dealing with customers every day, but I would never dream of writing a negative comment here and criticizing the work of others! There are many other restaurants, but none are like ours!

google_reviews.author: B J
google_reviews.text: The unfriendly female staff, who speak broken German and clearly struggle to understand customers, and are utterly unfriendly to boot, were the highlight of my visit to Murpark today. No "please," no "thank you," no "goodbye." That was my first and last visit to Tann Bistro.

google_reviews.author: Gregor Peters
google_reviews.text:
Very friendly team and fast service!

I'm a weekly customer at TANN Grill in the SPAR Murpark and have always been satisfied. The service was quick, friendly, and attentive. I received fresh and tasty food very quickly – perfect when you want a quick and good meal. I'll definitely be back!

google_reviews.author: KAMRAN SAEED
google_reviews.text: Visited with 7 office colleagues and had a very nice dinner. Parking is available, and we enjoyed the pleasant outdoor ambience. The restaurant specializes in Balkan food, which was delicious and well prepared. Great place for group dining — recommended!

google_reviews.author: Matej Stijepic
google_reviews.text: Excellent experience overall. The food was authentic Balkan, rich and perfectly cooked for meat lovers. Our waiter Goran was outstanding, friendly, attentive, and very knowledgeable. His service truly made the meal even more enjoyable.

google_reviews.author: Tomo 53nja
google_reviews.text:
Busy place but we managed to get a table and our waiter Goran explain us the menu and everything was so delicious and can’t wait to come back!
Guys please continue like this and restaurant scene will never die, you are example that good food with super team is top combo 👌🍻👏

google_reviews.author: Liam
google_reviews.text:
Incredible food – the best I’ve had, even compared to London!

As someone from London who’s tried food from all over the world, I can honestly say that Restaurant Duo in Graz completely blew me away. The flavors were out of this world – every bite was pure perfection. I’ve never tasted anything like it before.

The staff were incredibly kind and welcoming, making the whole experience even better. Warm atmosphere, generous portions, and food that touches the soul.

If you’re anywhere near Graz – don’t miss this place. Absolute gem. I’ll definitely be coming back!

google_reviews.author: Marko Bičanić
google_reviews.text: Amazing food and service in this Balkan restaurant. Best restaurant in Graz. Everything was exceptional from food and we were served by two legends Goran and Aldin

google_reviews.author: kris kris
google_reviews.text: The best in Graz. Fresh and high quality food. The staff is very friendly,they make you feel like at home. 10/10

google_reviews.author: Maruša Puhek
google_reviews.text: Very cheap and extremely delicious. Also loved the coffee :)

google_reviews.author: Ziga Petek
google_reviews.text: Ordered over foodora. 10 minutes after the food should arrive it was canceled. No reason was given. I am hungry, I only have 15 minutes of my break left and I have to search something else to eat. I only have broccoli at home. I am not happy

google_reviews.author: Lorenz B
google_reviews.text:
This used to be one of my favorite kebab places, when i studied at FH Joanneum. The meat was great, the bread was great, veggies fresh and the price ok, although slightly more expensive than other kebabs.

For old times sake, i decided to visit again. To my horror i noticed the Kebab skewer completely gone. Still my friends and i ordered kebab. It ended up being pre cooked pieces of chicken, which were thrown on a Grill for 2 mins to warm them up.

When we paid we realized in shock that they had increased the price to 6.80€ for non students.

Overall, you can get better, more authentic kebab for less in Graz.

google_reviews.author: berke ayrancioglu
google_reviews.text: I did not eat, I only drank a cup of coffee. The food seemed nice. The decoration is really nice in the cafe, there are lots of plants. Employees are really friendly.

google_reviews.author: Milutin Sekulić
google_reviews.text:
Amazing food, everything was tasty and presented in a unique way.
Grinks are awesome. Mango and homemade tea are my favorite.
Hospitality is next level. The staff is really trying to make your meal as nice as possible.
Try coconut spirit drink if you are into that. It reminded me of sake, just stronger.

google_reviews.author: Hassan Raza
google_reviews.text: Had an experience. Food quality and service was out of Mark.❣️ Taste is something's that we were really missing from past 1 year so good for everyone.

google_reviews.author: Rike Bergmann
google_reviews.text: This is one of my favorite restaurants. Everything there is so amazing!! I would definitely recommend the momos. Those are incredible, especially the JHOL momos, which are served in a  soup-like-sauce. Everything else is also extremely delicious. The naan here is so great! The staff is so incredibly nice, helpful and welcoming. There's also a beautiful outside eating area. I absolutely love it here! 💕

google_reviews.author: Elena A
google_reviews.text: Loved the atmosphere of this place - everything from food, to service to the place itself felt very authentic. The momos were delicious ❤️ the butter chicken was tender and full of taste. The mint soda is a must to beat the heat and the little inner yard with its breeze made a July afternoon feel cool. Highly recommend this place!

google_reviews.author: Sonja Orlovich
google_reviews.text:
I was fortunate enough to visit Nepal and taste their food.
Himalaya Masala offers authentic taste. If you are in Graz, do yourself a favor and have momo for starters, butter chicken for mains.

google_reviews.author: Martin Novák
google_reviews.text: Great kebab for 3€, the owner is very friendly, he even gave us a mint after we finished the kebab.

google_reviews.author: Eduard Capitan
google_reviews.text: A mediocre experience witha kebap, due to the fact that I was hungry, and nothing else was open at that late hour in the city of Graz.

google_reviews.author: Benno Mertel
google_reviews.text: It was pride I was wearing a  crop top and they choose to serve people behind me in the queue instead of me . Even though they displayed a pride flag

google_reviews.author: Ricardo Luiz Oliveira
google_reviews.text: Very good Kebbab and the service is even better. I reccomend!

google_reviews.author: Kevser Ozkan
google_reviews.text:
We had truly wonderful (halal) food. But what made this place truly special was meeting a person like Mehmet abi.

I have rarely encountered such a hospitable, friendly, and sincere tradesman in my life.

His attention to our children, his sincerity, and his smiling face made us very happy.
We felt like we were in our family home, not just a restaurant.

The food portions were huge; we were practically bursting! Everything was incredibly fresh and delicious. The coffee was equally excellent.

The interior is clean and tidy, decorated in a somewhat classic style, but thanks to Mehmet abi's sincerity, you don't mind anything.

From the outside, it might not seem like a very remarkable place, but once you step inside, you feel a warmth that embraces you.
