May God bless you, Mehmet abi. If we lived in Graz, we would definitely visit often. Your coffee was superb, and so were your meals. May God grant you abundant blessings, InshaAllah. May God protect you.

Greetings from İhsan, Kevser (Karamanlı), and the children, who are traveling to Holland!

google_reviews.author: Andraž Radovan
google_reviews.text:
Hands down the best burger I have ever had 🍔🔥
This place is not just another burger spot, it feels like people here are genuinely obsessed with quality and it shows in every bite.
First, the buns. Soft, buttery, slightly crispy on the outside, and they actually hold the burger together until the last bite 😍 You can tell they are freshly made and not some generic industrial bread.
The beef is next level. Fresh, juicy, full of flavor, cooked exactly how you ask for it. No dryness, no shortcuts, just pure burger perfection 🥩👌
And the sauces… wow. Homemade, rich, balanced, and they elevate the whole burger instead of overpowering it. Every bite tastes intentional.
One thing I really loved is that you can fully customize your burger 🧠✨ Tons of ingredients, all high quality, so you can build your own masterpiece. If you are vegetarian or vegan, you are absolutely covered too. Their plant based options are legit and not an afterthought 🌱💚
The location is right in the city center, super easy to find, and the space itself is big, comfortable, and relaxed. Perfect stop after walking around Graz. Also a big plus.

If you are in Graz and even remotely like burgers, this is a must. One of those places you keep talking about after the trip and compare all future burgers to 😄
Already looking forward to coming back 🤤🍔✨

google_reviews.author: Marcel Legault
google_reviews.text: Le Burger was great. Good food, good service, good environment. Le Burger has two floors of fantastic, bar/lounge upstairs and restaurant on the main floor. Make sure to book a reservation if you are going at or around dinner service as it gets crazy busy, so the reservation helps get you to your seats faster. Love it and I can't wait to go back.

google_reviews.author: Jasmina Jahic
google_reviews.text: I had an excellent, very tasty burger. The staff were extremely friendly and helpful, even though I don’t speak German well. Great service and a cozy atmosphere, definitely recommend!

google_reviews.author: Chris Stone
google_reviews.text: Walked in with family and friends with a young child and had a great meal. Dietary allergy options were fantastic and easy to navigate (GF, Dairy, Egg). The staff were happy to help me customize a burger to avoid allergies and they had tons of options to choose from.

google_reviews.author: Denis Scofich
google_reviews.text:
Hidden gem in the heart of Graz!

This burger joint on one of Graz’s busiest pedestrian streets is a MUST-TRY!
Impeccably clean, super cozy atmosphere.
OUTSTANDING food! Burgers are perfection, and Emin, the waiter... KILLER service! Friendly, attentive, and made my night.

google_reviews.author: Rodney Torres-Mabe
google_reviews.text: Great meal and super great service.

google_reviews.author: Phyu Phyu
google_reviews.text: I like the vibe and decorations of the bar. Warm and cozy. Nice cocktails !

google_reviews.author: Károly Kasza
google_reviews.text: Friendly staff, good price/value ratio, correct cocktails, regular live music.

google_reviews.author: Krystle Morley
google_reviews.text: Saturday night (5th November) I visited this bar with some friends. They had never been here before but I had been here once. We all had an amazing time. The staff were so welcoming and friendly. The drinks were amazing but that’s not why we stayed! We felt so comfortable so we stayed until after midnight even though we only came for an after work drink. Recommend this bar to anyone visiting Graz after a great night of cocktails with friend or even just a night cap. Prost!

google_reviews.author: Melli Blubiblub
google_reviews.text: Cocktails are a NO GO. Very low quality. 2 stars because the waitress was very friendly and courteous!

restaurants.name: Bowls and Pots by May Kay

google_reviews.author: Jyothish Atheendran
google_reviews.text:
We tried the buffet from this place without the grill. The food was average, nothing to complain about or nothing to write home about either.

When it comes to the service, they have a robot that brings your food. This is a really cool initiative. However, I would've given you one more star if I could place an order also digitally. Maybe through an app, or scanning a QR code on the table or something like that.

Even though the restaurant was almost empty when we visited, the staff took their sweet time in taking our orders. If they make this part also automated, they have great potential combined with the existing robots.

The ambience of the place was also okay.

They accept payments with Card 💳.

google_reviews.author: Markus
google_reviews.text: Sorry to say and can gibe only 4 Stars. So why only 4 Stars, that's why 1st of all the *fresh* meat for the teppanyaki grill was not really fresh, as it was deep frozen. And second as they are advertising rodizio  which is a typical brazil way of bbq, they was only offering one kind of meat and showing up with that one meat skewer did take to long. So here is much room for improvement. Now on the other hand, the staff was very friendly, the serving robots are funny and the ambiance is modern but I do love it. So if you like asian buffet food that's the right place and you  will not be disappointed, if you are going because of the Brazil rodizio then I am sorry to say that's the wrong place

google_reviews.author: Simply Red
google_reviews.text: Well, we used to love it here, but now the food is not the same like before. For dinner buffer at 22 euro something there is not so much option anymore like before

google_reviews.author: Hans de Raad
google_reviews.text: Good food, decent service, all you can eat concept Far Eastern fusion restaurant. With a nice gimmick, a robot serving the drinks 😊

google_reviews.author: JZ
google_reviews.text: Very friendly staff, fairly priced buffet and great deserts. Some of the food is a bit oversaturated meaning it's layered and fried a tad too much but as far as the buffet goes there is plenty of choice for everyone.

google_reviews.author: Hersson Villegas
google_reviews.text: I was walking around the area when I stumbled upon Maida Soulkitchen. The place has a cozy atmosphere and charming design. I ordered a refreshing drink, and the lady was incredibly kind. I’ll definitely be coming back. Highly recommended! Top🙌🏻

google_reviews.author: Chiara Muzzi
google_reviews.text:
Found this as I was casually walking Graz. If I lived here it would become a favourite.
It has a chilled and friendly vibe, the cappuccino was nice and love that they have small, home made, sweet treats.

google_reviews.author: David Thornton
google_reviews.text: This place is really something special.  It's so cozy and intimate, you feel like you're having a meal at a friend's house.  Food is delicious, everything is fresh, and the service could not have been more chill and hospitable.

google_reviews.author: Sofya Volkova
google_reviews.text: It feels like home there) everything is so cozy and tasty

google_reviews.author: Daniel L.
google_reviews.text: Food was ok, but way too expensive for the amount

google_reviews.author: PaulNms
google_reviews.text: Very friendly staff and amazing food

google_reviews.author: Amela Stankovic
google_reviews.text: The best pizza I’ve tried here in Graz. Definitely recommend.

google_reviews.author: Igor Kelcak
google_reviews.text:
THE BEST ESSEN!!! TOOOOPPP !!!!
Lg Igor

google_reviews.author: Gregor
google_reviews.text: Really good Pizza and Kebab here

google_reviews.author: deadlybee111
google_reviews.text: No card, but very friendly people

google_reviews.author: Maciej Pelc
google_reviews.text:
Everything was quite okay. Ramen was tasty but not amazing. I have made a reservation through their website and unfortunately there was some error on their side and we had to sit a while with some other couple at our table because of double booking. However I think that was an honest mistake and the staff gave us a free starter and an apology so everything was good in the end. We also had a nice opportunity to meet new people.  😄

Design of the interior of the restaurant makes you think about far east and the music was also japanese themed.

They also have japanese alcohol available.

I recommend this place.

google_reviews.author: Spencer Zhao
google_reviews.text: So yummy! Can park on the nearby street, normally it’s free during weekends.

google_reviews.author: Stan
google_reviews.text: Delicious vegan ramen! Three vegan ramen options in the menu. Food is of excellent quality. Staff is very friendly. Lovely atmosphere. It's very popular, best to make reservations.

google_reviews.author: Gulli Griesmaier
google_reviews.text:
I heard from friends that this place is known for serving the most authentic Japanese Ramen in Graz. I ordered spicy Abunai Miyajima - one of three vegan Ramen options.  I really loved the taste. The overall atmosphere is cozy and the restaurant is very well decorated.
Definitely looking forward to eating there again.

google_reviews.author: Klaus Wanderer
google_reviews.text:
Great taste, real traditional food served with a smile on the face. Place is a bit off from the center but worth it if you want to experience good food.

They also have Austrian Pils beer on tap which makes the whole thing even better! 💪

Prices are similar to other places in Austria, not on the cheap side but good value for money

google_reviews.author: Mengxue Zhai
google_reviews.text: This is the second time I tried. Döner was just lukewarm, if not cold. And it had not as much meat and vegetable as the first time. The quality should be more consistent.

google_reviews.author: Simeon
google_reviews.text:
funky, fresh, and full of good energy.

what a find, tucked right on heinrichstraße, just steps from the university — super easy to reach from any direction. the vibe is vibrant and contemporary, with a unique charm that sets it apart from the usual spots.

the food? always fresh, always beautifully presented, and honestly... it just looks freaking delicious. every time. they clearly put effort into both taste and appearance, and it pays off.

the staff and owners radiate good vibes — always friendly, always in a good mood (or at least convincingly so). even when it gets busy, they keep things flowing with care. yes, you might have to wait a bit sometimes, but that’s just proof they’re in demand — and worth it.

plus, the fully open kitchen adds an extra layer of trust and appreciation. you see the chefs doing their thing with real attention to detail, not just pushing orders out, but crafting them.

all in all, this place delivers on food, feeling, and flow. highly recommended.

google_reviews.author: HUMAN BEING
google_reviews.text:
I often come to this place for the falafel teller, usually swapping the pommes for grilled Gemüse. Unfortunately, my experience has been consistently disappointing for quite some time. I waited before writing this review because I wanted to give the place the benefit of the doubt, but nothing has improved.
What I receive every time is basically falafel with only Eissalat lettuce and sauce- no grilled Gemüse, no griechischer Salat—and the server seems to go out of his way to make sure there is absolutely no feta cheese, even by accident. On top of that, he is rude.
This feels like a blatant rip-off of the customer. Please improve your service and attiude. We pay for it. You are not doing a charity.

google_reviews.author: Oscar Ivarsson
google_reviews.text: Did try several Döner places in Graz as an exchange student but Ali mit Alles takes the prize. Best in Graz.

google_reviews.author: Nouman Akram
google_reviews.text:
A must try in Graz!
One of the best kebabs in Graz and very friendly guys making the kebabs. They have a nice sitting area too!

google_reviews.author: Alissa Howard
google_reviews.text:
Disappointing food. You can get better food for the same price elsewhere.

I got a burger, it was a basic tasting burger. They also added gerkins which i didn’t order, and missed out the tomato that I did order. The sweet potato fries are good though.

My husband got a pfandl and found the taste lacking. The sauce was very watery too.

google_reviews.author: Intetsu .-
google_reviews.text:
The food was okay, though it felt like they were skimping on the toppings, which affected the overall flavor.

What really brought the experience down were the long and frustrating waiting times.

google_reviews.author: Dexter Singpet
google_reviews.text: ​My children are big fans of this place, including the delicious food.

google_reviews.author: Lucas Domaros
google_reviews.text: Affordable prices, Pizza very good, spageti with overcooked pasta, poor service . Nevertheless worth it .

google_reviews.author: Raphael Pircher
google_reviews.text:
I ate a burger, it was super tasty, you could choose what you wanted inside. The beer was great too. We had a very friendly waitress a young girl with freckles. It is very rare that the waiter really listens to you and often asks if everything is okay.
All in all a very great restaurant. Gonna be there again soon :)

google_reviews.author: Stefan Zink
google_reviews.text: Food is not bad, but not great either. Vegetable pieces were too big, too roughly chopped. Main course alone would have gotten 3/4 stars since the duck meat was awesome. The spicy cabbage salad however was really barely edible.

google_reviews.author: Kehkashan Mansoor

google_reviews.author: Günter Pratter
google_reviews.text:
The "IG zum Kunstheurigen" in Graz presents itself as a traditional wine tavern, inviting guests to linger and relax. The establishment has taken over the premises of the well-known "Werger's Café" and has been redesigned.

The interior is impressive and custom-made, featuring plenty of wood that creates a down-to-earth atmosphere. This is reflected in the selection of regional dishes. The beautiful outdoor seating area, which is particularly inviting on sunny days, is also a highlight.

Culinary Offerings:

The menu offers a selection of hearty Styrian specialties. In addition to the traditional "Brettljause" (a cold platter of various meats), guests can look forward to classics such as Styrian "Flecksuppe" (a type of beef soup). Hot dishes like homemade sausages and scrambled eggs are also available. Special delicacies such as cold cuts, roast chicken, or spare ribs can be ordered in advance. Just ask.

The hosts are dedicated to the well-being of their guests, which is reflected in the preparation of the food and the cozy ambiance.


The hosts are committed to the well-being of their guests, which is reflected in the preparation of the dishes and the cozy atmosphere.
... Special Features:

The connection to the former "Werger's Café" and the new, wood-dominated design give the "IG zum Kunstheurigen" a special touch. It seems to be a place that appeals to both lovers of traditional wine tavern culture and those looking for a cozy restaurant with regional cuisine.

Conclusion:
The "IG zum Kunstheurigen" is a welcome addition to Graz's culinary scene and offers an authentic wine tavern experience. With its hearty cuisine, charming ambiance, and hospitality, it's definitely worth a visit to enjoy Styrian hospitality.

Recommendation:

A visit to the outdoor seating area on a sunny day ☀️ is particularly recommended to fully enjoy the atmosphere and try a traditional Styrian snack platter with a good wine 🍷.

google_reviews.author: Dr. Dr. Immanuel Fruhmann MSc
google_reviews.text:
The Café Frohsinn is a really nice and cosy coffee shop with a light and bright atmosphere and homemade pastries ranging from tarts like chocolate, chestnut, and coffee cream with a meringue as well as all kinds of cakes. The delicacies offered here are very delicious and look that way as well. It is sensible that the products are home-made and comes from the heart. The staff is very friendly and willing to help and there are many plugs to charge your devices here at the Café Frohsinn. This coffee shop's name 'Frohsinn' corresponds with my basic mood, since the German term 'Frohsinn' is 'glee' or 'cheerfulness'. So here at this cheerful café, everything seems to be in balance and at the right place, and its location in the lovely neighborhood of Geidorf with its many well-restored buildings from the late decades of the Austrian-Hungarian Empire around the turn of the century, makes it easy to reach from most parts of the city. And if coffee, cakes and tarts is not your thing, you also can have some snacks such as toasts and the like here at the Café Frohsinn.

So, although I mentioned it before, it is quite hard to find a good combination of nice atmosphere to have a seat in and a variety of delicious home-made pastries, tarts and cakes, the Café Frohsinn simply makes it happen.

I had a Café Verlängerter and a slice of the home-made Linzertorte, by the way quite a famous product in Austria and beyond, with a portion of whipped cream. What a great combination!

From Graz with Love,
Dr. Dr. Immanuel Fruhmann

google_reviews.author: Sarah Lesjak
google_reviews.text:
Indulgent poke-bowls made to order.
Shake Shaka is a food stall offering Hawaiian inspired poké-bowls.
The menu includes 4 pre-set bowls as well as a “build your own” section.
Almost all ingredients are gluten free and vegan, the choice is fair. It is medium-priced yet absolutely justified. Portion size is generous, and the ingredients are of very good quality. The bowls are prepared to order using fresh, if possible, regionally sourced ingredients.
The waitress is very friendly and swift and staff answers any question patiently and gives good advice on choice of food/matching ingredients.
The dish is flavoursome and rich in texture, it was finished within a reasonable time as at that point the establishment was not very busy.
The have outside as well as sheltered seating, with small tables that will approximately fit 30 people all together. They offer delivery as well (online order; velofood.at).
Although ingredients are kept in separate storages using separate utensils to serve from, one cannot exclude cross-contamination, therefor it is advisable to inform the waiter/waitress of food intolerances or allergies.
They do have a small selection of alcoholic and non-alcoholic drinks too.

google_reviews.author: Elise Sala
google_reviews.text: In the past I would have given 5 stars. The food was so good but the last few times I’ve checked, the menu was changed to vegetarian/vegan only. I get it, they’re in Lend, the hip quarter. And I love vegan options when they’re done right but the vegan burrito I got was dry and bland even with salsa, and after I added sour cream/hot sauce. I hope they find a way to improve because in the past the flavors were really great and the potential is there! I hope to try it again someday and change my review! :)

google_reviews.author: hans schmied
google_reviews.text: It looks nice and fancy and bio plus vegan sounds promising. Unfortunately everything is ruined with really low quality cooked ingredients including very old sauces who likely weren't good anymore. If you checkout the left side with the plastic bottles you better leave on your first instincts and don't order anyways just to leave it there because the mango smells rotten with that peanut sauce .

google_reviews.author: Joanita
google_reviews.text: We were on holiday in Graz and we discovered this lovely restaurant just opposite the big city park. We ordered two large take away bowls with very tasty and healthy combinations of rice,salmon, mangoes, coconut flakes,nuts and the list goes on everything was super tasty and fresh. It was definitely a delicious lunch I hope to find a restaurant like this in Vienna:). The waiter was very friendly and accomodating he even gave us an extra take away bowl with a little bit of coconut rice for our daughter. Such kindness is rare because these days everyone just wants to make money. We left this restaurant very happy and satisfied. We hope to one time come back here again in the future if we're in Graz.

google_reviews.text: The food was absolutely amazing! Bowls were very delicious, and there are so many options to choose. There are many vegan gluten free options as well.

google_reviews.text: I went here because of all the good reviews and I felt mislead. The guy recommended the thai soup and it was very bad, even the ingredients were cheap. Having been in Thailand for 2 months this year I can say for certain this soup was significantly worse than the worst soup I had in Thailand, yet the guy got aggressive with me when he asked me how it was and I told him I didn’t like it. He said it’s authentic, that it’s supposed to taste like that (uhm okay maybe in fantasy thailand). He then begged me (!) not to leave a bad review. Really weird attitude. I would rate it a 0/5 if I could.

google_reviews.text: Yum! This is a great little spot with fantastic soup and lots of options, both vegan and with meat. Everything was very flavorful, and the goulash was especially great. We also liked the seasoned salt mix for sprinkling on top. The owner was friendly and clearly takes a lot of care in his cooking. Soups are available to eat hot at one of the two counters or take refrigerated to make at home. Definitely recommend stopping by! I'd love to have a place like this at home.

Third time: Very friendly staff, very quick service and good food

Second time: I went back and this time I  asked them to put less salt, and food was great.

1st time: My Thai tofu curry with rice was a bit too oily and too salty ( almost inedible :( ) This is my first time ordering here so can't tell if that was an one time mistake. ++ Friendly staff, very short waiting time for pickups and possibility to pay with bank transfer if you don't have cash with you

google_reviews.author: Johanna Fliesser
google_reviews.text:
I had a sake sushi set, and it could've been better. The rice was a little too sour, but that's up to preference. The bigger problem was the lack of wasabi - for 12 nigiri and 3 maki it was just too little, it was less than half a teaspoon, and flat, not heaping! But what made the experience even worse, was hard rice bits in the rice. I'm not sure if this was rice that was in the air too much and turned dry, or undercooked pieces, but it made the sushi both physically and mentally uncomfortable to eat.

I gave it an additional star for the cheap price I got it for, but this is not the place if you're looking for decent sushi!

I can't wait to go back! Also, the window couch was comfortable and a great place to people-watch!

Only men were working in the kitchen, so I guess I didn’t worry on the hygiene aspect as much, but then if only men are working for the business, that creates its own set of issues.

google_reviews.author: L. P.
google_reviews.text: A nice hidden gem in a lovely building, with nice atmosphere inside and a quiet garden terrace outside. The choice is not huge but the food is fresh and tasty and the service friendly. A safe choice if you wish to enjoy a good diner/lunch. Reservation is a must by sunny days

google_reviews.author: Anja Medić
google_reviews.text: The servers are pleasant and kind, and the food is served very fast, but the taste of the food is off, my gut felt weird after; wouldn’t recommend, best thing on the plate were the fortune cookies and the orange pieces :/

google_reviews.author: KUANG CHIAW LEE
google_reviews.text: It is a disgrace for the Cook to present his skill on these two dishes. Honestly, he/she should travel to Jap or China to polish up his skillset. Totally disappointed with the taste of the food served. Will not return.

google_reviews.author: Vienna
google_reviews.text: It's a little funny to see many locals in the reviews saying it's good. They must have never eaten real Japanese food and never been to Japan. A Japanese restaurant with completely Chinese cooking, large quantities, very average taste and cheap prices.

google_reviews.author: Ari Manik
google_reviews.text: Oisihii Restaurant is a fusion basically. They offer some sorts of Ramen and Sushi. The ramen is not like common Japanese ramen, but it might be a combination between Chinese noodles and Japanese Ramen. Staffs are super friendly. And dish portion are very generous 😄. If you order Bento 🍱 you get extra prawn cracker and spring roll. Overall is good.

google_reviews.author: 孙卓伶
google_reviews.text: Amazing Asian comfort food in Graz! This place serves delicious, heartwarming dishes that truly feel like home.

google_reviews.author: Charles Bernard
google_reviews.text: Best waffle house in Graz! Tastes like no other 🧇

google_reviews.author: Josipa Kristić
google_reviews.text: Great ice cream! Mango is my favorite!

google_reviews.author: Thomas Lavoie
google_reviews.text: Insane ! Ice Cream is so good.

google_reviews.author: Fay Kumpusch
google_reviews.text: A complete rip-off! I paid €40 for a cold bubble waffle, empty crepes, and empty pancakes that should have come with chocolate sauce and ice cream. When I tried to contact the shop, they just brushed me off. They kept the €20 even though the order was missing. It's simply pointless to order from them.

google_reviews.author: Dagmar Kramser
google_reviews.text: Our first bubble waffle! Very friendly, long opening hours, unfortunately no parking, but paid parking is available in the surrounding area. I also thought it tasted very good 🫶

google_reviews.author: Péter Lázár
google_reviews.text: This is a pretty large burger bar with the most idiotic toilet setup I've ever seen in the downtown of Graz. During my visit, only 8 type of burgers were available. Vegan options are available. Burgers were fine, but they are not a big portion at all. For some reason the potato is not peeled before baking. They're selling their own beer, so that's a huge plus point.

google_reviews.author: Éva Gabriella Csallóközi-Fekete
google_reviews.text: The burger was very tasty, but quite small and the price was friendly. The fries didn't really work for me, they were homemade but not crispy at all. Good guacamole. The whole concept is really great, spacious interior with lots of seating.

google_reviews.author: Phil Sabra
google_reviews.text: One if not the best smashed burger I had in Europe so far! An absolute juice packed taste explosion, beefy faste, excellent soft bun, top notch fries! loved it and a must for every burger fan!!! A little expensive, but worth every cent.

google_reviews.author: Kornélia Krisbaum
google_reviews.text: The food was delicious. I ate burger and freaky fries and it made from fresh potatoes. This is also an ecofrendly, vibrant, colorful, bohemian place. It fills my heart with joy.

google_reviews.author: Fabian Jöbstl
google_reviews.text: Nice new burger factory in heart of graz. sustainable, tasty fast food in a nice environment. Nice concept, small but suffcient menu and sauces are for free. Price is really good. Check out the seating area on 1st flow with panorama view on Sporgasse!

google_reviews.author: Daria Valenta
google_reviews.text: A nice view from the outdoor terrace. A menu of soup+salad+main+dessert and drink only for 12,50€. There is a choice of two mains, one of which is vegetarian. And the food was very good. Open to public, located in the business building, on the 4th floor. Accessible with a lift, so we could easily visit with a stroller.

google_reviews.author: Joysn
google_reviews.text:
Despite being a former university of applied sciences student and living and working nearby, I wasn't really familiar with it, but I was very pleasantly surprised. The food was excellent, portions were larger than average, and the price of €12 for soup/salad/main course/dessert/drink is definitely reasonable.
For an open-air cafeteria, this is probably the highlight here in Graz!

google_reviews.author: Jakob Gre
google_reviews.text: The food is absolutely fantastic for cafeteria fare, balanced and varied. On busy days, there's usually a brief queue at the salad buffet. The value for money is decent.

google_reviews.author: David Schneider
google_reviews.text:
One of the best cafeterias in Graz. The price-quality ratio is just right.

The staff is always friendly, and you can even make small special requests :)

Thanks for the food and drinks

google_reviews.author: Gustav Jansen
google_reviews.text:
Excellent goulash!

Unfortunately, it gets quite crowded at peak times; you should arrive around 11:50.

google_reviews.author: bluebardot
google_reviews.text: Very unfriendly services, small portions at adult prices. The people who work there are very rude and unfriendly if they notice you are not Austrian (them being foreigners themselves) and are very rigid when trying to communicate with them. I asked for more meat and less carbs and they said they can t due to portion regulates. This happened a lot of times. A big mess that place is. I hope there will be a change in staff soon otherwise it's not worth going there anymore.

google_reviews.author: Mohammadreza Kariman
google_reviews.text: Love this place for a number of reasons!

google_reviews.author: Gaiana Danielian
google_reviews.text: Very nice university cafeteria

google_reviews.author: Rayon Riot
google_reviews.text: "MSC roasted redfish fillet with Mediterranean grilled vegetables, rosemary potatoes, and herb butter" – I got what you see in the picture. No herb butter, cold fries and lukewarm fish instead of rosemary potatoes... For €11.90... It's really getting worse and worse.

google_reviews.author: Lina
google_reviews.text: The food isn't very good, unfortunately; it's overcooked and definitely pre-packaged. What's also really annoying is that even with a cafeteria stamp, you don't always get the correct price, and the staff don't seem to care. It just depends on the employee—sometimes it's good, sometimes it's not.

google_reviews.author: R Lin
google_reviews.text:
Bar Amouro is beautiful and good vibes! Came here for drinks with some friends and I would definitely recommend a reservation.

It was packed on a Saturday night but somehow we found a table eventually. The drinks were fantastic! I had a more fruity flavored one which was mixed so well, but even my friends drink which featured basil (and I’m not a fan of) tasted pretty good.

You can come other times of day to actually have food as well, which I can imagine would be just as enjoyable. It definitely gets a little loud with that late night crowd, but it is a bar so it should be expected. Alex makes the best drinks, you won’t be disappointed!!

google_reviews.author: Krista Tropper
google_reviews.text: We booked a high table weeks in advance because of bad experiences in the past where we couldn’t get a table without a reservation. Even so, they refused to give us a nice table. It appears that other people get the buddy-buddy treatment and can get whatever they want. The host got very rude and started making a scene, accusing my partner of being rude when we were just trying to get out of there. Too bad, because we used to love coming here… :(

google_reviews.author: Korina Kyriakou
google_reviews.text: I would have given this place 3 stars because the waiter forgot my food and because they were not answering the phone for 2 days BUT it’s a really pretty atmosphere and the waiter was still friendly, even if he forgot my food. I ordered the truffle linguine which was one of the best pasta dishes I’ve ever had! I also ordered a piña colada which tasted very refined and was also quite strong! 🤭It was difficult to get the attention of the waiter for our 2nd order (the room is quite long so they couldn’t see us) so I had to go find them. I’d definitely come here again and I think it’s also a perfect place for a date night.

google_reviews.author: Val
google_reviews.text:
Such an amazing, wonderful, legendary food !!! One of the most delicious place of the town. We ate the mezze, and we were so amazed by the quality and the taste.

The waiters are very nice and helpful.

A great « bravo » to the cook.

google_reviews.author: Abbey Pitman
google_reviews.text: My partner and I came here for dinner and had a great experience. We tried two different taftoons and were really impressed; the Bianca taftoons are amazing! Our drinks were also delicious. The atmosphere is great and our server was very lovely; she was more than happy to speak english to accommodate us.

google_reviews.author: Petya Georgieva Miller
google_reviews.text: My husband and I love this cozy restaurant, its friendly atmosphere, and welcoming staff that was trying above and beyond to accommodate to our food restrictions. Their dishes are perfection — we had the salmon with veggies, the chicken with veggies, and the minestrone soup and all three were very tasty in a homemade style and with quality ingredients.

google_reviews.author: Allesha Song
google_reviews.text:
I had the seafood pasta today, and I have to say—it was the best I’ve ever had! The flavors were perfectly balanced, the seafood was incredibly fresh, and the pasta was cooked to perfection. Every bite was a delight! If you’re a fan of seafood, this dish is an absolute must-try. Highly recommended! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

P.S. I only have a photo of the empty plate because it was too good to wait for a picture before diving in! 😄

google_reviews.author: shirin bb
google_reviews.text:
Best Italian  restaurant I visit in Graz
The food was great, the service  was excellent  the price was good, we
We were four people at the restaurant and the total amount we paid was €100 including the tip.
We also ordered two pizzas, cheese ravioli, a very delicious mixed leaf salad, and grilled calamari.
Everything was perfect!

google_reviews.author: Espen Arge
google_reviews.text: I spent a few days in Graz with fellow students drawing cityscapes, and il centro ended up being our little "home" in the city. The location is beautiful and the waiters and the owner are simply the nicest people. I would almost consider them our friends now:) We were allowed to sit at the restaurant multiple days to work, and ate lunch here every day. If we needed anything, it was already done before we could ask, for example blankets and a cup of tea when the weather turned a bit cold (and they insisted on us not paying anything for it). All in all a great place, and I absolutely recommend a visit - grab a pizza and a beer outdoors if the weather's fine, or a cup of tea in the cosy restaurant! (P.S. If you visit, look for the sketch i drew of the bar, it hangs on the wall:)) This will be one of the first places I visit when i return to Graz!

google_reviews.author: Dia Gejdosova
google_reviews.text: Pizza was amazing! Really tasty Neapolitan pizza. The waiter super sweet.

google_reviews.author: Su N
google_reviews.text: We ordered two bubble waffles, which took quite a while to make and were very lightly filled. At the very bottom of the cup were a few strawberries and two small scoops of ice cream, but the whipped cream and sauce were missing. Unfortunately, I really wouldn't recommend them, as they were quite expensive. The waitresses seemed to have been poorly trained.

google_reviews.author: Mil Ena
google_reviews.text: The best and freshest smoothies and juices in all of Graz!! They're incredibly delicious, the fresh fruit is excellent, and the service is always friendly, competent, and professional. I've also tried the bubble waffles several times; they're simply delicious 🤤 I've never had this incredibly delicious batter anywhere else! I'm a regular!! 🤩

google_reviews.author: Bloody Eater
google_reviews.text: I paid almost €10 for a large bubble tea and a small cup of water. When I asked why it was so expensive, the lady said, "We only charge for the cups." So, to everyone: bring your own cup next time, since the tea and bubbles are free.

google_reviews.author: Gnooks
google_reviews.text: Far too expensive! My waffle was practically empty and I had to wait ages for it even though there were no other customers!

google_reviews.author: Serap Ö.
google_reviews.text: One star because the boba was curdled and the size was much smaller than in other shops. The taste wasn't great either.

google_reviews.author: Anna Novik
google_reviews.text: The best cappuccino I've ever had. It's a shame the owners don't allow customers to use laptops at the tables. It doesn't look very welcoming, even though there's plenty of space inside.

google_reviews.author: Aischaa
google_reviews.text: This is a great spot if you want a cozy breakfast/brunch or a quick boost of energy on the go. This is the best matcha I have had in the city. I highly recommend the strawberry matcha, it is unsweetened but they have extra sugar packets, for people who like it a little bit sweet like me. The atmosphere is great and it is cozy caffe. The sandwich was also very good, but took a little longer than it should have. All in all this is a great location, that deserves a visit.

google_reviews.author: Erkan Yildiran
google_reviews.text: The best thing about this cafe is their rooftop. Very basic but casually designed interior. Prices are reasonable, not expensive. They only offer arabica blends for the coffees in their cafe. I tried an espresso with the single origin arabica blend and it was very intense and tasty. So if you like only arabica beans than you should definitely try this place.

google_reviews.author: Peter Kraus
google_reviews.text:
The service was very friendly, barista made an effort to show us what kind of coffee beans they serve. Atmosphere is welcoming and fresh.
However this is not a good specialty coffee place (if you are looking for a good pour over). We found this place on "European coffee trip" app and we were disappointed. Coffee beans used for a V60 were roasted too dark, something like using "Lavazza" coffee with a hint of cherry juice. (We tried Nicaragua and Colombia specialty coffee).
I would recommend this place for people looking for quick bite (sandwiches of other customers looked appetizing) and a cappuccino or other coffees using milk.

google_reviews.author: Matija
google_reviews.text: Of all great specialty coffee shops in Vienna and Graz this one stands out. The unique taste, the choice of 2 single origins, barista art, cute hidden rooftop. Relaxed yet professional service, looks like it's still owner managed.

google_reviews.author: Dietmar Huhs
google_reviews.text: EXCELLENT

google_reviews.author: Jojo Jomama
google_reviews.text: The Zunki simply remains the Zunki

google_reviews.author: Georg Streicher
google_reviews.text: Always good for a coffee

google_reviews.author: Andreas Fliesser
google_reviews.text: A very good atmosphere

google_reviews.author: Ernst HOFER
google_reviews.text: Just great

google_reviews.author: Niklas Dominick
google_reviews.text:
We ordered two double espressos, but unfortunately, the coffee was rather stale and lacked flavor—not quite the win we were hoping for. Maybe the milk-based drinks are better options here.

On the bright side, the service was great! Eva was in an amazing mood and really made the visit enjoyable. She’s the kind of person who turns a simple coffee stop into a fun experience. We also loved the cycling connection—it added a unique touch to the place.

The café itself is super tiny; we didn’t notice any indoor seating when ordering. It’s bicycle-inspired, which fits the theme nicely. The outdoor seating was comfortable, and the cushions were a nice touch. Everything looked clean and well-kept.

We didn’t try any food, and there were no Wi-Fi or power outlets available.

Overall, a cozy and creative coffee stop with great service and personality—just not the best spot if you’re after a standout espresso.

google_reviews.author: Philipp Kahr
google_reviews.text: It is a lovely place to grab a coffee and have a good chat with the owner. The cakes and overnight oats are excellent. I am usually not a fan of chocolate cake, cause it’s most often just too heavy. However, that was an exquisite chocolate cake!

google_reviews.author: Chihuahua
google_reviews.text: Very nice place with a bike atmosphere. Nice barista (or even the owner? 🙂) and tasty coffee. As for me it's not a casual cafe or coffee shop. I recommend you to come here!

google_reviews.author: Manuel Feldbaumer
google_reviews.text:
Best coffee with the friendliest barista in town! Chocolate cake is an absolute must! 😍🍰
Perfect spot for cycling enthusiasts! 🙌🏼☕️🚲

google_reviews.author: Andreas Hofmarcher
google_reviews.text: Absolutely the best coffee in town with the most friendly service ever 😁 say hi to Eva and her amazing coffee plus the spinning wheel to every order!

google_reviews.author: adem kljajic
google_reviews.text: Do not let the fancy pictures fool you!Rude staff who followed me into the bathroom just to tell me i wasn’t allowed to use it.I needed to be a customer.Was waiting on my friends to arrive so we can have drinks.After the bartenders attack and tantrum i would NEVER go into this kind of establishment!Plenty other beautiful places in Graz i can spend my hard earned money on.

google_reviews.author: Matic Čuk
google_reviews.text: Overpriced 1 cappuccino is 5,10€

google_reviews.author: Niko Jančec
google_reviews.text: The service was not friendly, I wouldn't recommend comming here.

google_reviews.author: Melanie Champoux
google_reviews.text: The regular Tiramisu and the apple Tiramisu are amazing !

google_reviews.author: Adam Bistrovic
google_reviews.text: baldy is mean

google_reviews.author: Erkan Yildiran
google_reviews.text: This time I was searching the best espresso in Graz. As an Italian espresso lover, a fan of great arabica and robusta blends I tried an espresso at Cafe Muhr in the center of Graz because on their sign was stated “Italian espresso”. They really do offer a tasty blend with arabica and robusta beans. The espresso was quite well balanced but little bit too long extracted so there was little bit too much water for me. The price for an espresso is with over 3 euros expensive. But I can definitely recommend it because of the Italian vibes you taste.

google_reviews.author: Kim Stanton
google_reviews.text: 1 star for very tasteless hot chocolate. Worst in 9 wks touring around Central Europe. Friendly waitress. Lots of smoking patrons unfortunately, which reduced the atmosphere score.

google_reviews.author: Vasileios Karakostas
google_reviews.text: Nice cafeteria in the most famous location of Graz. The icekaffee I took was very good, unique! The stuff took the order quick and the place was clean. Coffee was a little bit expensive like almost everything in Austria 😅

google_reviews.author: Nikolina Cvitkušić Mareljić
google_reviews.text:
Unprofessional service. The waitress is very slow and takes forever to come and take the order. It's a shame that you have to wait so long for an order in one of the busiest places in Graz. This is a place which we will definitely not return and I would not recommend this place to any tourist.

We waited 15 minutes for someone to come take our order and when the waitress finally took our order it took them 30 minutes for two coffees, I think kindergarten kids would be faster.

google_reviews.author: Magdalena Dedić
google_reviews.text:
I waited a bit for a service but I didn’t mind. I ate the chicolate cake, it wasn’t bad but not great, not something I would order again. The lemonade was also average.
The ambient and location is nice.

restaurants.name: Napo am TU Campus

google_reviews.author: Vedad Misirlić
google_reviews.text: I find the audacity of this establishment quite breathtaking, especially taking into account that they are one of the only food options at the campus. To market themselves as 'student-friendly' while charging upwards of 15 euros for a self-service one-meal buffet which is not even good in taste is an insult to one's intelligence. It is particularly frustrating that they insist on weighing the already heavy plate, which is a substantial object for which I receive no nutritional benefit, as part of the final cost. One portion of pasta, with some sauce, can cost you upwards of 10-15 euros. Should one attempt the pizza pieces, one finds that three microscopic portions command a price point better suited to fine dining. Even the university cafeteria is better, and that tells you a lot about the quality of this place.

google_reviews.author: Daniel Lukic
google_reviews.text: Tried the Supli and the various Lasagna and it is great. It tastes great and makes full. The prices in combo with the salad and or dessert are reasonable for the quality and amount.

google_reviews.author: aqib javaid
google_reviews.text: I had an awesome meal,The food was super tasty,and the service was really friendly. Great spot for a chill hangout or a study break with friends. Definitely coming back!😇❤️💫👌

google_reviews.author: Gregor
google_reviews.text:
Unfortunately, since the recent price adjustment, it's no longer a viable option. Before, I always enjoyed going there; the price of the daily special and the set menu options was good for the quantity and quality offered.

For roughly the same portion size, you now pay about €10 (for the main course alone!), and the salad now costs €4.50 (previously €2). Most importantly, you only find out the final price of your lunch after it's weighed at the register, which unfortunately makes the whole experience even worse.

The pizza is still good and the price is acceptable for the quality.

In summary: Napo at TU Graz was, until now, a very good option for a good and substantial lunch at an acceptable price, but that's no longer the case at all. For me, it's now simply too expensive for what's offered!

google_reviews.author: Phil
google_reviews.text:
The pizza at NAPO on the TU campus tastes okay, but it's nothing special. The dough is sometimes difficult to cut, and the cutlery provided is of limited help – it's a far cry from a fresh or fluffy pizza. Even a quick oven bake barely improves the result.

At peak times, the operation seems uncoordinated and overloaded; the lines are long, and the process isn't well-coordinated. Only card payments are accepted, including the option to tip, which seems questionable given the limited service offered.

The good coffee and the relaxed atmosphere outside of lunchtime are worth mentioning. Therefore, if you can, plan your visit during quieter times.

restaurants.google_name: Napo Pizza am Campus TU Graz

google_reviews.author: Katharina Friedl
google_reviews.text: We eat there almost every day. We're thrilled because it's really delicious. The portions are totally generous 😋 The staff is attentive and friendly. I'm so glad you exist! 🤗 Thank you!

google_reviews.author: Andrea Anderhuber
google_reviews.text: Today, on the occasion of an appointment at the SMZ (Social Medical Center), we ate at the bistro for the first time with our parents and were delighted. The gentleman who served us was very friendly and the food was excellent. Thank you so much, we will definitely come again.

google_reviews.author: Daniela Ka
google_reviews.text: I enjoy coming here for a coffee or a takeaway, and I'm always pleased when people know or ask if I want a coffee to go. Very thoughtful, I always enjoy coming back! It's wonderful that such friendly staff still exist these days.

google_reviews.author: Maria Perner
google_reviews.text: Very good food, and you're supporting a social cause. I think the concept is great. The value for money is also unparalleled these days. Keep it up!! 👍👍

google_reviews.author: Patrick Patricka
google_reviews.text:
First, I've met too many people.
Even though everyone's in the same boat, we're playing off each other. No solidarity.
Selfishness all over the place.
It makes me so angry and aggressive.
Promises aren't kept, etc.
It hurts me deeply inside.
My state of mind has gotten even worse.
I'm coming to the end. Thank you for the unnecessary time I've spent here. 😡😡😡😡😠😠😠

google_reviews.author: Sophie
google_reviews.text: Have been here several times now for lunch and dinner and the food is always superb! Very unique fusion flavours and by far the best ceviche in Graz! Lunch is great value and always impressed by how yummy the vegetarian option is. Highly recommend!

google_reviews.author: Diego Porqueras (Deezmaker)
google_reviews.text: This food blew me away! The two guys that own the place are incredibly nice and the chef is wonderful. I had a soup, chicken sandwich and teigtashen and everything was amazing. I was so busy enjoying the food I forgot to take pictures but the dishes looked beautiful. Everything is made in house and tasted super fresh. The dessert menu is also spectacular. Highly recommended, you have to try this place!

google_reviews.author: Bernadette
google_reviews.text: 🤗🌟Found an amaziiiing treasure in LEND!!🤩🌟🙌🏻✨We had 4 dishes and … my God … we would have kept going if we could’ve. All the food here was colourful, juicy, full of aroma and I may add- really healthy!!🤗😂 The two guys running this place are a fantastic COMBO! Chef Andreas- used to be the Chef at “ Die Amsel”, and partner Bevil is the Influence on the brilliant Caribbean twist - which makes the dishes so much more exiting and memorable!!💥🥳🥳FOODIES MUST TRY THIS PLACE!!! Oh- and if you want to enjoy some drinks with your meals- the NR 6 TRAM- stops RIGHT OUTSIDE THE RESTAURANT!!!❤️💥

google_reviews.author: Helena K
google_reviews.text: It's a cute little place that offers delicious food, and a relaxing atmosphere. Great choice for a date. We'll definitely come back!

google_reviews.author: Gábor Dobrocsi
google_reviews.text: Really good food for reasonable price and I can only praise the service as well. Have been there for lunch for multiple times and I was always happy.  Highly rcommended.

google_reviews.author: Maryia
google_reviews.text: Was really tasty and we payed only 60 euros for 2 pizzas and 2 large desserts + 4 beers. Really worth to visit this place, nice small dog will welcome you on the entry:)

google_reviews.author: Ione Ianniruberto
google_reviews.text: The owner of the restaurant was very rude. She spilled water on a girl at our table, saying, "This is karma" over a misunderstanding the night before. At the end of lunch, we asked if we could pay separately by card, but after telling us, she started getting angry, saying we had to pay in cash. Then she started saying she had reserved the table for us, putting some famous designers at the tables outside. It's a shame there were no tables outside, and no one was there for lunch except us. The pizza is good for an Austrian pizza, but it's not worth having to endure such rude comments during lunch.

google_reviews.author: Máté Cser
google_reviews.text:
Perfect pizzas, great service. I recommend booking in advance because it is a small restaurant and it's also quite popular (for a good reason).
We ate dinner after a hot day and it was still very warm inside, the place could use an air conditioner. But that's my only complaint. Also big shout-out to the staff for working in this hot weather and still being so nice at the end of their shift.

google_reviews.author: Anastasiia Vasylieva
google_reviews.text:
The staff and owner extremely rude and disrespectful.

We came to the restaurant on a Sunday afternoon. It was completely empty—no other guests except our family.

We ordered two pizzas for the kids, as only they were hungry. However, the waiter seemed very disappointed with our small order. She later returned and told us that they could only offer takeaway service, as the tables were reserved for larger orders.

This was quite shocking, especially considering that the restaurant was empty and there were at least three other vacant tables.

We were truly surprised and disappointed by this experience….

google_reviews.author: Weng Ian
google_reviews.text:
I have the happiest time here tonight. With the lovely family hosting with food from heaven.

Strongly recommend this pasta lasagna !

google_reviews.author: Kei Ma
google_reviews.text:
Ther Ramen is wonderful, creamy soup, taste good, sercice is good, and with English Menu too. It almost taste like in Japan.
I assume it is Chinese own as the staff there speaks Mandarin.

google_reviews.author: Francesca
google_reviews.text: One of the best ramens that I’ve had in Europe. Really good portion size, great flavours. The broth was super creamy and noodles were cooked perfectly. The dessert menu was small but good selection. I had a cheesecake which was so light and not too sweet, the perfect amount of richness after a filling ramen.

google_reviews.author: Pimrawee Jearanai
google_reviews.text:
We went there for dinner. Food was really good, fast and warm. Fried chicken was really crispy and beef in hot pan was soft. Sushi is okay but not special.
Rice was not include with your dish, you had to order it extra. The portion of rice was quite big so I would say 1 is enough for 2 persons.
Mojito drink without alcohol was good and fresh but a bit too small for the price.
Overall it was a good place to visit when you are in Graz but we had to wait long for a bill.

google_reviews.author: Ivet Hornackova
google_reviews.text: Friendly staff, quick service and good price/quality food. We stopped by for dinner, had sushi and chicken in hot pot. The food was well made and there was plenty of it. We were super full after it :))

google_reviews.author: Rea Rubio-Stock
google_reviews.text: Did not disappoint us!👍🏻 Hubby and I was very satisfied and ate most. I even forgot to take a photo of poke bowl salmon that I also recommend😍

google_reviews.author: Kei Ma
google_reviews.text:
Ther Ramen is wonderful, creamy soup, taste good, sercice is good, and with English Menu too. It almost taste like in Japan.
I assume it is Chinese own as the staff there speaks Mandarin.

google_reviews.author: Francesca
google_reviews.text: One of the best ramens that I’ve had in Europe. Really good portion size, great flavours. The broth was super creamy and noodles were cooked perfectly. The dessert menu was small but good selection. I had a cheesecake which was so light and not too sweet, the perfect amount of richness after a filling ramen.

google_reviews.author: Pimrawee Jearanai
google_reviews.text:
We went there for dinner. Food was really good, fast and warm. Fried chicken was really crispy and beef in hot pan was soft. Sushi is okay but not special.
Rice was not include with your dish, you had to order it extra. The portion of rice was quite big so I would say 1 is enough for 2 persons.
Mojito drink without alcohol was good and fresh but a bit too small for the price.
Overall it was a good place to visit when you are in Graz but we had to wait long for a bill.

google_reviews.author: Ivet Hornackova
google_reviews.text: Friendly staff, quick service and good price/quality food. We stopped by for dinner, had sushi and chicken in hot pot. The food was well made and there was plenty of it. We were super full after it :))

google_reviews.author: Rea Rubio-Stock
google_reviews.text: Did not disappoint us!👍🏻 Hubby and I was very satisfied and ate most. I even forgot to take a photo of poke bowl salmon that I also recommend😍

google_reviews.author: Arturo Castro
google_reviews.text: If you wanna have a delicious dinner, excellent attention, generous portions.

google_reviews.author: Alejandro Almiron
google_reviews.text: With my friends we have such an amazing dinner at this place. Highly recommended.

google_reviews.author: Jacki Hafellner
google_reviews.text: Ordered 4 pizzas for my son’s birthday. We have tried so many pizza deliveries in our area and already had some great options. From a recommendation from a friend we tried Don Alfredo and we will not stray again! So good! Fair prices too. They were super overloaded with orders today but ours came fresh, perfect, warm. Very happy customers!

google_reviews.author: Paweł Bednarczyk
google_reviews.text: I have been waited for my order for almost 2 hours. And right before restaurant closing I received message about delivering the food. I didn't received it. I put complain in liferando app. I hope that my cash will be returned. But the worst was that I have been left without food.

google_reviews.author: Наталия S
google_reviews.text: The best pizza I have eaten in Graz.

google_reviews.author: Hemanth Acharya
google_reviews.text: Just had the Indian dog and the fries. Simply brilliant stuff. The fries were crispy with a bit of spice thrown in. The falafels in the Indian dog were super crispy and fresh and the caramelized onions were a brilliant addition. Loved it and will come back for sure!!

google_reviews.author: Robert Schäfer
google_reviews.text: Fantastic food truck with incredibly friendly and super-fast service! The quality is top-notch across the entire menu! I find the prices perfectly reasonable for what you get. Whenever I'm in the area, I always enjoy stopping here! Thanks to the owner and his team.

google_reviews.author: Tuned1
google_reviews.text: World-class! Very good burger. The buns are excellent. The meat-to-toppings ratio is perfect. A positive surprise... pumpkin seed oil in the sauce.

google_reviews.author: Ramona Schobegger
google_reviews.text:
The owner is incredibly friendly and accommodating!
The food was absolutely amazing!
We can definitely recommend it!
All the best!

google_reviews.author: Katrin Sommer
google_reviews.text: The owner was very friendly, the Indian (falafel) hot dog and fries were excellent :) The sauces are homemade—I think that's really great! Good value for money.

google_reviews.author: Carina
google_reviews.text: I am disappointed really! We ordered from foodora, the quesadillas with vegetables looked yummy! For my surprise, it got delivered with frozen vegetables like carrots and peas instead of plenty of fresh paprika as shown on the display picture. The taste was blend, where were the spices?? I really wanted to like it, but it was just ok.

google_reviews.author: Reinhard Ott
google_reviews.text: Can only agree with the other reviews. Tried both the burrito and quesadillas. Both were complete freezerware, bland, little cheese and no texture, just mush really. Only positive thing I can say is that the staff are very friendly.

google_reviews.author: Pedro S.
google_reviews.text: Great food, pretty selective options. As a Mexican far from home this helps ease the flavor I’ve been missing. The only gripes I have are the prices which are understandable and they should really add a pico de gallo side. All in all an amazing place for a good meal 👍

google_reviews.author: Lorenz B
google_reviews.text:
The taste is alright, nothing special but also not revolting. What really upsets me is the size and price of the food. The Burrito is about the size of a small Dürum for twice the price in Graz.

If the Burrito was as big as a Burrito should be, then 12€ would be justified, but as things stand no

There is basically no Salsa and no sour cream in it, even though it's mentioned on their menu. Also who the hell puts peas and carrots in a Burrito?

google_reviews.author: Luan D
google_reviews.text: There’s a vegan option for every dish available 👍 The vegan burritos we had were well toasted and wrapped, yet they lacked in taste insofar as neither the veggies nor the guacamole they use are freshly prepared. The burrito filling tastes overwhelming like tomato sauce. The vegan soy chunks have a nice texture but don’t taste like anything either. Regrettably, the burritos are rather overpriced (almost 13€ each), especially considering their noticeably small size.

google_reviews.author: Manfred Wisniewski
google_reviews.text:
Good Ramen, Udon, Bun and nice lemonade in a street setting.
The food is nice with fresh ingredients but lacks the depth I know from really great Ramen.

google_reviews.author: Mariam Hambardzumyan
google_reviews.text:
A little ramenbar on Jakominiplatz, full of various Asian food options. I was surprised to find kimchi, tteokbokki, bibimbap, jajangmyeon, gyoza, ramen, summerrols, hot pot, mochi - all in one place and with VERY convenient prices.
The Yasai ramen I ordered was very good, the portions are huge here. The ingredients were fresh and tasted nice together.
The only things I didn't quite like was the fact that the place is very small, and you can pay only in cash.
Overall, I think I might visit again, as the food and the prices are really worth it!

google_reviews.author: bluebardot
google_reviews.text: I always get their rice bowls and I love the variety so much! Very good price and the lady always puts so much food which I am happy about since I am a fan of their bowls. Great service an delicious food

google_reviews.author: Aneta Pawlik
google_reviews.text: Such nice staff!! I came here for ramen because I got recommended this place several times. Delicious food! I went with tonkatsu ramen and the only regret I had was that I could not fit in more than one bowl.

google_reviews.author: Piotr Staniszewski
google_reviews.text: Good ramen and choice of similar Asia dishes!

google_reviews.author: Celina Koch
google_reviews.text: Ordered food, waited two hours, and the food was cold. The spring rolls were rock hard and inedible. If you have to wait two hours, I think they could offer a discount.

google_reviews.author: Roland Aigner
google_reviews.text: I ordered through Lieferando, received the wrong food, and despite promises to deliver the correct food, it never arrived. I advise everyone not to order from here!

google_reviews.author: Azra Zivanovic

google_reviews.author: Katharina Trestler

google_reviews.author: Usama Hassani

google_reviews.author: Guilherme Cavalcante

google_reviews.author: Djordje Skakun
google_reviews.text: The food is alright, for the price the portions could be bigger. They were better earlier, the prices are always increasing and the portions are always getting smaller. The sight is really good if nothing.

google_reviews.text:
They do not accept card payments for weeks now. They cannot handle the membership and students discounts without it, and their way of handling cash is very poor.
Portion sizes are OK but not spectacular for the money.

google_reviews.author: Ashok Samraj
google_reviews.text: Went there for a team lunch during my visit to Graz. The place was beautifully with a view of the mountains and clock tower. Food was just okay, nothing that stood out.

google_reviews.author: Martin Salcher
google_reviews.text: Nice place/view. Cheap and high quality food. TASTY

google_reviews.author: Felix Suma
google_reviews.text: Just one second after I entered the restaurant, the waitress was already rude to me. Her tone of speaking was incredibly unpleasant. I just left after that. The restaurant was empty by the way, which can be a bad sign.

google_reviews.author: Răzvan Marian Dinu
google_reviews.text: Best In Graz

google_reviews.author: PADURE GHEORGHE
google_reviews.text: Super

I disturbed the waitress while she was working, she couldn't click the tiktok button and she started to be rude. I didn't even order anymore, I went somewhere else. I would recommend anything else in the area, just don't try here. Disappointed 👎🏻

google_reviews.author: Flaviu Ludusan
google_reviews.text: No thanks! I've never experienced such a waitress before. Incredibly rude. We interrupted her while she was doing nothing. We left immediately; it's unacceptable to treat customers like that! I wouldn't even give one star, unfortunately that's not possible…

google_reviews.author: Lisa Ifkovits
google_reviews.text: Super tasty, juicy burgers, perfectly seasoned fries, large portions, and excellent value for money. We'll definitely order and come back!

google_reviews.author: Zaricin Ivo
google_reviews.text: Imbiss + Zustellung (große Karte)

google_reviews.author: Kaiser
google_reviews.text: Never had such a bad burger! The bread was dry, the cheese was tasteless, the lettuce, tomato, and other ingredients were bland, and the meat was tough and like an old shoe sole! I'm sorry, but if I could give it 0 stars, I would do it immediately!

google_reviews.author: Samuel H
google_reviews.text: Very nice owners, excellent food, and long opening hours!

google_reviews.author: Anfisa Bobylova
google_reviews.text: The food is Ukrainian and so delicious! The owners are very friendly and nice! The prices are top!

google_reviews.author: HUMAN!
google_reviews.text: 10/10. Amazing food — shashlik, shuba, and borscht are absolute masterpieces.

google_reviews.author: Pavlo Liakhovskyi
google_reviews.text:
I wanted to go to a cafe with friends and have lunch. There were very few tables and most of them were reserved. In the meantime, one of the tables at which people were sitting became vacant, we asked the owner of the establishment to sit at this table but he said that we could not because all the tables were reserved, some kind of nonsense🤦‍♂️…

The owner did not speak English, and my friends and I are foreigners, it was good that I could at least somehow speak German with him, but here a second problem arose on the spot. He said that you can book a table at 16:00, but it was already 15:59. I say - then you can book a table because it is already 4 pm, he says - no. I show him my watch and he almost shouts - no! As I understood, he speaks bad not only English, but also German because it is very difficult to confuse "sechzehn (16:00)" and "sechs Uhr (18:00)"🤦‍♂️🤦‍♂️🤦‍♂️.

We did not even have lunch, but we already got a bad impression, so we turned around and left. Honestly, it's really sad that the only restaurant of my native cuisine in this city has SUCH BAD staff. Even though I'm from Ukraine, I doubt I'll actually come back here again, and NEVER with my friends (they aren’t from Ukraine)! Thank you sarcastically for ruining the mood for the next 15 minutes👎👎👎!

The only thing I want to say to this restaurant is to work with your abnormal staff. It is very unpleasant when customers are shouted at. If your staff treats customers like this, why haven't you fired them yet?

And yeah, really thank you to the guy who makes doner in the another place across the street who returned the good mood to us💪🌯!

google_reviews.author: Eduard Vaisman
google_reviews.text: Very tasty dishes served in an interesting way, napoleon and honey cakes are amazing not over sweetened as in a supermarket. The staff is really nice and polite. If you want to have a proper homemade-like lunch for a reasonable price, then it is totally worth visiting.

google_reviews.author: Liam Hall
google_reviews.text:
Food is very good and it’s refreshing to have something that isn’t so salty like the rest of food in Austria.
Their tea is also the closest thing to an English cup of tea I’ve had in Austria so far.

The downside is their English service. The man doesn’t understand any English but the woman does understand enough.
However, the man would rather argue with you in German than ask for the women to translate so be warned.

google_reviews.author: Jyothish Atheendran
google_reviews.text:
Review of The Burger Factory

Date and Time of Visit: Wednesday evening at 5:30 PM

Crowd Level: The restaurant was about half crowded when I visited, which provided a comfortable and relaxed atmosphere.

Food Ordered:
I opted for the spicy beef burger and cheese fries with spicy mayonnaise. Both dishes were delightful. The beef burger had just the right amount of spice, and the patty was juicy and flavorful. The cheese fries were crispy, and the spicy mayonnaise added a perfect kick to them.

Service:
The staff's service was exceptional. They were attentive, friendly, and efficient. They made sure we had everything we needed throughout our dining experience.

Cleanliness:
The washroom facilities were notably neat and clean, reflecting the restaurant's commitment to hygiene.

Payment Options:
I appreciated that they accept card payments, making transactions convenient for customers.

Accessibility:
The Burger Factory is conveniently located near the tram stop, close to the art university, making it easily reachable for both locals and visitors.

Dining Options:
The restaurant offers both dine-in and takeaway options, catering to different preferences.

Special Features:
One notable aspect of The Burger Factory is its provision of vegan options, catering to a diverse range of dietary requirements. Additionally, they prepare food on demand, ensuring freshness, although this might entail a bit of waiting time. The ambience of the place was also really calm and vibrant.

Multilingual Staff and Menus:
The staff is proficient in both English and German, accommodating a wider range of customers. Moreover, the availability of signage and menus in both languages enhances accessibility for non-native speakers.

Professionalism:
I appreciated the periodic service checks conducted by the staff to ensure that our dining experience was satisfactory. This attention to customer satisfaction reflects a high level of professionalism.

I also noticed that before billing, they cross-check everything with the customer which shows a higher transparency and also avoids confusions.

Beverage Options:
In addition to their food offerings, The Burger Factory serves a variety of alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages, providing a well-rounded dining experience.

Overall, my experience at The Burger Factory was highly positive. From the delicious food to the exceptional service and cleanliness standards, it's evident that this establishment prioritizes customer satisfaction. Whether you're craving a hearty burger or looking for vegan options, The Burger Factory is definitely worth a visit.

google_reviews.author: Borbala Stuber
google_reviews.text: Very tasty burger in different styles. There are vegan and kid's burgers too. From the side dishes I can recommend the classic fries and the sweet potato fries, they're much more delicious than normally. Truffle mayo is a must if you're a truffle fan. Soft drinks, wine and good beers are on the menu too. The service lady was very very friendly and competent. The food arrived surprisingly fast, which is an advantage with starving kids.

google_reviews.author: Pokec329
google_reviews.text:
Absolutely amazing place, especially in summer! The outside terrace has a great vibe and setting and the burger here was really good as well. Special thanks to the guy serving there, he was really quick and kind even in english.
Couldn't reccomend more, 11/10 evening.

google_reviews.author: Maria Boltenko
google_reviews.text: Burger was very nice, the buns were small and tasty, perfect quantity of salad in a burger, and the meat was delicious also the meat was 40% of the burger. Stuff spoke English. Music was not too loud. I would recommend to take the homemade lemonades.

google_reviews.author: Andraž Hajdenkumer
google_reviews.text: I came here because it was recommended by a friend and I can say it is very good. The best burger in graz!

google_reviews.author: Silvo Katalenić
google_reviews.text:
Ask immediately for the sechuan menu. Very kind, really good and carefully prepared simple food.

Room for improvement on the ambient side, but nothing that pokes out too much.

google_reviews.author: Oh Josh
google_reviews.text: Very clean environment, and no oily smell at all  at dining area. The owner served very nicely fresh Chinese flavor food. It’s a charm in Graz. Recommend on the ala carte: 地三鮮 is the best ❤️

google_reviews.author: prashant dekate
google_reviews.text: The best Chinese food I have had outside china. Also the vegetarian/vegan options was sooooo tasty. The owner was kind enough to also make a vegetarian huo guo ( hot pot ) for us. We will come here always when we crave Chinese food now.

google_reviews.author: Ivy Yang
google_reviews.text: I cannot believe that I actually finally ate some authentic Chinese Sichuan dishes in Graz! It’s been soooooo hard to find any authentic ones except the buffet. Here is the heaven for life in Graz and I’m so proud of them to introduce real Chinese dishes to Austria. Super delicious and super authentic and super friendly staff, making people feel like home totally. Chinese restaurants should all be like this one, daring to show the authentic dishes, not just soy sauce = Chinese dishes. Love it!

google_reviews.author: bluebardot
google_reviews.text:
I love getting bowls from this place as they have big, tasty portions and very much affordable. I feel like starring in a K Drama when I eat in hahaha
I highly recommend.

google_reviews.author: Oliver Lengyel
google_reviews.text:
Extra kind staff, shisha is small but really tasty and medium smoke. Drinks are good price. Let's go GS& Sallai 😉
Greetings from Hungary

google_reviews.author: D. Maicovski-Augustinovic
google_reviews.text:
Here is a polished English review you can use:

⸻

I visited Papyon Shisha Lounge again today with my wife, and once more we were impressed by the exceptional service. The staff were incredibly attentive, friendly, and made us feel truly welcome from the moment we arrived.

The cocktails were absolutely perfect — beautifully prepared, well-balanced, and full of flavor. The shisha was smooth and enjoyable, just as we expected from this place.

Papyon Shisha Lounge remains one of our favorite spots to relax and unwind. Highly recommended for anyone looking for great shisha, amazing cocktails, and outstanding service!

google_reviews.author: Sefa Yalcin
google_reviews.text: By far the best place in town! Everything here first class from the shisha flavours to the service. Staff are very friendly and make you feel welcomed. Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: Toni J
google_reviews.text: Very comfortable and nice atmosphere. Great shisha quality and always a quick service!

google_reviews.author: Stefan Zink
google_reviews.text: Nice bar with excellent service. Perfect to sit and chat and enjoy a chill afternoon. Thanks Patricia for the great hospitality!

google_reviews.author: Nikolas Hansbauer
google_reviews.text:
Very friendly staff and a nice location. The appetizers were very good (try the bruscetta!) and the desserts were also tasty. The main courses (chicken / fish filet) were a bit dry for our liking but still OK.

My only negative point concerns the building itself. The ventilation of the restaurant isn’t great, leading to a very strong fried / oil & grease smell from the open kitchen. (Genuinely had to wash & hang out our clothes after our 2 hour visit.) 👀 Not sure if mgmt. notices this anymore, but could be improved.

All in all a pleasant evening though.

google_reviews.author: Angelina Minalto
google_reviews.text: It’s literally the most delicious and beautiful place I’ve been for a long time. And I’ve visited a lot of good places. The food is perfect, it tastes amazing and it looks even better! People that work here are the most friendly and caring ever. Definitely come back and I really recommend you to go there! ♥️ P.s. Chiara is the best waitress that gave us the top service!

google_reviews.author: Matthew Lemetteil
google_reviews.text:
We ate by chance at this restaurant and what a nice surprise!
Great service, great quality price ratio, you can choose between small and big portions, also for the main course, which I recommend if you’re not too hungry and yet want to go for three courses. I highly recommend!

google_reviews.author: Iva
google_reviews.text: The beef tartare was excellent. We ordered two. Waitress also very sympathetic.

google_reviews.author: Nemanja Stamenic
google_reviews.text:
Toni is the best waiter ever!
Will definitely come back because of him.

google_reviews.author: Julian Jank
google_reviews.text:
Unfortunately, it's very hidden in the tennis club! - It's not signposted outside!!

Spoiler, I'm a Wilding fan! I think the new Wilding on the quay is really cool! You sit there by the tennis court, enjoy a "Speck'n'Ei" (snack and egg) and a beer, and watch live tennis ;) and the lady who runs the place is super nice and dedicated! She brings a really good vibe and is just really great. I'd love to go back :)

google_reviews.author: Johannes der Jünger
google_reviews.text:
We were frequent guests there (practically every day since it opened in December 2023). Unfortunately, the quality has steadily declined since then – though this is also heavily dependent on who's working in the kitchen or serving. The quality fluctuates considerably, but overall, it has (unfortunately) deteriorated significantly. The tables, etc., are often sticky or still covered in dishes, etc. – it takes a very long time for them to be cleaned. Another drawback is that after a visit (if you sit inside), you smell like you've fallen into a deep fryer.

There are also no suitable high chairs for small children – a high chair might cost a few euros, but apparently, they don't consider it necessary.

Conclusion: Unfortunately, the restaurant has declined significantly – we won't be coming back. Sadly, there aren't any real alternatives in the area – so we'll just have to drive somewhere else again.

google_reviews.author: Gulden Fried
google_reviews.text: Wilding - great food and a super nice waitress. What more could you want?

google_reviews.author: John Kaxos
google_reviews.text: Wonderful gyros in the heart of Graz. The boys attention to detail and outstanding hospitality was much appreciated. Most importantly the quality of the gyros was as good as anything you will enjoy in Athens. Seating inside is available to escape the cold outside and enjoy your gyros in comfort as it was intended.

google_reviews.author: BLobstein
google_reviews.text:
The food was super fresh and delicious.
The restaurant is very clean and well managed. It is the best Greek gyro meat I've ever tasted.

google_reviews.author: bluebardot
google_reviews.text: Before they disappeared in 2024 and another kebap shop took over, this was the best gyros place in Graz. Fries were fresh and not frozen, the gyros was bigger and less of a price. When they returned in 2025 they changed some of the stuff, and not necesarilly better: fries became frozen fries and not the fresh ones like they used to, the meat has too much oregano flavour and the tzatziki is not as abundant as it used to be. It's a shame they had to cut down on these details

google_reviews.author: Hung Nguyen
google_reviews.text: Food is nice and the owner is amazing. What a friendly guy he is. Feel nice everytime i stop by for a gyros after training.

google_reviews.author: Moe Sam
google_reviews.text: Just tried out the new kebab spot in Graz—absolutely delicious! The flavors are spot-on, and the meat is perfectly seasoned. Definitely a must-visit for kebab lovers!

google_reviews.author: Dan
google_reviews.text: Very good! Polite  friendly service, and a delicious apfelsaft gesprizt at a reasonable price. Danke schon Dan

google_reviews.author: Julia Koschinsky
google_reviews.text: Love this place! Go check it out if you haven't: Designed with attention to detail, welcoming everyone from kids to older ages, and constantly coming up with new ideas and improvements. My favorite: Thursday evening music, starting at 18:30 :) Thanks, Julia, Ivo and team!

google_reviews.author: Fabian Nowak
google_reviews.text: The best place to enjoy a Sunday morning breakfast. Service is super friendly and the Atmosphere is cozy and welcoming 👍

google_reviews.author: Opritescu Azghadi Elena
google_reviews.text: Nice cafe house in the centre of Statteg,

google_reviews.author: Eva Maria Glanz-Possert
