google_reviews.text: Good coffee, special cakes and tartes, very nice place in shades.

google_reviews.author: D M
google_reviews.text: Fast service, the food is very good, suitable for a family outing because of the peaceful atmosphere.  The staff speaks Serbian, so communication was easy.  Since there were no free parking spaces, they let us park in a place reserved for the restaurant owner, which is why I give them a big plus.

google_reviews.author: Purple On Three
google_reviews.text: Well... What a wonderful evening!! Staying across the street at the NED Hotel and the wonderful young lady at our front desk recommended this amazing 🤩 restaurant.... We were late arriving and the owner, Ilham, told us the grill was cleaned BUT he didn't turn us away... He spoke to his chef and they decided to make us a delicious meal of white fish, roasted vegetables and a delicious sauce.... How very gracious!! The food was not only delicious, but the company was as well. We spent several hours chatting with Ilham, Elif and Adin while they were all working very hard. Excellent service! Then for dessert.....a honey cake that takes 50 hours to make!! Heavenly is how I describe it! Adin explained how traditional Bosnian coffee is made and Ilham showed us the family coffee bean grinder passed down through the generations. Can't say enough good things about this restaurant....I highly recommend it! We are only here for a few days but we will go back for more delicious coffee and honey cake. What a welcoming place... Stop in when in Graz.... Or better yet, make a special trip to Graz just to give it a try. You won't be disappointed! 🤗🙏💜

google_reviews.author: Vladimir Gajic
google_reviews.text: The best cevapcici in city, totally recommend to visit this place. Ambient modern and comfortable. Personal really polite and friendly, good job boys. When you finish with cevapcici, you must try homemade desserts. Medena cake is my favorite. Definitely we will visit this place again.

google_reviews.author: Mo Amanda
google_reviews.text: Wow, das Essen ist lecker . We are grateful for the whim that takes us to get there and the staff are second to none, friendly and hospitality. Highly recommended.

google_reviews.author: Angrish
google_reviews.text:
Absolutely amazing little spot, authentic Balkans food with great service to boot
Highly recommend

google_reviews.author: Nika
google_reviews.text: Truly delicious, fresh made food with reasonable prices! The personel and the atmosphere is also very nice! This place is truly a gem, would totally recommend!

google_reviews.author: bluebardot
google_reviews.text: Great food! Was happy to find such a great asian restaurant! Totally recommend

google_reviews.author: junyi guo
google_reviews.text: It’s very clean and very nice! The Ramen is very yummy. I like it very much!

google_reviews.author: Sara Golubić
google_reviews.text: The food is AMAZING, staff is sweet, they even give you tips on how to prepare the food from their store to get the most of it. I've been here few times and everytime they were nothing but excellent, can highly recommend.

google_reviews.author: David Malam
google_reviews.text:
Wonderful food & service
Quiet night

google_reviews.author: Scott Halaby
google_reviews.text: If you want great food and not leave hungry, eat here. The staff has very nice. The place was full with local people. I'm sure we were the only English speaking people there and everyone made us feel like home. The couple next to us even offered us some of their desert!  If you try this place you won't be sorry.

google_reviews.author: Rene Leitgeb
google_reviews.text: Top

google_reviews.author: Manuel Walzl
google_reviews.text: Herrvoragend!

google_reviews.author: Gerfried Zuser
google_reviews.text:
A quaint inn where time seems to have stood still, which isn't a bad thing.

The food is hearty, fresh, and very reasonably priced. Service is quick, and it's quite busy. Highly recommended.

google_reviews.author: Daniel Pratl (psYcocat)
google_reviews.text:
This place wasn't known to my family or me. However, we didn't regret our decision to eat here! The food was very good; even my mom raved about the roast pork, which doesn't happen often ;). The schnitzels (pork and turkey), the frittata soup, and the salads were all excellent! The cakes also looked delicious.

The service was friendly and efficient. They frequently checked if everything was alright.

Very good value for money. We'll definitely come back.

google_reviews.author: Jakob Gre
google_reviews.text:
The atmosphere is much nicer since the renovation. However, the food is rather poor. The daily changing pasta dishes are almost always bland, and penne in a watery milk and cream sauce with a few strips of ham are being sold as carbonara.

Some of the other main courses are good, but the portion sizes are usually inadequate (see photo!). At least one dish is already gone shortly after noon.

It's okay for a quick bite, but you can find higher-quality cafeteria food for the same price almost next door.

google_reviews.author: Tobias Kaiser
google_reviews.text:
The whole point of a canteen is clearly missed. We went there three times (each time between 12 and 1 pm), and each time there was only one dish left to choose from (and even that wasn't fully stocked).

The staff's explanation: they always run out of food at lunchtime because it's so busy.

google_reviews.author: Samuel Haneder
google_reviews.text: We've been there several times, but each time the advertised dishes were no longer available, and we had to make do with what was left. The food itself is only precooked and usually served lukewarm.

google_reviews.author: sarina pinczar
google_reviews.text: I went here once for pizza. The pizza with ham was really delicious, and the selection of drinks was also very good.

google_reviews.author: Joysn
google_reviews.text:
Unfortunately, I can't understand the positive feedback from the other reviewers. I've been there several times, on different days of the week and at different times, and it seems everything is pre-cooked, delivered, and then simply handed out. As a result, the food is usually lukewarm to cold. Even the pizzas, heated in the very small pizza oven (microwave?), aren't particularly appealing, and pasta dishes are always cold. Furthermore, the food service isn't very convenient. You can't really put your tray down while getting soup, and dressing the salad is also impractical. You're handed a bowl full of salad, which you have to chop up at your table first, and then return it for oil and vinegar to dress.

In conclusion: Not far away on the same street is FABERS, which has a really great cafeteria, and the prices are the same.

google_reviews.author: Anja Milicevic
google_reviews.text:
12/10, probably the best cocktails in graz!
amazing drinks beautifully done by really nice bartenders, also love the spooky vibe, definitely worth a visit!

google_reviews.author: Thao Pham
google_reviews.text: a very cool pub. We stayed in Graz only for 2 nights and we spent both at this pub. Waiter is super friendly and the drinks are spot on!

google_reviews.author: Amelie Wolf
google_reviews.text: Amazing cocktails, loved the vibe, barkeepers are very inviting and friendly:)

google_reviews.author: Judith
google_reviews.text: best drinks in graz! the staff is so nice and I have a great time, whenever I visit the bar - no matter if it’s a date, drinks with friends or just casual get together

google_reviews.author: No Ragretz
google_reviews.text:
Come for the drinks, stay for the unique interior, bathroom background "music" and the amazing staff. Trying the "freak of the week" is a must.
10/10 will come again.

google_reviews.author: grgrgr psctr
google_reviews.text: Great takeaway lunch, fair prices, very nice owners - glad to have them on campus!

google_reviews.author: Margarita Kniaziuk
google_reviews.text:
My favorite food on campus 🥰
And always good music!

google_reviews.author: Gudrun Turek-Lima
google_reviews.text:
The Unibites food truck, located right next to the university library, is quickly becoming an institution. The high-quality, incredibly tasty, and affordable lunch menu is available in both a meat and an equally delicious vegan option.

Bread rolls, sweets, and excellent coffee, prepared and served by a relaxed and friendly team, complete the experience in a pleasantly laid-back atmosphere. Always worth a visit.

google_reviews.author: Fridolin Springer
google_reviews.text:
Great location, great food, great vibes!
A new, creative lunch every day that tastes amazing and is definitely worth the 9.50! The coffee is great and definitely better than the vending machine.👍

google_reviews.author: Philipp Weismaier
google_reviews.text:
A very cool food truck with probably one of the best locations!
And of course, Flo's attentive service is a must. You feel very well looked after, and the food is top-notch!
Thank you so much 💪🏾🙂

google_reviews.author: Antwan Hommy
google_reviews.text: I had a panini and a cake which was pretty good. Customer service was very nice and the view fantastic.

google_reviews.author: Mark Mauthner
google_reviews.text: Had a delicious prosciutto-rukola panini and a chai tea for brunch. It was cool outside but sunny, so good all round. Fine, friendly service.

google_reviews.author: Jonas Halvorsen
google_reviews.text: Good food and service, a bit small paninis though

google_reviews.author: Dylan Wolf
google_reviews.text: Cute little eatery with a cozy vibe with great paninis.

google_reviews.author: holy j
google_reviews.text: Really kind service. Loved it

google_reviews.author: Shanette Seipt
google_reviews.text: I was in Austria last year in May visiting my family. One of our family friends took me to this place. The owner was so nice and gave us food even though the kitchen was closing. My friend lives close by and goes there all the time to meet up with his buddies. It was really nice to meet them and chat with everyone.

google_reviews.author: Veronika Tasic
google_reviews.text: This is a great bar & restaurant in a quiet neighborhood. The place was filled with very friendly local people who were happy to share recommendations. The owners took extra effort to serve us food even if the kitchen was already closing. We had tasty dinner with some nice local wines and relaxed chat with other patrons.

google_reviews.author: Michi Hofer
google_reviews.text: Cuisines are good and cheaper.

google_reviews.author: Engelbert Dornhofer
google_reviews.text: 1 A

google_reviews.author: Hans-Peter Woger
google_reviews.text: Beisl halt ;)

google_reviews.author: Gabriel Molina
google_reviews.text: I try the empanadas and they are very good. I come latin america and this ones make me remeber my country 😀

google_reviews.author: Dennis LaRose
google_reviews.text: I was craving a snack and passed by the empanadas in Citypark Graz. I thought I'd give them a try and was pleasantly surprised. Really delicious. I'd go back anytime. And the service was really friendly. Thanks again 😃

google_reviews.author: Van Helsing
google_reviews.text: Probably due to its location, this frozen product was overpriced and too small. A loose mass wrapped in a dry, brittle pastry case. Without a dip, it was only partially edible for me. The ingredients of the filling were unidentifiable. The lady on site was very friendly, hence the 2 stars.

google_reviews.author: Daniel Reusberg
google_reviews.text: I came across your site by chance. I ordered online and was more than thrilled. It's not exactly cheap, but the taste is truly excellent. My first time eating empanadas in Graz! I've only ever had them in Spain before. It brought a little taste of vacation right here at home. Thanks, El Gusto! I'll definitely order again.

google_reviews.author: Thomas Aschauer
google_reviews.text: The taste is absolutely fine, but unfortunately, it's completely overpriced. I ordered it at the "introductory price" of €22, and for that amount of money, I somehow expected to be somewhat filling. Four empanadas are a good but expensive appetizer. 100% of my six work colleagues, for whom I ordered, also agree that the price-performance ratio is poor.

google_reviews.author: Kelly Luff
google_reviews.text: What a great place! Fast friendly service all cooked and served by the owners themselves. Really great healthy food. Location is good and so is the setting. Lovely to sit and watch people passing by while sipping a great coffee. When done with the coffee, you have to try Omas Rumtopf Prosecco! We sat there on a very cold evening so we were served cosy blankets to keep warm. It’s a great little spot with great food. A must visit!

google_reviews.author: Florian
google_reviews.text:
Thank you to Edda and her husband for letting us celebrate our wedding with you.

The food—especially the vegetable lasagna—was delicious, and your service was impeccable!

From the warm welcome and greetings to the table decorations perfectly coordinated with our color scheme, everything was wonderful.

Your attentive and easygoing manner helped us have a carefree celebration. The option to pack everything up later was a huge help.

google_reviews.author: Philipp Grasser
google_reviews.text: We had a really lovely evening at Hillside, with delicious food and great hospitality!

google_reviews.author: Patrick
google_reviews.text: Based on the many positive reviews, I expected a lot more. I would consider the service, food, and ambience to be average, hence 3 stars.

google_reviews.author: Emilia M
google_reviews.text: We visited Hillside today and were amazed by how fantastic the food was. The owners really have a great feel for spices, which is evident in their dishes. They were absolutely delicious and exceptional. Highly recommended for vegans and vegetarians! They also offer many local and regional products. The premises and location are perfect as well.

restaurants.name: Maroni

google_reviews.author: Kaya M
google_reviews.text:
The best Maroni in Graz!
Friendly atmosphere and chestnut are always fresh, hot and perfectly prepared.
An extra back for wasted shells is added.
100% recommend!!!

google_reviews.author: Silvia Hillbrand
google_reviews.text: Super

google_reviews.author: Thomas P. Egger
google_reviews.text: I bought a pack of chestnuts earlier. The quality is okay. The price was around €4.20 for 10 pieces.

google_reviews.author: Mario Brun
google_reviews.text: You could call them the annoying golden chestnuts, because they are so expensive and on top of that they are also annoying – or rather cheeky.

google_reviews.author: Klaus
google_reviews.text:
The owner is incredibly friendly, and the hot chestnuts are really hot and delicious.

And a second bag for the trash is provided as a matter of course.

restaurants.google_address: Herrengasse, Kiosk Ecke, Hans-Sachs-Gasse, 8010 Graz, Austria

google_reviews.author: Peter
google_reviews.text: The kebabs and döner were delicious. There is a game that if you stop the wall counter at exactly 10 seconds, you don't have to pay the price of the kebab. The place is clean, they mopped the terrace as soon as a large group left.

google_reviews.author: Liza Arco
google_reviews.text: Very nice atmosphere and food. The truffle Mayo was the highlight of this dish! Very tasty!

google_reviews.author: Artem Balamut
google_reviews.text: I loved the white souse

google_reviews.author: Jeoven Iwu
google_reviews.text: A wonderful place where you can go eat nice fast food such as kebab, pizza, etc. Their chicken is well grilled and their bread is the best in al of Graz.

google_reviews.author: Evangelos Koutsouradis
google_reviews.text: If not the best, one of the best in Graz! Very friendly service, good food. We exclusively pick up food for home. Well packed! And looks as hygienic as it can get! Thank you!

google_reviews.author: Max
google_reviews.text:
Got a TooGoodToGo bag. It contained three pieces of potato strudel with yoghurt sauce, a potato side dish, a small salad and a large piece of carrot cake (?) with chocolate glazing.

Everything was absolutely fresh and delicious, and a slightly earlier pickup time was no problem as well. Great choice for everyone who loves potatoes.

google_reviews.author: Barna Robert
google_reviews.text: I’d say everything is outstanding: clean, nice ambiance, and excellent service.

google_reviews.author: Dumitru Jalba
google_reviews.text: The food was delicious. The tuna wrap was was extremely good. Will eat here again.

google_reviews.author: Mousa Mohamad
google_reviews.text: The food was delicious with a wonderful oriental touch; everything was fresh and the prices were very reasonable. The restaurant owner is very friendly and welcoming. Everything was wonderful.

google_reviews.author: ٌRamy Husseinابن فلسطين
google_reviews.text:
We came from Vienna to visit Graz.
We looked for a fast-food restaurant worth visiting. The food, service, and friendly staff were unbeatable. I highly recommend it.

Sehr sehr gutes Restaurant zu empfehlen. Sind aus Wien angereist und kommen defintiv wieder!!!!

restaurants.name: Frankowitschi
restaurants.summary: Historic, family-run establishment offering fancy pastries, sandwiches with cured meats & more.

google_reviews.author: Vanessa L.
google_reviews.text:
Excellent service and great food. We came here because the place was recommended to us as tourists visiting Graz.
We cannot eat egg and garlic and the lady behind the counter was super helpful. Thanks a lot we really appreciated it

google_reviews.author: Joann Mistica
google_reviews.text: The bread is great. I can probably eat it as is and still enjoy it. With the toppings though, it's just perfect! If we lived closer to this place, we would buy here regularly. Simple, pretty, and delicious.

google_reviews.author: bluebardot
google_reviews.text: This is probably the most high end place in Graz. It doesn't get better than that. Food and drinks are excellent. Staff is friendly, efficient and go all the way to make your visit a memorable one. I am regular customer.

google_reviews.author: M.M Marie
google_reviews.text: This place was recommended by an acquaintance and it must have been my most favorite place to eat in Graz! The open faced sandwiches were delicious and I regret that we only ate there once. If I'm ever in Graz I would definitely return. Highly recommended!!!

google_reviews.author: Matthias Gutmann
google_reviews.text: Street life at it’s best, humming atmosphere ‘n’ all

google_reviews.author: Ezenwata Rita
google_reviews.text: The caramel chicken tasted so bad it was way too sour and the fried rice did not taste good at all .The shrimp was so oily and it did not taste fresh at all nothing I ordered was actually good 23€ wasted on food that was really bad. This is actually the first time I’m making a review fr like I was so disappointed, I was not expecting this

google_reviews.author: Julius Ott
google_reviews.text:
Please support this place, the staff is so adorable and the food is getting better and better. They are really trying hard. A big selection of Asian food and drinks which is a great alternative to the Spar and Billa monopoly. They also open until 10pm when most other places are closed.
It would break my heart if they had to close due to lack of customer 💔

google_reviews.author: Brennan Bell
google_reviews.text:
Can't say anything of the atmosphere as I ordered takeaway. For a restaurant claiming authenticity, I thought it was appropriate to try the Mapo Tofu, and was careful to specify that I want it done authentically, in German, English, and Mandarin.

Sadly, this was as far from authentic as imaginable. Setting aside the lack of meat in the dish, there was no doubanjian, and the pictures showing red chili are a complete lie as well -- there was barely any chili oil. The oil tasted cheap as well. The tofu was cooked well, that's all I can say positive of it. Flavour profile was so beyond wrong I can't even accurately describe the experience.

If you want authentic Chinese food, don't go here.

google_reviews.author: István Szakál
google_reviews.text: Cool place to eat

google_reviews.author: Pop Iulia
google_reviews.text: I order caramel chicken and it was one of the worst ones i have ever tasted. There was so much vinegar in it that i couldn’t eat it. I also order soju and got a beer instead.

google_reviews.author: Virginia Marisela Salinas Guajardo
google_reviews.text: The ice cream ist delicious!!! 🤤

google_reviews.author: Cristina Aucapiña
google_reviews.text: Really nice coffe!!

google_reviews.author: Artem Titov
google_reviews.text: Excellent service

google_reviews.author: Harald wurzinger
google_reviews.text: Very friendly staff, Wednesday meals are always special. I had tuna from the Sofisch, perfectly cooked. Small wine selection, reasonably priced, and clean.

google_reviews.author: Cornelia Hohensinner
google_reviews.text: Very nice and friendly. And very pleasant for a non-smoker that this establishment is smoke-free!

google_reviews.author: AMIT SINGH
google_reviews.text: The food was nice, with a moderate amount of spices. Vegetarians should try ladyfinger sabzi. The staff also speaks English. The meal portion is enough for one person. Service is fast. Unfortunately, the spiciness of the meal can not be customized. Overall, it's worth trying if you like Persian food.

google_reviews.author: Daniela Schinnerl
google_reviews.text:
This was our first time here today. We were curious and hungry.

The restaurant is very tastefully and authentically decorated.

We received attentive and extremely friendly service.

All the dishes were fresh and very flavorful. A feast for the eyes and the palate.

You should definitely come with a good appetite.

We will certainly be back again.

google_reviews.author: Leo W
google_reviews.text:
New Persian restaurant, overall a rather mediocre experience.

We had various savory yogurts as appetizers, which were good, but the bread served with them was pre-made flatbread from the supermarket. We then had grilled dishes, which were okay, but there was far too much rice compared to the two small grilled skewers. The various stews are not recommended. We had digestive problems after eating them, and the taste of the stews was very peculiar. The kitchen staff seemed somewhat overwhelmed, even though the restaurant wasn't very busy.

Conclusion: improvements are needed to offer truly good Persian cuisine.

google_reviews.author: Peter Hackmaier
google_reviews.text:
We were the only guests in the restaurant – and yet almost nothing went smoothly. The waiter, who also appeared to be the owner, seemed very drunk or at least completely unfocused. He was noticeably overwhelmed, completely forgot our drink order, and we had to wait an unusually long time before anyone even came to our table.

The ambiance was anything but inviting: Old, worn-out dishes sat on the neighboring table throughout our entire visit – apparently for quite some time. Especially in an empty restaurant, this is simply incomprehensible.

The food was palatable, but nothing to write home about. Overall, the visit was disappointing – we unfortunately cannot recommend this restaurant.

google_reviews.author: Agnes R.
google_reviews.text: The food was really good, and the portions were very large. There were also several vegetarian options. The staff was very attentive and friendly. Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: Nati G
google_reviews.text:
So food, drinks, and cakes were delicious, but I'm knocking a star because of the atmosphere. The place is small, and as a result the tables are cramped and the setup uncomfortable (sadly no comfy couch like you'd want in a nice café). You're right next to other people and and gets so loud with everyone speaking, it made me shy about speaking myself and force me to ask my boyfriend to repeat what he was saying multiple times.

BUT the cakes OMG! They are so food it will make me look past the uncomfortable setup and somewhat high prices to go back

google_reviews.author: Khrystyna Kai
google_reviews.text: A great and cozy place to have some breakfast or brunch! We ordered two different types of syrnyky – with pistachio and vanilla sauce –  they were amazing! The coffee also tasted great! We also like the service, the staff is helpful and friendly! Will definitely come by next we’re in Graz 🤩

google_reviews.author: eleanna top
google_reviews.text: Beautiful place with very kind staff and very tasty food! We went for breakfast and the plate was just amazing! Not to mention the delivious honig torte😍

google_reviews.author: N.B
google_reviews.text:
I checked all the reviews before coming and i cannot describe how disappointed i am.

We ordered shakshouka that was canned tomato paste mixed with water and 2 eggs swimming inside ( i come from the origin country of shakshouka) with 2 toasted pieces of bread. The bread was toast bread and not sourdough as in the menu.
Overall, it was terrible.

The cakes were beautiful but very average tasting.
2 waiters were serving over 50 clients at the same time. Asking for anything felt like a burden.
The place is very small and crowded.

This is the kind of places that looks good but actually isn't.

google_reviews.author: J R
google_reviews.text:
This was the most disappointing breakfast I've had in Graz. The English breakfast: beans were ice cold like they came straight from the can to the plate. The potatoes were not washed or seasoned and the sausage they use is two not so fresh frankfurter. If you are the owner - Google 'english breakfast' and compare your plate to any of the first images you find. I have a stomach ache from this.

The shakshuka was bland and also tasted like it was out of a cheap packet.

Took about 30 mins from sitting down to get the coffee and juice. Coffee has very little body to it. The food came out about 25/30 mins after that.

The ham and cheese 'grilled' sandwich is just cheap pan bread but still they somehow forget the grill ? Just a mushy mess no idea how you managed to melt the cheap cheese and not grill the bread.

The kitchen it also a chaotic mess that you can see from both sides if you look.

Didn't try the cakes, though the looked great - the whole place presents well online. Reality is something different.

google_reviews.author: Sara KJ
google_reviews.text: Nice little restaurant with self-made pasta next to the university. In my opinion the have the best spinach lasagna in the city.

google_reviews.author: Kari Cooper
google_reviews.text: A nice lunch spot near the university in Graz. It's a self service pasta bar inside. A little pricey, but delicious food.

google_reviews.author: Markus Sorger
google_reviews.text: Very close to the university restaurant. Decorated in a mix of modern and old Italian furniture style. Because of the closeness to the uni its kinda cheap but still delicious food. They don't have just pasta. Their variety goes from risotto, pizza, quiche and much more. Little bit crowded but because of the price and the location worth to eat there.

google_reviews.author: Patricia Brocker
google_reviews.text: Lovely place on Graz Strassgang .Hope they keep it going as not much nice eating places in the area.

google_reviews.author: Luka Guštin
google_reviews.text: Good food with Italian music. Some mini Italian experience in the middle of Graz.

google_reviews.author: Maja K H
google_reviews.text: Best spray stand in all of Austria!

google_reviews.author: Rebeca Monteiro Neves
google_reviews.text:
Very mordern selfservice bowl restaurant. The food is average, good portion. Suits for a good lunch time during work.
Many outdoor chilling space, good also for a drink after work.

google_reviews.author: Umut B.
google_reviews.text: The taste of food was actually perfect, I ate a Steak Bowl and My wife ate a custom one, even though we thought the food was overpriced, it was actually really great however, the portions are extremely small for its price, for a (yes "a") "kirchentomaten" we paid 1.50 euro extra, for 2.50 euros extra, we got half a tiny avocado. I'm not saying that they are "small" they are extremely small in european standards. We had to order another full dish from another place after 2 hours. My wife is 42 kg and I'm mid-proportioned 90 kg man. So no, not overweight. We are planning on going there in 3 weeks, so I will update if portions have been updated.

google_reviews.author: Roderick Cutajar
google_reviews.text: New place in town...food quality excellent and freshly prepared. Ambience very cool amd service always with a smile...it was my first visit and definitely will not be the last...Prices very resenable for the quality...compliments to the the Management and staff...till next time

google_reviews.author: martin lamar
google_reviews.text: Best bowls in town 🤩

google_reviews.author: Stefan Vucak
google_reviews.text: One of the best places in town!

google_reviews.author: LemLem Oliveira
google_reviews.text: I like the location and that it’s hidden in a courtyard - the presentation is also very appetizing and they offer a range of condiments for the pizzas. However I found the pizza slices to be bland and either soggy or not warm, so unappetizing. Feels like the dough is more fried than oven baked and the dough itself lacked salt. The man at the counter was doing his job but didn’t go beyond that. Overall, it’s nothing to call home about but I liked the concept.

google_reviews.author: Rula
google_reviews.text: The best pizza in town! The attitude, the atmosphere, the taste - is amazing! Thanks for having us, we will come back to taste more.

google_reviews.author: Amit Harpaz
google_reviews.text:
The pizza was delicious, but the desserts we took later were unforgettable.
The tiramisu was prepared in real time right on our table and also the canaloni so we took video. The owner is very friendly and funny guy and we chat a little bit. The experience is very well worth the visit.

google_reviews.author: Shivi Shrivastava
google_reviews.text: Delicious Authentic Apulian pizza slices!! New concept in Graz. Good desserts too!! Chilli oil is awesome:D

google_reviews.author: Jonathan Kaliwoska
google_reviews.text: Just fantastic. Great food. Good atmosphere and affordable prices. Marco the owner is a guy that lives for this. He makes you feel welcome and at home. A place to become a regular!

google_reviews.author: Terence Eden
google_reviews.text: The serve beer on floppy disks!

google_reviews.author: Madison Gillingham
google_reviews.text:
Great atmosphere, friendly staff, sunny terrace.
They have live music regularly, I'll be back!

google_reviews.author: He Wi
google_reviews.text: Simply lovely. Family atmosphere.

google_reviews.author: Walter Funkl G
google_reviews.text: Soup, please.

google_reviews.author: David Jerman
google_reviews.text: The pizza is great! Fluffy, tasty, just the right size - it just a really good napoli pizza! The selection of different pizzas is also reàlly good. Just don't expect the place to be like a resturant. It is a really small space with 3 tables and a couple of chairs.

google_reviews.author: Danira Bekrija
google_reviews.text:
Just ordered from the new Napoli-style pizza place via VelooFood, and holy smokes – this place is the real deal!
Fast, efficient, and the pizza was still crispy when it arrived!
Hands down, this is my new go-to for pizza nights.

google_reviews.author: Jerin Lawrence Joy
google_reviews.text: Pizza Diavolo, Pizza Napoli, best in the town. Please support them, crazy good!

google_reviews.author: Nora Buklevska
google_reviews.text: Best pizza in town, hands down!

google_reviews.author: Sophia
google_reviews.text: Super Pizza! 🍕

google_reviews.author: mithun pal
google_reviews.text: A Really delicious Indian vegetarian food ( breakfast and Lunch). Must visit place.

google_reviews.author: Sophie LAURRIN
google_reviews.text:
Really good wraps with indian bread/naan. Vegetarian and delicious.
Super nice people.
I recommand Bombay and Graz wraps.

google_reviews.author: manmeet singh
google_reviews.text:
Awsm Food and Services.

Love to visit Again aland also serving the food with Positive Attitude.

google_reviews.author: Deno vaire
google_reviews.text: Just loving this place! This is what makes our city so enjoyable :)

google_reviews.author: Cathrin Winter
google_reviews.text:
We stumbled upon this place by chance and decided to stay.

The kitchen was actually already closed, but we still got the best wraps ever—crispy on the outside, surprisingly delicious on the inside, vegetarian, with Indian-marinated grilled cheese, or the Styrian version with tasty scarlet runner beans.

Each wrap was €9.50—a real filling meal. They also had a wonderful selection of excellent local wines—for example, a glass of yellow Muscat for €5—and to top it all off, amazing coffee. 🙏

And then there was the wonderful, warm service—wine tasting, a friendly chat, and a complimentary bowl of curry and a small sweet treat straight from the owner's mother-in-law in India. Simply lovely, thank you! If we were from Graz, we'd stop by every day.

(There are no photos of the wraps; they were just too delicious to wait for.)

google_reviews.author: Yele
google_reviews.text: Recently enjoyed a delightful dining experience at this restaurant. The grilled shrimps were perfectly cooked, the risotto had a light and flavorful sauce, and the pizza, though not very crunchy, was still delicious. The tiramisu felt like a genuine homemade treat. The staff was incredibly friendly, and the atmosphere remained pleasant even when the restaurant was full, but not overly crowded. Highly recommended for a satisfying and enjoyable meal.

google_reviews.author: Julia Savina
google_reviews.text:
A very humble place with surprisingly good food. The concept is that you choose the main dish (7-9 euro) and serving includes also soup & salad (same for all the options). Food is unpretentious but very well executed - and the portions are essential
Service was friendly, but somewhat slow and inattentive - and they simply forgot to bring our salads
But in general I'd recommend this place

google_reviews.author: Richard Tommy
google_reviews.text: 1 server killed it, because she worked her tail off for the whole restaurant. I had the mussels (awesome) and my group had the salmon, (awesome) and the filet (not recommended)

google_reviews.author: Eugene Carbajal
google_reviews.text: Very good service. Food was delicious 😋

google_reviews.author: Jovi Pavlovic
google_reviews.text: they offer daily menus at affordable prices.  nice, quiet location near the city center

google_reviews.author: Celina Koch
google_reviews.text: Ordered food, waited two hours, and the food was cold. The spring rolls were rock hard and inedible. If you have to wait two hours, I think they could offer a discount.

google_reviews.author: Roland Aigner
google_reviews.text: I ordered through Lieferando, received the wrong food, and despite promises to deliver the correct food, it never arrived. I advise everyone not to order from here!

google_reviews.author: Azra Zivanovic
google_reviews.text: After waiting for two hours, I realized it wouldn't arrive. I ordered through Liferando and am now fighting to get my money back! Never again!

google_reviews.author: Katharina Trestler
google_reviews.text: Will not order again. Still no delivery after 2.5 hours. No phone number or anything to contact them with. Stay away.

google_reviews.author: Usama Hassani
google_reviews.text: After 4 hours still no kebab

google_reviews.author: Ivica
google_reviews.text: I ordered a Puntigamer today – unfortunately, it was completely warm. As a customer, I find it absolutely incomprehensible how anyone could serve something like that. When I asked, the waiter explained that the beer had only been bought that day – that may be true, but that's not my problem as a customer. If a beer isn't cold, it shouldn't be on the table. The mineral water was also barely chilled. Overall, a disappointing experience.

google_reviews.author: Jakob Gre
google_reviews.text: A small but fine menu, Prosecco on tap, and cold drinks. Everything is very cozy, no frills – just right for a kiosk like this!

google_reviews.author: Daniel Ivanovici
google_reviews.text: Very well prepared dishes in a traditional Austrian style. A real hub of the neighbourhood, but still quiet, relaxing and with a nice open air area.

google_reviews.author: Vetal Fiber
google_reviews.text: Gut

google_reviews.author: Andreas Goelles
google_reviews.text: Dear friends of refined Austrian home cooking! Here you'll find top quality at a fair price! Friendly, fast, cozy, and above all, incredibly delicious! The lunch menu is unbeatable, a strong recommendation!

google_reviews.author: Günter Pratter
google_reviews.text:
A hidden gem for outstanding, down-to-earth cuisine and warm hospitality

Gasthaus Wagner is a true treasure and comes highly recommended!

From the moment you arrive, you'll feel welcome and perfectly at ease.

The exceptionally friendly staff deserves special mention. You'll be served with a warmth and attentiveness that is sadly rare these days. Every request is promptly fulfilled with a smile, which significantly contributes to the overall positive atmosphere.

Gasthaus Wagner also excels in terms of value for money. The dishes are not only of excellent quality and lovingly prepared, but also fairly priced. You truly get your money's worth and leave the restaurant feeling you've received exceptional value.

Whether for a cozy dinner for two, a family outing, or a larger gathering – Gasthaus Wagner offers the perfect ambiance for every occasion and a cuisine that leaves nothing to be desired.

A visit is definitely worthwhile!

google_reviews.author: Roland Reicher
google_reviews.text:
A true gem in the culinary world. It's rare to find such good Wiener Schnitzel and Cordon Bleu.

And of course, the soups and salads are fantastic.

They really know how to cook here.

google_reviews.author: Mauricio Azevedo
google_reviews.text: THE place to have a coffee, chill, and appreciate the nice decoration and the art pieces that are displayed around this cozy cafe. The atmosphere is simply divine, with nice and friendly staff (obrigado, Lucy!). Delicious drinks and cakes. Definitely worth visiting!

google_reviews.author: Arina Arigato
google_reviews.text: Finally, a wonderful new spot on Lagergasse—a blend of art, literature, and café culture. The place is cozy and stylishly decorated. The owners are incredibly friendly, and they serve Brazilian snacks and drinks that you can enjoy either inside the artistically designed interior or on the quiet, comfortable courtyard terrace. Highly recommended!

google_reviews.author: Fellini
google_reviews.text: Great place! You notice that the owners put a lot of effort and love, to create a nice and chill atmosphere. Last time I was there a really nice latin music trio played live and made my stay even better. Don't forget to try the sweets and the brazilian snacks. Keep it up!

google_reviews.author: Soroosh Kianara
google_reviews.text: Authentic and wholesome gateway to Brazil! The friendly Brazilian woman answers all your questions patiently! 🇧🇷💛💚

google_reviews.author: Samara
google_reviews.text: Very nice place with delicious food and welcoming service.

google_reviews.author: Anna Novik
google_reviews.text: wonderful place. the food was very tasty, orange wine was great. the atmosphere inside is calm and friendly. the waiter guy was incredibly nice and smiling. will recommend.

google_reviews.author: Elke Tomašič
google_reviews.text: such a lovely refreshing place in graz. a huge variety of drinks, all the cocktails made with great attention to the detail. the biggest plus for me are the vegan options on the menu, even the churros are vegan! the food might feel a bit experimental for some but i feel like they do it super well so don't be afraid of trying even if you are not familiar with all the ingredients. the staff is super attentive and professional too. a reservation might be advised.

google_reviews.author: Maja Gajić
google_reviews.text: Quite expensive place. Drinks are good here. However, the food choice is small and its quality depends on what you choose. Fries are really nice and they are accompanied by a homemade sauce, but other things I tried were not so good.

google_reviews.author: Filip Cesarec
google_reviews.text:
My dinner was sooo good. I loved the empanadas and the quesadilla was also tasty, great portion size! Cocktail presentation was fantastic. And then the best brownie with ice cream I had in a long time,  sweet & salty and hot & cold.
Love the quirky interior and little details, like using glass bottles as drink menus. The staff is so nice, great relaxed and friendly energy.

google_reviews.author: Sarah Haas
google_reviews.text: Really awesome. My colleagues and I enjoyed a very nice lunch there. The prices are moderate and the taste was really great. I love the location and decoration at this place.

google_reviews.author: FoodHopperGraz
google_reviews.text: The bread wasn't freshly baked, unfortunately, but it was still crispy and tasty. The meat was standard fare, the vegetables fresh, and the sauces not homemade. All in all, a standard doner kebab.

google_reviews.author: Mark M.
google_reviews.text: This isn't an Italian pizzeria, it's a Turkish place with ridiculous prices! Almost 6 euros for a kebab?? And by the way, no Italian pizzeria would offer kebabs... simply laughable.

google_reviews.author: Rahime Uyar
google_reviews.text: The Italian pizza chef made a great pizza and the staff were very friendly.

google_reviews.author: RomGro
google_reviews.text: Kebab was very good, we will be back ☺️

google_reviews.author: Dark
google_reviews.text: Food was very good :)

restaurants.name: Noodle King

google_reviews.author: Coucou Ola
google_reviews.text: We discovered this restaurant /take away place during an overnight stop. The portions are really large and prepared right upon the order, so you always get fresh food. The team is nice and welcoming. A good value for money.

google_reviews.author: Iris Kaa
google_reviews.text: We made a stop in this place before traveling further. Received our food quick. The noodles were very good 🇳🇱

google_reviews.author: Kseniia Yeremenko
google_reviews.text: the food was good and portions were pretty big. it’s a nice mix of asian cuisines. the service was great and quick.

google_reviews.author: Lukas holder
google_reviews.text: Good Asian food for good prices.

google_reviews.author: Natalia Perlak
google_reviews.text: Amazing

restaurants.google_address: Eingang Billa Plus, Triesterstraße 371, 8055 Graz, Austria

google_reviews.author: Rebecca Zalia
google_reviews.text: What can o say about this place. Booked in advanced for a table day before as I definitely wanted a table whe.n we arrived.  Staff were amazing very welcoming.  Spent over an hour here. Thank you for your hospitality.  And a must try is the classic Sachertorte. The menu offers a fantastic selection of breakfast and some light lunch options amd all made with fresh, quality ingredients. Definitely recommend.  I will add more photos of the meal hopefully when the photos are developed.

google_reviews.author: Bernard K
google_reviews.text:
Cafe Herzog is an absolute gem in the heart of Graz. From the moment you step inside, you're greeted with a warm, inviting atmosphere that perfectly blends classic Viennese cafe culture with a modern, cozy feel. It's the kind of place where you can comfortably settle in with a good book, meet a friend for a long chat, or simply watch the world go by.

The coffee is consistently excellent—rich, aromatic, and expertly prepared. Paired with one of their delicious pastries or a classic Sachertorte, it’s a truly perfect indulgence. The menu offers a lovely selection of breakfast and light lunch options, all made with fresh, quality ingredients.

What truly sets Cafe Herzog apart, however, is the service. The staff is incredibly friendly and attentive, making you feel right at home. They are always ready with a recommendation and a smile, which adds so much to the overall experience. Whether you're a local or just visiting, this cafe is a must-visit spot that embodies the best of Graz's hospitality and charm.

google_reviews.author: anupam
google_reviews.text:
Café Herzog is not just a coffeehouse, it’s an experience woven into the cultural soul of Graz. Located inside a beautifully preserved UNESCO World Heritage building herrengassee6, the café offers the charm of old-world Austria blended with a modern touch of elegance.

The aroma of freshly brewed  coffee welcomes you as you step inside, perfectly complemented by a menu featuring classic Austrian specialties – from delicate  house  made pastries to hearty traditional dishes. Each plate feels authentic and crafted with care.

What makes the experience unforgettable is dining with live piano music , creating a warm, timeless atmosphere that elevates your coffee moment into something truly special.The Staff are warm attentive and genuinely welcoming.

google_reviews.author: visar kika
google_reviews.text: A charming spot in Graz that brings a true Viennese dining atmosphere. The elegant yet cozy interior makes it perfect for both casual lunches and refined dinners. Service is attentive without being overbearing.

google_reviews.author: Ronald Stilting
google_reviews.text: I just had a cappucino in this top location and reputable establishment. The coffee was OK but this reputation and price level I had expected a waiter without stains on his -overly classic- waistcoat and Villeroy & Boch tableware that wasn't polished. It is all about details.....

google_reviews.author: David Salchenegger
google_reviews.text: closes at 9pm - came here for nothing

google_reviews.author: Lilly Zunic
google_reviews.text: Best "sirnica" (burek with cheese) in Graz right now! Friendly service, lovely restaurant.

google_reviews.author: Songül Halici
google_reviews.text: Everything is halal, they make it themselves, and their pastries and desserts are delicious. Friendly staff and a clean environment.

google_reviews.author: Stefan Hoedl
google_reviews.text: Very tasty burek and sweet dessert. (The pistachio croissant is highly recommended!)

google_reviews.author: Vladimir Vesic
google_reviews.text: Amazing burek, tri leće, baklava, and tulumba—and they even have boza! The service is very friendly, too. My favorite bakery in Graz.

google_reviews.author: Can Göcer
google_reviews.text: The entire experience was simply outstanding. From the friendly staff to the overall concept, I highly recommend the Boston Bar Lounge to anyone looking for a wonderful evening in a warm and inviting atmosphere. An absolute must for everyone!

google_reviews.author: Stefan Tesic
google_reviews.text: A beautiful restaurant with great attention to detail! It was my first time here and I was immediately impressed by the ambiance – cozy and very inviting. Ideal for relaxing, working, or simply enjoying yourself.

google_reviews.author: D. G.
google_reviews.text: A very nice new bar/lounge with very friendly staff and a great atmosphere. Plenty of comfortable seating both indoors and outdoors!

google_reviews.author: It's Black
google_reviews.text: A great place in a fantastic location, perfect for sitting and having a drink. The service is excellent — I highly recommend it!

google_reviews.author: Jozo Senjic
google_reviews.text:
The staff is very friendly, and the owner is very helpful and kind. The renovation has given the restaurant a real fresh look.

Highly recommended.

google_reviews.author: Zan Zeleznik
google_reviews.text: Relaxed atmosphere, good food, and helpful staff

google_reviews.author: Uriel Ventris
google_reviews.text:
Very nice and friendly staff, the food was delicious. The quality was also very good, and the portion size (burrito) was just right. The price is perhaps €1-2 too high for my budget, but still within an acceptable range.

In short:
Food was delicious, service was excellent, and the price was okay.

I'm already looking forward to next time; I'll be ordering the tacos. ;)

google_reviews.author: Sahel N Soudani
google_reviews.text:
We waited over two hours for delivery. The food arrived cold and was of very poor quality. Furthermore, the dish bore no resemblance to Mexican food.

The photo clearly shows the condition.

Very disappointing – unfortunately, I cannot recommend this service.

google_reviews.author: Siamak
google_reviews.text: The food we ordered had nothing to do with Mexican cuisine. In terms of taste and quality, it fell far short of our expectations. I would advise others not to order from here, otherwise they will very likely be disappointed.

google_reviews.author: Seb K
google_reviews.text: Nice staff, nice place. I thought the food was delicious. For that price, I would have expected three tacos instead of two. In my opinion, black beans absolutely belong in tacos. The contents were a bit lackluster. The quesedillas were good :)

google_reviews.author: Jojo Blubb
google_reviews.text: Nice place with good food. Nothing super special but good. They were friendly though.

google_reviews.author: Jacky V.
google_reviews.text: The pad Thai was tasty and filling. The staff members were polite, but they don't seem used to having tourists there. They were nice, and we had no problems. They just seemed confused by our presence somehow. There was a lot of fun 80s music playing when we went, and it wasn't crowded. I recommend this place.

google_reviews.author: Ornela Zdrava
google_reviews.text: Grand opening a success! Superb Thai cuisine, fresh ingredients, and very friendly staff! If you're looking for Thai food, this is definitely the place to go!! 🤩

google_reviews.author: Klaus Schiefer
google_reviews.text: A successful relocation from the former Easy Asia to the city center. The combination of restaurant (ground floor) and bar (lower level) on two levels is also a success (formerly UNO for "children of the 80s") – the food maintains its usual high and authentic standard (and it's still true: Thai spicy = Thai spicy). Well done, we'll be back!

google_reviews.author: Toni
google_reviews.text: Absolutely delicious food and friendly service. Thankfully, they offer the same wonderful Thai dishes as their previous restaurant, Easy Asia, on Albert-Schweitzer-Gasse.

google_reviews.author: C Daniel Nagy
google_reviews.text: They only accept cash, for which a small sign warns the guests. Nearest ATM charges 5 euro for cash withdrawal. I cannot imagine how they can get away not accepting a bank card. In my not so developed country it is mandatory to accept cards. So I was not expecting this in an Austrian shopping center in Graz. Interesting.

google_reviews.author: Zoki K.
google_reviews.text: Super!

google_reviews.author: Luke 83
google_reviews.text: Hebt sich hervor durch freundliches, aufmerksames Personal, raschem Service und super Produktqualität.  Hingehen, entspannen, genießen. Liebes Team,  weiter so. Gerne wieder. Empfehlung !!👍😊

google_reviews.author: Susanne
google_reviews.text:
We stumbled upon this shopping mall by chance during our visit to Graz.

Of course, we took a break at this café.

I have to say, the tall gentleman (excuse the expression 😋) was so incredibly friendly; you can tell he enjoys his job. You rarely find that kind of person. This company is lucky to have such wonderful staff.

It's a pleasure to have a drink there. We'll definitely be back.

google_reviews.author: Andreas Steiner
google_reviews.text:
A good café with a good selection of desserts.
The service was friendly and efficient.
My slice of Sachertorte was delicious, and the hot chocolate was also good.
According to my companions, the coffee is also very good, or rather, from a high-quality brand.

The price-performance ratio is also quite good for what you get.

google_reviews.author: Denis Malyshev
google_reviews.text: Really tasty, smells also good. Doesn't smell like the oil was used 10000 times like other fast-food joints smell

google_reviews.author: Tamás Kovács
google_reviews.text: Really good Hungarian lángos and kind staff. I really recommend to try it.

google_reviews.author: Felix Barka
google_reviews.text: Had an authentic hungarian lángos here, amazing taste.

google_reviews.author: Katarína Hájková
google_reviews.text: Delicious

google_reviews.author: Josef Ritz
google_reviews.text: Super

google_reviews.author: Lili Plöschberger
google_reviews.text: We waited two hours for the food. When I called after 1.5 hours, they claimed it was almost there. Half an hour later, I called again and they said it would be there in five minutes. Outrageous! Lieferando states a delivery time of 30 minutes. Do not order from here under any circumstances.

google_reviews.author: Andrea Kern
google_reviews.text: We ordered udon noodles with salmon for takeaway. It was ready at the agreed time and very good. We'd gladly order again!

google_reviews.author: Sigrid 9
google_reviews.text:
It doesn't work at all.

The order only arrives after 2 hours, and even then only after 2 extra phone calls.

google_reviews.author: Ivo Oršulić
google_reviews.text: We order a kebab pizza with beef meat,and when we come to pick it up it was chicken. Pizza was good but dont lie!

google_reviews.author: S
google_reviews.text: Since they don't have any way of contacting them I'll leave this here: I found a huge piece of wire in my kebab by almost swallowing it.

google_reviews.author: quar tierre
google_reviews.text: First and last time when I eat from there, the meat was not well done

google_reviews.author: Simon Arnfelser
google_reviews.text: Super kepab

google_reviews.author: urška klaneček
google_reviews.text: Always good and friendly staff.

google_reviews.author: Tilly of &Tilly
google_reviews.text: A cool bubble tea place! Classic as well as specialty flavors and nice staff, too. Yum!

google_reviews.author: engel child
google_reviews.text: Very nice bubble tea shop, they offer a variety amazing flavors, as well as limited edition bubble teas, which are always creative and delicious! Sadly I don't visit this bubble tea shop very often because it is quite far away from me, however it is always delightful to have little break at this place after shopping. I haven't tried the bubble waffles yet, but I can imagine how good they taste because the smell is just INCREDIBLE!!! The shop is very cozy and there's more space to spend some time there in comparison to other bubble tea shops.

google_reviews.author: Shine-Od Mongoljiibuu
google_reviews.text:
- The environment is cozy and comfortable.
- The staff seemed nice.
- The menu is broad and easy to understand (because it was in English)
What I really liked the most was that you can ask for the how sweet or cold you would like to drink.

google_reviews.author: Nadine Lombaard
google_reviews.text: A must-have treat for us when visiting Murpark. We love the Mr Oreo Bubble waffle and the Strawberry Bubble tea. Service is quick and staff is friendly! We don't speak fluent German and the staff is very helpful, they can also understand and speak English as well. Will recommend over and over!

google_reviews.author: Amelie 아멜리
google_reviews.text: Very nice little café. Got the bubble tea Lumos lotus. Just one euro more than the normal one. It tastes super sweet and there were biscuits crumbs inside. The staff were friendly too ☺️ I highly recommend it!

google_reviews.author: BlackfieldB
google_reviews.text: Bin regelmäßig in diesem Lokal und kann nur das Beste berichten. Eine umfangreiche Speisekarte, gekocht von der Frau des Wirts. Äußerst freundlicher und aufmerksamer Service (hauptsächlich Hr. Pire selbst)!! Ob am 2-er oder am 10-er Tisch - man fühlt sich überall wohl und rundum gut betreut!!

google_reviews.author: Andreas Zahrl
google_reviews.text: Friendly and quick service. The pizza was very good and the price was perfectly reasonable.

google_reviews.author: ElmarE E
google_reviews.text:
I think it's great that a fantastic, upscale café has finally found its place here AND that you can also get excellent food (I've even picked it up after calling ahead...no credit card etc. needed, just call).

5 stars - also for the espresso :)

google_reviews.author: Renate
google_reviews.text: Very nice restaurant with a beer garden, good coffee, and excellent ice cream! Very friendly service, we'd love to come back! Next time we'll try the extensive breakfast selection.

google_reviews.author: Jürgen Sternat
google_reviews.text: Of course, absolutely, and Pire's 😃✌️The owner himself is wonderful!

google_reviews.author: michael ankrisch
google_reviews.text: Perfect coffes

google_reviews.author: Christian Köck
google_reviews.text:
By far the most charming bar/café I've ever been to. Absolutely fabulous and incredibly cozy, and it's been far too long since I'd been there.

And once again, a huge thank you to both of you for the wonderful evening. I was the guy from the Philosopher's Center. And you saved my day. And my evening. And my night.

And anyway... thank you 😌

google_reviews.author: Arnold Klug
google_reviews.text: Well, what can I say? One of the best restaurants I've ever been to. It's great for young and old, and the service is very friendly!

google_reviews.author: Herbert Hamberger
google_reviews.text: Very friendly service and a great garden.

google_reviews.author: Manuela Janach
google_reviews.text: Beautiful garden.....Great to reach by tram 6. Stop at Moserhofgasse...Andrea and Annemarie are the kind souls here at the restaurant 😃

google_reviews.author: Jing Hong Okorn-Kuo
google_reviews.text: Cozy, casual, very friendly and very local. The beef tartar is a must-try! Don't miss their dessert too!

google_reviews.author: Markus Schnizer
google_reviews.text:
Sloppy service, long waiting, orders were forgotten and had to reordered. A couple who came 40 minutes later than us was served first, with kind of similar dishes.
Food itself is ok. But not worth waiting that long

google_reviews.author: Antonio De Sena
google_reviews.text: Nice little bar / gasthaus with home made receipt and food from the region.

google_reviews.author: Dieter Okorn-Kuo
google_reviews.text: best food. best wirtn.

google_reviews.author: An Ko
google_reviews.text: Phenomenales Beef Tatar! 🤗

google_reviews.author: soph h
google_reviews.text: Nice relaxed bar with a concert hall as well.

google_reviews.author: Benni
google_reviews.text: Cute relaxed student place with frequent live music.

google_reviews.author: Thomas Ulz
google_reviews.text: Perfect for a beer or 12 after a long day at TU Graz.

google_reviews.author: Hans-Peter Woger
google_reviews.text: Nice bar for a beer or two

google_reviews.author: Marko Kotur
google_reviews.text: Perfect

google_reviews.author: Restaurant Rewiever
google_reviews.text:
Great restaurant.It's not very elegant, but it's good as it is.
The food is really very tasty and the portions are huge.The service is attentive and fast. We were satisfied with everything.

google_reviews.author: Vitaliy Boyko
google_reviews.text: Very good gasthaus. Big portions

google_reviews.author: Tjaša Markočič
google_reviews.text:
We came here for a dinner, when we were visiting Graz with a company trip.
The service was the worst ever, the food was low quality, no taste and the atmosphere was awful…
It’s true that we came as a group of 55 people, but they seated as next to the bar, with drunk locals having their own “party” there.
The waitresses were spilling the soup when putting it on a table and the tiramisu was not even tiramisu, just the cream and cookies without coffee..
Low quality and bad experience..

google_reviews.author: Günther Prem
google_reviews.text: Super Service!!!

google_reviews.author: Alf Red
google_reviews.text: A restaurant with really good food and a cozy, home-style atmosphere. The staff is attentive and quick – especially the waiter, who responds to stupid questions with charm and wit 😂. All in all, a place I'd happily recommend!

google_reviews.author: inesgpunkt
google_reviews.text: Already fantastic, even though it's not even finished! They're still renovating inside, but you can already sit outside and enjoy the cozy beer garden, which you wouldn't expect to find standing in front of the entrance on Jakominiplatz. Very nice atmosphere, great drinks, and the friendliest waiter from Graz to Mexico!

google_reviews.author: Alexander Atzl
google_reviews.text:
**Great Evening at Steingarten**

I recently visited Steingarten and was absolutely thrilled! The beer was excellent, nice and cold, and poured perfectly. The music perfectly complemented the relaxed atmosphere – a really great choice! I especially want to commend the owner – super friendly and attentive, he took care of everything and made us feel welcome. All in all, a fantastic evening in a great location. I'll definitely be back! I especially loved the olive trees.

google_reviews.author: DI Sebastian Weiland
google_reviews.text:
We were here for the Aufsteirern party, and even though not everything was ready, it was a really fun day. They also had a really good roast pork for only €10!
The place has a lot of potential, is finally revitalizing this very central courtyard, and the very friendly and chatty owner adds to the charm.

google_reviews.author: Florian G
google_reviews.text: The garden was quite cozy and will surely be even more cozy once it's 100% finished. Unfortunately, your Vienna Kraft beer doesn't taste good at all. Thanks to the guys from Freigeist for bringing us a drinkable beer.

google_reviews.author: Klaus Piber
google_reviews.text: Fantastic new addition to Graz! It's already one of the city's best summer spots! Great home-brewed beer from VIENNA KRAFT! And after the EURO Pop-up, there will definitely be various food stalls.

google_reviews.author: Timea
google_reviews.text: The staff was very welcoming, they asked several times if everything was alright with the meals, they were truly caring. Our orders got brought quite fast, and the foods were delicious. Definitely a place which worths visiting!

google_reviews.author: Akshay Rao
google_reviews.text:
The food is really good, and the portion sizes are quiet large. Even if it can take a while, the food is certainly worth the wait.

We visited shortly after peak hour, and it definitely took a hot minute till we were noticed and got menus, then one of our drinks was forgotten. Food and desert were both very quick though, and the staff is super friendly.

While the outside seating is really nice, it's FULL of smokers - good luck getting any reasonable amount of clean air. The inside is quite charming too, and if smokers bother you, absolutely go inside! It's super cozy!

google_reviews.author: Daniel Babo
google_reviews.text: Perfect place if you want to experience something really Austrian. The space is gorgeous both indoors and outdoors, the employees are very nice and the food is delicious! I only don't give 6 stars because I can't :)

google_reviews.author: Hiroki Ochiai
google_reviews.text: As you can see, schnitzel was a bit too large (my hand size is around 20cm) and you might be struggling for finishing it. Meanwhile, it was tasty and you won't regret it. If you stay in Graz, you really should go! :)

google_reviews.author: John Oliver B. Monghit
google_reviews.text: The servers are really nice and attentive. The food is very flavorful for a reasonable price. Highly recommend!

restaurants.name: Taj Mahal

google_reviews.author: Pavle Zivotic
google_reviews.text:
Good Indian restaurant.
Staff is very friendly.
OK to speak English and make recommendations.
Ambient is good, very cozy.
Food:
Make sure to state how hot you like your food- otherwise it won’t be.
But nice spices on the side, so we had our share of hotness:)
10/10 for ventilation system.
Will come back.

google_reviews.author: Krishnaprasad MG
google_reviews.text: Great food and even greater hospitality! We came just before closing, but the owner warmly welcomed us and let us enjoy our meal without rushing. Truly appreciated!

google_reviews.author: Gerald Sommer
google_reviews.text: Great place to have also authentic Indian specialities, spiced to your demand…wonderful chicken and lamb plus vegetarian dishes - always served with a very lovely smile!

google_reviews.author: Molly Mazey-Richardson
google_reviews.text: The service was amazing and food delicious. The owners are very friendly and happy to help with any requests or questions about the food. Would recommend if you’re in the area!

google_reviews.author: Vel Shankar
google_reviews.text: Being an Indian and giving two stars to a hotel named Tajmahal is very rude. But that's what I feel. The place is like devaluation of Indian culture and food. Food is not at all near to traditional Indian food (not even 10 percent). A very rude staff members who won't allow you even to select your seat. Be ready for disappointment if you are expecting to eat good Indian food.

restaurants.google_name: Taj Mahal Singh OG - Indisches Restaurant

google_reviews.author: Michi Hofer
google_reviews.text: The cuisines are cheaper ,excellent and the staffs , the manager are very friendly .

google_reviews.author: eva wernig
google_reviews.text: Excellent selection of cakes and coffees

google_reviews.author: Mithun Kumar
google_reviews.text: Liked the food and amazing ambience

google_reviews.author: Gernot Gauper
google_reviews.text: Topcafe

google_reviews.author: Karl JH
google_reviews.text: Excellent cakes and delicious drinks that impress with their quality and taste. I used to come here often as a child about 30 years ago – and now, after so long, it feels like meeting up with an old friend. The café has modernized without losing its special charm. The atmosphere is still pleasant, warm, and inviting, yet stylish and contemporary. A perfect blend of tradition and modernity – a place you always love to return to.

google_reviews.author: Leonid Spektor
google_reviews.text:
Friends, this place has turned into a complete disappointment. We actually used to visit it quite often, and everything was good. We came with a group of friends, booked a billiard table, and played as much as we wanted. We could order a drink – beer, coke, or even tea – and everything was perfectly fine.

But just a few days ago, on September 12, 2025, something happened that completely changed our attitude towards this place. When we came with friends, at the entrance an older man – quite heavy, with a belly, probably in his 50s – told us something in German like “not allowed, not allowed.” We didn’t understand, so we asked in English what he meant. He said, “no water.” We were just holding water bottles, and suddenly we were told we couldn’t enter with water. Very strange for this kind of place where people come to play billiards, and we had entered with water many times before without any problem.

Anyway, we thought fine, maybe it’s a rule. We stepped outside, threw away the water, because we wanted to be polite. Then we went inside, to the counter where they hand out billiard balls, and asked if we could play. They said yes, of course, and the hall was actually quite empty – many free tables. At that point, the woman at the bar suddenly says: you must buy a drink. I was shocked. What drink? Why must we buy one? She said: well, you must buy a drink. I said, what kind of nonsense is this? We always just played billiards, and if we wanted drinks, we ordered them later. She didn’t even understand me when I asked in English if this was a new rule, clearly her English was poor.

I told her we absolutely did not want to buy drinks, we just wanted to play billiards. She said we could speak to that same man at the entrance – turns out he was the owner or director! That made it even worse, because his behavior was not only rude but also completely anti-customer. Then the woman added: you need to buy three drinks, since there are three of you – one drink per person. At that point I was completely shocked by the arrogance. All three of us were outraged – why should we be forced to buy three drinks just to play billiards, when we already pay for the table?

So we decided to leave. Luckily, just 300 meters away there’s another billiard place called Brot & Spiele. We went there, had a great time, and told the owner of the first place to his face: we’ll never come back. If they think they can force people to buy drinks in order to play billiards, they’re badly mistaken. With this kind of attitude, the owner will lose all his customers sooner or later.

This was an awful, awful example of customer service, and I honestly would not recommend anyone to go there until they completely rethink their behavior. 👎🏻👎🏻👎🏻👎🏻👎🏻

google_reviews.author: Emsud Grosic
google_reviews.text:
Rustic place, with all the things needed for a night out with friends. The staff is sometimes sarcastic but they are helpful.
Decent cue sticks and pool/snooker tables.
They offer needed drinks and food too.

google_reviews.author: Fay Beening
google_reviews.text: Came here with my friend to play some pool. Initially the downstairs tables were all occupied so we decided to wait for a table, the waitress instantly informed us when a table became available which was really kind. Overall great place for some casual pool!

google_reviews.author: Micky Kula
google_reviews.text:
I went there almost every day for the past month, it really made my time in graz great.
My friends and me enjoyed it a lot, it wasn't pricey... The atmosphere was really nice.
There's a smoking area downstairs and a no smoking area upstairs, and they have football tables there and darts.
There's a place to sit both inside and out side.

google_reviews.author: Konstantin Varbenov
google_reviews.text: Good location and lots of tables, including two for snooker. Friendly reception and staff. However, clean isn't exactly how I'd describe the place, the quality of the snooker tables also wasn't exactly up to expectations. Moderate pricing.

google_reviews.author: Deno vaire
google_reviews.text: A vegetarian's nightmare: not only the "veg" soup was based on meat broth, the fried rice had chicken remains in it and the tofu dish was definitely fried with duck fat. Even our meat lover's stomach rumbled later that evening. Admittedly the soups are very tasty and overall the food was not bad either. Very nice lady running the place, but please overthink your food prep.

google_reviews.author: Livia Morvay
google_reviews.text: Excellent Chinese restaurant, very reasonable prices, flavoursome, big portions, among my top favourites! I love everything, from the giant, fresh spring roll to the "Eight Treasures" - see photo. Each time I come here, there is a group of Chinese people eating their meal, which just goes to show...❤️😊

google_reviews.author: Michael Monschein
google_reviews.text: Very delicious authentic Chinese food. Usually we order take away but they also have a very nice terrace so it is also nice to eat there in summer. Overall the place is not very crowded most of the time so send they are more focused on take away.

google_reviews.author: Matthias Heher
google_reviews.text:
A small restaurant serving authentic Chinese food, very rare to find through all Chinese restaurants. However this one has it. A lot of buses with tourists from China make a stop over here. Nowadays the situation is a little bit different, everything looks like  temporary, you could see that the staff is living in this restaurant, waiting for better times to come.

However the food is still good and the service is fine.

google_reviews.author: Leon L
google_reviews.text: Cheating the price at the end and made everything big portion price.  Ordered only 1kg fish but charged 2 kg.  Targeting tourists

google_reviews.author: Dimas Otaño
google_reviews.text: We ended by chance here, lovely atmosphere, they were preparing for a concert. Ate very very well, the service was always super nice, even considering they were having an extremely busy night. Had the fish soup for starters, the Schnitzel, a lamb stew and home made pumpkin gnocchi with kohlrabi and walnuts. Everything was great!!

google_reviews.author: Cyril Karpenko
google_reviews.text:
I didn't hate it, but it could've been better. The schnitzel was a bit too thick, potatoes were not crunchy and barely seasoned. The atmosphere and service were okay.

It's a cash only place, which is not very clear before you ask for a bill.

google_reviews.author: Ashley Z
google_reviews.text: that is a incredible courtyard... actually I was attracted by scenery immediately rather than food haha. eating outside is amazing in spring. and the staff is really nice and helpful even if to a guest who have no idea with German. Thank you for the great experience — wishing your restaurant all the success it deserves!

google_reviews.author: Travel When not Gardening
google_reviews.text: What a lovely place to finish a sightseeing day in Graz under the lush wisteria with a cold beer pint! The food is delicious, portions are huge and service is patient and efficient. The best place we had dinner in Austria. The only thing to be aware of is that they don't accept cards.

google_reviews.author: Siee Koh
google_reviews.text:
The place is well designed with a huge chair and table. The waiter who served us was friendly and recommended us the special menu pullpork with jasmine rice.
Our favorite dish is the chicken claypot.
Me and my family had a really good time and will come back again.

google_reviews.author: michael kemeny
google_reviews.text: Nestled in the heart of Graz’s, Schmidhofer im Palais offers an unforgettable dining experience. The restaurant’s modern interior with vaulted ceilings and a charming courtyard terrace create the perfect atmosphere for both casual lunches and elegant dinners.

google_reviews.author: Korina Kyriakou
google_reviews.text:
I got taken here for my birthday (I’m vegetarian) and it was one of the best veggie dishes I even had in a higher end restaurant! I had the baked risotto with tofu and pumpkin.
We have been to quite a few higher end restaurants and unfortunately most chefs are not able to put together a well rounded, tasty as well as satisfying vegetarian main dish. So I was pleasantly surprised! I love that they included the tofu as a protein because a veggie protein source is usually lacking from other veggie restaurant meals.
The waiters were very friendly and they knew the menu and wine offerings inside out. We were also offered a starter on the house which I really enjoyed. Again, they had a yummy veggie option!
The only thing I can say that I didn’t like so much is the intense sharp light lamp directly over our table but we found a way of dimming it down which made the atmosphere a bit cozier.
Also the dessert wasn’t really good, it was quite dry, tiny and not chocolatey at all (the chocolate tart). But the rest of the experience was great.

google_reviews.author: Lina Fievet Merkscha
google_reviews.text: The food was very good quality, but not worth the price. We ordered the tuna tartare, unfortunately the ponzu sauce was not like the traditional one I had expected. The other dishes were very good, especially the grilled octopus, and the crème brûlée dessert was excellent.

google_reviews.author: Gulnar
google_reviews.text: Went there for a birthday dinner and the food did feel like a celebration. We took their suggested menu and liked all the dishes.

google_reviews.author: Maciej Kapron
google_reviews.text:
The best Schnitzel in the most cozy part of Graz! As an international guest, part of a larger group celebrating graduation of a family member I must say anyone visiting Graz and looking for a unique experience with Austrian food - this is the place to go.

Located in the centre of town, the restaurant staff makes you feel very welcome and helps you get the most out of the experience, a greating from the restaurant's owner and you are taken to one of many comfortably spaced out tables. On the walls you'll find modern paintings, the kitchen is open so you may take a peak and the place really makes its guests feel very special.

Now onto the food. The menu is well balanced and everybody should find something for themselves. We had the opportunity to try several starters out of which, I would personally recommend the Schöcklfreilanderei. This, coming from a person who may not always pick eggs "soft-style" but if I had a chance, I would have that one over and over. The truffle smell does not hit but rather pleasantly evaporates leaving a bespoke after taste. If this is not to someone's liking, the Rote Rüben Carpacio is another very special item, particularly due to the refreshing taste of the Granatapfel.

For Schnitzel, it's been my second time at Schmidhofer and whilst I would absolutely want to have anything else from their menu, it would be a guilt not going for that one in my next visit (hopefully soon). It tastes absolutely phenomenal. Coming from the land of "Kotlet Schabowy" which is a look-alike brother we have in the country of Vistula river, it's much lighter and more pleasant in combination with lemon and jam - that's an honest review of someone who's likely to have their passport taken away as a result. Going for the Schnitzel, it's best to go for the simplest  potatoes with parsley - it completes this simple but spectacular dish very well.

To round off your experience with a dessert, I tried two options, the Plum Sorbet and the Schmarrn. Both are worth considering and the plum is a refreshing option whilst you do get vanilla ice cream with the Schmarrn and that just makes it a little bit more complete.

Overall, I cannot wait for the next visit to Graz and whilst I already have my favourites, this is a place where you can go ahead and choose anythign out of the menu not to be disappointed. and by all means, if you are in Graz, next to the castle and the Kunsthaus, Schmidhofer is a place you have to book and visit to get a unique flavour of the city and of Austria.

google_reviews.author: Laurenz Tropper
google_reviews.text: A cozy restaurant where you'll always receive a warm welcome from the friendly owner. The outdoor area is a feel-good oasis, especially in warm weather, the likes of which you rarely find elsewhere. I'll definitely be back.

google_reviews.author: Jürgen Lawatsch
google_reviews.text:
A lovely little restaurant in the middle of a residential area. For the past few weeks, they've had an exceptionally friendly, attentive, and funny new waitress (I think her name is Tamara).

Thanks to this wonderful server, my partner and I have become regulars, even though it's not even remotely our neighborhood (we live in Puntigam!).

Therefore, 5 out of 5 stars 🌟

google_reviews.author: Alexandru Cohal
google_reviews.text: The restaurant is listed on Google as a UPS Access Point. I stand in front of the door, where a UPS sticker is visible, and call and ask if the access point is still open. The person responds rudely, simply saying that it should be obvious that it's a cafe.

google_reviews.author: Ulrich Katzenberger
google_reviews.text:
Just popped in for a quick after-work beer.

Nice atmosphere, good beer, and a friendly owner.

google_reviews.author: Andreas Kalcher
google_reviews.text: Great place! I'd happily spend a few hours here and would gladly come back. A recommendation for all food connoisseurs!

restaurants.name: Cooking Wu

google_reviews.author: Ahmad A
google_reviews.text:
I had an overall enjoyable experience and would recommend giving it a try.
